translations.english: The people of Morthal would much rather weave their own horrid tales about my life than simply ask me for the truth.
translations.chinese: 莫萨尔的人们宁愿编织关于我生活的可怕故事，也不愿意简简单单来问我真相。

translations.chinese: 幻象让我继续保持平衡，葛姆。

translations.english: I have done no such thing, nor do I intend to. I simply wish to live my life in peace.
translations.chinese: 我没做过，也不打算做。我只想平静地生活。

translations.english: If you stand before me to accuse me of sacrificing children, or eating the hearts of the dead, you may save your breath.
translations.chinese: 如果你是想站在我面前指责我献祭小孩儿，或者吃死人心的话，那就省省吧。

translations.chinese: 我不会再重复，也不会让它们在这个屋檐下散播。

translations.english: It's no secret that Jarl Idgrod is... different. It's also no secret that there are rumors about her and her visions.

translations.english: That's where we'll find Alduin's Wall.
translations.chinese: 在那里能找到奥杜因之墙。

translations.english: This is what I've been trying to explain. It's in Sky Haven Temple, an ancient Blades sanctuary, hidden deep in the crags of the Reach.
translations.chinese: 这就是我试着解释给你们的。在天佑神殿，那是一座古老的刀锋会圣殿，深藏在瑞驰的峭壁当中。

translations.chinese: 不管怎么说，瑞驰现在是片野蛮之地，遍地都是弃誓者。最好还是小心点。

translations.english: From Riverwood? The road south through Falkreath is the most direct route.
translations.chinese: 从河木镇出发？从南边穿过佛克瑞斯最直接。

translations.english: I... shouldn't say that.

translations.english: If he's worried about some mead-swilling afterlife in Sovngarde, he's free to pursue it. I'll take the glories of the hunt right here.
translations.chinese: 如果他渴望痛饮蜜酒的来世生活，自可去追求，但我还是想在这里享受狩猎的荣耀。

translations.chinese: 有些人无法将控制兽性。陷入了狂乱。这种可怜的状况可能发生在任何人身上。

translations.english: I am here to assist those seeking the wisdom of the College.
translations.chinese: 我在这儿帮助那些寻求学院智慧的人。

translations.english: The more important question is: why are you here?
translations.chinese: 更重要的是，你是为何而来？

translations.english: And if, in the process, my presence helps to deter those who might seek to do harm, so be it.
translations.chinese: 如果在这个过程中，我的存在能阻止那些祸害进去，也不错。

translations.chinese: 多年来，我们因为很多事情而受到了不公的职责，这也不是什么秘密了。

translations.english: Thus we must take certain precautions in order to secure our safety.
translations.chinese: 因此，我们必须采取一定的预防措施，以确保安全。

translations.english: The good people of Skyrim on occasion would rather pass judgment than attempt to understand what we do here.
translations.chinese: 有时候，天际的优秀民众更喜欢直接做出判断，而不是试着理解我们在这里的作为。

translations.english: Oh, forgive me.
translations.chinese: 哦，抱歉。

translations.english: Most who arrive here do so because they have heard of the College beforehand.
translations.chinese: 大多数人来此都是因为有所耳闻。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Oh, forgive me. | ZH: 哦，抱歉。 | SID: 008C1C
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Most who arrive here do so because they have heard of the College beforehand. | ZH: 大多数人来此都是因为有所耳闻。 | SID: 00A061

translations.english: Welcome to the College of Winterhold. I am Faralda, one of the senior Wizards here.
translations.chinese: 欢迎来到冬堡学院。我是法劳达，这里的资深巫师。

translations.english: I trust you found your journey to Winterhold not entirely unpleasant.
translations.chinese: 相信你到冬堡来的旅途并没有什么不愉快吧。

translations.english: If, however, you seek something more, I will be happy to assist you.
translations.chinese: 不过，如果你是来寻求更多帮助的，那我很乐意帮你。

translations.english: Now, I must advise you that if your only purpose in being here is to complain, you would be far better off speaking with the Jarl of Winterhold.
translations.chinese: 现在，我必须给你个建议，如果你来这儿的唯一目的就是抱怨，那最好去找冬堡领主。

translations.english: The way is dangerous, and the gate will not open. You shall not gain entry!

translations.english: Cross the bridge at your own peril!
translations.chinese: 一旦上桥后果自负！

translations.english: Yes, the school of Illusion can be quite influential. Kings have risen to power because of it, and empires have been razed with it.
translations.chinese: 嗯，幻术学派确实很有影响力。多少国王因它掌权，又有多少帝国因它灰飞烟灭。

translations.english: It is true there are some here who have spent years studying the accumulated knowledge of the scrolls.
translations.chinese: 确实，这里的人花了很多年研究卷轴积累的知识。

translations.english: They worry that Tullius is so focused on the war, that he risks forgetting what's best for our people.
translations.chinese: 他们担心图留斯太专注战争，可能会忘记什么才是对我们人民最好的。

translations.english: The real irony is that, while General Tullius is certainly no Nord, the people of Skyrim would be lost without him.
translations.chinese: 但讽刺的是，虽然图留斯将军不是诺德人，但如果没有他，天际人民肯定会迷失方向。

translations.english: Trust is always difficult, especially for my people. Yet we must trust in Tullius' leadership. For what other choice do we have?
translations.chinese: 信任总是很难的，尤其是对我的人来说。但我们必须相信图留斯的领导。我们还有别的选择吗？

translations.english: Hmmm... A question I am all to familiar with. One my very Thanes ask often.
translations.chinese: 嗯……这个问题挺耳熟。我的武卫们经常提起。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: That is all I will say, for it grieves me to speak of it.
translations.chinese: 我只能说这些，因为说这个会让我感到难过。

translations.english: When Ulfric unleashed such fury, my husband he... he simply ceased to be.
translations.chinese: 当乌弗瑞克怒吼过后，我丈夫他……他已经不在了。

translations.english: And so he came before my husband and he... he shouted. With that terrible voice. Like something out of a legend... Or a nightmare.
translations.chinese: 于是他来到我丈夫的面前，然后他……大吼了一声。用那个可怕的声音。就像传说……或是噩梦。

translations.english: Because that's what traitorous cowards do when they desire power.
translations.chinese: 一个叛徒懦夫渴望权力，所以就会这么做了。

translations.english: Ulfric coveted the High King's throne. He thought he deserved it more than Torygg.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克渴望至高王的宝座。他觉得自己比托依格更有资格。

translations.english: Oh, most certainly. At least, when Elisif herself asks.
translations.chinese: 哦，当然了。至少艾利西弗自己问的时候。

translations.english: If you're inquiring whether we have concerns about her age and inexperience, well, let me put it this way...
translations.chinese: 如果你是问，我们是否担心她的年龄阅历不足，好吧，这么跟你说吧……

translations.english: The Thanes have every confidence in General Tullius's leadership.
translations.chinese: 武卫们对图留斯将军的领导很有信心。

translations.english: You'll pay those rumors no heed if you wish to retain your welcome in this city.
translations.chinese: 如果你想在城市里继续受到欢迎，就不要理会那些谣言。

translations.english: Of course he does. What sort of a question is that?
translations.chinese: 当然了。这算哪门子问题？

translations.english: You'd do well to remember that.
translations.chinese: 你最好记住这点。

translations.english: She may be young, but Elisif is the Jarl by right. And here in Skyrim, if nothing else, we respect the traditions of our father's fathers.
translations.chinese: 她也许还很年轻，但艾利西弗是理所当然的领主。在天际，我们遵循祖先的传统。

translations.english: Maybe you've been listening to Erikur. There's been loose talk among some of the Thanes, and I suspect he's the cause of it.
translations.chinese: 也许你是听艾瑞库尔的话听多了。部分武卫之间有些流言蜚语，我怀疑他就是罪魁祸首。

translations.chinese: 还有待观察。按理说，她有成为天际至高女王的合法权利。

translations.english: I've only been a part of the Red Wave's crew for a few weeks, but I've already learned to stay out of Captain Safia's way.
translations.chinese: 我加入赤红波浪号才几周，但我已经学会了不去妨碍萨非亚船长。

translations.chinese: 忘记美酒、女人和财富，只需给我一片宁静的大海和一本好书，我就知足了。

translations.chinese: 我听说阿多纳托·莱奥特利住在风舵城。我读过他的一些作品。但愿有机会见他一面。

translations.english: My father was all the family I ever had. I felt so lost when he died. But the crew of the Red Wave's my family now.
translations.chinese: 我父亲是我唯一的家人。他去世的时候我很失落。但赤红波浪的船员们现在就是我的家人。

translations.english: I've seen some truly wondrous sights since I took to the seas. I had no idea a man could die in so many ways...

translations.english: I hail from Cyrodiil, but after a... misunderstanding with the law, I needed a swift change of scenery.
translations.chinese: 我从希罗帝尔来，但在一次……对法律的误解之后，我只能迅速改换地方了。

translations.english: This land is riven by war, and her people suffer for it. The Stormcloaks are a blight on Skyrim, and like any blight... must be purged.
translations.chinese: 这片土地被战争撕裂，人民为此受苦。风暴斗篷就是天际的枯萎病，就该像其他病症一样……必须被清除。

translations.english: Not yet, no. Although it is true my husband Torygg was the High King, and I am his widow... now is not the time to lay claim to such a title.
translations.chinese: 还不是呢。虽然我丈夫托依格确实是至高王，而我是他的遗孀……但现在还不是宣称自己拥有这一头衔的时候。

translations.english: Only then will I take my rightful place as High Queen.
translations.chinese: 只有到那时，我才能获得作为至高女王应有的地位。

translations.english: Enough to know that it's not worth it.
translations.chinese: 足以让我知道这一切不值得。

translations.english: Ranmir's a good boy, and he doesn't deserve what fate pushed his way, but there's only so far I'll go to risk my neck.
translations.chinese: 兰米尔是个好小伙子，不该受命运摆布，但我也只能帮到这里了。

translations.english: He said he'd even gone to Riften to try and find the bastard. I think maybe he was hoping they'd just kill him, and that'd be the end of it.
translations.chinese: 他说想去裂谷城找那个混蛋。我想他可能是打算让那帮人杀了他，一了百了。

translations.english: He ranted at me, how I didn't know what he's been through, how Isabelle broke his heart when she ran off with some thief named Vex...
translations.chinese: 冲着我大吼大叫，说我不知道他经历了什么，伊莎贝尔和一个叫小烦的小偷私奔了，伤了他的心。

translations.english: One night Ranmir was in here like always, drinking himself to death.
translations.chinese: 一天晚上兰米尔像往常一样在这里买醉。

translations.english: When I told him there was no more Honningbrew, that he'd drank it all, he got angry.
translations.chinese: 当我告诉他蜜之酿已经被他喝光的时候，他很生气。

translations.english: Riften and thieves means trouble. Just leave it alone.
translations.chinese: 裂谷城和盗贼就意味着麻烦。离那里远点。

translations.english: Dagur never heard any of this, and I chose to keep it to myself. I'm only telling you so you don't get into trouble.
translations.chinese: 达古尔从没听说过这些，我选择保守秘密。我只告诉你，免得你惹上麻烦。

translations.chinese: 我爱他，愿他被保佑，但他不知道事情的全部。

translations.english: You'll wind up getting yourself killed. Dagur shouldn't have said a word about it.
translations.chinese: 你会把自己害死的。达古尔不该说这事。

translations.english: I'll tell you what I told him -- stay out of it. It's none of your business. Those aren't folks you want to get tangled up with.
translations.chinese: 我告诉你我跟他说过的话吧——别插手。这不关你的事。你可不会想和那些人纠缠。

translations.english: Dagur's been talking at you, hasn't he? Gotten you roped into his little plan to fix Ranmir's life?
translations.chinese: 达古尔一直在和你聊对吧？把你拉进改变兰米尔生活的小计划里？

translations.english: Oh, no.
translations.chinese: 哦，不。

translations.chinese: 不行不行。我建议你就此打住。我不想看到任何人因此受伤。

translations.english: Is there anything else you can tell me about Isabelle Rolaine?
translations.chinese: 和我说说伊莎贝拉·罗莱尼的事。

translations.chinese: 看到你来工作真令我惊讶。穆鲁什昨天差点把你胳膊打折了。

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We will keep each other safe. No matter what. | ZH: 无论发生什么，我们都会保护好彼此。 | SID: 00E188

translations.english: What kind of talk is this? The man I married would never speak of leaving his home.
translations.chinese: 这是什么话？我嫁的那个男人从没说过要离开他的家。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B021A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What kind of talk is this? The man I married would never speak of leaving his home. | ZH: 这是什么话？我嫁的那个男人从没说过要离开他的家。 | SID: 000DC4

translations.english: We can't do that. Every soldier we send to hunt dragons is one more man that can't defend the Reach.
translations.chinese: 我们不能这么做。我们每多派一个士兵去猎龙，就多了一个没法保卫瑞驰的人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: More settlements have sent riders to say dragons are being spotted throughout Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 越来越多的定居点飞骑来报说天际有巨龙出没了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B021C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: More settlements have sent riders to say dragons are being spotted throughout Skyrim. | ZH: 越来越多的定居点飞骑来报说天际有巨龙出没了。 | SID: 0024C4

translations.english: Ain't nothing for it. They're still in charge.
translations.chinese: 说这些有什么用。他们还是统治者。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B021D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ain't nothing for it. They're still in charge. | ZH: 说这些有什么用。他们还是统治者。 | SID: 00F82A

translations.english: Killing dragons isn't defending the Reach?
translations.chinese: 屠龙就不是保护瑞驰了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B021E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Killing dragons isn't defending the Reach? | ZH: 屠龙就不是保护瑞驰了吗？ | SID: 008BA1

translations.english: Got any ale or mead?
translations.chinese: 有麦芽酒或者蜜酒吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B026C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Got any ale or mead? | ZH: 有麦芽酒或者蜜酒吗？ | SID: 00C621

translations.english: You'd better. Because until you do, you don't get a single coin from us... and you won't be able to use our fences.
translations.chinese: 最好这样。因为在这之前，我们不会分你一分钱……也不能利用我们的人脉。

translations.english: Now get out of here and don't come back until your pockets are full.
translations.chinese: 现在赶紧滚，等把袋子装满了再回来。

translations.english: Anything you steal, you bring it straight to me.
translations.chinese: 偷来的东西直接给我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Anything you steal, you bring it straight to me. | ZH: 偷来的东西直接给我。 | SID: 0063C3

translations.english: I'm going to make this short and sweet, because frankly I don't think you deserve another shot.
translations.chinese: 我就长话短说吧，因为我确实觉得你不值得再获得一次机会。

translations.english: You've broken the rules and now you need to pay... and it's going to cost you quite a bit.
translations.chinese: 你坏了规矩，现在得付出代价……而且还是得花不少钱哦。

translations.english: Well, well. If it isn't Brynjolf's little protege.
translations.chinese: 哎呀呀。这不是布林乔夫的小徒弟么。

agentText:

translations.english: Next time you decide to pull a stunt like that again, just remember how much it hurt to give this away.
translations.chinese: 下次想耍花招的时候，记得这件事有多赔钱。

translations.english: It's all here. Well, congratulations. You're one of us again.
translations.chinese: 数目没错。好，祝贺你，又成为我们的一员了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B038E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Next time you decide to pull a stunt like that again, just remember how much it hurt to give this away. | ZH: 下次想耍花招的时候，记得这件事有多赔钱。 | SID: 003C90
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: It's all here. Well, congratulations. You're one of us again. | ZH: 数目没错。好，祝贺你，又成为我们的一员了。 | SID: 008B8A

translations.english: Again? Didn't we teach you enough of a lesson the first time?
translations.chinese: 又来了？第一次的教训不够多？

translations.english: Anyway, you know the drill. You want to buy back in, and it'll cost you.
translations.chinese: 不管怎么样，知道该怎么做吧。想要回来就付出代价。

translations.english: I suppose it's tough for an old dog to learn new tricks.
translations.chinese: 看来让老狗学新把戏也挺难的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B038F]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Anyway, you know the drill. You want to buy back in, and it'll cost you. | ZH: 不管怎么样，知道该怎么做吧。想要回来就付出代价。 | SID: 00834D
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I suppose it's tough for an old dog to learn new tricks. | ZH: 看来让老狗学新把戏也挺难的。 | SID: 008B7F

translations.english: Pick pockets, knock over houses... heck, I don't care if you have to bust into a palace. You do what you have to do to come up with the coin.
translations.chinese: 扒包、闯空门……切，我不管你是要闯哪座宫殿。自己想办法弄钱去吧。

translations.english: I'd say it's time you put your nose to the grindstone and figure it out for yourself. You claim to be a thief... act like one.
translations.chinese: 我想你还是该去埋头苦干自己想辙了。你可是个小偷啊……至少是像。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B0390]

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I'd say it's time you put your nose to the grindstone and figure it out for yourself. You claim to be a thief... act like one. | ZH: 我想你还是该去埋头苦干自己想辙了。你可是个小偷啊……至少是像。 | SID: 00CF34

translations.english: I hope you come up with that gold soon.
translations.chinese: 希望你是带着钱回来的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B0391]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I hope you come up with that gold soon. | ZH: 希望你是带着钱回来的。 | SID: 003BC8

translations.english: You have the gold yet or what?
translations.chinese: 拿到钱了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B0392]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You have the gold yet or what? | ZH: 拿到钱了吗？ | SID: 004AEB

translations.english: I believe you owe the Guild something.
translations.chinese: 我想你还欠公会些什么吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B0393]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I believe you owe the Guild something. | ZH: 我想你还欠公会些什么吧。 | SID: 002941

translations.english: Did you think we'd accept a heartfelt apology and let bygones be bygones?
translations.chinese: 你以为我们会接受你衷心的道歉，然后一笑了之吗？

translations.english: This is the Thieves Guild, genius. How do you think? With gold. A lot of gold.
translations.chinese: 这里是盗贼公会哟，你个小天才。你觉得呢？当然是用金币了。大量的金币。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B0394]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Did you think we'd accept a heartfelt apology and let bygones be bygones? | ZH: 你以为我们会接受你衷心的道歉，然后一笑了之吗？ | SID: 008B67
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: This is the Thieves Guild, genius. How do you think? With gold. A lot of gold. | ZH: 这里是盗贼公会哟，你个小天才。你觉得呢？当然是用金币了。大量的金币。 | SID: 008B68

translations.english: Speak to Vex. We have nothing else to talk about.
translations.chinese: 去找小烦。我们没什么好说的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B0395]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Speak to Vex. We have nothing else to talk about. | ZH: 去找小烦。我们没什么好说的。 | SID: 005B3F

translations.english: I'm taking you out of the game for now. No jobs will be offered and you won't be able to fence your goods.
translations.chinese: 我真是不能让你掺和进来了。没有工作，就没法销赃。

translations.english: Speak to Vex to make the proper reparations if you want back in. Now get out of my sight.
translations.chinese: 如果想回来工作，那就去找小烦谈谈，赔个合适的数目。现在躲远点。

translations.english: The Guild will not tolerate the kind of behavior you've been displaying. Too much is at stake.
translations.chinese: 公会不会容忍你这种行为。风险太大了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B0396]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I'm taking you out of the game for now. No jobs will be offered and you won't be able to fence your goods. | ZH: 我真是不能让你掺和进来了。没有工作，就没法销赃。 | SID: 003B32
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Speak to Vex to make the proper reparations if you want back in. Now get out of my sight. | ZH: 如果想回来工作，那就去找小烦谈谈，赔个合适的数目。现在躲远点。 | SID: 008B53
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: The Guild will not tolerate the kind of behavior you've been displaying. Too much is at stake. | ZH: 公会不会容忍你这种行为。风险太大了。 | SID: 00E8E9

translations.english: Until you're done with Vex, we don't have anything to discuss.
translations.chinese: 在你搞定小烦前，没什么好谈的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B0397]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Until you're done with Vex, we don't have anything to discuss. | ZH: 在你搞定小烦前，没什么好谈的。 | SID: 0010D0

translations.english: You've done it now, whelp. You broke the rules and now you're knee deep in it.
translations.chinese: 你闯祸了，小家伙。违反了规矩，现在陷在里面拔不出来了。

translations.english: You want to get back into our graces, you need to talk to Vex. She'll set you straight.
translations.chinese: 想要重新获取我们的欢心，就去找小烦吧。她会纠正你的。

translations.english: That means your out. No jobs, no payouts... no nothing.
translations.chinese: 那就意味着你出局了。没有差事，没有报酬……啥都没有。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B0398]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: You've done it now, whelp. You broke the rules and now you're knee deep in it. | ZH: 你闯祸了，小家伙。违反了规矩，现在陷在里面拔不出来了。 | SID: 002E79
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: You want to get back into our graces, you need to talk to Vex. She'll set you straight. | ZH: 想要重新获取我们的欢心，就去找小烦吧。她会纠正你的。 | SID: 006F1E

translations.english: Sorry. We got nothin' to talk about. Vex will straighten you out.
translations.chinese: 抱歉，咱们没什么好谈的。小烦会帮你摆平的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B0399]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Sorry. We got nothin' to talk about. Vex will straighten you out. | ZH: 抱歉，咱们没什么好谈的。小烦会帮你摆平的。 | SID: 003E89

translations.english: Are you crazy? What were you thinkin'? You can't just go around doin' things the way you please!
translations.chinese: 你疯了吗？想什么呢？你不能太随心所欲了！

translations.english: Now we have to kick you out until things cool down. Can't give you any jobs or payouts for goods.
translations.chinese: 现在我们得把你排除出去，直到事情平息下来。没有工作也没有货款。

translations.english: Go talk to Vex. She'll tell you the why's and how's if you want to get back in.
translations.chinese: 去找小烦谈谈。如果你想回来，她会告诉你原因和方法的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B039A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Are you crazy? What were you thinkin'? You can't just go around doin' things the way you please! | ZH: 你疯了吗？想什么呢？你不能太随心所欲了！ | SID: 006580
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Now we have to kick you out until things cool down. Can't give you any jobs or payouts for goods. | ZH: 现在我们得把你排除出去，直到事情平息下来。没有工作也没有货款。 | SID: 008B4D
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Go talk to Vex. She'll tell you the why's and how's if you want to get back in. | ZH: 去找小烦谈谈。如果你想回来，她会告诉你原因和方法的。 | SID: 00EBA8

translations.english: Until you get back into the Guild's graces, we have nothing to speak about.
translations.chinese: 在你被公会重新接纳前，咱们没什么好谈的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B039B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Until you get back into the Guild's graces, we have nothing to speak about. | ZH: 在你被公会重新接纳前，咱们没什么好谈的。 | SID: 002A9A

translations.english: Straighten yourself out with the Guild and then maybe we can talk.
translations.chinese: 跟公会讲清楚，然后在说吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B039C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Straighten yourself out with the Guild and then maybe we can talk. | ZH: 跟公会讲清楚，然后在说吧。 | SID: 00A24E

translations.english: Don't want to know what you did and I don't care. Just keep away from me.
translations.chinese: 我不想知道你干了什么，也不在乎。离我远点。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B039D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Don't want to know what you did and I don't care. Just keep away from me. | ZH: 我不想知道你干了什么，也不在乎。离我远点。 | SID: 008B49

translations.english: I may be new around here, but at least I know how to follow the rules.
translations.chinese: 我也许是个新来的，但也知道该遵守规矩。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B039E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I may be new around here, but at least I know how to follow the rules. | ZH: 我也许是个新来的，但也知道该遵守规矩。 | SID: 000453

translations.english: And here I expected you to hop the next caravan to Morrowind. What have you got for me?
translations.chinese: 我还以为你会搭下一班大篷车去晨风呢。给我带什么来了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B039F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And here I expected you to hop the next caravan to Morrowind. What have you got for me? | ZH: 我还以为你会搭下一班大篷车去晨风呢。给我带什么来了？ | SID: 008B82

translations.english: I hope you brought a little something for me.
translations.chinese: 希望你给我带了些小礼物。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B03A0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I hope you brought a little something for me. | ZH: 希望你给我带了些小礼物。 | SID: 003A0C

translations.english: First, let's count the coin, then we can get back to business.
translations.chinese: 先数数钱，再来谈正事。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B03A1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: First, let's count the coin, then we can get back to business. | ZH: 先数数钱，再来谈正事。 | SID: 00AF1F

translations.english: But now it's too late for escape. The dragon is upon me - fire and darkness descending like a thunderbolt.
translations.chinese: 但想要逃走已经太迟了。巨龙向我扑来，火与暗如雷霆般降临。

translations.english: And not just any dragon, but the Dragon - Alduin, the World-Eater, the dragon who devours both the living and the dead.
translations.chinese: 那不是别的龙，而是——奥杜因，世界吞噬者，吞食生者死灵之龙。

translations.english: Then, finally, realization and horror arrive together. The orange is flame, heat. The sound a roar, a challenge in their ancient tongue.
translations.chinese: 最后，意识和恐惧同时出现。眼前的橙色都是炽热的火焰。耳边的咆哮是用他们古老语言发来的挑战。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B0BBF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: But now it's too late for escape. The dragon is upon me - fire and darkness descending like a thunderbolt. | ZH: 但想要逃走已经太迟了。巨龙向我扑来，火与暗如雷霆般降临。 | SID: 003BC4
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: And not just any dragon, but the Dragon - Alduin, the World-Eater, the dragon who devours both the living and the dead. | ZH: 那不是别的龙，而是——奥杜因，世界吞噬者，吞食生者死灵之龙。 | SID: 008B2E
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Then, finally, realization and horror arrive together. The orange is flame, heat. The sound a roar, a challenge in their ancient tongue. | ZH: 最后，意识和恐惧同时出现。眼前的橙色都是炽热的火焰。耳边的咆哮是用他们古老语言发来的挑战。 | SID: 00F856

translations.english: And a sound, too. Distinct and indistinct. Not thunder... something else. Something I should recognize, but in the dream I cannot place it.
translations.chinese: 还有声音。又独特、又模糊。不像是雷声……或者别的东西。我一定记得那是什么，可在梦里又想不起来。

translations.english: Then it came again, this time more distinct. Closer. Definitely not lightning now. It was orange - brilliant orange, the color of hearth and dawn.
translations.chinese: 然后它又来了。这次更清晰了。不是什么闪电，那是橙色的，如炉火和黎明一般的亮橙色。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B0BC0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: And a sound, too. Distinct and indistinct. Not thunder... something else. Something I should recognize, but in the dream I cannot place it. | ZH: 还有声音。又独特、又模糊。不像是雷声……或者别的东西。我一定记得那是什么，可在梦里又想不起来。 | SID: 008D86
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Then it came again, this time more distinct. Closer. Definitely not lightning now. It was orange - brilliant orange, the color of hearth and dawn. | ZH: 然后它又来了。这次更清晰了。不是什么闪电，那是橙色的，如炉火和黎明一般的亮橙色。 | SID: 00A04D

translations.english: Then came the flash of light - just on the horizon, within the clouds that mark the border between worlds.
translations.chinese: 接着，一道闪光——就出现在地平线那端世界尽头的云层里。

translations.english: It could have been lightning, but there was no thunder. In the dream, the sense of foreboding grew, but I could never wake up.
translations.chinese: 可能是闪电，却又听不见雷声。不祥的预感越发浓烈，我却一直没法从梦里醒来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B0BC1]

translations.english: Now the crystal needs to be focused. It was created so far away, we knew that some adjustments would have to be made.
translations.chinese: 现在需要用水晶进行聚焦。年代有些久远了，需要做些必要的调整。

translations.english: Heating and cooling the crystal will cause it to expand or contract, which will change how the light passes through it.
translations.chinese: 对水晶进行加热或冷却可以导致它膨胀或收缩，这样就会改变光通过它的方式。

translations.english: There should be a few basic tomes around here somewhere in case your training is even more sub-standard than I've heard.
translations.chinese: 万一你的训练比我听说的还差的话，那边有几本基础魔法书。

translations.english: You'll need to use spells to do that. Being from the College, I assume you know them already.
translations.chinese: 你需要些魔法才能做到。身为学院成员，你应该很熟悉。

translations.chinese: 你得让水晶进行正确聚焦。冷热均可影响它。简单的集中法术就可以了。

translations.chinese: 你需要让上面的控件对齐镜子。等一切排列好，光线就会通过水晶反射过来。

translations.english: If the world is meant to end, so be it. Let it end and be reborn.
translations.chinese: 如果世界注定毁灭，那就顺其自然吧。让它结束、重生。

translations.english: Those who overthrew him in ancient times only postponed the day of reckoning, they did not stop it.
translations.chinese: 远古时期推翻他的人只是推迟了清算的到来，却没能阻止它。

translations.english: Have you considered that Alduin was not meant to be defeated?
translations.chinese: 你有没有想过？奥杜因不是注定要被打败。

translations.english: What I want is irrelevant. This Shout was used once before, was it not? And here we are again.
translations.chinese: 我怎么想无所谓。这种龙吼以前用过了，结果怎么样？我们还不是要再用。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Have you considered that Alduin was not meant to be defeated? | ZH: 你有没有想过？奥杜因不是注定要被打败。 | SID: 0089C8
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: What I want is irrelevant. This Shout was used once before, was it not? And here we are again. | ZH: 我怎么想无所谓。这种龙吼以前用过了，结果怎么样？我们还不是要再用。 | SID: 0089CB

translations.english: This is why so few follow it, and why the world is as it is.
translations.chinese: 这就是很少有人遵循的原因，也是世界变成这般模样的根源。

translations.english: Those who are ignorant find the Way of the Voice easy to ridicule.
translations.chinese: 那些对吼声之道一无所知的人只会嘲笑。

translations.english: Yes, yes. My staff, take it. Kill something pretty with it.
translations.chinese: 对，对。我的法杖，拿着吧。用它多杀几个人。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B3D70]

translations.chinese: 快到了！已经很近了！

Translations:

translations.chinese: 就是这样！你已经找到了其中一个了！

translations.english: So, what is it? What have you done?
translations.chinese: 怎么回事？你做了什么？

translations.english: Well, explain yourself!
translations.chinese: 好了，从实招来！

translations.english: Did you know what we were attempting? Are you here to make sure your plan worked, that our efforts have been for nothing?
translations.chinese: 你知道我们在做什么吗？你是来确认你的计划成功，我们的努力白费吗？

translations.english: This is... he should not have gone alone.
translations.chinese: 这……他不该单独行动的。

translations.english: Go. Grieve in whatever way you know.
translations.chinese: 走吧。用你的方式去哀悼吧。

translations.english: Thank you for telling me. This is a day where our souls must cry, and our hearts will answer.
translations.chinese: 感谢你告诉了我。今天我们的灵魂必然哭泣，我们的心也会做出回应。

translations.english: Skjor... I always thought of him as invincible.
translations.chinese: 斯科约尔……我一直以为他是不可战胜的。

translations.english: Truly, one of our great fires has gone out.
translations.chinese: 说真的，我们中最强大的一团火焰熄灭了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B3DFF]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Truly, one of our great fires has gone out. | ZH: 说真的，我们中最强大的一团火焰熄灭了。 | SID: 00F566

translations.english: He was the one I looked up to. I need to find my brother.
translations.chinese: 他是我很崇敬的人。我得去找我兄弟了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B3E00]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: He was the one I looked up to. I need to find my brother. | ZH: 他是我很崇敬的人。我得去找我兄弟了。 | SID: 00DFDF

translations.english: He has joined the honored dead. This will be a difficult time for us all.
translations.chinese: 他加入了光荣的死者之列。这段时间对我们来说都很难过。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B3E01]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: He has joined the honored dead. This will be a difficult time for us all. | ZH: 他加入了光荣的死者之列。这段时间对我们来说都很难过。 | SID: 008968

translations.english: Unfortunate. He was an excellent sparring partner. I'll miss our training sessions.
translations.chinese: 真不幸。他是个不错的陪练搭档。我会怀念我们一同训练的时光。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B3E02]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Unfortunate. He was an excellent sparring partner. I'll miss our training sessions. | ZH: 真不幸。他是个不错的陪练搭档。我会怀念我们一同训练的时光。 | SID: 008967

translations.english: I... I can only imagine Aela's anger. I'll make sure not to cross her for a while.
translations.chinese: 我……能想象到艾拉的愤怒。我最近得少惹她了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B3E03]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I... I can only imagine Aela's anger. I'll make sure not to cross her for a while. | ZH: 我……能想象到艾拉的愤怒。我最近得少惹她了。 | SID: 008966

translations.english: He did? That's... I'm surprised.
translations.chinese: 他死了？这……太令人惊讶了。

translations.english: I wonder who will replace him in the Circle?
translations.chinese: 我想知道圆环中有谁能取代他？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B3E04]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: He did? That's... I'm surprised. | ZH: 他死了？这……太令人惊讶了。 | SID: 00236C
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I wonder who will replace him in the Circle? | ZH: 我想知道圆环中有谁能取代他？ | SID: 005076

translations.english: Tragic, of course.
translations.chinese: 实属悲哀。

translations.english: But, well. Fires go out. Others ignite. Skjor inspired many with his life. Perhaps his death can continue to inspire.
translations.chinese: 但是，火虽然熄灭了，总会有别人再点燃。斯科约尔用自己的一生激励了很多人。也许他的死能够继续鼓舞人心。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B3E05]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Tragic, of course. | ZH: 实属悲哀。 | SID: 008962
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: But, well. Fires go out. Others ignite. Skjor inspired many with his life. Perhaps his death can continue to inspire. | ZH: 但是，火虽然熄灭了，总会有别人再点燃。斯科约尔用自己的一生激励了很多人。也许他的死能够继续鼓舞人心。 | SID: 00EA0A

translations.english: I... I'll get his things in order.
translations.chinese: 我……我会把他的遗物整理好。

translations.english: Oh my. He was always so kind to me. A bit rough around the edges, but a good man.
translations.chinese: 哦，天。他一直对我不错。虽然有些粗鲁，但确实是个好人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B3E06]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I... I'll get his things in order. | ZH: 我……我会把他的遗物整理好。 | SID: 00095B
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Oh my. He was always so kind to me. A bit rough around the edges, but a good man. | ZH: 哦，天。他一直对我不错。虽然有些粗鲁，但确实是个好人。 | SID: 00CAF0

translations.english: Let's go talk with her. Stay close. Talk of assassins has the guards jumpy. They might attack you if you're not standing near me.
translations.chinese: 我们去和她谈谈。跟紧点。一谈到刺客，卫兵们都很紧张。如果你不站在我旁边，他们可能会攻击你。

translations.english: I bet she would feel safer. And hopefully you wouldn't have to baby sit her for long. Once she calms down, she might start thinking straight again.
translations.chinese: 我打赌她会更安全了。希望你不用照顾她太久。等她冷静了，也就会清醒过来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B3E25]

translations.english: If there's someone in the palace who can speak for you and wouldn't mind walking you around. Great. Lead me to him.
translations.chinese: 如果宫殿里有人能替你说话，不介意带你四处走走。好吧，带我去找他。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B3E26]
Translations:

translations.english: Come in, come in! Shut the door behind you!
translations.chinese: 进来，进来！把门关上！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B3E27]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Come in, come in! Shut the door behind you! | ZH: 进来，进来！把门关上！ | SID: 00894D

translations.english: I thought you didn't believe I was in danger!
translations.chinese: 我看你根本不信我有危险！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B3E28]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I thought you didn't believe I was in danger! | ZH: 我看你根本不信我有危险！ | SID: 008942

translations.english: I'm afraid you'll have to come back later. I've been given strict instructions that no one be allowed to trouble Lady Elisif.
translations.chinese: 恐怕你要以后再来。我奉严命，任何人都不能打扰艾利西弗夫人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B3E29]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm afraid you'll have to come back later. I've been given strict instructions that no one be allowed to trouble Lady Elisif. | ZH: 恐怕你要以后再来。我奉严命，任何人都不能打扰艾利西弗夫人。 | SID: 001F77

translations.english: Stay close and in plain view. No funny business unless you want a few inches of steel in your belly.
translations.chinese: 光明正大地跟紧点。除非想被刀插穿肚子，否则别开玩笑。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B3E2B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Stay close and in plain view. No funny business unless you want a few inches of steel in your belly. | ZH: 光明正大地跟紧点。除非想被刀插穿肚子，否则别开玩笑。 | SID: 00031B

translations.english: I know. The poor girl's fright has left her bereft of reason. But there's no talking her out of it. I fear she'll be locked in there for days.
translations.chinese: 我也知道。可怜女孩的恐惧已经压制了理智。想说服她是没戏了。我担心她会把自己关在里面好几天。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B3E2C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I know. The poor girl's fright has left her bereft of reason. But there's no talking her out of it. I fear she'll be locked in there for days. | ZH: 我也知道。可怜女孩的恐惧已经压制了理智。想说服她是没戏了。我担心她会把自己关在里面好几天。 | SID: 00ADBF

translations.english: Go. Away. Please!
translations.chinese: 走开，求你了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B3E2D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Go. Away. Please! | ZH: 走开，求你了！ | SID: 007F47

translations.english: Look at me ramble... Well, I guess I'll go about my business sulking in here. You can stand over there in the corner watching for assassins.
translations.chinese: 只是看我闲逛吗……好吧，我可能还是有些生气吧。你可以在角落里防备刺客。

translations.english: I'm glad they finally believed me. About the assassin I mean. It's been so hard since my Torygg passed. No one takes me seriously.
translations.chinese: 很高兴他们终于相信有刺客的事了。自从托依格过世，我过得很艰难，没人把我当回事。

translations.english: So how's this work exactly? Do you just kind of stand there on the look out? That's what Bolgeir does. Well, he sort of looms more than stands.
translations.chinese: 所以这工作到底是干什么？就这么站住傻看着吗？波盖尔就是这么干的。好吧，与其说是站着，不如说是在摸鱼。

translations.english: Bolgeir's loyal, but even he doesn't do what I ask. Case in point, this whole assassin thing. Well at least I have you now.
translations.chinese: 波盖尔很忠诚，但他也不听我的。比如，这个暗杀事件。但至少我还有你。

translations.english: Private quarters are strictly off limits. You have been warned.

translations.english: Well, she needs to eat. I don't think she even knows where the kitchen is. And milady isn't exactly going to remove her own chamber pot, now is she?
translations.chinese: 她要吃饭的嘛。我估计她连厨房在哪都不知道。再说，领主也不能自己出去倒夜壶吧？

translations.english: She lets the servants in? Seems like a gap in security that could be exploited.
translations.chinese: 她让仆人进去？听起来似乎有机可乘啊。

translations.english: Even still, I make a point of announcing myself when I enter her room now. I spooked her so bad last time she almost threw the chamber pot at me!
translations.chinese: 即便如此，现在我想进去，都得通禀一声。上次把她吓着了，差点把夜壶扔我身上！

translations.english: She's locked herself in her room not letting anyone in. Well, except for us servants. She's afraid of assassins coming to get her.
translations.chinese: 她把自己锁在房间里，不需任何人进去。除了仆人。她害怕有刺客。

translations.chinese: 请允许我把这个送给您，这是我第一次品尝您的菜的时候用的叉子。还有我为您收集的这些食材。

translations.english: I've risked life and limb so that you may create another masterpiece. Make sure to think of me when you use them!
translations.chinese: 我冒着生命危险让您创造新的杰作。当您使用它们的时候可一定要想起我啊！

translations.chinese: 哦，我的天！是你？真是太荣幸了！你的美食让我看到了世界的美妙。

translations.english: I thought Enmon and Mean had a little girl, but I haven't seen her in a while.
translations.chinese: 恩蒙和梅娜家有个小女孩，但有段时间没见到了。

agentText:

translations.english: I think you might be looking for Enmon.
translations.chinese: 你是在找恩蒙吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B7866]

translations.chinese: 这和我我有什么关系？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B7867]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And what's that have to do with me? | ZH: 这和我我有什么关系？ | SID: 00DDE6

translations.english: Yeah, we're all looking for something.
translations.chinese: 是啊，我们都在找东西。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B7868]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yeah, we're all looking for something. | ZH: 是啊，我们都在找东西。 | SID: 00F00F

translations.english: You know, I think you're right.
translations.chinese: 我觉得你是对的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B810C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You know, I think you're right. | ZH: 我觉得你是对的。 | SID: 00F2C5

translations.english: No, I'm afraid I don't know anything of the sort.
translations.chinese: 不，恐怕我对此并不清楚。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B810D]
Translations:

translations.english: But I sense that perhaps you're after more than just that.
translations.chinese: 但我觉得你想要的可不止这些。

translations.english: Ha! Humor is often in short supply here.
translations.chinese: 哈！这里确实很缺幽默感。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: A small test, if you will.
translations.chinese: 如果你愿意的话，可以进行一个小测试。

translations.english: Not just anyone is allowed inside. Those wishing to enter must show some degree of skill with magic.
translations.chinese: 不是谁都能进去的。想要加入必须表现出一定程度的魔法才能。

translations.english: It would seem that the College has what you seek. The question now is what you can offer the College.
translations.chinese: 看来学院有吸引你的东西。现在的问题是你能给学院带来什么。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Ah, the immortal plane. It is said to be the source of all magic. This is a noble goal, indeed.
translations.chinese: 啊，不朽位面。据说是一切魔法的源泉。这目标确实崇高。

translations.english: And most of us are quite satisfied with that.
translations.chinese: 我们大多数人还是对此很满意的。

translations.english: We don't mistake that for acceptance, though. Odds are they're simply too afraid to confront us directly.
translations.chinese: 不过，我们不会把这误认为接受。他们可能只是太过害怕，不敢直面我们。

translations.english: No, not recently at least.
translations.chinese: 不，至少最近没有。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: No, not recently at least. | ZH: 不，至少最近没有。 | SID: 00E47D

translations.english: Well, yes. Probably.
translations.chinese: 嗯对。有可能。

translations.english: I mean, yes. Certainly it is, but that doesn't matter now, because I know you're hoarding something even more important at your College.
translations.chinese: 我是说，没错。当然在那里，但现在已经不重要了。因为我已经知道你们学院里藏了更重要的东西。

translations.english: The Council will be informed of this. They will find out what you're up to.
translations.chinese: 等把这事通知议会，他们会找出你们在干什么的。

agentText:

translations.english: Is there some way I can assist you?
translations.chinese: 我能帮上什么忙吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B8114]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Is there some way I can assist you? | ZH: 我能帮上什么忙吗？ | SID: 008C16

translations.english: We are the only group left in Skyrim dedicated to the study of the arcane.
translations.chinese: 我们是天际中唯一致力于研究奥术的组织。

translations.english: There are others who study, to be sure, but they do so in private, and often in secret.
translations.chinese: 当然，还有一些私下研究的人，而且常常是偷偷研究。

translations.english: You'll want to speak with Mirabelle Ervine right away. And welcome to the College of Winterhold.
translations.chinese: 你得马上和米拉贝勒·厄文谈谈。欢迎来到冬堡学院。

translations.english: Well, you clearly possess the minimum aptitude required. Congratulations. I'll escort you up to the gate.
translations.chinese: 嗯，显然你达到了天赋的最低要求。恭喜。我来送你到大门口。

translations.english: Your trickery won't confuse me!
translations.chinese: 你的诡计迷惑不了我！

translations.english: I think I've discovered more here than I could've hoped to.
translations.chinese: 我觉得我在这里发现了比我预期更多的东西。

translations.english: Am I? Am I?
translations.chinese: 我？我？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B8117]

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Am I? Am I? | ZH: 我？我？ | SID: 008705

translations.english: I think you'll be a superb addition to the College. Welcome, Apprentice.
translations.chinese: 我觉得你会成为学院的优秀成员。欢迎你，学徒。

translations.english: I'll lead you across the bridge. Once you're inside you'll want to speak with Mirabelle Ervine, our Master Wizard. Please, follow me.
translations.chinese: 我这就带你过桥。进去之后找我们的高等巫师米拉贝勒·厄文谈谈。请跟我来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B8119]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I'll lead you across the bridge. Once you're inside you'll want to speak with Mirabelle Ervine, our Master Wizard. Please, follow me. | ZH: 我这就带你过桥。进去之后找我们的高等巫师米拉贝勒·厄文谈谈。请跟我来。 | SID: 008732

translations.english: Excellent.
translations.chinese: 非常好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B811B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Excellent. | ZH: 非常好。 | SID: 00872E

translations.english: This is not over, I assure you.
translations.chinese: 告诉你，这事儿没完。

translations.english: Even if all you've said here is lies, I know you have something in Winterhold the Synod Council will be very interested in.
translations.chinese: 即使你在这里谎话连篇，我也知道你们冬堡有议会感兴趣的东西。

translations.english: So, mage from Winterhold, despite your intentions I've beaten your little game.
translations.chinese: 冬堡的法师，不管你的企图如何，我已经打败了你的小伎俩。

translations.english: So fine, trudge off to Labyrinthian in search of your Staff. I shall return to Cyrodiil and deliver my full report to the Council.
translations.chinese: 好了，去迷城找法杖去吧。我回希罗帝尔，向议会提交全面报告。

translations.english: I think there is much that we can learn from each other.
translations.chinese: 我觉得我们可以互相借鉴很多东西。

translations.english: Normally you'd need to show some aptitude with one of the schools of magic, but you...
translations.chinese: 通常情况你需要表现出一些魔法学派的天赋才能进入，但你……

translations.english: So the stories are true... you are Dragonborn!
translations.chinese: 这么说，传说是真的……你是龙裔！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B811D]
Translations:

translations.chinese: 如果你真的会使用吼声，能给我展示一下吗？我还从未亲眼目睹过。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B811E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If it's true, and you do have the Voice, would you mind showing me? I've never seen it first-hand. | ZH: 如果你真的会使用吼声，能给我展示一下吗？我还从未亲眼目睹过。 | SID: 00C7D9

translations.english: Dragonborn?
translations.chinese: 龙裔？

translations.english: It's been so long since we've had any contact with the Greybeards. Do you really have the Voice?
translations.chinese: 我们已经很久没和灰胡子有过联系了。你真的拥有吼声吗？

translations.english: I would be most impressed to see that.
translations.chinese: 如果能亲眼看看就好了。

Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I would be most impressed to see that. | ZH: 如果能亲眼看看就好了。 | SID: 008723

translations.english: Mind what - or who - you practice this on.
translations.chinese: 一定要注意练习的对象。

translations.english: I want to train in Destruction Magic.
translations.chinese: 我想学毁灭系魔法。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B8127]

- INFO:RNAM | EN: I want to train in Destruction Magic. | ZH: 我想学毁灭系魔法。 | SID: 0046A9

translations.english: Your power over others shall be great, like mine.
translations.chinese: 你影响他人的力量会和我一样强大。

translations.english: I'd like you to train me in Illusion magic.
translations.chinese: 我希望你教我幻术系魔法。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B8128]
Translations:

- INFO:RNAM | EN: I'd like you to train me in Illusion magic. | ZH: 我希望你教我幻术系魔法。 | SID: 003E2F

translations.english: I'm afraid your skills haven't improved enough to be considered.
translations.chinese: 恐怕你的技能还没达到应有的程度。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B8135]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm afraid your skills haven't improved enough to be considered. | ZH: 恐怕你的技能还没达到应有的程度。 | SID: 00872F

translations.english: If you can pass the test, then yes.
translations.chinese: 如果能通过测试，那就可以。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B8136]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If you can pass the test, then yes. | ZH: 如果能通过测试，那就可以。 | SID: 00E6DB

translations.english: I told you, it's the wedding of Vittoria Vici, an extremely well connected merchant with the East Empire Company. The Emperor's cousin? Remember?
translations.chinese: 我跟你说过，这是维托利亚·维齐的婚礼，她和东帝国公司关系密切得很。而且还是皇帝的表妹。你忘了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I told you, it's the wedding of Vittoria Vici, an extremely well connected merchant with the East Empire Company. The Emperor's cousin? Remember? | ZH: 我跟你说过，这是维托利亚·维齐的婚礼，她和东帝国公司关系密切得很。而且还是皇帝的表妹。你忘了？ | SID: 000CB5

translations.english: Why are we even going to a wedding at this far flung end of the Empire anyway?
translations.chinese: 我们为什么到离帝国这么远的地方参加婚礼？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B813C]
Translations:

translations.english: Come along, no more stops, we need to find our way to Solitude.
translations.chinese: 走吧，别停下来，我们得找到去独孤城的路。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B813D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Come along, no more stops, we need to find our way to Solitude. | ZH: 走吧，别停下来，我们得找到去独孤城的路。 | SID: 006234

translations.english: Hopefully these gifts will put us in her good graces, secure that import deal, and lead the way to an audience with the Emperor.
translations.chinese: 希望看在这些礼物的份上她能高看咱们一眼，达成进口的协议，然后带咱们觐见皇帝。

translations.english: Ha, what a coward. Didn't even put up a proper fight.
translations.chinese: 哈，真是个软蛋。都不反抗一下的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B8159]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ha, what a coward. Didn't even put up a proper fight. | ZH: 哈，真是个软蛋。都不反抗一下的。 | SID: 007AEB

translations.english: No, I guess not. Well, get out of here before I change my mind.
translations.chinese: 不，我看不像。好吧，在我改主意前赶紧滚。

translations.english: Yes, actually. You look like you're lousy with gold.
translations.chinese: 是啊，千真万确。你看着浑身都是金的。

translations.english: All right, hand over your valuables, or I'll gut you like a fish.
translations.chinese: 好了，把值钱的东西都交出来，不然我向宰鱼一样把你剁了。

translations.english: Hail, brother! I saw you walking there and thought you might need this.
translations.chinese: 嘿，兄弟！我看你正在走路，觉得你可能会需要这个。

translations.english: Hail, sister! I saw you walking there and thought you could use this.

translations.english: Hail, Nightingale! Luck has shined down on me and made me a rich man. Here is your cut, as promised.
translations.chinese: 您好啊，夜莺！我今天运气不错，发了笔财。这是您应得的那份。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Ah, now this is a sad path. Pelagius hated and feared many things. Assassins, wild dogs, the undead, pumpernickel...

translations.english: Let's talk inside.
translations.chinese: 我们进去谈谈。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B82E9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Let's talk inside. | ZH: 我们进去谈谈。 | SID: 00E04C

translations.english: We hid from our past for years, became tradesman, people of coin and influence.
translations.chinese: 我们隐瞒了很多年，转行经商，变得有钱有势。

translations.english: It's no secret that my family were once members of the Mythic Dawn. One of my forefathers was even chosen to assassinate Uriel Septim himself.
translations.chinese: 众所周知，我的家族曾经是神话黎明的成员。我的一位祖先甚至被选中参与刺杀尤瑞尔·塞普汀的行动。

translations.english: I'll see everyone in Tamriel remember that for a moment, we held the fate of the world in our hands, for good or ill.
translations.chinese: 我要让泰姆瑞尔所有人都记住，曾有那一刻，不管好坏，世界的命运掌控在我们手中。

translations.english: But I realized that the Mythic Dawn's importance -- our importance -- to history cannot be denied.
translations.chinese: 但我意识到了神话黎明的历史重要性、我们的重要性，这是不可否认的。

translations.english: And here you are. Good. Come in, browse the display, and let's talk. I have a job you look perfect for.
translations.chinese: 所以你就来了。很好。请进，参观参观陈列，然后我们可以谈谈。我有份工作很适合你。

translations.english: Never mind that. Madena is a good woman, but I have my own reasons for opening this museum, and I'm not changing my mind.
translations.chinese: 别在意。玛迪娜是个好人，但我开博物馆自有道理，我是不会改主意的。

translations.english: Why don't you come in? You can browse the displays, and we can talk. I have a job you look perfect for.
translations.chinese: 何不进来看看？你随便参观，我们也可以聊聊。我有份工作很适合你。

translations.english: I have a collection of artifacts from the group that toppled an Empire. Their importance to history cannot be forgotten.
translations.chinese: 我收藏了一些文物，都是来自那个曾经颠覆帝国的组织。他们对历史的重要性不该被忘记。

translations.english: I need training in Light Armor.
translations.chinese: 我想训练轻甲技巧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B833B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You'll be able to run circles around the big, slow brutes in Heavy Armor. | ZH: 学会之后你就能围着那些穿重甲的蠢东西绕圈了。 | SID: 004675
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I need training in Light Armor. | ZH: 我想训练轻甲技巧。 | SID: 00C9C7

translations.english: Well, you've come to the right place.
translations.chinese: 嗯，那你算找对人了。

translations.english: I'd like training in the art of Speech.
translations.chinese: 我想训练口才技艺。

translations.english: More than you'll ever realize. The poison on that arrow took me a year to perfect; I only had enough for a single shot.
translations.chinese: 比你想的还要多。那支箭上的毒是我花了一年时间才准备好的，剂量只够我发射一箭。

translations.english: I made a split second decision to get you out of the way and it prevented your death.
translations.chinese: 我在一瞬间做了个决定，把你救出来，救你一命。

translations.english: My original intention was to use that arrow on Mercer, but I never had a clear shot.
translations.chinese: 我本来是要用那支箭对付墨瑟的，但我一直没有把握。

translations.english: Here, take these as well, they may prove useful for your journey.
translations.chinese: 来，把这些拿上吧，可能会对你旅行有用处。

translations.english: Perhaps I'll tell you more about it later. Right now, you need to head for Winterhold with the journal and get the translation.
translations.chinese: 也许以后会告诉你更多。但现在，你得带着日记去冬堡找人翻译。

translations.english: There were three of us. Myself, Gallus and Mercer. We were a anonymous splinter of the Thieves Guild in Riften.
translations.chinese: 我们有三个人。我，加卢斯，还有墨瑟。我们是裂谷城盗贼公会的一个隐秘分队。

translations.english: Farewell. I'll be certain to give Brynjolf your regards.
translations.chinese: 永别了。我会代你向布林乔夫问好的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B8385]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Farewell. I'll be certain to give Brynjolf your regards. | ZH: 永别了。我会代你向布林乔夫问好的。 | SID: 007BE8

translations.english: It's the only outsider Gallus trusted with the knowledge of his Nightingale identity.
translations.chinese: 这也是唯一受加卢斯信任，知道他夜莺身份的外人。

translations.english: Enthir... Gallus's friend at the College of Winterhold. Of course...
translations.chinese: 恩希尔……他是加卢斯在冬堡学院的朋友。当然……

translations.english: I spent thousands of septims and used every contact at my disposal, but it was as if she had simply vanished... like I said before, she was the best.
translations.chinese: 我花了成千上万的塞普汀，动用了一切可以使用的关系网，但她就像凭空消失了一样……我说过，她很出色。

translations.english: The infighting had taken months to subside which gave her time to go into hiding and carefully cover her tracks.
translations.chinese: 内讧花了几个月才平息下来，给了她时间躲藏起来，小心翼翼地掩盖了自己的踪迹。

translations.english: I wish I knew. The journal is written in some sort of language I've never seen before.
translations.chinese: 我也想知道。这本日记用的是某种我从未见过的语言。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B8388]

translations.english: I saw what they did to Gallus. I wanted to use the Guild's resources to hunt down Karliah. The others didn't even care he was gone.
translations.chinese: 我看到了他们对加卢斯的所作所为。我想利用公会的资源追捕卡莱亚。其他人根本不在乎加卢斯的生死。

translations.english: Fortunately, I persevered and the other groups were either killed or they left Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 幸运的是，我坚持了下来，其他派别或是被杀，或是离开了天际。

translations.english: My purpose in using Snow Veil Sanctum to ambush Mercer wasn't simply for irony's sake.
translations.chinese: 我打算在雪幔圣所伏击墨瑟不仅是为了讽刺他。

translations.english: Before both of you arrived, I recovered a journal from Gallus's remains. I suspect the information we need is written inside.
translations.chinese: 在你俩到这儿前，我从加卢斯的尸体上找到了一本日记。我怀疑我们需要的信息都写在这里面了。

translations.english: Sides quickly formed behind these men and the Ratway became a bloodbath.
translations.chinese: 这些人很快分成了很多派系，在鼠道里大打出手。

translations.english: The Guild was thrown into disarray. Several stepped up and tried to claim Gallus's former position as Guild Master.
translations.chinese: 公会陷入一片混乱。有几个人想上台取代加卢斯公会大师的地位。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: The Guild was thrown into disarray. Several stepped up and tried to claim Gallus's former position as Guild Master. | ZH: 公会陷入一片混乱。有几个人想上台取代加卢斯公会大师的地位。 | SID: 003A7D

translations.english: All I had hoped was to capture Mercer alive.
translations.chinese: 我只希望活捉了墨瑟。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B838C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: All I had hoped was to capture Mercer alive. | ZH: 我只希望活捉了墨瑟。 | SID: 0093E6

translations.english: Mercer must be brought before the Guild to answer for what he's done. He needs to pay for Gallus's murder.
translations.chinese: 墨瑟必须被押回公会，为他的所作所为负责。他必须为加卢斯的死付出代价。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B838D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Mercer must be brought before the Guild to answer for what he's done. He needs to pay for Gallus's murder. | ZH: 墨瑟必须被押回公会，为他的所作所为负责。他必须为加卢斯的死付出代价。 | SID: 0044BA

translations.english: I promise you, the thought crossed my mind. The poison on that arrow took me a year to perfect; I only had enough for a single shot.
translations.chinese: 我向你保证，我一开始是那么想的。那支箭上的毒是我花了一年时间才准备好的，剂量只够我发射一箭。

agentText:

translations.english: The poison on that arrow took me a year to perfect; I only had enough for a single shot and yet I used it on you.
translations.chinese: 那支箭上的毒是我花了一年时间才准备好的，剂量只够我发射一箭，却用在了你身上。

translations.english: Without the antidote I administered, you'd be as still as a statue. I treated your wounds and didn't leave you defenseless.
translations.chinese: 没有我的解药，你就会像个雕像一样一动不动。我治疗了你的伤口，而且没有让你一直毫无防备下去。

translations.english: Don't you walk away from me!
translations.chinese: 你躲不开我！

translations.english: I don't have time for this.
translations.chinese: 我没时间管这些。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: I don't know, Babette. Looks like he may have suffered a head wound. Best not let him out of our sight...
translations.chinese: 我不知道，巴贝特。看起来他磕到脑子了。最好盯着点……

translations.english: (Remain silent)
translations.chinese: （保持沉默）

translations.english: Whoa, whoa, whoa. Slow down. It's all right. You've been through a lot. Maybe you should just sit down for a bit...
translations.chinese: 喔，喔，喔。慢一点。没关系。你经历的事情太多了，应该坐下来休息一下……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Whoa, whoa, whoa. Slow down. It's all right. You've been through a lot. Maybe you should just sit down for a bit... | ZH: 喔，喔，喔。慢一点。没关系。你经历的事情太多了，应该坐下来休息一下…… | SID: 00B435

translations.english: I'm with you, Listener.
translations.chinese: 我会跟着你的，聆听者。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B839E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm with you, Listener. | ZH: 我会跟着你的，聆听者。 | SID: 00C37D

translations.english: Sleep.
translations.chinese: 睡吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B839F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Sleep. | ZH: 睡吧。 | SID: 00D845

translations.english: Damn it, there's got to be a way out of here!
translations.chinese: 该死，肯定有出路的！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B83A0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Damn it, there's got to be a way out of here! | ZH: 该死，肯定有出路的！ | SID: 00087A

translations.english: Nazir told me what happened in Solitude. You poor dear. You've been through so much...
translations.chinese: 纳兹尔把独孤城发生的事告诉我了。你真可怜。经历了这么多……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B83A1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Nazir told me what happened in Solitude. You poor dear. You've been through so much... | ZH: 纳兹尔把独孤城发生的事告诉我了。你真可怜。经历了这么多…… | SID: 00CFCE

translations.english: Oh! Well in that case, lead on. I'm right behind you.
translations.chinese: 哦！既然这样那就带路吧。我跟着你。

translations.english: I'm fine. But the Night Mother has another task for me. Let's go.
translations.chinese: 我很好。但夜母给了我另一个任务。跟我来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B83A2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh! Well in that case, lead on. I'm right behind you. | ZH: 哦！既然这样那就带路吧。我跟着你。 | SID: 001E0F
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I'm fine. But the Night Mother has another task for me. Let's go. | ZH: 我很好。但夜母给了我另一个任务。跟我来。 | SID: 002626

translations.english: She's here? By Sithis, I thought we'd lost her. Let's go!
translations.chinese: 她在这里吗？西帝斯在上，我以为她死了。我们走！

translations.english: I have to speak with Astrid! She's here, in the Sanctuary. Follow me.
translations.chinese: 我要跟阿斯垂德谈谈！她就在圣所里。跟我来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B83A3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: She's here? By Sithis, I thought we'd lost her. Let's go! | ZH: 她在这里吗？西帝斯在上，我以为她死了。我们走！ | SID: 008661
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I have to speak with Astrid! She's here, in the Sanctuary. Follow me. | ZH: 我要跟阿斯垂德谈谈！她就在圣所里。跟我来。 | SID: 00812D

translations.english: My family thanks you. Take this as a token of our gratitude.
translations.chinese: 我的家族会感谢你的。请收下这个以示我们的感激之情。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B83B9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: My family thanks you. Take this as a token of our gratitude. | ZH: 我的家族会感谢你的。请收下这个以示我们的感激之情。 | SID: 00934E

translations.english: I expected too much. I'll seek someone else to salvage the family honor.
translations.chinese: 我抱的希望太大了。我还是找别人挽救家族的荣耀吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B83BA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I expected too much. I'll seek someone else to salvage the family honor. | ZH: 我抱的希望太大了。我还是找别人挽救家族的荣耀吧。 | SID: 008653

translations.english: Good. He will have fled to gather others of his kind.
translations.chinese: 好。他应该是逃出去召集其他同类了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B83BB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good. He will have fled to gather others of his kind. | ZH: 好。他应该是逃出去召集其他同类了。 | SID: 008650

translations.english: No. It's too late for the wardstone. Vighar must be destroyed. If this gets out, my family will suffer great shame.
translations.chinese: 不，现在去找结界石已经太晚了。必须消灭维加尔。此事一旦泄露，我的家族会蒙受极大的耻辱。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B83BC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No. It's too late for the wardstone. Vighar must be destroyed. If this gets out, my family will suffer great shame. | ZH: 不，现在去找结界石已经太晚了。必须消灭维加尔。此事一旦泄露，我的家族会蒙受极大的耻辱。 | SID: 00864F

translations.english: You may have seen the open grave in our graveyard. Most of the townsfolk think it's the work of a corpse thief.
translations.chinese: 你可能已经看到我们的墓地里有个敞开的坟墓。大多数镇民都认为是盗尸贼干的。

translations.english: He is also a vampire. My family is entrusted with keeping him buried, but recently someone stole the wardstone, and Vighar escaped.
translations.chinese: 他还是个吸血鬼。我的家族奉命埋葬了他，但最近结界石被人偷了，维加尔跑了出来。

translations.english: The truth is less pleasant. It is...was, the grave of Vighar, my own ancestor, dead for centuries now.
translations.chinese: 真相并不那么令人愉快。那……是我祖先维加尔的墓，他已经死了好几百年了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: You may have seen the open grave in our graveyard. Most of the townsfolk think it's the work of a corpse thief. | ZH: 你可能已经看到我们的墓地里有个敞开的坟墓。大多数镇民都认为是盗尸贼干的。 | SID: 008473
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: He is also a vampire. My family is entrusted with keeping him buried, but recently someone stole the wardstone, and Vighar escaped. | ZH: 他还是个吸血鬼。我的家族奉命埋葬了他，但最近结界石被人偷了，维加尔跑了出来。 | SID: 008649
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: The truth is less pleasant. It is...was, the grave of Vighar, my own ancestor, dead for centuries now. | ZH: 真相并不那么令人愉快。那……是我祖先维加尔的墓，他已经死了好几百年了。 | SID: 00E1F9

translations.english: Destroy Vighar, my long dead vampire ancestor. Have you changed your mind?
translations.chinese: 消灭我死了很久的吸血鬼祖先维加尔。你改主意了？

translations.english: What did you want my help with?
translations.chinese: 你要我帮什么忙来着？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.chinese: 我早该知道。自从玛雯把西比扔进监狱，他俩一直不和。

translations.english: I never meant for any of what happened here. Tried to seal it up, lock it away forever.
translations.chinese: 我从未想过这里会发生这一切。我想把它封起来，永远地封起来。

translations.english: It's too late. There isn't enough of him left to go back in after.
translations.chinese: 太迟了。他肯定活不下来的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B867C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's too late. There isn't enough of him left to go back in after. | ZH: 太迟了。他肯定活不下来的。 | SID: 001A17

translations.english: Atmah cried to herself. Hafnar wouldn't look at either of us. And I kept telling them it would be all right.
translations.chinese: 奥特玛暗自啜泣，哈弗那不愿看我们。而我一直在跟他们说会没事的。

translations.english: Let's just get inside, see what's in there.
translations.chinese: 我们进去吧，看看里面有什么。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Let's just get inside, see what's in there. | ZH: 我们进去吧，看看里面有什么。 | SID: 00218C

translations.english: And then we were all fighting just to survive. None of us were prepared. It was amazing the rest of us survived.
translations.chinese: 之后我们都拼命求生。毫无准备。我们能活下来简直不可思议。

agentText:

translations.english: It would seem I'm bound to this place. The bitter irony of it all -- my greatest failure, and even in death I can't escape it.
translations.chinese: 看来我注定要来这个地方。讽刺的是，这是我最大的失败，即使死了，我也无法逃避。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: We barely made it out alive, and you want to go back in?
translations.chinese: 我们好不容易活着逃出来，你还想回去？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B8681]
Translations:

translations.english: I've no idea what killed her, but I'm sure something did.
translations.chinese: 我不知道是什么杀了她，但肯定有什么东西。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B8682]

translations.english: Don't forget, this whole idea was Atmah's to begin with.
translations.chinese: 别忘了，整个注意一开始就是奥特玛出的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B8683]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Don't forget, this whole idea was Atmah's to begin with. | ZH: 别忘了，整个注意一开始就是奥特玛出的。 | SID: 0085F3

translations.english: I had to leave them behind, had to sacrifice them so I could make it out alive.
translations.chinese: 我想要活着逃出去，就得丢下他们，牺牲他们。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B86B7]
Translations:

translations.english: I knew you'd come eventually.
translations.chinese: 我知道你最后会来的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B86BA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I knew you'd come eventually. | ZH: 我知道你最后会来的。 | SID: 009805

translations.english: We... we have to go back. We can't leave Girduin...
translations.chinese: 我们……我们得回去。我们不能扔下吉尔登……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B86C1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We... we have to go back. We can't leave Girduin... | ZH: 我们……我们得回去。我们不能扔下吉尔登…… | SID: 008602

translations.english: There were only three of us left. Takes-In-Light just sat down and gave up, and we left her there to die.
translations.chinese: 我们就剩三个人了。拥入光明坐下来放弃了，我们把她扔在原地等死。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B86CF]

translations.english: You would care about that, since you're the Arch-Mage's favorite!
translations.chinese: 你当然会在乎，谁叫大法师最中意你呢！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B86D0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You would care about that, since you're the Arch-Mage's favorite! | ZH: 你当然会在乎，谁叫大法师最中意你呢！ | SID: 00216A

translations.english: One moment we joked about what we'd find below, the next he'd been ripped in half.
translations.chinese: 我们还在说笑，说会在下面发现些什么，他就被撕成两半了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B86D1]
Translations:

translations.english: I had no choice, don't you see?
translations.chinese: 我别无选择，你明白吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B86D2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I had no choice, don't you see? | ZH: 我别无选择，你明白吗？ | SID: 0066EE

translations.english: Against six College-trained mages? I think we'll be fine.
translations.chinese: 对抗六个受过学院训练的法师？我觉得不可能。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B86DA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Against six College-trained mages? I think we'll be fine. | ZH: 对抗六个受过学院训练的法师？我觉得不可能。 | SID: 00DC78

translations.english: "If we can just make it through, it'll all be worth it", I told them. And the fools believed the words I myself didn't trust.
translations.chinese: 我告诉他们：“如果我们能够挺过去，那一切都是值得的。”。那些傻瓜相信了我那连自己都不相信的鬼话。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B86DB]
Translations:

translations.english: We'll be back at the College before anyone even knows we're gone.
translations.chinese: 我们要在别人发现我们离开之前回到学院。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B86DC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We'll be back at the College before anyone even knows we're gone. | ZH: 我们要在别人发现我们离开之前回到学院。 | SID: 00E2BD

translations.english: Girduin died first. It happened so fast, none of us had a chance to react.
translations.chinese: 第一个死的是吉尔登。事情发生太快，我们都来不及反应。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B86E9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Girduin died first. It happened so fast, none of us had a chance to react. | ZH: 第一个死的是吉尔登。事情发生太快，我们都来不及反应。 | SID: 00BC6C

translations.english: "No matter what, we stay together", Hafnar said. I looked him in the eyes and lied to him.
translations.chinese: 哈弗那说，“无论发生什么，我们都要同进退。”我盯着他的眼睛，撒了谎。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B86ED]
Translations:

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B86F2]
Translations:

translations.chinese: 我们真的能确定这是好主意吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Are we truly sure this is a good idea? | ZH: 我们真的能确定这是好主意吗？ | SID: 00C18E

translations.english: We thought it would be so simple.
translations.chinese: 我们想得太简单了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B86F6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We thought it would be so simple. | ZH: 我们想得太简单了。 | SID: 0065DD

translations.english: Enchanted weapons, tomes of ancient knowledge, Shalidor's secrets themselves -- who knows what we could find!
translations.chinese: 附魔武器、古代典籍、沙利多的秘密，谁知道我们能找到什么！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B86F7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Enchanted weapons, tomes of ancient knowledge, Shalidor's secrets themselves -- who knows what we could find! | ZH: 附魔武器、古代典籍、沙利多的秘密，谁知道我们能找到什么！ | SID: 0085FB

translations.english: I... I don't know why I pressed the others on, convinced them to keep going.
translations.chinese: 我……我不知道我为什么会强迫其他人，说服他们继续前进。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B86F8]

translations.chinese: 来吧，我们终于到了！不要浪费时间了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B8714]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Come on, we're finally here! Let's not waste any more time! | ZH: 来吧，我们终于到了！不要浪费时间了！ | SID: 006EAD

translations.english: We were sure we'd find it all here, hidden away from time. Power, knowledge... All the things we didn't want to wait for.
translations.chinese: 我们本相信会在这里找到一切，远离时间。力量、知识……一切我们不想等待的东西。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B8715]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We were sure we'd find it all here, hidden away from time. Power, knowledge... All the things we didn't want to wait for. | ZH: 我们本相信会在这里找到一切，远离时间。力量、知识……一切我们不想等待的东西。 | SID: 00BC4E

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B8716]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What was that thing, anyway? | ZH: 那是什么东西啊？ | SID: 00860F

translations.english: None of our spells were potent enough, none of our wills were strong enough.
translations.chinese: 我们的法术、意志都不够强大。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B871B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: None of our spells were potent enough, none of our wills were strong enough. | ZH: 我们的法术、意志都不够强大。 | SID: 00E1FD

translations.english: Given the history of this place, it's more than likely there's still some amount of power here.
translations.chinese: 从这个地方的历史来看，这里应该还存留一些力量。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B871C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Given the history of this place, it's more than likely there's still some amount of power here. | ZH: 从这个地方的历史来看，这里应该还存留一些力量。 | SID: 00E5FB

translations.english: Hafnar was covered in blood, but his stupid Nord pride wouldn't let him admit defeat.
translations.chinese: 哈弗那满身是血，但他那愚蠢的诺德自尊感不允许他承认失败。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:

translations.chinese: 好吧，我也是有事。所以才希望你帮我的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B871F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, well so do I. That's why I was hoping you could help. | ZH: 好吧，我也是有事。所以才希望你帮我的。 | SID: 0085E9

translations.english: It's clearly magical in nature, but like nothing I've ever seen before. He should be most interested.
translations.chinese: 这显然是自然中的魔法，但我从未见过。他应该很感兴趣。

translations.english: Let him know that we've unearthed something... Well, I'm not sure. Something unique, let's say.
translations.chinese: 告诉他我们的发现……嗯，我也说不太准。或许可以说，某种特殊的东西。

translations.english: The sort of embellishment wizards of ancient times loved to make.
translations.chinese: 古代那些巫师们就是喜欢这样包装。

translations.english: I believe I've heard it said that it's the only thing that could adequately contain his power.
translations.chinese: 我听人说，这是唯一能充分控制他力量的东西。

translations.english: I'm not really sure. Made and used by Magnus himself, if you believe those sorts of things.
translations.chinese: 我也不太确定。玛格努斯自造自用的东西，前提是你相信这种话。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I'm not really sure. Made and used by Magnus himself, if you believe those sorts of things. | ZH: 我也不太确定。玛格努斯自造自用的东西，前提是你相信这种话。 | SID: 00E016

translations.english: As long as the Synod don't blame us for this mess, I have more pressing matters to deal with.
translations.chinese: 只要希诺别把事情怪到咱们头上就行，我还有更要紧的事要处理。

translations.english: I warned them it might be dangerous. It's not my fault they didn't listen.
translations.chinese: 我警告过他们可能会很危险。他们不听我有什么办法。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Not enough to bother with it. Arch-Mage Aren's approach to these things is to just let them sort themselves out.
translations.chinese: 没有感到太困扰。阿冉大法师应对这些问题的办法就是顺其自然。

translations.english: Although now it looks like you'll be doing the sorting. Good luck with that.
translations.chinese: 尽管现在看来是你要来操心了。祝你好运。

translations.english: Oh, I think I'll be fine. We seem to have eliminated the most pressing threat.
translations.chinese: 哦，我想没问题。我们似乎已经消除了最紧迫的威胁。

translations.english: It certainly seems that whoever placed this here intended for it to be well guarded. I wonder why...
translations.chinese: 很明显，不管是谁把它放在这里，都是为了保护好它。但我想知道原因……

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: It certainly seems that whoever placed this here intended for it to be well guarded. I wonder why... | ZH: 很明显，不管是谁把它放在这里，都是为了保护好它。但我想知道原因…… | SID: 00859C

translations.english: Your father's too easy on you, boy. I'd have you cutting wood at dawn if you were my son.
translations.chinese: 你父亲对你太纵容了，孩子。要是你是我儿子，天亮我就让你砍柴去了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B8752]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Your father's too easy on you, boy. I'd have you cutting wood at dawn if you were my son. | ZH: 你父亲对你太纵容了，孩子。要是你是我儿子，天亮我就让你砍柴去了。 | SID: 008598

translations.english: As do I. That man saved my life. I hope that someone helps him, as he once helped me.
translations.chinese: 我也是这么想，他救过我一命。我希望有人能帮助他，就像他曾经帮助过我一样。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B8753]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: As do I. That man saved my life. I hope that someone helps him, as he once helped me. | ZH: 我也是这么想，他救过我一命。我希望有人能帮助他，就像他曾经帮助过我一样。 | SID: 008593

translations.english: And how is that old warrior doing these days?
translations.chinese: 那个老战士最近怎么样？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B8754]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And how is that old warrior doing these days? | ZH: 那个老战士最近怎么样？ | SID: 00858C

translations.english: Papa says I'm not old enough yet, so I help out by patrolling the town with Lucky here.
translations.chinese: 爸爸说我还不够大，所以我和幸运在镇上巡逻。

agentText:

EDID: [000B8755]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Papa says I'm not old enough yet, so I help out by patrolling the town with Lucky here. | ZH: 爸爸说我还不够大，所以我和幸运在镇上巡逻。 | SID: 008597

translations.english: Oh dear. I wish there was something we could do to help him.
translations.chinese: 哦天啊。我们应该做点什么帮帮他。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B8756]
Translations:

translations.english: But more importantly, I am a daughter of Skyrim and wish to see her made whole again.
translations.chinese: 但更重要的是，我是天际的女儿。我希望她能恢复统一。

translations.english: I've been a daughter of Skyrim all my life. I love this land and her people. So do all the Nords that serve the Empire.
translations.chinese: 我自始至终都是天际的女儿。我热爱这片土地和这里的人民。所有效忠帝国的诺德人也是如此。

translations.english: The rebels are only inflaming the tension and weakening the Empire by distracting it from its ultimate aim.
translations.chinese: 叛军只会激化紧张的局势、削弱帝国的力量。分散帝国对最终目标的注意力。

translations.english: Ulfric, too, once. He wasn't always a self-serving ego-maniac. He fought in the Imperial army in the War against the Dominion.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克曾经也是这样。他并非一直自私自利又自大。在对抗先祖神洲的战争中，他曾经投身帝国军队服役。

translations.english: But Ulfric and his "Stormcloaks" are deluding themselves. If there's any hope of a long term victory against the Dominion, it's in the Empire.
translations.chinese: 但现在乌弗瑞克和他的“风暴斗篷”是在自欺欺人。帝国是长期战胜先祖神洲的唯一希望。

translations.english: I'm a soldier, not a politician. And my personal beliefs are not yours to question.
translations.chinese: 我是军人不是政客。我的个人信仰不容你质疑。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000B8EBB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm a soldier, not a politician. And my personal beliefs are not yours to question. | ZH: 我是军人不是政客。我的个人信仰不容你质疑。 | SID: 00DC56

translations.english: I'm a man. Skyrim is man's homeland. That's a fact. A fact I'm proud of. There's no shame in that. Read your history.
translations.chinese: 我是人类。天际是人类的家园。这是事实，我为此而自豪。这没什么可丢人的。读读历史吧。

translations.english: I oppose tyranny. I oppose those who tell me how to live, what to think, and what to believe.
translations.chinese: 我反对暴政。反对那些告诉我该如何生活、思考什么、相信什么的人。

translations.chinese: 如果没别的事，我还有些急事要处理。

translations.english: No. I will have no part of any such Empire. And I will gladly gut anyone who says otherwise.
translations.chinese: 不。我不会再加入这样的帝国了。如果有人反对，我很乐意杀了他。

translations.english: The Empire to bend its knee before those evil elf bastards? Signing a treaty meant to kill the heart of the Empire itself. To deny Talos?
translations.chinese: 让帝国在那群混蛋精灵面前下跪？再签署一份抹杀帝国内核、否认塔洛斯的条约？

translations.english: I fought in the Imperial army in the War against the Dominion. I bled and spilt blood for the Empire. And for what?
translations.chinese: 我曾在帝国军队中和先祖神洲作战。我为帝国抛洒鲜血。结果又得到了什么？

translations.english: Not this Empire. The world's better without it. Certainly Skyrim is.
translations.chinese: 但不是这个帝国。世界会因无它而更好，天际也是。

translations.chinese: 只有那些该死的外来者和帝国才需要理由。

translations.english: Reasons? Since when does a man need a reason to protect his family, to defend his homeland?
translations.chinese: 理由？什么时候保卫家人家园还需要理由了？

translations.english: The Nords went to war with the Falmer in the First Era. Killed them by the thousands to drive them from their snowy homeland.

translations.chinese: 伐莫撤退到了地下，与矮人结成了并不牢固的联盟。最后遭到了矮人的背叛。

translations.chinese: 在独孤城的吟游诗人学院。像我这样的吟游诗人都是在那里训练的。

translations.chinese: 嗯……我们听说有一对附魔护腕正被危险的人或野兽，甚至更糟糕的东西藏起来守护着。

translations.english: We live by his code and follow his teachings. Spend some time with the wise woman and you'll remember.
translations.chinese: 我们按照他的法典生活，遵循着他的教诲。花点时间和智妪多聊聊，你会想起来的。

translations.chinese: 这是我们的要塞。我们在这里可以自由地按照玛拉凯斯的意愿生活，远离诺德人的窥视。

translations.english: Which is why I have lived here. For thousands of mortal years I have waited. I knew where he would emerge but not when.
translations.chinese: 所以我才住在这里。我等了几千年。我虽然知道他会在哪出现，却不知道具体时间。

translations.english: I knew better. Tiid bo amativ. Time flows ever onward. One day he would surface.
translations.chinese: 我却知道。提德 波 阿玛提乌。时间滚滚向前，他早晚会浮上来。

translations.english: Not intentionally. Some hoped he would be gone forever, forever lost. Meyye.
translations.chinese: 不是有意的。他们希望他永远回不来。米诶耶。

translations.english: It is an... artifact from outside time. It does not exist, but it has always existed. Rah wahlaan. They are...hmm... fragments of creation.
translations.chinese: 那是……时间以外的传说之物。它从未存在却又一直存在。拉 瓦兰。它们……嗯……是创世的碎片。

translations.english: Hmm. How to explain in your tongue? The dov have words for such things that joorre do not.
translations.chinese: 嗯。该怎么用你们的话解释呢？都瓦有对应的词汇，不过你们约尔没有。

translations.english: The Kelle... Elder Scrolls, as you name them, they have often been used for prophecy. Yes, your prophecy comes from an Elder Scroll.
translations.chinese: 科尔……你们说的上古卷轴，经常被用来预言。没错，你的预言也是来自上古卷轴。

translations.english: But this is only a small part of their power. Zofaas suleyk.
translations.chinese: 但那只是它们力量的皮毛。佐法斯 苏勒耶。

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I just hope this party doesn't drag on all night. | ZH: 我只希望这个宴会不要开一整晚。 | SID: 0080ED

translations.english: Elenwen puts a great deal of effort into these parties, and it shows.
translations.chinese: 看得出，爱琳温对这些宴会很花心思。

translations.english: I just wonder what her real motivations are. That woman is inscrutable.
translations.chinese: 我只是想知道她真正的动机。那个女人真是难解难测啊。

translations.english: Well enough, I suppose.
translations.chinese: 我想还行吧。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Well enough, I suppose. | ZH: 我想还行吧。 | SID: 00815F

translations.english: Lucky for you, I possess a forgiving nature and I'm not easily insulted.
translations.chinese: 不过你很走运，我生性宽容，不太容易感觉被侮辱。

translations.english: You must have me mistaken for someone else. I am Elisif, widow of High King Torygg and Jarl of Solitude.
translations.chinese: 你一定认错人了。我叫艾利西弗，是至高王托依格的遗孀、独孤城的领主。

translations.english: I beg your pardon?
translations.chinese: 你说什么？

translations.english: But at the same time, I don't dare refuse an invitation from Elenwen.
translations.chinese: 但是，我又不敢拒绝爱琳温的邀请。

translations.english: Ill luck. I'm a busy man and I don't have time for this sort of frivolity.
translations.chinese: 太倒霉。我本来是个大忙人，结果却跑来做这种无聊的事。

translations.english: But I do respect power, and the Thalmor have that. They leave me alone, and I leave them alone.
translations.chinese: 但我懂得尊重力量。而梭默拥有力量。我不会干涉他们，他们也不会干涉我。

translations.english: I care little about the politics and rivalries between the Thalmor and the Empire.
translations.chinese: 我对梭默和帝国之间的政治斗争毫无兴趣。

translations.english: We have a relationship of mutual respect.
translations.chinese: 我们尊重彼此。

translations.english: By the gods, let this mine be small so we can be done with it quickly.
translations.chinese: 神啊，让这个矿变小一点吧，这样就能快点挖完了。

agentText:

EDID: [000BC17E]

translations.english: My only regret is that she doesn't host them more often.
translations.chinese: 唯一的遗憾就是办的太少了。

translations.english: Elewen's parties are always so elegant. She really has impeccable taste.
translations.chinese: 爱琳温的宴会始终这么优雅，她的品位确实无可挑剔。

translations.english: Very much so, yes.
translations.chinese: 是的，很开心。

translations.english: Now that I think of it, she would have made a fine Imperial general.
translations.chinese: 我在想，要是她到帝国参军，说不定能当个优秀的将军。

translations.english: Elenwen is a formidable woman. She lacks for neither cunning nor ambition.
translations.chinese: 爱琳温是个令人敬畏的女人，兼具狡猾以及野心。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Elenwen is a formidable woman. She lacks for neither cunning nor ambition. | ZH: 爱琳温是个令人敬畏的女人，兼具狡猾以及野心。 | SID: 00F782

translations.english: I haven't signed any deals yet, but I'm sure my cousin will want a cut if I do. What better way to soothe his wounded pride?
translations.chinese: 我还没签署任何协议，但我相信我表哥会想要分点份额的。还有什么好方法能抚慰他受伤的自尊呢？

translations.english: A delicate question, to be sure. I'm the Emperor's cousin, and the Empire has little love for the Thalmor.
translations.chinese: 真是个怪问题。我是皇帝的表妹，而帝国对梭默没有什么好感。

translations.english: On the other hand, the Thalmor have considerable funds and are looking to expand their shipping.
translations.chinese: 但话说回来，梭默拥有很可观的资金，而且正在寻求扩大航运。

translations.english: It is not eyes that reveal another's true nature. It is the heart.
translations.chinese: 眼睛不能看穿他人本性。要靠心去感受。

translations.english: If your eyes and your ears are open and your mind is free of judgement and expectation, you might learn much in this chamber.
translations.chinese: 只要愿意敞开耳目，摒弃成见，你就能在这儿学到很多东西。
