translations.english: There are words spoken, and words unspoken. Beware these Thalmor, for they are adept in both languages.
translations.chinese: 话分可言与不可言，要当心梭默，他们太擅长这两种话术了。

translations.chinese: 真没想到在这儿遇到你。留心，你正与毒蛇同行。

translations.english: I would refuse, but I don't want to jeopardize the peace between us.
translations.chinese: 我当然想拒绝，不过我不能危害到彼此之间的和平。

translations.english: The Thalmor invite me here to remind everyone that they can tell the Empire what to do.
translations.chinese: 梭默邀请我来，就是为了提醒所有人，他们可以吩咐帝国做事。

translations.english: That's putting it mildly.
translations.chinese: 这么说都算客气了。

translations.english: I am not. I have no more taste for Thalmor wine than I do for Thalmor company.
translations.chinese: 不。我对梭默的酒会和往来都没什么兴趣。

translations.english: There's every chance I'll return to find a pile of smoking ash where Whiterun once stood.
translations.chinese: 恐怕等我回去的时候，白漫城都被烧成一片白地了。

translations.english: What is more, I'm away from the hold at a time when there are dragons and Stormcloaks on the loose.
translations.chinese: 更何况，现在龙族和风暴斗篷都失控了，我却离开了领地。

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: There's every chance I'll return to find a pile of smoking ash where Whiterun once stood. | ZH: 恐怕等我回去的时候，白漫城都被烧成一片白地了。 | SID: 008128

translations.english: I trust them completely, because I understand them.
translations.chinese: 我完全信任，因为足够了解。

translations.english: So if one of them says they're going to do something, I believe them. When you can just take what you want, there's no need to lie.
translations.chinese: 所以如果他们说想要做什么，我就会相信他们。一个人要是能够随心所欲做事，又有什么可扯谎的。

translations.english: When the Thalmor want something, they tell you straight. In my experience, they have no interest in subtleties and innuendo.
translations.chinese: 当梭默想要点什么东西，他们会直接告诉你。根据我的经验，他们对藏着掖着说话不感兴趣。

translations.english: Those who fought the Thalmor in the Great War still see an enemy. But that war is over, and a new day has dawned.
translations.chinese: 那些参与浩大战争的人还在把梭默视作敌人。不过战争结束了，新时代也到来了。

translations.english: Besides, the Thalmor reward their friends richly. Anyone who doesn't take advantage of that is a stubborn fool.
translations.chinese: 再说，梭默厚待朋友。不懂得利用这点才是呆瓜呢。

translations.english: Yes, I know what you mean. Most Nords struggle to accept change.
translations.chinese: 啊，我明白你的意思。大多数诺德人很难接受改变。

translations.english: Not well at all, and I'm happy to keep it that way.
translations.chinese: 也不多。不过我打算保持这种状态。

translations.english: That woman and her Thalmor Justiciars have caused nothing but problems for the people of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 这个女人和她那群梭默审判者只会给天际人民带来麻烦。

translations.english: A Jarl has many duties. Attending parties isn't the most important one, but neither is it unpleasant.
translations.chinese: 领主职责繁重，参加宴会不是最要紧的，不过我也不算反感。

translations.english: Take advantage of the fine food and drink. Such things have been scarce since the war began.
translations.chinese: 好好享受美酒佳肴吧。自战争以来这种东西可不常见了。

translations.english: I came here hoping to learn that more Imperial reinforcements were on their way to Skyrim, but so far I've been disappointed.
translations.chinese: 我来这里希望得到帝国增援天际的消息。可惜一直没能如愿啊。

translations.english: I admit, I've never felt entirely at ease in the Thalmor embassy.

translations.english: It is more like the calm between storms. And the next storm, I think, will be far deadlier than the last.
translations.chinese: 我想，这不过是暴风雨前的宁静，下一场风暴要比上次猛烈得多。

translations.english: But make no mistake, this is not a peace forged out of necessity between rival nations of equal strength.
translations.chinese: 但毫无疑问，势均力敌、相互竞争的国家之间没有缔造和平的需要。

translations.english: There is peace now, and that peace will continue for as long as it suits our needs.
translations.chinese: 现在是和平的，而且只要和平符合我们的需要，就会一直持续下去。

translations.english: I made a lot of friends in a lot of ports, and the Thalmor approached me with a generous offer.
translations.chinese: 我在很多港口交友无数。梭默给了我一个慷慨的提议。

translations.english: I've spent most of my life as a trader. I've got a stake in several shipping ventures across Tamriel, mostly imports and exports.
translations.chinese: 我这辈子都在做贸易。我在泰姆瑞尔好几家航运公司里都持有股份，主营进出口贸易。

translations.english: I give them access to my business associates, and they keep my coffers full.
translations.chinese: 我帮他们跟我的商业伙伴牵线搭桥，他们就能让我赚的盆满钵满。

translations.english: With any luck, a worthy hero will step forward and solve our problems, just like in the tales of old.
translations.chinese: 要是走运的话，就该像古老传说那样，一位可敬的英雄会挺身而出，拯救我们。

translations.english: We must keep faith in ourselves and the Divines.
translations.chinese: 我们要相信圣灵和自己。

translations.english: For this reason, I avoid them when I can.
translations.chinese: 正因如此，我才会尽量避开他们。

translations.english: There are words spoken, and words unspoken. Beware these Thalmor, for they are adept in both languages.
translations.chinese: 话分可言与不可言，要当心梭默，他们太擅长这两种话术了。

translations.english: When I married Torygg, he promised we'd go to lavish parties just like this. I wish he were here now.
translations.chinese: 我嫁给托依格时，他也承诺过举办这样奢华的宴会。我真希望他也能在这儿。

translations.english: Have you tried the wine? It's better than anything in the Blue Palace.
translations.chinese: 你尝过这酒了吗？比蓝宫的还要好。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: We've got our hands full dealing with the Stormcloaks. What about you?
translations.chinese: 我们正在忙着对付风暴斗篷，你们那儿怎么样？

translations.english: Are the dragons frightening your people as much as they're frightening mine?
translations.chinese: 龙把我们那儿的人吓得够呛，你们那儿如何？

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Have you found it difficult to get provisions lately? I can scarcely feed the staff in my palace.
translations.chinese: 你没发现最近食物有些难买么？我连宫中的下属都快喂不饱了。

translations.english: Between the dragons and the Stormcloaks, my coffers are running dry.
translations.chinese: 又是巨龙又是风暴斗篷，我的钱都快掏空了。

translations.english: As far as I'm concerned, those Talos-worshippers get what they deserve. All they do is cause problems for me and the other Jarls.
translations.chinese: 在我看来，那些塔洛斯信徒罪有应得。他们不过是在给我和其他领主制造麻烦。

translations.english: And also long enough to respect her importance to Skyrim. She plays a vital role in rooting out the forbidden worship of Talos.
translations.chinese: 也尊重她对天际的重要性。她在根除塔洛斯禁忌信仰方面是个重要角色。

translations.english: I've known her long enough to appreciate her excellent taste in food and wine.
translations.chinese: 我认识她很久了，我很欣赏她在美酒佳肴方面的高端品味。

translations.english: I'm not sure whether it's the soil, the climate or the favor of the Divines, but we've never had a poor harvest.
translations.chinese: 我不确定是因为土壤、气候还是圣灵的眷顾，但我们从没有歉收的时候。

translations.english: It's true. For as long as I can remember our crops have always done well.
translations.chinese: 确实。自我记事起，我们的庄稼就一直长得很好。

translations.english: But I also enjoy learning the latest gossip and hear the most intriguing rumors.
translations.chinese: 我还喜欢了解最新的小道消息和有趣传言。

translations.english: Quite often, yes. The only thing I enjoy more than luxury is sharing that luxury with those who can appreciate it.
translations.chinese: 当然。比起独自享受奢侈，我更喜欢和那些欣赏奢侈品味的人一起分享。

translations.english: Oh, hello there. I didn't expect to see you here.
translations.chinese: 啊，你好。没想到在这儿见到你。

translations.english: Though I confess, being surrounded by so many wealthy and important people makes me feel more than a little nervous.
translations.chinese: 不过，身边有这么多权贵人物，让我感觉很紧张。

translations.english: Yes, I am indeed. Elenwen always serves the best wine at her parties. The food is excellent as well.
translations.chinese: 是，我确实很享受。爱琳温常在宴会上提供好酒好菜。

translations.english: I lead the Justiciars. We are charged with enforcing the ban on Talos worship.
translations.chinese: 我领导审判者负责执行塔洛斯信仰禁令。

translations.english: But mark me well -- I will purge the heresy from this land as surely as the flame burns the flesh from the bone.
translations.chinese: 但好好记住我的话，我要从这片土地上把异端信仰彻底清除，像把骨头上的血肉焚烧干净一样。

translations.english: Nords can be quite stubborn. They're slow to change their ways, and we find more heretics every day.
translations.chinese: 诺德人相当固执。他们改变生活方式的速度很慢。我们每天都能发现新的异端分子。

translations.chinese: 这只不过我们给予利益相关者好处的一小部分罢了。

translations.english: Of course not. One does not gather the most important men and women of Skyrim and then serve them cheap ale and stale bread.
translations.chinese: 当然了。我们可不能把天际要人们聚在一起然后提供一堆廉价的麦芽酒和破面包。

translations.chinese: 美人佳肴人人喜爱。但诚实正直却很少令人欢愉。

translations.chinese: 说实话，还是在白漫城待着舒服些，和这么多大人物打交道有点紧张。

translations.english: I'm the Steward of Whiterun. I serve Jarl Balgruuf in Dragonsreach.
translations.chinese: 我是白漫城的总管。在龙临宫里为巴尔古夫领主服务。

translations.chinese: 你不觉得身为统治者享受奢侈理所应当吗？梭默就明白这一点。

translations.chinese: 为什么有人会加入风暴斗篷？他们不过是帝国权力财富的一小部分罢了。

translations.english: If I had my way, I'd spend all my time at parties like this, and none of it dealing with the common rabble.
translations.chinese: 要是我能随心所欲，我真想把所有时间都用来参加这种宴会，而不是去治理那群乌合愚民。

translations.english: Have you learned nothing about me? I have dealings with everyone.
translations.chinese: 你还不了解我吗？我跟所有人都有往来。

translations.english: I'd rather be back at Whiterun, but while I'm here I might as well get some real news from the other parts of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 我很想回白漫城，但既然我已经在这儿了，总要从天际其他部分那里获取些可靠的消息。

translations.english: These Thalmor might not like to admit it, but as long as the Empire has Skyrim, the Empire has strength.
translations.chinese: 尽管梭默可能不愿承认，但只要帝国拥有天际，就拥有了力量。

translations.english: It's not the most exciting place in the world, but the people here work hard and don't cause trouble for anyone.
translations.chinese: 这里不是世界上最令人兴奋的地方，但这里的人勤劳工作，不会招灾惹祸。

translations.english: My mother passed away when I was just a babe, so he did his best to raise me on his own.
translations.chinese: 我母亲在我还是个婴儿时就去世了，所以他一个人费了很大劲把我拉扯大。

translations.english: My father was a soldier. He fought in the great war and when it was over, he retired here to raise a family.
translations.chinese: 我父亲是个军人，参加过浩大战争，战争结束以后，他退役到这里成家立业。

translations.english: Born and raised right here in Rorikstead.
translations.chinese: 我是在洛利克镇土生土长的。

translations.english: As for honor, well, there are some luxuries even I can't afford.
translations.chinese: 至于荣誉嘛，嗨，有些奢侈玩意儿我也买不起。

translations.english: Not every Nord is obsessed with strength, honor and skill at arms.
translations.chinese: 并不是每个诺德人都会痴迷于力量、荣誉和武技。

translations.english: A rare few are born with a gift for making money. My investments are my strength and my wealth is my weapon.
translations.chinese: 我们中的极少人与生俱来就有赚钱的本事。对我来说，投资就是力量，财富就是武器。

translations.english: I hope I'm wrong. I'm not sure the Empire can afford another war.
translations.chinese: 希望是我想多了。我不敢肯定帝国还禁得起新一轮的大战。

translations.english: I suspect the treaty that ended the war was just a tactic to buy time so the Thalmor can rebuild their armies.
translations.chinese: 我怀疑结束战争的条约只是缓兵之计，为的就是让梭默有时间重整兵力。

translations.english: For now, perhaps. But I've heard disturbing rumors that they're marshalling their strength.
translations.chinese: 现在也许可信。但我听到一些令人不安的传言，说他们正在集结力量。

translations.chinese: 我确实很惊讶会在这儿遇到你。这些宴会一般都是给天际的领主和商界精英预备的。

translations.english: Elenwen must be very fond of you.

translations.english: I'm with the Vigil of Stendarr. We believe this house might have been used for Daedra worship. Evil rites and so forth.
translations.chinese: 我是斯丹达尔的警戒者。我们认为这所房子可能是用来膜拜迪德拉的。或者进行什么邪恶的仪式。

translations.chinese: 不能说。请放心，领主会听到所有人的担忧。再过不久就可以再去探望死者了。

translations.chinese: 我不想知道细节了。感谢你的帮助。愿阿尔凯祝福你。

translations.english: Here. Take my amulet as a reward.
translations.chinese: 来。我这个护符算是谢礼。

translations.english: This shrine was built by the Dunmer. As our land was scorched by fire and brimstone, Azura's prophecies led us to safety.
translations.chinese: 这个祭坛是丹莫建造的。当我们的土地被烈焰与硫磺烧灼时，阿祖拉的预言将我们带到了安全的地方。

translations.english: She is a Daedra, a powerful being who watches from beyond our mortal plane. She has chosen you to be her champion.
translations.chinese: 她是一位迪德拉，俯瞰尘世的强大存在。她选择你作为自己的勇士。

translations.english: But if they've captured you.... Oh gods, where are they taking us?
translations.chinese: 但如果他们把你抓了……神啊，他们要带我们去哪儿？

translations.chinese: 嘴巴放尊重点。你面前的可是乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷，天际真正的至高王。

translations.english: This Elder Scroll might be able to show you the past in some way, then... yes, yes, it could work.
translations.chinese: 上古卷轴或许能以某种方式向你展示过去……对，对，这可行。

translations.english: Fascinating! So the ancients were more daring... or foolhardy... similar to the Dragon Break itself, although less far-reaching...
translations.chinese: 很神奇！古人更有胆量……或者说更鲁莽……就好像“龙破”本身一样，尽管没那么深远……

translations.english: They were mighty, in their day. Even to attempt to defeat Alduin... sahrot hunne. The Nords have had many heroes since, but none greater.
translations.chinese: 他们是那个时代的强者。甚至企图击败奥杜因……撒洛特 翁尼。尽管诺德人自那之后英雄辈出，但也找不到与他们比肩的了。

translations.english: The first mortals that I taught the Thu'um - the first Tongues. The leaders of the rebellion against Alduin.
translations.chinese: 第一批接受我吐'目教导的凡人，首批发声者。也是反抗奥杜因的领袖。

translations.english: You will see them... wuth fadonne... my friends - Hakon, Gormlaith, Felldir.
translations.chinese: 你会看到他们……乌斯 法多恩……吾友——哈肯、葛姆拉丝、费迪尔。

translations.english: Then you will feel - know - Dragonrend, in the power of its first expression.
translations.chinese: 然后你就能感受，了解，龙魂撕裂。在它初次展露的时候。

translations.english: Return it here, to the Tiid-Ahraan. Then... Kelle vomindok. Nothing is certain with such things...
translations.chinese: 回到这，回到提德-阿兰。然后……凯勒 沃米都克。这种事谁也说不准……

translations.english: But I believe the Scroll's bond with the Tiid-Ahraan will allow you a... a seeing, a vision of the moment of its creation.
translations.chinese: 但我相信，卷轴与提德-阿兰结合起来还会让你看到……一个景象，它创造时的景象。

translations.english: So little is known about the Elder Scrolls, almost anything is possible where they're concerned. Artifacts of truly inconceivable power.
translations.chinese: 我们对上古卷轴知之甚少，只要涉及了它们，几乎一切皆有可能。是具有非凡伟力的器物。

translations.english: Hmm. Well, if that's what the Greybeards told you, I confess I don't have a better plan.
translations.chinese: 嗯。好吧，如果灰胡子这么说，我也想不出更好的计划了。

translations.chinese: 我妻子正在服丧，我得尽快回去找她。如果你能帮我把这个带给艾拉，那我感激不尽。

translations.english: I won't be the one to go back there. I won't return to Avanchnzel. You can't make me do it.
translations.chinese: 我不能再回去了。我不会再去阿旺晨泽尔了。你不要逼我这么做。

agentText:

EDID: [000BD6FA]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I won't be the one to go back there. I won't return to Avanchnzel. You can't make me do it. | ZH: 我不能再回去了。我不会再去阿旺晨泽尔了。你不要逼我这么做。 | SID: 007DEE

translations.english: Then you didn't know Roggvir, and you have no idea what it means to be a Nord of Skyrim!
translations.chinese: 那你就是不了解罗吉维尔，你不知道身为天际的诺德人意味着什么！

translations.english: He did the honorable thing, even when he knew it would cost him everything.
translations.chinese: 他做的事很光荣，即使他知道这会让他付出一切。

translations.english: My brother was the best man in Solitude.
translations.chinese: 我的兄弟是独孤城最好的男人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BD6FB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Then you didn't know Roggvir, and you have no idea what it means to be a Nord of Skyrim! | ZH: 那你就是不了解罗吉维尔，你不知道身为天际的诺德人意味着什么！ | SID: 0098A2
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: He did the honorable thing, even when he knew it would cost him everything. | ZH: 他做的事很光荣，即使他知道这会让他付出一切。 | SID: 00B391
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: My brother was the best man in Solitude. | ZH: 我的兄弟是独孤城最好的男人。 | SID: 00C458

translations.english: Depends on what you mean by "busy." I'm also the head jailor in the dungeon here. Quiet job, usually.
translations.chinese: 看你说的“忙”是什么意思了。我还是监狱的狱卒。这工作通常还是很安静的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BD6FC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Depends on what you mean by "busy." I'm also the head jailor in the dungeon here. Quiet job, usually. | ZH: 看你说的“忙”是什么意思了。我还是监狱的狱卒。这工作通常还是很安静的。 | SID: 0010B0

translations.english: But it was Ulfric. And he did kill the High King, in honorable combat. My brother refused to allow the the Imperials to take revenge for the deed.
translations.chinese: 但那就是乌弗瑞克。他确实在光荣的决斗中杀死了至高王。我兄弟拒绝让帝国人为此复仇。

translations.english: He opened a gate and the wrong man rode out of it. If that man hadn't been Ulfric Stormcloak. If Ulfric hadn't killed High King Torygg...
translations.chinese: 他开了门，一个不该出去的人出去了。如果那个人不是乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷。如果乌弗瑞克没有杀死至高王托依格……

translations.english: So now he's dead.
translations.chinese: 所以现在他死了。

translations.english: Roggvir. He opened a gate and they executed him for it.
translations.chinese: 罗吉维尔。他打开了一扇大门，他们就因此处死了他。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BD6FD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: But it was Ulfric. And he did kill the High King, in honorable combat. My brother refused to allow the the Imperials to take revenge for the deed. | ZH: 但那就是乌弗瑞克。他确实在光荣的决斗中杀死了至高王。我兄弟拒绝让帝国人为此复仇。 | SID: 0026F8
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: He opened a gate and the wrong man rode out of it. If that man hadn't been Ulfric Stormcloak. If Ulfric hadn't killed High King Torygg... | ZH: 他开了门，一个不该出去的人出去了。如果那个人不是乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷。如果乌弗瑞克没有杀死至高王托依格…… | SID: 005DE7
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: So now he's dead. | ZH: 所以现在他死了。 | SID: 007F2B
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Roggvir. He opened a gate and they executed him for it. | ZH: 罗吉维尔。他打开了一扇大门，他们就因此处死了他。 | SID: 00A211

translations.english: You mean Roggvir. Yes. I made an appeal to Captain Aldis. He allowed Roggvir to have a proper Nord burial, as is the custom in Solitude.
translations.chinese: 你是说罗吉维尔吧。没错。我向艾迪斯队长请示过。他允许罗吉维尔按独孤城的习俗，进行一个正规的诺德葬礼。

agentText:

translations.english: Work in it? I own it.
translations.chinese: 工作？我拥有它。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BD6FF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Work in it? I own it. | ZH: 工作？我拥有它。 | SID: 00B17D

translations.english: You could say that. I own the place.
translations.chinese: 你可以这么说。我是这块地方的主人。

translations.english: So you work here?
translations.chinese: 你在这里工作？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BD700]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You could say that. I own the place. | ZH: 你可以这么说。我是这块地方的主人。 | SID: 00C263
- INFO:RNAM | EN: So you work here? | ZH: 你在这里工作？ | SID: 00AA13

translations.english: You must bring it to Avanchnzel, in the west. Return it to them. It must go back.
translations.chinese: 你必须把它带回西面的阿旺晨泽尔。还给他们。必须把它带回去。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BD701]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You must bring it to Avanchnzel, in the west. Return it to them. It must go back. | ZH: 你必须把它带回西面的阿旺晨泽尔。还给他们。必须把它带回去。 | SID: 007DEC

translations.english: Then like Roggvir, you're a Nord at heart. It's hard for many of the people here to understand.
translations.chinese: 那你和罗吉维尔一样，有一颗诺德人的心。这里很多人都不理解。

translations.english: I think Aldis understands. I don't think I could have stayed here if anyone else had...
translations.chinese: 我想艾迪斯是理解的。我觉得不能待在这里了，如果有人……

translations.english: I... I think I need to stop talking now...
translations.chinese: 我……我现在不能继续聊了……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BD702]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Then like Roggvir, you're a Nord at heart. It's hard for many of the people here to understand. | ZH: 那你和罗吉维尔一样，有一颗诺德人的心。这里很多人都不理解。 | SID: 006542
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I think Aldis understands. I don't think I could have stayed here if anyone else had... | ZH: 我想艾迪斯是理解的。我觉得不能待在这里了，如果有人…… | SID: 007F2A
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I... I think I need to stop talking now... | ZH: 我……我现在不能继续聊了…… | SID: 009047

translations.english: My books tell the stories. Have no doubt - as pretty as its streets are, as jovial as the bards may be... darkness is drawn to Solitude.
translations.chinese: 我的书里讲了这些故事。毫无疑问，正如街道如此美丽，诗人如此欢快……黑暗也如此被独孤城吸引。

translations.english: This city has a long history of madness and murder. The Wolf Queen... Pelagius... The death of High King Torygg... And now, public executions.
translations.chinese: 这座城市疯狂与谋杀的历史由来已久。狼后……佩拉吉奥斯……托依格之死……还有现在的公开处决。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BD703]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: My books tell the stories. Have no doubt - as pretty as its streets are, as jovial as the bards may be... darkness is drawn to Solitude. | ZH: 我的书里讲了这些故事。毫无疑问，正如街道如此美丽，诗人如此欢快……黑暗也如此被独孤城吸引。 | SID: 007F05
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: This city has a long history of madness and murder. The Wolf Queen... Pelagius... The death of High King Torygg... And now, public executions. | ZH: 这座城市疯狂与谋杀的历史由来已久。狼后……佩拉吉奥斯……托依格之死……还有现在的公开处决。 | SID: 007F08

translations.english: He'd beat me up, dump mead on my head, anything he could get away with. Once he even slipped a beehive into my bed.
translations.chinese: 他会揍我，往我脑袋上倒蜜酒，只要不至于挨罚，什么事都做得出来。有次他甚至往我的床上放了一个蜂巢。

translations.english: We were children, sure. But Roggvir never outgrew that immaturity, or his cruelty. So any talk about him being an "honorable" Nord? Pure folly.
translations.chinese: 那时我们确实还是孩子。但罗吉维尔从未摆脱那份幼稚，也从不掩饰他的残忍。有人说过他是个“可敬的”诺德吧？蠢透了。

translations.english: From that point forward, every time Vivienne and I were anywhere close to each other, he made sure to humiliate me.
translations.chinese: 之后，每当我和薇薇安走得近些，他都要羞辱我。

translations.english: I have no idea why, but one day, I told Roggvir I liked her. It was a stupid thing to do... He mocked me incessantly after that.
translations.chinese: 我不知道为什么，但有一天，我告诉罗吉维尔我喜欢她。是我办得蠢了……从那以后，他不断嘲笑我。

translations.english: Listen, Roggvir and I grew up together. It was us, a few others and Vivienne. Vivienne Onis.
translations.chinese: 听着，罗吉维尔和我是发小。除了我们，还有薇薇安。薇薇安·奥尼斯。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/4] | EN: He'd beat me up, dump mead on my head, anything he could get away with. Once he even slipped a beehive into my bed. | ZH: 他会揍我，往我脑袋上倒蜜酒，只要不至于挨罚，什么事都做得出来。有次他甚至往我的床上放了一个蜂巢。 | SID: 0005E9
- INFO:NAM1 [4/4] | EN: We were children, sure. But Roggvir never outgrew that immaturity, or his cruelty. So any talk about him being an "honorable" Nord? Pure folly. | ZH: 那时我们确实还是孩子。但罗吉维尔从未摆脱那份幼稚，也从不掩饰他的残忍。有人说过他是个“可敬的”诺德吧？蠢透了。 | SID: 0074D1
- INFO:NAM1 [2/4] | EN: From that point forward, every time Vivienne and I were anywhere close to each other, he made sure to humiliate me. | ZH: 之后，每当我和薇薇安走得近些，他都要羞辱我。 | SID: 007F59

translations.english: Though, admittedly... it helps.
translations.chinese: 不过，不可否认……这有效。

translations.english: Sometimes you just do what needs to be done. You don't have to hate a man to kill him.
translations.chinese: 有时候，你只能做该做的事。仇恨并不是杀人的唯一理由。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BD706]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Though, admittedly... it helps. | ZH: 不过，不可否认……这有效。 | SID: 0070E1
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Sometimes you just do what needs to be done. You don't have to hate a man to kill him. | ZH: 有时候，你只能做该做的事。仇恨并不是杀人的唯一理由。 | SID: 007F02

translations.english: If you're looking for a good attitude go see the Bards. They'll fake it for you if nothing else.
translations.chinese: 如果想看好态度，去找那些吟游诗人吧。就算没态度，他们也会装给你看。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BD707]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If you're looking for a good attitude go see the Bards. They'll fake it for you if nothing else. | ZH: 如果想看好态度，去找那些吟游诗人吧。就算没态度，他们也会装给你看。 | SID: 007F53

translations.english: It is done. I won't go back to Avanchnzel. I won't.
translations.chinese: 已经结束了。我不会再回阿旺晨泽尔了。不会。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BD708]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It is done. I won't go back to Avanchnzel. I won't. | ZH: 已经结束了。我不会再回阿旺晨泽尔了。不会。 | SID: 00A5E6

translations.english: I could have left it behind. I could have put it back where it came from.
translations.chinese: 我本可以把它留下的。我可以把它放回原处的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BD709]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I could have left it behind. I could have put it back where it came from. | ZH: 我本可以把它留下的。我可以把它放回原处的。 | SID: 002BD6

translations.english: Oh, wow. I knew it. I knew they were real! I have to remember to tell papa.
translations.chinese: 哦，哇哦。我就知道。我就知道它们是真的！我得告诉我爸爸。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BD70A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, wow. I knew it. I knew they were real! I have to remember to tell papa. | ZH: 哦，哇哦。我就知道。我就知道它们是真的！我得告诉我爸爸。 | SID: 005602

translations.english: No. I think he was entirely wrong. Roggvir's execution was justified and necessary.
translations.chinese: 不。我认为他大错特错。罗吉维尔的死刑正当且必要。

translations.english: Being honorable might make you a good man, but it doesn't make you right. Be a better world if it did.
translations.chinese: 诚实也许能让你成为好人，但并不意味着你就是正当的。如果真是这样，那世界就会更美好了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BD70B]

translations.english: I'm not certain what business it is of yours, but I'm moth... I mean Jarl Maven's steward.
translations.chinese: 我不知道这和你有什么关系，但我是我妈……我是说，玛雯领主的总管。

translations.english: I run the prisons in Riften, keep the riff-raff from robbing the good folk of this city and have drunks tossed into the lake.
translations.chinese: 我管理裂谷城的监狱，防止那些不三不四的人抢掠城里的好人或是把醉汉丢进湖里。

translations.english: To be honest, I doubt someone would be stupid enough to make an attempt on Maven... sorry, Jarl Maven's life.
translations.chinese: 老实说，我怀疑会不会真有人尝试对玛雯……抱歉，领主玛雯不利。

translations.english: But just in case, I'll be ready for them.
translations.chinese: 但以防万一，我会准备好的。

translations.english: As long as she continues to keep me at her side, she can count on my blade to protect her.
translations.chinese: 只要她继续把我留在身边，我的剑就会一直保护她。

translations.english: Ulfric's a bloody hero. I don't think there's a worthy Nord alive who'd dare argue the point.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克真他妈是个英雄。但凡活着的诺德人没人能反驳这一点。

translations.english: I don't think I'll be content until Ulfric sits upon the throne of Skyrim with the ashes of the Concordat at his feet.
translations.chinese: 除非乌弗瑞克坐上天际的宝座，把白金协定的纸灰踩在脚下，我是不会满足的。

translations.english: He's taking the Empire to task and making them answer for their crimes.
translations.chinese: 他要向帝国讨债，让他们为自己的罪行负责。

translations.english: Hey, if the Empire and the Stormcloaks want to kill each other over some foolish cause, I say let 'em.
translations.chinese: 嘿，如果帝国和风暴斗篷想为了一些蠢事自相残杀，那就随他们去吧。

translations.english: All I care about is two things: watchin' Maven's back and countin' the gold she pays me to do it.
translations.chinese: 我就关心两件事：保护好玛雯，然后数她给我的金币。

translations.chinese: 你最近去过洛利克镇吗？那里不管多冷，庄稼都不会枯萎。

translations.english: Is it good fortune? The blessings of the Divines? Who knows?
translations.chinese: 是运气好？还是圣灵保佑？谁知道呢？

translations.english: Now that I think on it, I did hear something rather interesting the other day.
translations.chinese: 我想起来，前些日子听到了些趣事。

translations.english: Of course, she would never admit such a thing. Captain Safia is far too proud a woman for that.
translations.chinese: 当然，她是不会承认的，这个女人太骄傲了。

translations.english: Some say the ship suffered damage to her hull when she struck an iceberg, and Captain Safia can't afford the repairs.
translations.chinese: 有人说是撞上冰山船体受损，萨非亚船长无力承担维修费。

translations.english: After all, Eorlund works the Skyforge. How is any smith going to compete with that?
translations.chinese: 毕竟，厄伦德可是守着天空锻炉。哪个铁匠还能跟他争？

translations.english: I'm not sure that it's news, but lately it seems like every blacksmith in Skyrim is out to prove that he's the equal of Eorlund Gray-Mane.
translations.chinese: 我不知道这算不算新闻。好像天际所有铁匠都打算证明自己和厄伦德·灰鬃一样厉害。

translations.english: It's not really a fair comparison, if you ask me.
translations.chinese: 要我说，这种比较根本不公平。

translations.english: Well, I did see something interesting not long ago.
translations.chinese: 嗯，我前不久是看到些有意思的。

translations.english: You've got to admire their courage, doing something like that with dragons on the loose and a war going on.
translations.chinese: 真是不得不佩服他们的胆量。巨龙肆虐，战争持续，他们居然还敢遍地跑生意。

translations.english: There were several Khajiit camped outside the walls of Whiterun. Seems they've been traveling around the whole of Skyrim peddling their wares.
translations.chinese: 几个卡吉特在白漫城外扎营，他们好像走遍天际兜售自己的商品。

translations.english: Make yourself useful and chop up some firewood. There's a few coins in it for you.
translations.chinese: 想做点事就去劈柴火吧。会付你几枚金币的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BF20D]
Translations:

translations.english: Honest gold for honest work.
translations.chinese: 有付出就会有回报。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BF20E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Honest gold for honest work. | ZH: 有付出就会有回报。 | SID: 007CB4

translations.english: They're probably trying to scare us into giving them more money and influence, so they can save us from the dragons threat.
translations.chinese: 他们八成是想吓唬我们，好让我们以为只要多给他们些钱和影响力，他们就能把咱从龙族的威胁下救出来。

translations.english: They seem to think it's at least a dozen, but I'm sure they're exaggerating.
translations.chinese: 他们好像认为至少有一打，不过我看他们是在吹牛。

translations.english: I heard those mages up in Winterhold have been trying to figure out how many dragons there are in Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 我听说冬堡的法师们一直想弄清楚天际到底有多少龙。

translations.english: Well, I did hear that Ulfric Stormcloak was slain while defending Windhelm against a dragon, but it sounds too good to be true.
translations.chinese: 嗯。我听说乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷在防御巨龙进攻风舵城时被杀了。要是真的就好了。

translations.english: I'll wager it was Ulfric himself that started the rumor. Maybe he thought it would bolster recruitment.
translations.chinese: 我打赌这是乌弗瑞克自己编的。他大概是想借此多招几个兵。

translations.chinese: 事态还能恶化到什么程度？

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: How much worse is this going to get? | ZH: 事态还能恶化到什么程度？ | SID: 00B92F

translations.english: We need to get in there and stop this!
translations.chinese: 我们得进去阻止这一切！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BF408]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We need to get in there and stop this! | ZH: 我们得进去阻止这一切！ | SID: 007CB0

translations.english: I'm as ready as I'm going to be.
translations.chinese: 我已经准备好了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BF445]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm as ready as I'm going to be. | ZH: 我已经准备好了。 | SID: 007CAF

translations.english: Not until we're all ready. We have to go together.
translations.chinese: 等我们都准备好再说。我们得一起进去。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BF446]
Translations:

translations.english: What are we waiting for?
translations.chinese: 我们还在等什么？

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BF447]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What are we waiting for? | ZH: 我们还在等什么？ | SID: 007CAB

translations.english: When it was clear we were going to have to fall back, she stayed behind and made sure the rest of us were all right.
translations.chinese: 当我们要撤退时，她留在后面，掩护我们安全撤了出来。

translations.english: She... She didn't make it.
translations.chinese: 她……没能活下来。

translations.english: Hold up. There's a bear just ahead. See her?
translations.chinese: 慢着。前面有头熊，看到了吗？

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BF45B]

translations.english: I guess we're lucky that didn't come down on top of us.
translations.chinese: 我们还算走运，没被它砸到。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BF45C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I guess we're lucky that didn't come down on top of us. | ZH: 我们还算走运，没被它砸到。 | SID: 00AC0F

translations.english: Whew. That was close.
translations.chinese: 喔，差一点了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BF45D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Whew. That was close. | ZH: 喔，差一点了。 | SID: 00F808

translations.english: I'd rather not tangle with her right now. We might be able to sneak by. Just take it nice and slow, and watch where you step.
translations.chinese: 我现在不想惊动她。我们也许可以偷偷溜过去。慢慢来，注意脚下。

translations.chinese: 看看这通向哪儿。

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Let's see where this goes. | ZH: 看看这通向哪儿。 | SID: 00E16A

translations.english: We'd better push on. I'm sure the others will find another way out.
translations.chinese: 我们最好向前走。我相信其他人能找到别的出路。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BF460]

translations.english: Damn it. No going back that way.
translations.chinese: 该死。回不去了。

Addon: Skyrim

Translations:

translations.english: Easy does it now.
translations.chinese: 慢慢来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BF462]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Easy does it now. | ZH: 慢慢来。 | SID: 007C9B

translations.english: Ah, indeed. Well there's a pretty puzzle. Not the kind of thing you'll find in your local bookshop. I'm sure you'll manage, though.
translations.chinese: 啊，真要这样可有些难办啊。这可不是什么能在书店随便找到的东西。但我相信你能行。

translations.english: I'll need an Elder Scroll to get any further. I'm working on locating it.
translations.chinese: 我需要一卷上古卷轴才能取得更多进展。我正在找。

translations.english: Su'um ahrk morah.
translations.chinese: 苏'目 哈克 摩拉。

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Su'um ahrk morah. | ZH: 苏'目 哈克 摩拉。 | SID: 00C3AA

translations.chinese: 那个词在呼唤你。去吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BF4BB]

translations.english: Why do you intrude here, if not for tinvaak?
translations.chinese: 如果不是为了汀瓦克，你干嘛要闯进来？

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BF4BC]

translations.english: I have spoken. The Rotmulaag waits.
translations.chinese: 我说完了。那个罗姆拉格正在等着。

Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I have spoken. The Rotmulaag waits. | ZH: 我说完了。那个罗姆拉格正在等着。 | SID: 007CA0

translations.english: I hope your trip to Labyrinthian was worth it.
translations.chinese: 希望你的迷城之旅有所收获。

translations.english: Ancano's power is growing. We can't crack whatever magic he's using to shield himself.
translations.chinese: 安卡诺的力量在增长。我们破解不了他的保护魔法。

translations.english: Look for yourself.
translations.chinese: 自己看看吧。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Look for yourself. | ZH: 自己看看吧。 | SID: 007C92

translations.english: Before I came into Zenithar's calling, I confess I was a thief. But I learned a few things in my time that might help you survive. Let me show you.
translations.chinese: 在我接受泽尼萨尔的感召之前，我曾经是个小偷。但我那阵子学的东西也许能保你一命。我来给你展示一下。

translations.english: Bless you, friend. You have renewed my hope.
translations.chinese: 祝福你，朋友。你让我重新燃起了希望。

translations.english: I have your amulet.
translations.chinese: 我拿到了你的护符了。

agentText:

- INFO:RNAM | EN: I have your amulet. | ZH: 我拿到了你的护符了。 | SID: 00B0CA

translations.english: Windhelm has been hard on my people. But our fortunes will turn, and we have shelter and food.
translations.chinese: 风舵城对我们一族太苛刻了。但我们会转运的，而且好歹还有住处和食物。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BFA06]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Windhelm has been hard on my people. But our fortunes will turn, and we have shelter and food. | ZH: 风舵城对我们一族太苛刻了。但我们会转运的，而且好歹还有住处和食物。 | SID: 0040C6

translations.english: I began praying to Zenithar, the god of wealth, to bring us some fortune, but thieves made off with my sacred amulet almost as soon as I bought it.
translations.chinese: 我开始向财富之神泽尼萨尔祈祷，希望他能给我们带来一些财富，但我刚买到护符，就被小偷偷走了。

translations.english: We have not faired well outside our native Black Marsh, but we're determined to make the best of things.
translations.chinese: 我们在黑沼泽以外的地方确实不太顺，但我们下定决心要尽力做好。

translations.english: Your people have bad luck?
translations.chinese: 你们族人运气不好吗？

translations.english: Shahvee would be in your debt, kind one.
translations.chinese: 沙维欠你的，你真是好人。

translations.english: I could find your amulet for you.
translations.chinese: 我可以帮你把护符找回来。

translations.english: Not your concern, anyway.
translations.chinese: 反正也不关你的事。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BFA09]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Not your concern, anyway. | ZH: 反正也不关你的事。 | SID: 001B4A

translations.english: If money's all you hold dear, then you you end up like Jaree-Ra. A plague on the city.
translations.chinese: 如果你只在乎钱，那你最后就会像加雷-拉一样。变成一场侵袭城市的瘟疫。

translations.english: Food, experience and a roof over my head in the finest city in Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 食物、经验，还有在天际最好的城市中一片栖身之地。

translations.english: I was a member of the court during the reign of Torygg's father. It was Torygg who appointed me to the position.
translations.chinese: 托依格的父亲在位时我就是宫廷的一员。是托依格任命我担任了这个职务。

translations.english: Ha! I like you.
translations.chinese: 哈！我喜欢你这样的。

translations.english: Buying one of our blades wouldn't hurt your chances, though.
translations.chinese: 不过买我们的武器不会影响你的机会。

translations.english: No man is a match for a dragon.
translations.chinese: 没人能够与龙匹敌。

agentText:

translations.english: Why of course. And will you also be needing the bow that shoots rainbows? Or perhaps a quiver that dispenses beer?
translations.chinese: 当然了。你应该还需要能射到彩虹的弓吧？或者能分啤酒的箭袋？

translations.english: Look, if you want arrows we have them, but don't insult my intelligence.
translations.chinese: 听着，如果你想要买箭矢，我们这儿有，但别侮辱我的智商。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: You'll have to make your own decision. It's a beautiful philosophy, but outside the seclusion of High Hrothgar, I was never able to hold to it.
translations.chinese: 你得自己拿主意。这是一种瑰丽的哲学，可惜一离开霍斯加修道院的隐居生活，我就再也无法秉持了。

translations.english: They always hope to teach the Dragonborn to respect the Way of the Voice as they do. They never fully succeed.
translations.chinese: 他们一直希望教会龙裔像他们一样尊重吼声之道，不过他们从没真的成功过。

translations.english: You're Dragonborn. The rules don't apply to you. You can Shout the way dragons do... without training, through inborn instinct.
translations.chinese: 你是龙裔。他们的规矩对你不适用。你天生可以像龙族一样使用龙吼……不需要任何训练，而是依靠本能。

translations.chinese: 我……没能一直遵从他们严格的教诲，但我也认可它不该被滥用。看来，艾恩盖尔的教导也不是全白费了。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I have... fallen from their strict teaching, but I still don't feel it should be used lightly. Not all of Arngeir's lecturing was wasted, it seems. | ZH: 我……没能一直遵从他们严格的教诲，但我也认可它不该被滥用。看来，艾恩盖尔的教导也不是全白费了。 | SID: 007C25

translations.english: Yes. The oldest and most powerful, although he may not seem so.
translations.chinese: 没错，他们当中最年长也最强大的人，虽然他看上去不像。

translations.english: I doubt he's forgiven me for leaving. And for... well, for what he'd consider blasphemy. Using Shouts for anything but worship of Kynareth.
translations.chinese: 我怀疑他是否原谅了我的离去。而且不知他是否会觉得我亵渎了吼声之道……哎，我将龙吼用在了除礼敬凯娜瑞丝以外的地方。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I doubt he's forgiven me for leaving. And for... well, for what he'd consider blasphemy. Using Shouts for anything but worship of Kynareth. | ZH: 我怀疑他是否原谅了我的离去。而且不知他是否会觉得我亵渎了吼声之道……哎，我将龙吼用在了除礼敬凯娜瑞丝以外的地方。 | SID: 00F786

translations.english: I spent almost ten years at High Hrothgar, learning the Way of the Voice. Then the Great War came... I couldn't stand missing it.
translations.chinese: 我在霍斯加修道院学习研习吼声之道将近十年。后来浩大战争爆发了……我不想错过。

translations.english: I often think about High Hrothgar. It's very... disconnected from the troubles down here. But that's why I couldn't stay, and why I couldn't go back.
translations.chinese: 我时常回忆起霍斯加修道院。那里……远离世间的纷扰。但这就是我当初不留下，现在不回去的原因了。

translations.english: Yes. They chose me when I was just a lad. It was a great honor, of course. I was to become a Greybeard myself.
translations.chinese: 是的。在我少年时，他们就选中了我。能够在将来成为灰胡子，是一种殊荣。

translations.english: I'm sure Arngeir would call it one of my failings.
translations.chinese: 我想艾恩盖尔会说这是我性格的缺陷之一。

translations.english: I suppose the Greybeards care about Skyrim's troubles, in their way, but I needed to do something about it.
translations.chinese: 我想灰胡子在以自己的方式关心天际的问题。但我需要做些什么。

translations.english: Yes, my lord.
translations.chinese: 是，大人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BFC48]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, my lord. | ZH: 是，大人。 | SID: 007C12

translations.english: No matter. Go to High Hrothgar. Learn what the Greybeards can teach you.
translations.chinese: 没关系。去霍斯加修道院吧。灰胡子教导的东西可要好好学。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000BFC49]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No matter. Go to High Hrothgar. Learn what the Greybeards can teach you. | ZH: 没关系。去霍斯加修道院吧。灰胡子教导的东西可要好好学。 | SID: 007C11

translations.english: I know more than most. I trained with the Greybeards at High Hrothgar when I was a boy.
translations.chinese: 我知道的比大多数人都要多。我年轻时曾经在霍斯加修道院和灰胡子们一起训练。

translations.english: The Way of the Voice is an ancient, spiritual form of magic in which you project your vital essence into a "thu'um" or Shout.
translations.chinese: 吼声之道是一种古老、精神性的魔法形式，将你的精华以“吐'目”或龙吼的形式投射出去。

translations.english: The Dragonborn is different - you have an inborn ability to Shout, the same way dragons are said to.
translations.chinese: 但龙裔则不同，你天生具备像龙族一样的龙吼才能。

translations.english: Most people would need to train for years before they could even attempt a single Shout.
translations.chinese: 大多数人都需要训练多年才能尝试一种简单的龙吼。

translations.english: Back to business, Proventus. We still have a city to defend.
translations.chinese: 普罗万图斯，回归正题吧。我们还要负责防守一座城呢。

agentText:

translations.english: I envy you, you know. To climb the 7,000 Steps again... I made the pilgrimage once, did you know that?
translations.chinese: 我有点羡慕你啊。我也想再爬一次七千级台阶……你知道吗，我以前也做过一次朝圣之旅。

translations.english: I wonder that the Greybeards even notice what's going on down here. They haven't seemed to care before.
translations.chinese: 我不知道灰胡子是否注意到山下发生了什么。他们以前似乎不是很在意。

translations.english: High Hrothgar is a very peaceful place. Very... disconnected from the troubles of this world.
translations.chinese: 霍斯加修道院是个和尘世烦恼隔绝的宁静所在。

translations.english: It means you have the Dragon Blood - you have an inborn ability to use your Voice the way dragons do.
translations.chinese: 这意味着你拥有龙之血脉，你天生就能使用像龙一样的吼声。

translations.english: The old tales tell of Dragonborn heroes who slew dragons and took their power.
translations.chinese: 古老传说讲述了龙裔英雄们杀死巨龙掠夺力量的事。

translations.english: With the dragons returning, and now a Dragonborn appearing... maybe the Greybeards know what it all means.
translations.chinese: 龙族回归，现在又出了一位龙裔……或许灰胡子知道这意味着什么。

translations.english: It seems those tales are true.
translations.chinese: 看来故事是真的。

translations.english: There hasn't been a Dragonborn seen in the land for centuries. Not since Talos himself walked the 7,000 Steps to High Hrothgar.
translations.chinese: 自塔洛斯攀登霍斯加修道院前的七千级台阶以来，这片土地已经好几个世纪没有出现过龙裔了。

translations.english: It means you can kill dragons and steal their power - even speak with a dragon's voice, they say.
translations.chinese: 这意味着你可以杀死巨龙并夺取他们的力量，甚至用龙的吼声来呼喊。

translations.english: Ulfric can tell you more than most anyone. He was studying to be a Greybeard himself, back before the Great War.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克可以告诉你更多，浩大战争前，他就在学习如何成为灰胡子。

translations.chinese: 我年轻的时候曾和他们一起研习。他们教会了我如何使用龙吼。

translations.english: And guess who owns the Silver-Blood Inn? Not that we named it that, the people just insisted.
translations.chinese: 猜猜银血旅店的老板是谁？不是我们给它取了这么个名字，是人们非要这么叫。

translations.english: My dear vagrant, we're the only family worth knowing in Markarth. We own everything in this city, even the jail.
translations.chinese: 亲爱的游民，我们是马卡斯唯一值得被知晓的家族。我们拥有着城市的一切，甚至是监狱。

translations.english: Have you been bringing the battle to the Silver Hand, friend? I wish I could be there with you. Soon enough.
translations.chinese: 你去和银手交战了吗，朋友？真希望我能陪在你的身边。但很快就有机会了。

translations.chinese: 我一直在替你打掩护，目前还没人察觉咱们的小动作，不过也快了。

translations.chinese: 除非你是来付赎金的，否则就滚蛋。

translations.chinese: 哦，是你啊。我以为你一个人处理不了呢。克利斯特走了吗？

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, it's you. I didn't think you could handle this on your own. Did you get rid of Christer? | ZH: 哦，是你啊。我以为你一个人处理不了呢。克利斯特走了吗？ | SID: 00814F

translations.english: You cannot eat Gleda! Gleda is protected by Grok!
translations.chinese: 你不能吃格丽达！葛洛克会保护她！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C016C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You cannot eat Gleda! Gleda is protected by Grok! | ZH: 你不能吃格丽达！葛洛克会保护她！ | SID: 007BF8

translations.english: I sent a blessing to Mundus, a wasting plague that infected a scattering of Breton villages.
translations.chinese: 我给梦达思送去了祝福，一场散播在布莱顿村庄中的瘟疫。

translations.english: One of my monks, the elf Orchendor, was sent to gather these Afflicted. He shepherded them into Bthardamz for me, but has since lost his way.
translations.chinese: 我手下的僧侣，精灵奥尘多，受命召集这些病痛者。他代我把这些人带进了巴塔丹兹，却背叛了我。

translations.english: I will not stand for betrayal. I want you to go to Bthardamz and kill Orchendor, in my name.
translations.chinese: 我不容许背叛。以我的名义，去巴塔丹兹杀掉奥尘多。

translations.english: (Remain silent)
translations.chinese: （保持沉默）

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0276]
Translations:
- INFO:RNAM | EN: (Remain silent) | ZH: （保持沉默） | SID: 002524

translations.english: A joke? Alain Dufont... a joke? I am a king on my throne, and you, my friend... you will die slowly, and painfully.
translations.chinese: 笑话？竟敢说阿兰·杜峰特是……笑话？我就是王座上的王，而你，朋友……你会慢慢地、痛苦地死去。

translations.english: You will die as you lived. An arrogant joke.
translations.chinese: 你无论活着还是死了都是个天大的笑话。

translations.english: By Sithis, I need details. Get to the point.
translations.chinese: 西帝斯在上，我需要细节。说重点吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0278]
Translations:
- INFO:RNAM | EN: By Sithis, I need details. Get to the point. | ZH: 西帝斯在上，我需要细节。说重点吧。 | SID: 007BE3

translations.english: Muiri? Muiri? So, what, you're the cow's champion? Oh, now that is rich. Well then, champion, let's get this over with.
translations.chinese: 暮蕊？暮蕊？怎么，你是那头母牛的勇士？哦豁，那可太好了。来吧，勇士，动手啊。

translations.english: Muiri says goodbye. Forever.
translations.chinese: 暮蕊说，永别了。

agentText:

translations.english: Ha! My opponent is so paralyzed with terror, no words will come. Let's be done with it, then!
translations.chinese: 哈！我的对手被吓得目瞪口呆，说不出话了。那就赶紧去死吧！

translations.english: If not for the war, we might have enough guards in the hold to protect the settlements. That the dragons should return now is most unfortunate.
translations.chinese: 如果不是因为战争，我们可能还有足够的卫兵来保护定居点。龙族回归可真是太不幸了。

translations.english: How can we? We're a community of farmers, not fighting men.
translations.chinese: 我们怎么？我们这里都是农民，没有战士。

translations.english: How will you protect yourselves against the dragons?
translations.chinese: 你们要怎么保护自身不受龙族的攻击呢？

agentText:

translations.english: These secret visits to the tavern will make you an easy target for an enemy assassin. You should have told me first.
translations.chinese: 秘密造访酒馆很容易让你成为敌方刺客的目标。你应该提前告诉我一声。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: There are no secrets here, my curious friend. Our prosperity is simply the result of hard work, good fortune and the blessings of the gods.
translations.chinese: 这里没什么秘密可言，好奇的朋友。我们的繁荣仅仅是勤劳工作、幸运和神灵保佑的结果。

translations.english: Secret? What makes you think there's a secret?
translations.chinese: 秘诀？你为什么会觉得有秘诀？

translations.english: Your farms are thriving, even despite the harsh climate. What's your secret?
translations.chinese: 气候恶劣的条件下，你们农场还那么兴旺。有什么秘诀吗？

translations.english: Heard about that, did you? Yes, I went out for a pint or two. What of it?
translations.chinese: 你听说了？是，我出去喝了几杯。怎么了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C02D1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Heard about that, did you? Yes, I went out for a pint or two. What of it? | ZH: 你听说了？是，我出去喝了几杯。怎么了？ | SID: 0097D2

translations.english: Balgruuf, did you slip out again last night for a drink at the Bannered Mare?
translations.chinese: 巴尔古夫，你昨晚是不是又溜出去到悬旗母马喝酒了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C02D2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Balgruuf, did you slip out again last night for a drink at the Bannered Mare? | ZH: 巴尔古夫，你昨晚是不是又溜出去到悬旗母马喝酒了？ | SID: 006E0E

translations.english: We were as close as kinsmen, and when Rorik returned home I came with him. I am happy to spend my twilight years here with my good friend.
translations.chinese: 我们就像亲人一样亲密，洛利克回乡时，我也跟他一起来了。我很高兴能在这里和好友一起安度晚年。

translations.english: Rorik fought for the Empire in the Great War. He was gravely wounded, and so was brought before me. I was a healer then, you see.
translations.chinese: 洛利克在浩大战争期间为帝国作战。他受了重伤，被带到我面前，那时我是个治疗师。

translations.english: Have you met Rorik? He owns these lands, and it's from him that our village gets its name. We have been friends for many years now.
translations.chinese: 你见过洛利克了吗？他拥有这片土地，我们的村子也是因他得名的。我们是多年的老朋友了。

translations.english: How did a Breton like yourself come to dwell in Rorikstead?
translations.chinese: 你一个布莱顿人怎么来到洛利克镇的？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C02D3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: We were as close as kinsmen, and when Rorik returned home I came with him. I am happy to spend my twilight years here with my good friend. | ZH: 我们就像亲人一样亲密，洛利克回乡时，我也跟他一起来了。我很高兴能在这里和好友一起安度晚年。 | SID: 007BAC
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Rorik fought for the Empire in the Great War. He was gravely wounded, and so was brought before me. I was a healer then, you see. | ZH: 洛利克在浩大战争期间为帝国作战。他受了重伤，被带到我面前，那时我是个治疗师。 | SID: 007BAE
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Have you met Rorik? He owns these lands, and it's from him that our village gets its name. We have been friends for many years now. | ZH: 你见过洛利克了吗？他拥有这片土地，我们的村子也是因他得名的。我们是多年的老朋友了。 | SID: 00FCB3
- INFO:RNAM | EN: How did a Breton like yourself come to dwell in Rorikstead? | ZH: 你一个布莱顿人怎么来到洛利克镇的？ | SID: 007BAA

translations.english: Yes, my lord.
translations.chinese: 是，大人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C02D4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, my lord. | ZH: 是，大人。 | SID: 00D1E1

translations.english: Nonsense. If Balgruuf falls, someone will take his place, for better or worse. In the meantime, we have a war to win. And win we must.
translations.chinese: 无稽之谈。如果巴尔古夫倒下，无论好坏，总会有人接替他。与此同时，我们还有仗要打。我们必须赢得胜利。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C02D5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Nonsense. If Balgruuf falls, someone will take his place, for better or worse. In the meantime, we have a war to win. And win we must. | ZH: 无稽之谈。如果巴尔古夫倒下，无论好坏，总会有人接替他。与此同时，我们还有仗要打。我们必须赢得胜利。 | SID: 007BD1

translations.english: The best we can hope for a swift end to the conflict. The longer the war goes on, the worse it will be for all for us, I'm afraid.
translations.chinese: 我们所期望的最好就是冲突能尽快结束。战争持续越长，对我们恐怕越不利。

translations.english: And of course, as the war drags on and supplies run low, our ample fields and stores of food will make a tempting target for desperate men.
translations.chinese: 当然，随着战争的持续和物资的短缺，我们富饶的土地和储备的食物会成为散兵游勇的绝佳目标。

translations.english: With most of the hold's fighting men committed to the war, there are fewer swords to keep the roads safe from brigands and wild beasts.
translations.chinese: 由于领地内的大部分战士都投入了战争，保护道路不受强盗和野兽袭击的武装人员就越来越少了。

translations.english: Not yet, anyway, though it certainly could.
translations.chinese: 至少现在还没有，不过肯定是有可能的。

translations.english: Has the war taken a toll on your settlement and its people?
translations.chinese: 战争对你们聚落和居民造成损失了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C02D6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: The best we can hope for a swift end to the conflict. The longer the war goes on, the worse it will be for all for us, I'm afraid. | ZH: 我们所期望的最好就是冲突能尽快结束。战争持续越长，对我们恐怕越不利。 | SID: 007BA0
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: And of course, as the war drags on and supplies run low, our ample fields and stores of food will make a tempting target for desperate men. | ZH: 当然，随着战争的持续和物资的短缺，我们富饶的土地和储备的食物会成为散兵游勇的绝佳目标。 | SID: 007BA1
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: With most of the hold's fighting men committed to the war, there are fewer swords to keep the roads safe from brigands and wild beasts. | ZH: 由于领地内的大部分战士都投入了战争，保护道路不受强盗和野兽袭击的武装人员就越来越少了。 | SID: 007BA3
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Not yet, anyway, though it certainly could. | ZH: 至少现在还没有，不过肯定是有可能的。 | SID: 007BA8
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Has the war taken a toll on your settlement and its people? | ZH: 战争对你们聚落和居民造成损失了吗？ | SID: 007B9C

translations.english: You'll have to make do with what we have, Proventus.
translations.chinese: 你只能用现有的资源想办法了，普罗万图斯。

translations.english: Our coffers are nearly empty. I can scarcely afford to pay the guards, and we need every one of them in these troubled times.
translations.chinese: 我们的金库已经快空了。我快付不起卫兵的工资了，但在这个困难时期，我们需要他们每个人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C02D7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: You'll have to make do with what we have, Proventus. | ZH: 你只能用现有的资源想办法了，普罗万图斯。 | SID: 003103
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Our coffers are nearly empty. I can scarcely afford to pay the guards, and we need every one of them in these troubled times. | ZH: 我们的金库已经快空了。我快付不起卫兵的工资了，但在这个困难时期，我们需要他们每个人。 | SID: 007BDA

translations.english: And if an assassin slips past the night watch, we won't have a Jarl at all. Without Balgruuf's leadership, Whiterun will descend into chaos.
translations.chinese: 如果刺客溜过守夜卫兵，我们就没有领主了。没了巴尔古夫的领导，白漫城会陷入混乱。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C02D8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And if an assassin slips past the night watch, we won't have a Jarl at all. Without Balgruuf's leadership, Whiterun will descend into chaos. | ZH: 如果刺客溜过守夜卫兵，我们就没有领主了。没了巴尔古夫的领导，白漫城会陷入混乱。 | SID: 002BC7

translations.english: A healer named Jouane saved my life. He's been my closest friend ever since. I tell you, that man is a miracle worker.
translations.chinese: 一个叫乔安内的治疗师救了我。从那以后他就成了我最好的哥们。我跟你说，那家伙是个能创造奇迹的人。

translations.english: Aye, that I did. I commanded a force of several dozen men, most of them levies from villages in this part of the hold.
translations.chinese: 是啊，参加过。我指挥一支几十人的部队，大部分都是从领内这片地区的村镇招募来的。

translations.english: I damn near met my end in that war. An Aldmeri soldier ran me through with his blade and left me for dead.
translations.chinese: 那场战争差点要了我的命。一个先祖神洲士兵用刀刺穿了我，把我扔下自生自灭。

translations.english: Did you fight in the Great War?
translations.chinese: 你参加过浩大战争？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C02D9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: A healer named Jouane saved my life. He's been my closest friend ever since. I tell you, that man is a miracle worker. | ZH: 一个叫乔安内的治疗师救了我。从那以后他就成了我最好的哥们。我跟你说，那家伙是个能创造奇迹的人。 | SID: 002749
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Aye, that I did. I commanded a force of several dozen men, most of them levies from villages in this part of the hold. | ZH: 是啊，参加过。我指挥一支几十人的部队，大部分都是从领内这片地区的村镇招募来的。 | SID: 00A961
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I damn near met my end in that war. An Aldmeri soldier ran me through with his blade and left me for dead. | ZH: 那场战争差点要了我的命。一个先祖神洲士兵用刀刺穿了我，把我扔下自生自灭。 | SID: 00D0CB
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Did you fight in the Great War? | ZH: 你参加过浩大战争？ | SID: 003578

translations.english: My lord, since Ulfric Stormcloak's uprising, the cost of goods has doubled. I'll need more coin if I'm to provision us properly.
translations.chinese: 我主啊，自从乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷起义以来，商品价格已经翻番了。我需要更多的钱才能保证食物供应充足。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C02DA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: My lord, since Ulfric Stormcloak's uprising, the cost of goods has doubled. I'll need more coin if I'm to provision us properly. | ZH: 我主啊，自从乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷起义以来，商品价格已经翻番了。我需要更多的钱才能保证食物供应充足。 | SID: 007BD9

translations.english: What would you have me do? If we do not send men to fight in the war, you'll find yourself guarding one of Ulfric's men.
translations.chinese: 你想让我做什么？如果我们不派人去打仗，你会发现自己在护卫乌弗瑞克的人了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C02DB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What would you have me do? If we do not send men to fight in the war, you'll find yourself guarding one of Ulfric's men. | ZH: 你想让我做什么？如果我们不派人去打仗，你会发现自己在护卫乌弗瑞克的人了。 | SID: 005AEF

translations.english: Back then, nothing would grow here and so the land was worthless. Now, thanks to hard work and the gods' blessings, our farms prosper.
translations.chinese: 那时，这里寸草不生，所以地不值钱。现在，多亏了辛勤的工作和众神保佑，我们的农场繁荣了。

translations.english: Yes, that's right. Look around you. Most of the lands you see are mine.
translations.chinese: 是，没错。看看周围。你能看到的大部分土地都是我的。

translations.english: Most of this I purchased while my comrades were fighting in the south, helping the Empire against the Aldmeri Dominion.
translations.chinese: 大部分都是我和同志们在南边帮帝国和先祖神洲作战时买的。

translations.english: Is the town of Rorikstead named for you?
translations.chinese: 洛利克镇是因你命名的吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C02DC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Back then, nothing would grow here and so the land was worthless. Now, thanks to hard work and the gods' blessings, our farms prosper. | ZH: 那时，这里寸草不生，所以地不值钱。现在，多亏了辛勤的工作和众神保佑，我们的农场繁荣了。 | SID: 007B8F

translations.english: Ennis prides himself on his shrewd business schemes. For my part, I'm far happier working with cattle and crops than with people.
translations.chinese: 埃尼斯为自己精明的商业计划感到骄傲。但对我来说，跟牛和庄稼一起工作比和人在一起工作要快乐得多。

translations.english: Where do you sell your surplus crops?
translations.chinese: 你把多余的庄稼卖到哪儿去？

translations.english: I see in your eyes that you think I jest. I assure you, I don't. I am proud, and rightfully so, of the work we do here.
translations.chinese: 我从你眼睛里看得出你以为我在开玩笑。我向你保证，我没有。我为我们在这里所做的工作感到自豪，这是理所当然的。

translations.english: Working the soil with your hands, seeing your seeds take root and grow, tending a herd... there is a joy in honest labor you won't find elsewhere.
translations.chinese: 用双手耕耘土壤，看着种子生根发芽，然后照顾它们……勤恳劳动的乐趣是在别处找不到的。

translations.english: Do I detect a bit of jealousy in your tone? I would hardly blame you. What calling could be more noble than this?
translations.chinese: 我听你是有点嫉妒吗？我不怪你。还有什么职业能比这更高尚呢？

translations.english: Your farm is doing very well. You must be proud.
translations.chinese: 你们的农场这么好，你肯定很骄傲。

translations.english: Vald was tasked with getting it here safely and it ended up at the bottom of Lake Honrich.
translations.chinese: 沃德的任务就是把它安全送到，结果却掉到了霍利奇湖底。

translations.chinese: 他欠我一笔债。事实上他就够走运了，我只是让他去给墨瑟当差。

translations.chinese: 把这份文书交给沃德。债给他免了，但我不想在裂谷城再碰到他。

translations.english: But you were not placed in harm's way on purpose.
translations.chinese: 但绝不是故意让你冒险的。

translations.english: This was not the intention, to be sure. It is true that J'zargo was slightly concerned there may have been... problems.
translations.chinese: 但这绝不是他的意图。虽然杰'扎格有点担心会……出问题。

translations.english: Oh. J'zargo takes this to mean it did not go... well.
translations.chinese: 哦。杰'扎格知道这么说就是它的效果没有预期的……好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C04FD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Still, you are a good friend to J'zargo now, for taking this risk. J'zargo thanks you. | ZH: 不过，因为你冒了这个险，你现在是杰'扎格的好朋友了。杰'扎格很谢谢你。 | SID: 007ABD
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: But you were not placed in harm's way on purpose. | ZH: 但绝不是故意让你冒险的。 | SID: 007ABE

- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Oh. J'zargo takes this to mean it did not go... well. | ZH: 哦。杰'扎格知道这么说就是它的效果没有预期的……好。 | SID: 007AC1

translations.english: Okay, now don't move at all.
translations.chinese: 好了，现在请不要动。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Oh, good. I was afraid I'd have to go ask J'zargo.
translations.chinese: 哦，好。我还以为得去问杰'扎格呢。

translations.english: Now, you just stand there...
translations.chinese: 现在，你就站在那儿……

translations.english: Thank you. I was afraid I'd have to figure out some way to do this on my own.
translations.chinese: 谢谢。我还以为得自己想办法解决呢。

translations.english: It is good that you were willing to help J'zargo. This will not be forgotten, friend.
translations.chinese: 你能愿意帮助杰'扎格真是太好了。杰'扎格是不会忘记的，朋友。

translations.english: It is true, J'zargo suspected there might be problems. But this is most disappointing.
translations.chinese: 杰'扎格怀疑可能有问题。但这太令人失望了。

translations.english: No?
translations.chinese: 不顺吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0502]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: It is good that you were willing to help J'zargo. This will not be forgotten, friend. | ZH: 你能愿意帮助杰'扎格真是太好了。杰'扎格是不会忘记的，朋友。 | SID: 007B07
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: It is true, J'zargo suspected there might be problems. But this is most disappointing. | ZH: 杰'扎格怀疑可能有问题。但这太令人失望了。 | SID: 007B08
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: No? | ZH: 不顺吗？ | SID: 00DE52

translations.english: And? Were they magnificent?
translations.chinese: 然后呢？很华丽吧？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0503]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And? Were they magnificent? | ZH: 然后呢？很华丽吧？ | SID: 007AB3

translations.english: You have to hold still or this isn't going to work.
translations.chinese: 你最好保持别动，不然就没用了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0504]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You have to hold still or this isn't going to work. | ZH: 你最好保持别动，不然就没用了。 | SID: 0006EA

translations.english: No, not that kind of spell. Believe me when I say I wouldn't be asking if it weren't necessary.
translations.chinese: 不行，不是那种法术。相信我，如果没有必要，我是不会问的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0505]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No, not that kind of spell. Believe me when I say I wouldn't be asking if it weren't necessary. | ZH: 不行，不是那种法术。相信我，如果没有必要，我是不会问的。 | SID: 00579E

translations.english: But... J'zargo is pleased to see that you are here, and not in pieces!
translations.chinese: 但……杰'扎格很高兴你还站在这儿，而不是炸碎掉了。

translations.english: Ah. No, that was not supposed to happen.
translations.chinese: 哦。不，不应该是这样。

translations.english: You are a good friend to have done this. J'zargo will not forget it.
translations.chinese: 你真是个好朋友。杰'扎格不会忘记的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0506]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: But... J'zargo is pleased to see that you are here, and not in pieces! | ZH: 但……杰'扎格很高兴你还站在这儿，而不是炸碎掉了。 | SID: 0057CD
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Ah. No, that was not supposed to happen. | ZH: 哦。不，不应该是这样。 | SID: 007B04

translations.english: Do you... do you feel all right? You look very, umm, green.
translations.chinese: 你……感觉怎么样？你看起来很，呃，很绿。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0507]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Do you... do you feel all right? You look very, umm, green. | ZH: 你……感觉怎么样？你看起来很，呃，很绿。 | SID: 007AF0

translations.english: I'll get it right this time, I swear.
translations.chinese: 这次一定能成的，我发誓。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0508]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'll get it right this time, I swear. | ZH: 这次一定能成的，我发誓。 | SID: 00D696

translations.english: This is gettin' dangerous. Don't let anythin' get the jump on you.
translations.chinese: 越来越危险了。别让任何事影响到你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C050E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This is gettin' dangerous. Don't let anythin' get the jump on you. | ZH: 越来越危险了。别让任何事影响到你。 | SID: 006129

translations.english: While you're in there, help yourself to anything in Frey's manor. I would.
translations.chinese: 进去的时候，弗雷屋里的东西随你拿吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C050F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: While you're in there, help yourself to anything in Frey's manor. I would. | ZH: 进去的时候，弗雷屋里的东西随你拿吧。 | SID: 00440A

translations.english: Careful at Mercer's place, I don't want to lose anyone else to that madman.
translations.chinese: 在墨瑟家小心点，我不想再有人被那个疯子夺去了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0510]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Careful at Mercer's place, I don't want to lose anyone else to that madman. | ZH: 在墨瑟家小心点，我不想再有人被那个疯子夺去了。 | SID: 007B62

translations.english: I'll watch for Mercer, just get the information we need.
translations.chinese: 我会防着墨瑟，只要拿到我们需要的东西就行。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0511]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'll watch for Mercer, just get the information we need. | ZH: 我会防着墨瑟，只要拿到我们需要的东西就行。 | SID: 001054

translations.english: Come on, we need to show the journal to the Guild.
translations.chinese: 快点，我们得把日记交给公会。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0512]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Come on, we need to show the journal to the Guild. | ZH: 快点，我们得把日记交给公会。 | SID: 007B5F

translations.english: Can't talk long, got to keep my eyes open for Mercer.
translations.chinese: 不能多聊了。我得注意墨瑟。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0513]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Can't talk long, got to keep my eyes open for Mercer. | ZH: 不能多聊了。我得注意墨瑟。 | SID: 00EC9D

translations.english: Hold your thoughts 'til after we untangle this mess.
translations.chinese: 在我们理清这团乱麻之前，最好别胡思乱想了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0514]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hold your thoughts 'til after we untangle this mess. | ZH: 在我们理清这团乱麻之前，最好别胡思乱想了。 | SID: 0027A2

translations.english: Need to stay focused in case Frey comes back, make it fast.
translations.chinese: 集中注意，以防墨瑟回来，动作要快。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0515]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Need to stay focused in case Frey comes back, make it fast. | ZH: 集中注意，以防墨瑟回来，动作要快。 | SID: 00FC92

translations.english: How can I help?
translations.chinese: 我能帮上什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0516]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: How can I help? | ZH: 我能帮上什么？ | SID: 0049F2

translations.english: I can't believe this is happening, lass.
translations.chinese: 真不敢相信会发生这种事，姑娘。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0517]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I can't believe this is happening, lass. | ZH: 真不敢相信会发生这种事，姑娘。 | SID: 003B0B

translations.english: Just take a step back and let me figure this out. Then we'll talk.
translations.chinese: 你先别打扰我，让我想想办法。然后再说。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0518]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Just take a step back and let me figure this out. Then we'll talk. | ZH: 你先别打扰我，让我想想办法。然后再说。 | SID: 004BAE

translations.english: You had your chance to talk!
translations.chinese: 给你个说话的机会！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C05D5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You had your chance to talk! | ZH: 给你个说话的机会！ | SID: 00909C

translations.english: Please be careful here. The site isn't entirely secured.
translations.chinese: 请小心。这里还不是完全安全。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0630]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Please be careful here. The site isn't entirely secured. | ZH: 请小心。这里还不是完全安全。 | SID: 0017FA

translations.english: Do you think there's treasure here? Something to make J'zargo a powerful wizard?
translations.chinese: 你觉得这里会有宝藏吗？能让杰'扎格成为强大巫师的东西？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0631]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Do you think there's treasure here? Something to make J'zargo a powerful wizard? | ZH: 你觉得这里会有宝藏吗？能让杰'扎格成为强大巫师的东西？ | SID: 00F326

translations.english: Who knows what we might find in here.
translations.chinese: 谁知道我们会在这里发现什么。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0632]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Who knows what we might find in here. | ZH: 谁知道我们会在这里发现什么。 | SID: 0082DB

translations.english: I'm not seeing signs of any warding magics at all. Either they're not here, or they were removed long ago.
translations.chinese: 我在这里看不到任何结界魔法的迹象。要么是根本没有，要么就是早就失效了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0633]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm not seeing signs of any warding magics at all. Either they're not here, or they were removed long ago. | ZH: 我在这里看不到任何结界魔法的迹象。要么是根本没有，要么就是早就失效了。 | SID: 0093F5

translations.english: This is better than sitting around talking about magic, don't you think?
translations.chinese: 你不觉得这比坐而论道好多了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0634]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This is better than sitting around talking about magic, don't you think? | ZH: 你不觉得这比坐而论道好多了吗？ | SID: 0073AD

translations.english: Can you imagine what it was like, living here so long ago? The first men in Tamriel, here...
translations.chinese: 你能想象很久以前这里的样子吗？泰姆瑞尔的第一批人类，就在这儿……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0635]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Can you imagine what it was like, living here so long ago? The first men in Tamriel, here... | ZH: 你能想象很久以前这里的样子吗？泰姆瑞尔的第一批人类，就在这儿…… | SID: 00BCBD

translations.english: I'm not so sure we should be here.
translations.chinese: 我不确定咱们该不该来这儿。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0636]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm not so sure we should be here. | ZH: 我不确定咱们该不该来这儿。 | SID: 0090E0

translations.english: Svari, yes. It's been hard on her. The girl misses her uncle.
translations.chinese: 斯瓦瑞，没错。这对她来说很艰难。她会想念她舅舅的。

translations.english: I've tried to explain that Roggvir did something bad and that we all have to be accountable for our actions but... a child feels what she will.
translations.chinese: 我试着解释罗吉维尔做了坏事，我们都必须为自己的行为负责，但是……孩子总会有自己的想法。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0694]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Svari, yes. It's been hard on her. The girl misses her uncle. | ZH: 斯瓦瑞，没错。这对她来说很艰难。她会想念她舅舅的。 | SID: 007AAA
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I've tried to explain that Roggvir did something bad and that we all have to be accountable for our actions but... a child feels what she will. | ZH: 我试着解释罗吉维尔做了坏事，我们都必须为自己的行为负责，但是……孩子总会有自己的想法。 | SID: 00EF59

translations.english: Because the food and resources we get from the Empire are important to our people.
translations.chinese: 因为我们从帝国获取的食物和资源对我们的人民很重要。

translations.english: Because the Dominion is a sleeping beast that Skyrim cannot slay alone. Because many Nords are part of the Imperial army even now.
translations.chinese: 因为先祖神洲就是头沉睡的猛兽，而天际无法独自格杀它。因为现在很多诺德人都是帝国军队的一员。

translations.english: And Torygg wasn't ready to let it fall apart.
translations.chinese: 托依格还没做好准备让它分裂。

translations.english: Because even if we can't openly worship him, Talos the god was once Tiber Septim the man, and this is his Empire.
translations.chinese: 因为即使我们不能公开信仰，但身为神塔洛斯曾经就是身为人的泰伯·塞普汀，而这是他的帝国。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0695]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Because the food and resources we get from the Empire are important to our people. | ZH: 因为我们从帝国获取的食物和资源对我们的人民很重要。 | SID: 007A8A
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Because the Dominion is a sleeping beast that Skyrim cannot slay alone. Because many Nords are part of the Imperial army even now. | ZH: 因为先祖神洲就是头沉睡的猛兽，而天际无法独自格杀它。因为现在很多诺德人都是帝国军队的一员。 | SID: 007A8B
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: And Torygg wasn't ready to let it fall apart. | ZH: 托依格还没做好准备让它分裂。 | SID: 008B08
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Because even if we can't openly worship him, Talos the god was once Tiber Septim the man, and this is his Empire. | ZH: 因为即使我们不能公开信仰，但身为神塔洛斯曾经就是身为人的泰伯·塞普汀，而这是他的帝国。 | SID: 00FAEE

translations.english: Not much. But as a bard, I find the whole affair depressing.
translations.chinese: 不太大。但身为吟游诗人，我觉得这件事令人很沮丧。

translations.english: There are no heroes in this war. No winners to be had and no real conclusion.
translations.chinese: 这场战争没有英雄，没有赢家，也没有真正的定论。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0696]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Not much. But as a bard, I find the whole affair depressing. | ZH: 不太大。但身为吟游诗人，我觉得这件事令人很沮丧。 | SID: 00D329
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: There are no heroes in this war. No winners to be had and no real conclusion. | ZH: 这场战争没有英雄，没有赢家，也没有真正的定论。 | SID: 00F1BE

translations.english: It's a great big festival put on by the bards, every year. They burn an effigy of old King Olaf. It's quite a bit of fun.
translations.chinese: 这是吟游诗人们每年都会举办的盛大节日。他们会焚烧一个老奥拉夫王的雕像。很有趣。

translations.english: But with the death of High King Torygg, the Festival has been declared "in poor taste." So it looks like it won't happen this year.
translations.chinese: 但随着至高王托依格死了，这个节日被宣布为“低级趣味”，看来今年是不会办了。

translations.english: The bards give out spiced wine during the festival, so they put in a big order. And then, for weeks after, demand is so high, I can barely keep up.
translations.chinese: 吟游诗人们会在节日期间分发香料酒，所以他们订购了一大批。之后几周，需求都会很高，我都跟不上了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0697]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: It's a great big festival put on by the bards, every year. They burn an effigy of old King Olaf. It's quite a bit of fun. | ZH: 这是吟游诗人们每年都会举办的盛大节日。他们会焚烧一个老奥拉夫王的雕像。很有趣。 | SID: 005F24
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: But with the death of High King Torygg, the Festival has been declared "in poor taste." So it looks like it won't happen this year. | ZH: 但随着至高王托依格死了，这个节日被宣布为“低级趣味”，看来今年是不会办了。 | SID: 00687E

translations.english: They're... adequate. Honestly, I rely on the business brought in by the Burning of King Olaf, and that's not likely to happen this year.
translations.chinese: 已经……足够了。老实说，我很依赖火烧奥拉夫节带来的生意，但今年不太可能举办了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0698]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: They're... adequate. Honestly, I rely on the business brought in by the Burning of King Olaf, and that's not likely to happen this year. | ZH: 已经……足够了。老实说，我很依赖火烧奥拉夫节带来的生意，但今年不太可能举办了。 | SID: 0098E8

translations.english: Oh, yes. A secret family recipe. The only good thing my father Octieve ever did. In fact, it's so good, no one else in Skyrim even tries to make any.
translations.chinese: 哦，没错。家传秘方。我父亲奥克提夫做的唯一一件好事。而且是大好事，天际还没其他人试着做出来过。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0699]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, yes. A secret family recipe. The only good thing my father Octieve ever did. In fact, it's so good, no one else in Skyrim even tries to make any. | ZH: 哦，没错。家传秘方。我父亲奥克提夫做的唯一一件好事。而且是大好事，天际还没其他人试着做出来过。 | SID: 00870F

translations.english: I don't think Ulfric knew how much Torygg respected him for that.
translations.chinese: 我觉得乌弗瑞克不知道托依格有多尊敬他。

translations.english: But Ulfric was at that moot, continually talking about Skyrim's independence in terms just shy of treason.
translations.chinese: 但乌弗瑞克却在领主议会上大谈天际独立这种几乎可以称之为叛国的行径。

translations.english: No. Even after Istlod died, the moot voted to make Torygg High King of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 不。甚至在伊斯特洛德死后，领主议会也投票决定由托依格继任天际至高王了。

translations.english: If Ulfric had asked Torygg directly to stand up, to declare independence, Torygg might have done it.
translations.chinese: 如果乌弗瑞克要求托依格直接站出来宣布独立，托依格可能也会这么做。

translations.english: We thought he was here to ask Torygg to declare independence. By the time we realized Ulfric was here to challenge Torygg... it was already too late.
translations.chinese: 我们以为他是来要求托依格宣布独立的。当我们意识到乌弗瑞克是来挑战托依格的时候，已经太晚了。

translations.english: Ulfric showed up at the gates of Solitude requesting an audience.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克出现在独孤城的大门外，要求会面。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C069B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: We thought he was here to ask Torygg to declare independence. By the time we realized Ulfric was here to challenge Torygg... it was already too late. | ZH: 我们以为他是来要求托依格宣布独立的。当我们意识到乌弗瑞克是来挑战托依格的时候，已经太晚了。 | SID: 007A77
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Ulfric showed up at the gates of Solitude requesting an audience. | ZH: 乌弗瑞克出现在独孤城的大门外，要求会面。 | SID: 007A78

translations.english: Torygg's father Istlod had held Skyrim together for nearly twenty-five years. When he died, Torygg became that symbol.
translations.chinese: 托依格的父亲伊斯特洛德统治了天际将近二十五年。他死后，托依格就成了那个象征。

translations.english: Because Ulfric needed a symbol.
translations.chinese: 因为乌弗瑞克需要一个象征。

translations.english: Someone he could defeat that represented the Empire, the White-Gold Concordat, the banning of Talos worship.
translations.chinese: 一个他能够打败的，象征着帝国、白金协定和塔洛斯信仰禁令的人。

agentText:

translations.english: I was, to my shame. The whole court was in attendance. I've seen much in my time, but that was a gruesome day.
translations.chinese: 很惭愧，我确实在。整个宫廷都出席了。我这辈子阅历丰富，但那真是可怕的一天。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I was, to my shame. The whole court was in attendance. I've seen much in my time, but that was a gruesome day. | ZH: 很惭愧，我确实在。整个宫廷都出席了。我这辈子阅历丰富，但那真是可怕的一天。 | SID: 007A70

translations.english: He was very nervous, mentioned something about needing help.
translations.chinese: 他很紧张，说起需要帮助。

translations.english: That I do. I had a messenger from Dragon Bridge stop here on his way to the Blue Palace, not too long ago.
translations.chinese: 确实。不久前，我还见过一个龙桥镇的人到蓝宫送信，在这里停留过。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: At times. Jaree-Ra stopped by the other day. Told me to keep an eye out for him, see if any new people arrived in the city.
translations.chinese: 有时吧。加雷-拉有天来过，让我帮他留意一下有没有新人到城里来。

translations.english: If we send half our guards to aid the legions, just for a few days, it could tip the scales in the Empire's favor.
translations.chinese: 如果我们派一半卫兵去帮助军团，哪怕就几天，都能把局势扭转向对帝国有利。

translations.english: The Companions can help protect the city, and the Emperor will be in our debt.
translations.chinese: 战友团可以帮忙保护城市。还能让皇帝欠我们一个情。

translations.english: I haven't changed my mind, if that's what you're asking. I won't leave Whiterun defenseless, even for a day.
translations.chinese: 如果你想问的是那个的话，那我的主意不变。我不会让白漫城处于毫无防备的状态，一天也不行。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C06DC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I haven't changed my mind, if that's what you're asking. I won't leave Whiterun defenseless, even for a day. | ZH: 如果你想问的是那个的话，那我的主意不变。我不会让白漫城处于毫无防备的状态，一天也不行。 | SID: 00706A

translations.english: Have you reconsidered my idea?
translations.chinese: 你有没有重新考虑我的提议？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C06DD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Have you reconsidered my idea? | ZH: 你有没有重新考虑我的提议？ | SID: 006F62

translations.english: If we lose half our men, the Dark Brotherhood and Thieves' Guild will have the run of the city. The Stormcloaks will be the least of our worries!
translations.chinese: 如果我们派走一半的人手，黑暗兄弟会和盗贼公会就会控制这座城市。风暴斗篷是我们最不想要担心的！

translations.english: Have you lost all sense? We are short on guards as it is!
translations.chinese: 你失智了？我们现在缺的就是卫兵！

translations.english: The answer is no, I tell you! Now stop pestering me with your war-mongering!
translations.chinese: 我告诉你，答案是否定的！别再用你的战争贩子脑来烦我了！

translations.english: Everyone who's anyone. Viarmo bought an apple the other day, said he was looking for a new student.
translations.chinese: 每一个人，无论是谁。维阿墨前几天买过几个苹果，说他在找新学生。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
