translations.english: Not lately. Business has been slow.
translations.chinese: 最近没有。生意很清淡。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0705]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Not lately. Business has been slow. | ZH: 最近没有。生意很清淡。 | SID: 005D5B

translations.english: Halt!
translations.chinese: 停下！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C07AC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Halt! | ZH: 停下！ | SID: 00569C

translations.english: You have no business here, so keep walking.
translations.chinese: 你不该来这里，离开吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C07AD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You have no business here, so keep walking. | ZH: 你不该来这里，离开吧。 | SID: 008630

translations.english: Not much, to be honest. Their return was a shock to us all. Giraud Gemane has some tomes about them in the library, if you're interested.
translations.chinese: 老实说，不太多。他们的归来让我们大家都很震惊。如果你感兴趣的话，吉劳德·格玛尼在图书馆里存了一些关于他们的典籍。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C07C0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Not much, to be honest. Their return was a shock to us all. Giraud Gemane has some tomes about them in the library, if you're interested. | ZH: 老实说，不太多。他们的归来让我们大家都很震惊。如果你感兴趣的话，吉劳德·格玛尼在图书馆里存了一些关于他们的典籍。 | SID: 00225A

translations.english: I like to think I've aged well. I'm certainly wiser than I once was. And I know when one should speak... and when one should hold their tongue.
translations.chinese: 我觉得自己老了也不错。我肯定比以前聪明多了。我知道什么时候该开口……什么时候该闭嘴。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C07E8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I like to think I've aged well. I'm certainly wiser than I once was. And I know when one should speak... and when one should hold their tongue. | ZH: 我觉得自己老了也不错。我肯定比以前聪明多了。我知道什么时候该开口……什么时候该闭嘴。 | SID: 007A6E

translations.english: Watch that tongue, new blood.
translations.chinese: 说话注意点，新人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C07EC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Watch that tongue, new blood. | ZH: 说话注意点，新人。 | SID: 007A56

translations.english: Come, follow me.
translations.chinese: 跟我来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C07ED]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Come, follow me. | ZH: 跟我来。 | SID: 007A51

translations.english: By Nord custom, once the challenge was issued in court, Torygg had no choice but to accept.
translations.chinese: 根据诺德的习俗，一旦在宫廷上发起挑战，托依格就别无选择，只能接受。

translations.english: When Ulfric's lips parted, when he unleashed the power of the Thu'um... That Shout, that ancient and terrible tongue... ripped Torygg asunder.
translations.chinese: 当乌弗瑞克打开嘴巴，释放出吐'目的力量……那龙吼，那古老而可怕的喉舌……把托依格撕裂了。

translations.english: Torygg had some martial training, of course, but it mattered little that day.
translations.chinese: 托依格当然也受过些军事训练，但在那天也没什么用处了。

translations.english: Had he not, Ulfric would have had cause to call a new moot and a new vote for High King.
translations.chinese: 如果他不这么做，乌弗瑞克就有理由召集新的领主议会，重新投票选择至高王。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C07EE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: By Nord custom, once the challenge was issued in court, Torygg had no choice but to accept. | ZH: 根据诺德的习俗，一旦在宫廷上发起挑战，托依格就别无选择，只能接受。 | SID: 000337
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: When Ulfric's lips parted, when he unleashed the power of the Thu'um... That Shout, that ancient and terrible tongue... ripped Torygg asunder. | ZH: 当乌弗瑞克打开嘴巴，释放出吐'目的力量……那龙吼，那古老而可怕的喉舌……把托依格撕裂了。 | SID: 007A91
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Torygg had some martial training, of course, but it mattered little that day. | ZH: 托依格当然也受过些军事训练，但在那天也没什么用处了。 | SID: 007A93
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Had he not, Ulfric would have had cause to call a new moot and a new vote for High King. | ZH: 如果他不这么做，乌弗瑞克就有理由召集新的领主议会，重新投票选择至高王。 | SID: 007A96

translations.english: Very. I helped raise him. Oh, I could not have been more proud to see Torygg on the throne. He made a fine king. A fine king...
translations.chinese: 非常好。我帮着抚养他长大，看他登上王位，我真是非常自豪。他是个好国王，好国王……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C07FD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Very. I helped raise him. Oh, I could not have been more proud to see Torygg on the throne. He made a fine king. A fine king... | ZH: 非常好。我帮着抚养他长大，看他登上王位，我真是非常自豪。他是个好国王，好国王…… | SID: 007A6C

translations.english: You have asked for my help. I am providing it.
translations.chinese: 你不是需要我帮忙吗。我正在做呢。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0808]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You have asked for my help. I am providing it. | ZH: 你不是需要我帮忙吗。我正在做呢。 | SID: 00B833

translations.english: Mmm, sorry. I really can't risk it. I'm sure you can find someone else with a little less dignity.
translations.chinese: 嗯，抱歉，我真不能冒这个险。相信您能找到一个没那么要脸的人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Mmm, sorry. I really can't risk it. I'm sure you can find someone else with a little less dignity. | ZH: 嗯，抱歉，我真不能冒这个险。相信您能找到一个没那么要脸的人。 | SID: 00336B

translations.english: Watch this.
translations.chinese: 看着吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C080B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Watch this. | ZH: 看着吧。 | SID: 0056D4

translations.english: Go ahead and play your little joke.
translations.chinese: 继续你的小玩笑吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C080C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Go ahead and play your little joke. | ZH: 继续你的小玩笑吧。 | SID: 0071D0

translations.english: Sorry, but you'll have to find someone else to help you with your prank.
translations.chinese: 对不起。你还是找别人帮你恶作剧吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C080E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Sorry, but you'll have to find someone else to help you with your prank. | ZH: 对不起。你还是找别人帮你恶作剧吧。 | SID: 007A44

translations.english: Don't worry. I'll play my part.
translations.chinese: 别担心。看我演就是。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C080F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Don't worry. I'll play my part. | ZH: 别担心。看我演就是。 | SID: 007745

translations.english: Yes, this probably isn't really the place for your little jokes.
translations.chinese: 就是。这里哪是你开玩笑的场合。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0810]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, this probably isn't really the place for your little jokes. | ZH: 就是。这里哪是你开玩笑的场合。 | SID: 00B842

translations.english: Thank you. I knew you'd understand.
translations.chinese: 感谢理解。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0811]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Thank you. I knew you'd understand. | ZH: 感谢理解。 | SID: 008564

translations.english: I'll try to forget you ever asked.
translations.chinese: 我会试着忘了你的问题。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0812]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'll try to forget you ever asked. | ZH: 我会试着忘了你的问题。 | SID: 00B83C

translations.english: I'm sorry, but I really can't.
translations.chinese: 对不起。我真的不能帮你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0814]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm sorry, but I really can't. | ZH: 对不起。我真的不能帮你。 | SID: 007A40

translations.english: I'm doing as you asked. This is for some good purpose, yes?
translations.chinese: 我正按着你说的做。你是有什么目的吧？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0815]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm doing as you asked. This is for some good purpose, yes? | ZH: 我正按着你说的做。你是有什么目的吧？ | SID: 004A20

translations.english: I apologize for the disruption to such a festive occasion.
translations.chinese: 我很抱歉破坏了这个喜庆的场合。

translations.english: Tell your men to stand down. I don't need any help dealing with this kind of fool. He isn't worth the trouble.
translations.chinese: 让你的人闪开。对付这种蠢蛋用不上别人插手。他也配让人兴师动众？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0816]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I apologize for the disruption to such a festive occasion. | ZH: 我很抱歉破坏了这个喜庆的场合。 | SID: 003936
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Tell your men to stand down. I don't need any help dealing with this kind of fool. He isn't worth the trouble. | ZH: 让你的人闪开。对付这种蠢蛋用不上别人插手。他也配让人兴师动众？ | SID: 00B987

translations.english: Dear me. All this trouble over me? I think I was confused. There's no harm in him. Please, let him go.
translations.chinese: 天啊。怎么这么多麻烦事儿？我有点糊涂了。他应该没恶意。求你让他走吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0817]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Dear me. All this trouble over me? I think I was confused. There's no harm in him. Please, let him go. | ZH: 天啊。怎么这么多麻烦事儿？我有点糊涂了。他应该没恶意。求你让他走吧。 | SID: 00B984

translations.english: I'm sure he's learned his lesson. Let's try to enjoy ourselves.
translations.chinese: 我看他也吸取教训了。还是享受宴会吧。

translations.english: Oh... I'm afraid I may have overreacted. Please, I've already forgotten whatever it was he said to me.
translations.chinese: 哦……我可能反应过激了。我都忘了他跟我说了什么了。

agentText:

translations.chinese: 这是个错误，现在我想拿回给他的东西。那是我家族的护身符，真不该把它交给恩希尔。

translations.english: But he won't deal with me. Talk to him; see what it'll take to get my amulet back.
translations.chinese: 但他不肯和我交易。跟他说说，看看怎么样才能拿回我的护身符。

translations.chinese: 我可能卷入了跟恩希尔之间的……协议。他有我需要的东西，所以我拿东西和他换了。

translations.chinese: 我还有很长的路要走，我还没有准备好接受我一直在尝试的高级魔法。

translations.english: But at least I know where to start now. Thank you, you've been a great help to me.
translations.chinese: 但至少我知道该从哪入手了。谢谢，你帮了大忙。

translations.english: And thank you for your help. You're a good friend.
translations.chinese: 谢谢你的帮助。你真是一位好朋友。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0895]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Agreed. | ZH: 赞成。 | SID: 008CC2
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: And thank you for your help. You're a good friend. | ZH: 谢谢你的帮助。你真是一位好朋友。 | SID: 00A7E8

translations.english: Damn outsider. Why couldn't you just mind your own business?
translations.chinese: 该死的外来者。就不能不多管闲事吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0B76]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Damn outsider. Why couldn't you just mind your own business? | ZH: 该死的外来者。就不能不多管闲事吗？ | SID: 0077CD

translations.english: You ever need another blade at your side, just ask. Wouldn't mind seeing how you handle a few trolls.
translations.chinese: 如果你还需要帮手，尽管开口。我倒是很想看看你是怎么对付巨魔的。

translations.english: You're no liar. Best fight I've had in years. There you are.
translations.chinese: 你没吹牛。这是我这几年打得最痛快的一架。给你。

translations.english: I think I've earned that 100 gold.
translations.chinese: 我应该赢那100金币了吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0B77]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: You ever need another blade at your side, just ask. Wouldn't mind seeing how you handle a few trolls. | ZH: 如果你还需要帮手，尽管开口。我倒是很想看看你是怎么对付巨魔的。 | SID: 00096D
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You're no liar. Best fight I've had in years. There you are. | ZH: 你没吹牛。这是我这几年打得最痛快的一架。给你。 | SID: 001BBE
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I think I've earned that 100 gold. | ZH: 我应该赢那100金币了吧。 | SID: 00DCC0

translations.english: Thank goodness mother is keeping a level head about everything. If my brother Saerlund had his way, we'd be flying Imperial colors by now.
translations.chinese: 感谢神灵，母亲对这一切认识很清醒。如果让我兄弟赛尔伦德得逞了，我们现在已经改旗易帜了。

translations.english: Every day the threat of exile from Riften draws closer for myself and my family.
translations.chinese: 对我和我的家人来说，被流放的威胁日益逼近。

translations.english: Who knows how many spies the Empire has sent into our midst already. We're at war. This isn't the time for hospitality.
translations.chinese: 天知道帝国往我们中间派了多少细作。我们正在打仗。现在不是款待客人的时候。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0BBF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Thank goodness mother is keeping a level head about everything. If my brother Saerlund had his way, we'd be flying Imperial colors by now. | ZH: 感谢神灵，母亲对这一切认识很清醒。如果让我兄弟赛尔伦德得逞了，我们现在已经改旗易帜了。 | SID: 00685A
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Every day the threat of exile from Riften draws closer for myself and my family. | ZH: 对我和我的家人来说，被流放的威胁日益逼近。 | SID: 0086A3
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Who knows how many spies the Empire has sent into our midst already. We're at war. This isn't the time for hospitality. | ZH: 天知道帝国往我们中间派了多少细作。我们正在打仗。现在不是款待客人的时候。 | SID: 00F708

translations.english: His cause may be true, but the man is a lie... all he holds in his heart his lust for the throne.
translations.chinese: 他的理由可能是正当的，但这个男人是在撒谎……他心中只有对王位的渴望。

translations.english: He's begun a rebellion against those that wish to eradicate the worship of Talos and uses it as his rallying cry.
translations.chinese: 他引发了一场反对那些希望根除塔洛斯信仰者的叛乱，并以此作为他的战斗口号。

translations.english: Ulfric only cares about one thing... Ulfric. He's ordained himself the future High King of Skyrim and steps on anyone that gets in his way.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克只关心一件事……乌弗瑞克自己。他打算成为天际未来的至高王，并且会践踏任何阻碍他前进的人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0BC0]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: He's begun a rebellion against those that wish to eradicate the worship of Talos and uses it as his rallying cry. | ZH: 他引发了一场反对那些希望根除塔洛斯信仰者的叛乱，并以此作为他的战斗口号。 | SID: 007A1A
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Ulfric only cares about one thing... Ulfric. He's ordained himself the future High King of Skyrim and steps on anyone that gets in his way. | ZH: 乌弗瑞克只关心一件事……乌弗瑞克自己。他打算成为天际未来的至高王，并且会践踏任何阻碍他前进的人。 | SID: 007A1B

translations.english: I dared speak of the Empire and the lies that have been spread by Ulfric, the leader of the Stormcloaks.
translations.chinese: 我竟敢为帝国辩护，还揭露风暴斗篷领袖乌弗瑞克的谎言。

translations.english: Because I did something not a soul in this bloodstained house of war has the backbone to do... dared to speak my mind.
translations.chinese: 因为我做了一件在这血淋漓的战争堡垒里内没人敢做的事……说出自己的想法。

translations.english: Be wary what you say around here, friend. You'll find not all take kindly to "insurrection."
translations.chinese: 在这里说话要小心，朋友。你会发现不是所有人都喜欢“起义”。

translations.english: Now my mother's stripped me of my heritage and incarcerated me here like a common criminal and my brother has all but disowned me.
translations.chinese: 现在我母亲剥夺了我的继承权，把我像个寻常罪犯一样关在这里，我兄弟几乎与我断绝关系。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0BC1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: I dared speak of the Empire and the lies that have been spread by Ulfric, the leader of the Stormcloaks. | ZH: 我竟敢为帝国辩护，还揭露风暴斗篷领袖乌弗瑞克的谎言。 | SID: 00528B
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Because I did something not a soul in this bloodstained house of war has the backbone to do... dared to speak my mind. | ZH: 因为我做了一件在这血淋漓的战争堡垒里内没人敢做的事……说出自己的想法。 | SID: 007335
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Be wary what you say around here, friend. You'll find not all take kindly to "insurrection." | ZH: 在这里说话要小心，朋友。你会发现不是所有人都喜欢“起义”。 | SID: 007A13
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Now my mother's stripped me of my heritage and incarcerated me here like a common criminal and my brother has all but disowned me. | ZH: 现在我母亲剥夺了我的继承权，把我像个寻常罪犯一样关在这里，我兄弟几乎与我断绝关系。 | SID: 0093BE

translations.english: Good. Wait until I start the distraction and then show me what you're made of.
translations.chinese: 好。等我开始分散大家的注意力，就看你的了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0BC2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good. Wait until I start the distraction and then show me what you're made of. | ZH: 好。等我开始分散大家的注意力，就看你的了。 | SID: 006115

translations.english: He's a traitor, plain and simple. Had I been sitting on the throne, he'd be hanging from the gallows for his sympathies towards the Empire.
translations.chinese: 他就是个叛徒，显而易见。如果我坐在宝座上，他就会因为对帝国的同情被吊死在绞架上。

translations.english: He expects us to drop our defenses and greet them with open arms... to dialogue with them rather than defend our homeland by spilling their blood.
translations.chinese: 他希望我们放下戒备，张开双臂迎接他们……去和他们对话，而不是杀光他们保卫我们自己的家园。

translations.english: Can you believe that fool had the audacity to speak of his love for the Empire in the plaza?
translations.chinese: 你能相信那个傻子居然厚颜无耻地在闹市说出自己对帝国的热爱吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0BC3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: He's a traitor, plain and simple. Had I been sitting on the throne, he'd be hanging from the gallows for his sympathies towards the Empire. | ZH: 他就是个叛徒，显而易见。如果我坐在宝座上，他就会因为对帝国的同情被吊死在绞架上。 | SID: 007A0C
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: He expects us to drop our defenses and greet them with open arms... to dialogue with them rather than defend our homeland by spilling their blood. | ZH: 他希望我们放下戒备，张开双臂迎接他们……去和他们对话，而不是杀光他们保卫我们自己的家园。 | SID: 00955C
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Can you believe that fool had the audacity to speak of his love for the Empire in the plaza? | ZH: 你能相信那个傻子居然厚颜无耻地在闹市说出自己对帝国的热爱吗？ | SID: 00B000

translations.english: I know it looks bad, but we've got to figure out what happened. And if that dragon is still skulking around somewhere.
translations.chinese: 我知道这很糟，但我们必须弄清发生了什么。得确认那头龙是不是还在某地出没。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0C16]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I know it looks bad, but we've got to figure out what happened. And if that dragon is still skulking around somewhere. | ZH: 我知道这很糟，但我们必须弄清发生了什么。得确认那头龙是不是还在某地出没。 | SID: 001862

translations.english: Your outfit is something of an open wound... where attire is concerned.
translations.chinese: 在着装方面……你的衣服就像裂开的伤口。

translations.english: If I were walking around with a wound, I would want you to tell me to see a doctor.
translations.chinese: 如果我带着伤口满街晃悠，我也希望你告诉我去看医生。

translations.english: It's not an insult, just an observation.
translations.chinese: 这不是侮辱，是观察。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0DFD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Your outfit is something of an open wound... where attire is concerned. | ZH: 在着装方面……你的衣服就像裂开的伤口。 | SID: 001FA6
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: If I were walking around with a wound, I would want you to tell me to see a doctor. | ZH: 如果我带着伤口满街晃悠，我也希望你告诉我去看医生。 | SID: 0079E2
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: It's not an insult, just an observation. | ZH: 这不是侮辱，是观察。 | SID: 0079E9

translations.english: Not many people care, these days. The world is the worse for it.
translations.chinese: 这些日子没多少人在乎了。世界也因此变得更糟。

translations.english: Not many people comment on my clothes.
translations.chinese: 没有多少人会对我的衣着进行评论。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0DFE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Not many people care, these days. The world is the worse for it. | ZH: 这些日子没多少人在乎了。世界也因此变得更糟。 | SID: 0079DD
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Not many people comment on my clothes. | ZH: 没有多少人会对我的衣着进行评论。 | SID: 0079DA

translations.english: These days, we have more people like you coming in, looking for healing and the like.
translations.chinese: 不过这些日子，我们有很多像你这样的人光顾，来寻求治疗之类的。

translations.english: We mostly carry herbs and alchemical ingredients, that sort of thing. Before the war, our stock was mostly used for aromatic use in homes, yes.
translations.chinese: 我们主要卖草药和炼金原料一类的东西。战前，我们的货物确实主要用于家用芳香剂。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0DFF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: These days, we have more people like you coming in, looking for healing and the like. | ZH: 不过这些日子，我们有很多像你这样的人光顾，来寻求治疗之类的。 | SID: 0079D1
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: We mostly carry herbs and alchemical ingredients, that sort of thing. Before the war, our stock was mostly used for aromatic use in homes, yes. | ZH: 我们主要卖草药和炼金原料一类的东西。战前，我们的货物确实主要用于家用芳香剂。 | SID: 0086C1

translations.english: I suppose I would, but you're the only one who gets that greeting.
translations.chinese: 确实有，但你是唯一一个听到这样问候的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0E01]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I suppose I would, but you're the only one who gets that greeting. | ZH: 确实有，但你是唯一一个听到这样问候的。 | SID: 002732

translations.english: It's never been an issue. People say you helped with the problems at Wolfskull Cave.
translations.chinese: 这从来不是问题。人们说你解决了狼头骨洞穴的问题。

translations.english: I applaud anyone who assists the court.
translations.chinese: 我为帮助宫廷的人喝彩。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0E02]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: It's never been an issue. People say you helped with the problems at Wolfskull Cave. | ZH: 这从来不是问题。人们说你解决了狼头骨洞穴的问题。 | SID: 005756
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I applaud anyone who assists the court. | ZH: 我为帮助宫廷的人喝彩。 | SID: 00A6EA

translations.english: I'm impressed.
translations.chinese: 真不错。

translations.english: Oh, we do all right. Rumor is, you had a hand in the Blackblood Marauders' demise...
translations.chinese: 哦，我们做得很好。有传言说，你和黑血掠夺者的灭亡有关……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0E03]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I'm impressed. | ZH: 真不错。 | SID: 00B3EB
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Oh, we do all right. Rumor is, you had a hand in the Blackblood Marauders' demise... | ZH: 哦，我们做得很好。有传言说，你和黑血掠夺者的灭亡有关…… | SID: 00D16C

translations.english: That was a good bit of work.
translations.chinese: 干得漂亮。

translations.english: Radiant Raiment has the finest attire in all of Skyrim. That is how we...
translations.chinese: 锦衣服饰店有天际最好的服装。这就是我们为何……

translations.english: Wait. You're that new bard, the one who saved the Festival. Aren't you?
translations.chinese: 哦等等。你是那个新晋的吟游诗人吧，拯救了那个节日，对吧？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0E04]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: That was a good bit of work. | ZH: 干得漂亮。 | SID: 002F7C
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Radiant Raiment has the finest attire in all of Skyrim. That is how we... | ZH: 锦衣服饰店有天际最好的服装。这就是我们为何…… | SID: 00CF9C
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Wait. You're that new bard, the one who saved the Festival. Aren't you? | ZH: 哦等等。你是那个新晋的吟游诗人吧，拯救了那个节日，对吧？ | SID: 00F4AD

translations.english: You should look into joining. They could use every hand they can get.
translations.chinese: 你应该考虑一下加入。他们现在在找一切能找到的人手。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0E05]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You should look into joining. They could use every hand they can get. | ZH: 你应该考虑一下加入。他们现在在找一切能找到的人手。 | SID: 00957A

translations.english: But I'm not telling you anything you don't already know.
translations.chinese: 但我不会告诉你任何不需要知道的事。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0E06]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: But I'm not telling you anything you don't already know. | ZH: 但我不会告诉你任何不需要知道的事。 | SID: 00E488

translations.english: No, no. Mostly, I'm just a simple herbalist. Lami over in Morthal should be able to help you.
translations.chinese: 不，不。我只是个普通的草药师。莫萨尔的拉米应该能帮你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0E07]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No, no. Mostly, I'm just a simple herbalist. Lami over in Morthal should be able to help you. | ZH: 不，不。我只是个普通的草药师。莫萨尔的拉米应该能帮你。 | SID: 00AC39

translations.english: No, no. I'm just a simple herbalist. You'll want to see Arcadia, over in Whiterun.
translations.chinese: 不，不。我只是个普通的草药师。白漫城的阿尔凯迪雅应该能帮你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0E08]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No, no. I'm just a simple herbalist. You'll want to see Arcadia, over in Whiterun. | ZH: 不，不。我只是个普通的草药师。白漫城的阿尔凯迪雅应该能帮你。 | SID: 00A751

translations.english: The men training here in Solitude and the troops out in the field, they all need weapons and armor.
translations.chinese: 在独孤城训练的、在战场上作战的，都需要装备。

translations.english: It's almost all I have time for these days.
translations.chinese: 这些日子我几乎快忙死了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0E16]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: The men training here in Solitude and the troops out in the field, they all need weapons and armor. | ZH: 在独孤城训练的、在战场上作战的，都需要装备。 | SID: 0052A9
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: It's almost all I have time for these days. | ZH: 这些日子我几乎快忙死了。 | SID: 00634B

translations.english: Only when you're around. The rest of these fools I could do without.
translations.chinese: 只有你在的时候。剩下的笨蛋我可没那么好心情。

translations.english: You seem to be in a good mood.
translations.chinese: 你看起来心情不错。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0F18]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Only when you're around. The rest of these fools I could do without. | ZH: 只有你在的时候。剩下的笨蛋我可没那么好心情。 | SID: 001624
- INFO:RNAM | EN: You seem to be in a good mood. | ZH: 你看起来心情不错。 | SID: 0079FD

translations.english: You'd think so, wouldn't you? I'm fine. Thank you for asking.
translations.chinese: 你会这么想啊？我很好，谢谢你的关心。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0F19]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You'd think so, wouldn't you? I'm fine. Thank you for asking. | ZH: 你会这么想啊？我很好，谢谢你的关心。 | SID: 003CA7

translations.english: It is when my customers waste time chatting, and not buying.
translations.chinese: 当我的顾客们只顾着浪费时间聊天而不买东西的时候。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0F1A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It is when my customers waste time chatting, and not buying. | ZH: 当我的顾客们只顾着浪费时间聊天而不买东西的时候。 | SID: 003845

translations.english: Oh, Sayma would have my hide if I even suggested I might step foot on a battlefield.
translations.chinese: 哦，如果我说我想去战场的话，赛伊玛会让我难堪的。

translations.english: You think Stormcloaks and Legionnaires are dangerous? Ha!
translations.chinese: 你觉得风暴斗篷和军团兵很危险？哈！

translations.english: I think I would, if it weren't for my son. And my wife.
translations.chinese: 如果不是因为我老婆孩子，我也想。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0F1B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Oh, Sayma would have my hide if I even suggested I might step foot on a battlefield. | ZH: 哦，如果我说我想去战场的话，赛伊玛会让我难堪的。 | SID: 004DCB
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: You think Stormcloaks and Legionnaires are dangerous? Ha! | ZH: 你觉得风暴斗篷和军团兵很危险？哈！ | SID: 0066F5
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I think I would, if it weren't for my son. And my wife. | ZH: 如果不是因为我老婆孩子，我也想。 | SID: 0079C3

translations.english: Nothing at all. It's very... nice. If you want something with a little more style, however, you should come by our shop. Radiant Raiment.
translations.chinese: 并没有。已经很……好了。不过你如果想要更独具风格，可以到我们的锦衣服饰店看看。

translations.english: We could fix you right up.
translations.chinese: 我们马上能帮你整理好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C0F1D]
Translations:

translations.chinese: 确实。如今很少有人能具有合适的着装品味和礼仪。

translations.chinese: 不。那是一件丑闻。至高王托依格的死让整个城市发生了天翻地覆的变化。

translations.chinese: 别把我扯进来，霍隆格纳。如果你有话要对领主说，就自己去说。

translations.chinese: 现在我们负债累累，身无分文了，而且还要失去我们唯一的收入来源。

translations.english: I'm not asking you to defy the Jarl, just to open his eyes.
translations.chinese: 我不是要你反对领主，只是让他明白过来。

translations.english: No, I openly welcome the presence of armed strangers who have no reason to care about any of us.
translations.chinese: 没有啊，我很欢迎那些没有理由关心我们，还带着武装的陌生人出现。

translations.english: Next thing you know, there'll be more guards, and then we'll lose our homes as well. This is just the start of it, mark my words.
translations.chinese: 接下来还会有更多卫兵过来，然后我们连家园会一起失却。这只是个开始，记住我这句话。

translations.english: If you want something a bard can dig into look to the dragons.

translations.chinese: 只要乌弗瑞克想让艾利西弗继续当领主，那她就能继续当领主。武卫们就会继续听从她的命令。

translations.english: You really don't know?
translations.chinese: 你真不知道？

translations.english: And now the Stormcloaks have claimed the entire city. I guess we have Roggvir to thank for that as well.

translations.chinese: 最近好多了。

translations.english: The Blackblood Marauders haven't been seen since the Icerunner attack, so my shipments have been more regular.
translations.chinese: 自从冰驰者号被袭击之后，就没人见过黑血掠夺者了，所以我的货运还比较正常。

translations.english: That must have been a hard bit of business. I hear Stentor had been alive for a long, long time.
translations.chinese: 那一定是笔不小的生意吧。我听说斯丹特已经活了很久很久了。

translations.english: A place in court seems to suit you.

translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷取得了胜利，领主们已经倒向他的一边。

translations.chinese: 不。虽然我丈夫托依格确实是至高王，而我则是他的遗孀，但我没有资格宣称这个头衔。

translations.english: So, do you still claim to be the High Queen of Skyrim?

translations.english: These days? Aye. Most of what I make is for folk like you.
translations.chinese: 现在吗？是。我做的大部分都是给你们这群人的。

translations.english: So you make armor for the Stormcloaks?
translations.chinese: 所以你在为风暴斗篷制造护甲吗？

translations.english: Should they accept her rule, we will have peace.
translations.chinese: 如果他们接受她的统治，我们就会迎来和平。

translations.english: But we must have the support of the other Jarls for that claim to have any meaning.
translations.chinese: 但我们必须得到其他领主们对宣称的支持才有意义。

translations.english: With Ulfric's troops here, Elisif will be forced to support his bid for High King. He secures the position and appears above reproach.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克的军队驻扎在这儿，艾利西弗被迫支持他成为至高王。他由此得到王位，而且显得毫无破绽。

translations.english: What's more, Ulfric's refusal to execute his slain enemy's wife will be portrayed as the ultimate act of compassion. Hmph. It's genius, really.
translations.chinese: 更重要的是，乌弗瑞克拒绝处死敌人的遗孀，将会被描绘成终极的怜悯之行。哎。确实是天才。

translations.english: Because killing her would yield no political advantage.
translations.chinese: 因为杀了她并不能带来任何政治上的好处。

translations.english: By leaving Elisif alive, Ulfric completes the separation of the Empire and Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 留下艾利西弗一命，乌弗瑞克就实现了帝国和天际的分离。

translations.english: Why did Ulfric let Elisif live?
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克为什么让艾利西弗活着？

translations.english: That's the real question, isn't it? No one can deny Elisif has a legitimate claim to become High Queen of Skyrim...
translations.chinese: 这才是真正的问题，不是吗？没人否认艾利西弗拥有成为天际至高女王的合法权利……

translations.english: What will happen to Elisif now that the Empire has won the war?
translations.chinese: 帝国现在赢了战争，艾利西弗会怎样呢？

translations.chinese: 嗯……按理说，她有成为天际至高女王的合法权利。

translations.english: The moot will meet and choose Ulfric as High King. With his troops in most of the cities, they have little choice.
translations.chinese: 领主议会将会召开并选择乌弗瑞克成为至高王。由于他的军队遍布各城，他们几乎没有什么选择。

translations.english: But now Skyrim is at Ulfric's mercy.
translations.chinese: 但现在天际已经在乌弗瑞克的掌控下。

translations.english: What will happen to Elisif now that Ulfric has won the war?

translations.english: Not much. But as a bard, I find the whole affair depressing.
translations.chinese: 不太大。但身为吟游诗人，我觉得这件事令人很沮丧。

translations.english: Any day is a good one, long as I don't have to go into town. But with Hjorunn gone...
translations.chinese: 只要不进城，都是美好的一天。但自从卓恩走了之后……

translations.english: No one's seen them in well over a hundred years. They vanished, along with their sanctuary on the Isle of Artaeum.
translations.chinese: 已经一百多年没人见过他们了。他们和他们在阿塔姆的避难所一起消失了。

translations.english: They were a group of mages with a history that pre-dates the Empire. Very powerful, very secretive.
translations.chinese: 他们是一个法师组织，历史可以追溯到帝国建立以前。十分强大也十分神秘。

translations.english: I have no idea what connection they'd have to this place.
translations.chinese: 我不知道他们和这里有什么联系。

translations.english: You will?! Oh, thank you!
translations.chinese: 你会帮我？！哦，谢谢！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C1DFB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You will?! Oh, thank you! | ZH: 你会帮我？！哦，谢谢！ | SID: 00C5AF

translations.english: Now Sapphire wants her money back, and if I don't pay her, I think she's going to kill me.
translations.chinese: 现在蓝宝石想要回她的钱，如果我不还她，她会杀了我。

translations.english: I borrowed some gold from Sapphire to pay for the shipment, but it got robbed before it even arrived.
translations.chinese: 我从蓝宝石那儿借了些钱来支付运费，但没等到货就被抢了。

translations.english: I was able to work out a deal with the stables in Whiterun to sell me some of their tack and harnesses.
translations.chinese: 我和白漫城的马厩达成了一笔交易，卖给我一些马具。

translations.chinese: 我欠了某人一大笔钱，我应该是被骗了。我不知道该怎么办。

translations.english: I hope to open my own stables one day, but I think it's going to take a lot longer than I expected.
translations.chinese: 我希望有一天能开一家属于自己的马厩，但我想这比预期时间要长很多。

translations.english: Horses are my whole life. Back in Hammerfell, I helped my family raise horses at our farm.
translations.chinese: 马就是我生命的全部了。等我回到落锤，我会帮家里在农场养马。

translations.english: Yes. Hofgrir took me in when I arrived in Riften about a year ago. He's been teaching me everything he knows.
translations.chinese: 没错。一年前我来到裂谷城，霍夫吉尔收留了我。他对我倾囊相授。

translations.chinese: 跟你不熟，从我眼前消失。

translations.chinese: 我现在不想说话。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C1E00]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I can't talk right now. | ZH: 我现在不想说话。 | SID: 00792D

translations.english: Not half as sorry as I am.
translations.chinese: 不会比我更遗憾。

agentText:

EDID: [000C1E01]
Translations:

translations.english: If it's horses you want, you'll want to speak to Hofgrir. I'm afraid I'm in too much trouble to help you.
translations.chinese: 如果你想买马，你该去找霍夫吉尔。恐怕我帮不上你。

translations.english: If it's horses you want, you're talking to the right person.
translations.chinese: 如果你想买马，那你就找对人了。

translations.english: Follow me. I will show you how to open the path to Paarthurnax.
translations.chinese: 跟我来。我会告诉你如何去找帕图纳克斯。

translations.english: Paarthurnax is the only one who can answer your questions about Dragonrend.
translations.chinese: 帕图纳克斯是唯一能解答龙魂撕裂问题的人。

translations.english: The Words wait.
translations.chinese: 力量之语在等着你。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C1E1B]
Translations:

translations.english: Use Clear Skies to open the way to Paarthurnax.
translations.chinese: 用澄澈天空开辟通向帕图纳克斯的道路吧。

translations.english: This is neither the time nor place for such things. I'm surprised you would ask it of me.
translations.chinese: 真是不分时间场合，你居然还会问我这种问题。

translations.english: I look forward to having it back soon. The sooner, the better, in fact.
translations.chinese: 我期待尽快把它拿到手。事实上，是越快越好。

translations.english: Finally, we have an agreement.
translations.chinese: 很好，协议达成。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.chinese: 你看到了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C1E46]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Do you see that? | ZH: 你看到了吗？ | SID: 007923

translations.english: Regardless, I'm making you a very simple offer. You get me the staff, and I give you Onmund's precious amulet. Do we have a deal?
translations.chinese: 不管怎样了，我的条件很简单。你给我法杖，我给你昂蒙德的宝贝护符。成交吗？

translations.english: It's an entirely different situation. I don't expect you to comprehend the nuances of these matters.
translations.chinese: 这是完全不同的情况。我不指望你理解这里的细微差别。

translations.english: I told you, it's from my family.
translations.chinese: 我跟你说过，这是我家人给我的护符。

translations.english: I don't... I know they always disapproved of what I wanted in life, to learn magic instead becoming a farmer, or a hunter.
translations.chinese: 我……我知道他们总是反对我追求自己想要的生活，去学习魔法，只是想让我当个农民或者猎人。

translations.english: But no matter how poorly they may have treated me, they're still my family. I didn't consider that until after I'd made the trade.
translations.chinese: 但不管他们对我多不好，总还是我的家人。我在交易之后才意识到这点。

translations.chinese: 我不想让这事儿再困扰我。

translations.chinese: 嗯，是的。我完全不知道交易的对象名声问题。

translations.english: Ah, excellent. Well, here's the gold the Jarl offered in exchange for taking care of the problem.
translations.chinese: 啊，太好了。来，这是领主提供过来解决麻烦用的资金。

translations.english: Ah, excellent. Well, it's good to know that won't be a problem any longer.
translations.chinese: 啊，太好了。问题解决了就好。

translations.chinese: 跟他谈谈，看看你能不能说服他把护符还给我。

translations.english: It doesn't matter. It's also none of your concern.
translations.chinese: 没关系。和你没关系的。

translations.english: You're not very good at this, are you.
translations.chinese: 你不太擅长这个是吧。

translations.english: Look, I traded a staff to someone and found out later that was a bad idea. So, I'd like the staff back. Understand now?
translations.chinese: 听着，我跟某人交易了一根法杖，结果发现是个坏交易。所以我想把法杖拿回来。现在明白了么？

translations.english: The resulting disaster would reflect quite poorly on everyone involved. Are you following me?
translations.chinese: 由此造成的灾难会对所有相关人员造成不良影响。你听懂了吗？

translations.english: And it was only later that it was realized that this individual might... misuse such a staff.
translations.chinese: 后来人们才意识到那个人有可能……滥用那柄法杖。

translations.english: Let's pretend for a moment that a certain individual was looking to acquire a particular staff.
translations.chinese: 让我们假设一下，某人想要获得一柄特定的法杖。

translations.english: Let's also pretend that he traded some valuable items for said staff.
translations.chinese: 我们再假设他用一些值钱的东西把法杖交换到手了。

translations.english: Onmund gave up the first time I said no. But not you...
translations.chinese: 我第一次拒绝的时候，昂蒙德就放弃了。而你没有……

translations.english: All right. I'll tell you a little story.
translations.chinese: 好吧。我给你讲个小故事。

translations.english: Look how persistent you are. It's charming, really.
translations.chinese: 看看你这是有多执着啊。这很迷人，真的。

translations.english: I suspect that the power released by the Eye of Magnus was not fully contained, and has coalesced in this part of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 我怀疑是玛格努斯之眼释放的力量并没有被完全控制，而是在天际的某地汇合起来了。

translations.english: I do hope you still have the Staff of Magnus someplace. I suspect you're going to need it.
translations.chinese: 真希望你还拿着玛格努斯之杖。我觉得你用得上。

translations.english: It would seem there's some sort of disturbance. From what few details we were given, it sounds quite familiar.
translations.chinese: 好像是有什么骚乱。从得到的为数不多的细节来看，有些眼熟。

translations.english: Ha! I didn't think he'd really give it back.

translations.chinese: 跟你做生意真不错。

agentText:

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Pleasure doing business with you. | ZH: 跟你做生意真不错。 | SID: 0078DE

translations.english: Oh, I suppose. But you keep this to yourself; I don't want it being known that I go back on my trades. Understand?
translations.chinese: 哎，也是。但你得保密，我不想别人知道我又回去做生意了。明白吗？

translations.chinese: 说得对，但你看，事情就是……我不关心什么“对大家都好”。我只关心我自己。

translations.english: Oh, good. I was really afraid I'd lose it forever.
translations.chinese: 哦，好。我真的害怕永远失去它。

translations.english: Some kind of resonance... you and the wall. It must be connected to the amulet!
translations.chinese: 你和墙之间产生了……某种共鸣。一定和护符有关！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: So there's nothing more to be said.
translations.chinese: 所以没什么好说了。

translations.english: Onmund is too afraid to deal with me himself, and so he's sent you.
translations.chinese: 昂蒙德不敢亲自找我，就让你来了。

translations.english: Oh my. How precious.
translations.chinese: 哎呀。真稀奇啊。

translations.english: I'll make this very simple for you. All my trades are final. Onmund knew this ahead of time, and went through with it anyway.
translations.chinese: 简单跟你说吧。我这儿都是一锤子买卖。昂蒙德早就知道，并且坚持要交易。

translations.english: I'm not sticking around to fight a dragon!
translations.chinese: 我可不会留下来和龙打！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C1E8A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm not sticking around to fight a dragon! | ZH: 我可不会留下来和龙打！ | SID: 0000D6

translations.english: Are you daft? This isn't the Dark Brotherhood! We don't go around murdering anyone, ever. It just isn't how things are done.
translations.chinese: 你傻吗？这不是黑暗兄弟会的勾当！我们不会到处杀人，永远不会。我们不是这样办事的。

translations.english: I guess I shouldn't be surprised. Nothing around here has been going well lately.
translations.chinese: 我想我也没感到惊讶。最近是诸事不顺啊。

translations.english: They live below the streets in the Ratway like dirty animals. And trust me, they're no better than the vermin that slink out of there for scraps.
translations.chinese: 他们像一群肮脏的动物住在街道下面的鼠道里。相信我，他们比那些偷偷溜出去找残汤剩饭的害虫强不了多少。

translations.english: They make it difficult for decent people to earn a living. Of course, not many decent people live here in the first place.
translations.chinese: 他们逼得正直的人们难以过活，当然了，这里也没多少正派的人。

translations.english: It's Riften's name for the sewers beneath our feet. Absolutely disgusting!
translations.chinese: 是我们脚下裂谷城下水道的名字。十分恶心！

translations.english: If you fancy keeping your purse filled with gold and your head on your shoulders, I'd stay out of those awful tunnels.
translations.chinese: 如果你想让自己包里不丢钱，让脑袋安全放在肩膀上，就离那个可怕的地道远点。

translations.english: I hope one day to find out what happened to me... how I ended up like that.
translations.chinese: 我希望有一天能弄明白发生在自己身上的事……我为什么会成为孤儿。

translations.english: Through reasons I'm still trying to discover, I ended up orphaned then taken in by a kindly Argonian family in Black Marsh.
translations.chinese: 尽管我还在找寻原因，但我成为孤儿后被黑沼泽一家善良的阿尔贡家庭收养了。

translations.english: I may be dark elf by birth, but I was raised Argonian.
translations.chinese: 虽然我是个暗精灵，但我是被阿尔贡抚养长大的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C1F78]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Through reasons I'm still trying to discover, I ended up orphaned then taken in by a kindly Argonian family in Black Marsh. | ZH: 尽管我还在找寻原因，但我成为孤儿后被黑沼泽一家善良的阿尔贡家庭收养了。 | SID: 007898

translations.english: Perhaps it's because there's no better way to face the cold Skyrim nights than with a belly full of ale?
translations.chinese: 也许是因为在天际寒冷的夜晚，没有比灌满肚子酒更好的御寒方法了？

translations.english: A buxom barmaid between the sheets will keeps me plenty warm.
translations.chinese: 床上有个丰满的酒馆女侍会让我暖和很多的。

translations.english: Oh, there's a better way.
translations.chinese: 哦，还有个更好的办法。

translations.english: Better yet, she won't make my head ring the morning after.
translations.chinese: 更好的是，我不会因为她在第二天早上脑袋嗡嗡响。

translations.english: In the very oldest tales, back from when there still were dragons in Skyrim, the Dragonborn would slay dragons and steal their power.
translations.chinese: 在最古老的传说里，从天际还有龙存在的时候起，龙裔就可以杀死巨龙并夺取它们的力量。

translations.english: That's what you did, isn't it? Absorbed that dragon's power?
translations.chinese: 那不是你干的吗？吸收龙的力量。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C2462]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: That's what you did, isn't it? Absorbed that dragon's power? | ZH: 那不是你干的吗？吸收龙的力量。 | SID: 006E0C

translations.english: If I had a Septim for every case of Rockjoint or Witbane I've cured since I opened this shop, I'd be a rich woman indeed.
translations.chinese: 自从开了这家店，如果每治好一个关节石化病或者魔障症我就收一枚塞普汀的话，那我早就是富婆啦。

translations.english: Within these walls, I have all that I need to brew a potion for nearly any ailment.
translations.chinese: 在城里，我有足够的资源来调配一种可以治疗几乎所有疾病的药剂。

translations.english: Of a sort. I don't have formal training in the Restoration school, but... something just as good.
translations.chinese: 算是同行吧。我没接受过恢复系学派的正式训练，但……同样擅长治病。

translations.english: So you're a healer?
translations.chinese: 你是治疗师？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C2467]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: If I had a Septim for every case of Rockjoint or Witbane I've cured since I opened this shop, I'd be a rich woman indeed. | ZH: 自从开了这家店，如果每治好一个关节石化病或者魔障症我就收一枚塞普汀的话，那我早就是富婆啦。 | SID: 007837
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Within these walls, I have all that I need to brew a potion for nearly any ailment. | ZH: 在城里，我有足够的资源来调配一种可以治疗几乎所有疾病的药剂。 | SID: 007839
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Of a sort. I don't have formal training in the Restoration school, but... something just as good. | ZH: 算是同行吧。我没接受过恢复系学派的正式训练，但……同样擅长治病。 | SID: 00C01A
- INFO:RNAM | EN: So you're a healer? | ZH: 你是治疗师？ | SID: 00DB3B

translations.english: Anyway, our wares are strong and the prices fair. What else matters?
translations.chinese: 不管怎么说，我们店里的货都很结实，而且价格公道。还有什么问题吗？

translations.english: Place is named after her. "Warmaiden's." It's a childhood nickname, given by her father. What I hear, she was playing with swords even back then.
translations.chinese: 这地方是她命名的。“战争少女”。这是她小时候，她爸给她起的小外号。据我所知，那时候她就开始舞刀弄剑了。

translations.english: Adrianne. At her forge, just outside.
translations.chinese: 阿德里安。就是用外面的锻炉。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C2468]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Anyway, our wares are strong and the prices fair. What else matters? | ZH: 不管怎么说，我们店里的货都很结实，而且价格公道。还有什么问题吗？ | SID: 007831
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Place is named after her. "Warmaiden's." It's a childhood nickname, given by her father. What I hear, she was playing with swords even back then. | ZH: 这地方是她命名的。“战争少女”。这是她小时候，她爸给她起的小外号。据我所知，那时候她就开始舞刀弄剑了。 | SID: 007832
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Adrianne. At her forge, just outside. | ZH: 阿德里安。就是用外面的锻炉。 | SID: 007833

translations.english: Oh, yes. Hunting is my great passion.
translations.chinese: 哦，没错。打猎是我最大的爱好。

translations.english: He tends the store, and I've got this stall.
translations.chinese: 他负责打理商店，我管着这个摊位。

translations.english: That's why my brother and I opened a shop to sell hunting supplies. It's the Drunken Huntsman, down by the main gate.
translations.chinese: 这就是为什么我们兄弟开了一间卖狩猎用具的店。就是大门那边的醉猎户。

translations.english: My brother Anoriath and I came up with it one night after consuming... rather too much mead.
translations.chinese: 有天晚上，我和我兄弟阿诺利亚斯喝……蜜酒喝多了。

translations.english: He shot an arrow that pierced my... well, my rump. After such a memorable adventure, we knew we had the name for our shop.
translations.chinese: 他一箭就射到了我的……哎，屁股。有了这么一次难忘的冒险，我们就知道该给店起什么名字了。

translations.english: After our drinks, we went out for a moonlight hunt. We got separated, and in his drunken state my brother mistook me for a deer.
translations.chinese: 喝完了，我们就趁着月光去打猎了。我们走散了，我兄弟喝多了，把我当成了鹿。

translations.english: Yes, I hear that question often.

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: This one would try a shop. You might prefer the direct route, hm? | ZH: 在下可能会去商店试试。你可能更喜欢直接找，嗯？ | SID: 0077A8

translations.english: And yet you have done my bidding. Why, I wonder?
translations.chinese: 但你还是执行了我的命令。我很奇怪为什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C2D03]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And yet you have done my bidding. Why, I wonder? | ZH: 但你还是执行了我的命令。我很奇怪为什么？ | SID: 005C8D

translations.english: The vapors are waning, but not yet gone. Take a breath. Peryite will speak if He sees fit.
translations.chinese: 雾气渐弱，不过还未消散。深呼吸。魄伊特会决定是否见你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C2D04]

translations.english: Did you leave any alive? The Afflicted are mere vessels for my Blessing. It will spread to others through their touch and my own.
translations.chinese: 没有留活口吧？病痛者只不过是受我赐福的容器。通过接触把祝福传给他人。

translations.english: Another Overseer will replace Orchendor, when the time comes. For now all is cleansed and ordered.
translations.chinese: 到时候会有新的监督者取代奥尘多。现在一切都清洁有序了。

translations.english: Go, seek your fate. I will be watching, and perhaps we will meet again - afterwards.
translations.chinese: 去吧，追寻自己的命运。我会注视着你，或许我们终有一日会再见面的。

translations.english: Embrace order and hard truth, mortal. Good bye.
translations.chinese: 凡人，拥抱秩序与残酷的真理吧。再会。

agentText:

translations.english: Ah, no. Don't think you've got the stuff. Come back when you've seen a bit more in life, perhaps.
translations.chinese: 啊，不。我不觉得你有那本事。或许，你应该等经历更丰富了再来。

translations.english: I think Giraud here would give you the best explanation of both it and the history of King Olaf's Verse. You should speak to him about it.
translations.chinese: 吉劳德会好好给你解释的，还有关于奥拉夫王之诗的历史。你应该去找他谈谈。

translations.english: Get the coat. Then we'll talk.
translations.chinese: 去拿外套。然后再说。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C33B9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Get the coat. Then we'll talk. | ZH: 去拿外套。然后再说。 | SID: 00B876

translations.english: Nice to meet the person who went to King Olaf's Tomb.
translations.chinese: 很高兴见到去过奥拉夫王陵墓的人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C33BA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Nice to meet the person who went to King Olaf's Tomb. | ZH: 很高兴见到去过奥拉夫王陵墓的人。 | SID: 002DD8

translations.english: The Verse was Svaknir's contribution to the Poetic Edda, the living history of Skyrim. Each bard adds to the Edda in his or her time.
translations.chinese: 这首诗是斯瓦科尼尔对《诗歌埃达》的贡献。每位吟游诗人都会为他那个时代添加埃达。

translations.english: He's sending you after King Olaf's Verse then? That's good, we shouldn't leave it lying around now that I've figured out where it is.
translations.chinese: 他要派你去找《奥拉夫王之诗》？好，既然我已经知道它的下落，就不能置之不理。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C33BB]

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: He's sending you after King Olaf's Verse then? That's good, we shouldn't leave it lying around now that I've figured out where it is. | ZH: 他要派你去找《奥拉夫王之诗》？好，既然我已经知道它的下落，就不能置之不理。 | SID: 00F16B

translations.english: And a very ancient one.
translations.chinese: 而且是非常古老的一部分。

translations.english: At least, that's what we thought until I translated some ancient texts a year or so ago. We now believe King Olaf buried the truth with the bard.
translations.chinese: 至少我们是这么认为的，直到一年前我翻译古籍的时候。我们现在确信奥拉夫王埋葬了那个诗人的真相。

translations.english: The verse criticized the reigning King Olaf. He was so incensed the bard was put to death and all the copies burned.
translations.chinese: 这首诗批评了当政的奥拉夫王。奥拉夫一怒之下处死了吟游诗人，把那些副本都付之一炬。

translations.english: If I'm right Svaknir and King Olaf's Verse lie in Dead Men's Respite, along with the burial chamber of King Olaf himself.
translations.chinese: 如果我的看法正确，那斯瓦科尼尔和《奥拉夫王之诗》就在亡者之栖。

translations.chinese: 约格利姆眺台

Addon: Skyrim

Translations:

translations.english: Now, if were done being sentimental, it's time for you to take the Oath.
translations.chinese: 现在，如果我们不用再多愁善感，是时候宣誓了。

translations.english: Not at all. That was as much a test of your abilities as it was your resolve.
translations.chinese: 绝对不是。这既是对你能力的考验，也是对你决心的考验。

translations.english: I wasn't sure your heart was in it. But you've proven me wrong. And I respect that.
translations.chinese: 我不确定你是否真心。但你已经证明我错了。我承认。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C3471]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Now, if were done being sentimental, it's time for you to take the Oath. | ZH: 现在，如果我们不用再多愁善感，是时候宣誓了。 | SID: 005CB3
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Not at all. That was as much a test of your abilities as it was your resolve. | ZH: 绝对不是。这既是对你能力的考验，也是对你决心的考验。 | SID: 00BACD
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I wasn't sure your heart was in it. But you've proven me wrong. And I respect that. | ZH: 我不确定你是否真心。但你已经证明我错了。我承认。 | SID: 00CAEF

translations.english: And then get back here. Because if Ulfric isn't bluffing, I'll need every able body to defend Whiterun.
translations.chinese: 然后回到这儿。假如乌弗瑞克不是虚张声势，那我就得集结所有有能力的人来保护白漫城。

translations.english: Keep your wits about you and you won't be harmed.
translations.chinese: 保持清醒，你就不会受伤。

translations.english: True, he's a dangerous and blood thirsty man, but he's also a Nord that honors our traditions.
translations.chinese: 他确实是个危险嗜血的人，但也是尊重我们传统的诺德人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C3472]

translations.english: Only the ones I'm not sure about. This will prove your abilities, but more importantly, it will prove your commitment.
translations.chinese: 只有我不确定的那些。我需要测试你的能力，验证你的承诺。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C3473]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Only the ones I'm not sure about. This will prove your abilities, but more importantly, it will prove your commitment. | ZH: 只有我不确定的那些。我需要测试你的能力，验证你的承诺。 | SID: 007758

translations.english: "...and unwavering obedience to the officers of his great Empire."
translations.chinese: “……并毫不动摇地服从他伟大帝国的军官们”

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C3474]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: "...and unwavering obedience to the officers of his great Empire." | ZH: “……并毫不动摇地服从他伟大帝国的军官们” | SID: 00988C

translations.english: The Throne of Ysgramor! The throne of my father... I only hope I can prove worthy of the honor.
translations.chinese: 伊斯格拉默的王座！我父亲的王座……我只希望我能证明自己配得上这份荣誉。

translations.english: Clamoring in angry voices, calling out for justice, for war, they sat me on the throne.
translations.chinese: 他们愤怒地大声呼唤，呼唤正义，呼唤战争，他们让我坐上了王座。

translations.english: When finally set free, I returned to Windhelm, and was greeted by a city in mourning, at one with my own grief and anger.
translations.chinese: 等我最终获释返回风舵城的时候，迎接我的是一座深陷哀痛的城市，这其中也有我自己的悲愤。

translations.english: I, his only son, forced to deliver his eulogy via a letter I had smuggled out of prison. Such is the love of Titus Mede for his subjects.
translations.chinese: 我作为他的独子，只能从监狱偷偷捎出去的信来悼念他。这就是提图斯·迈德对他臣民的爱。

translations.english: My father, the great Bear of Eastmarch, died during my imprisonment after the Markarth Incident.
translations.chinese: 在马卡斯事件之后，我被囚禁了起来。我的父亲，东陲巨熊，在我被囚期间去世了。

agentText:

translations.english: But the Moot has not yet met to name her High Queen. And they won't. Not as long as I have any say in it.
translations.chinese: 但只要我还有发言权，领主议会就不会提名她成为至高女王。

translations.english: Indeed, Elisif has become Jarl of Solitude, historically and conveniently home of the High King, backed by Imperial interests.
translations.chinese: 确实，艾利西弗成为了独孤城领主。独孤城作为至高王的居城历史久远且便利，而且受到帝国利益上的支持。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C3477]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: But the Moot has not yet met to name her High Queen. And they won't. Not as long as I have any say in it. | ZH: 但只要我还有发言权，领主议会就不会提名她成为至高女王。 | SID: 00774A
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Indeed, Elisif has become Jarl of Solitude, historically and conveniently home of the High King, backed by Imperial interests. | ZH: 确实，艾利西弗成为了独孤城领主。独孤城作为至高王的居城历史久远且便利，而且受到帝国利益上的支持。 | SID: 00774B

translations.english: Now, while I'm certain this is all terribly interesting to you, I have important matters to attend.
translations.chinese: 我知道你对这事儿很感兴趣。但我有要事处理。

translations.english: I'm originally from Cyrodiil, sent here at the request of the Emperor himself. I'm often ordered to places with problems that need fixing.
translations.chinese: 我应皇帝之命从希罗帝尔而来。我经常被派到需要解决问题的地方。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C3478]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Now, while I'm certain this is all terribly interesting to you, I have important matters to attend. | ZH: 我知道你对这事儿很感兴趣。但我有要事处理。 | SID: 007710
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I'm originally from Cyrodiil, sent here at the request of the Emperor himself. I'm often ordered to places with problems that need fixing. | ZH: 我应皇帝之命从希罗帝尔而来。我经常被派到需要解决问题的地方。 | SID: 00D20A

translations.english: I'm sorry to hear that. If you change your mind, speak with Galmar. What does bring you to me?
translations.chinese: 很遗憾。如果你改主意了，就去找加尔玛吧。你来找我干什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C3479]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm sorry to hear that. If you change your mind, speak with Galmar. What does bring you to me? | ZH: 很遗憾。如果你改主意了，就去找加尔玛吧。你来找我干什么？ | SID: 007772

translations.english: It's time we had a real king. One of our own making.
translations.chinese: 现在是时候让我们选出一位真正属于我们的至高王了。

translations.english: There hasn't been a true High King in Skyrim for generations.
translations.chinese: 天际已经很多代没有真正的至高王了。

translations.english: For too long he's been hand-picked by the Emperor, and given emphatic nods by milk-drinking Jarls addicted to Imperial coin.
translations.chinese: 长久以来都是由皇帝选定，并且一群贪财的懦夫领主对其马首是瞻。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C347A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: It's time we had a real king. One of our own making. | ZH: 现在是时候让我们选出一位真正属于我们的至高王了。 | SID: 006A83
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: There hasn't been a true High King in Skyrim for generations. | ZH: 天际已经很多代没有真正的至高王了。 | SID: 006BAD
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: For too long he's been hand-picked by the Emperor, and given emphatic nods by milk-drinking Jarls addicted to Imperial coin. | ZH: 长久以来都是由皇帝选定，并且一群贪财的懦夫领主对其马首是瞻。 | SID: 007748

translations.english: Now, that's it. One free outfit per soldier. You lose that, or get it banged up, you'll need to pay like everyone else.
translations.chinese: 就这样吧。每个士兵都能免费拿一套。要是你弄丢了或者弄坏了，就和别人一样付钱吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Now, that's it. One free outfit per soldier. You lose that, or get it banged up, you'll need to pay like everyone else. | ZH: 就这样吧。每个士兵都能免费拿一套。要是你弄丢了或者弄坏了，就和别人一样付钱吧。 | SID: 00776C

translations.english: Take for example, Ulfric Stormcloak and his little "rebellion." But rest assured, his days are numbered.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克和他小小的叛乱就是个例子。但请放心，他已时日无多了。

translations.english: The Legion's always been here. Without us to keep order, the provinces would fall into barbarism and lawlessness. Especially Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 军团一直在这里。没有我们维持秩序，各省就会陷入野蛮和无法无天的境地，尤其是天际。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C347C]
Translations:

translations.english: Good.
translations.chinese: 很好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C347D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good. | ZH: 很好。 | SID: 00F567

translations.english: He was too privileged and too foolish, more interested in entertaining his queen than ruling his country.
translations.chinese: 他肆意专权，狂妄愚蠢，热衷讨好他的王后胜过治理国家。

translations.english: But that was precisely the point! He was a puppet-king of the Empire , not a High King of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 这正是问题所在！他是帝国的傀儡王，而不是天际的至高王。

translations.english: True, he didn't stand a chance against me.
translations.chinese: 事实上，他确实没有什么胜算。

translations.english: I challenged him in the traditional way, and he accepted. There were many witnesses. No "murder" was committed.
translations.chinese: 我以传统的方式挑战了他，他接受了。现场有许多证人，不存在“谋杀”一说。

translations.english: His father before him perhaps, but not Torygg.
translations.chinese: 他的父亲也许是，但托依格不是。

translations.chinese: 别的地方可找不到这么好的钢。要是这都救不了你的命，那可是真没辙了。

translations.english: I killed Torygg to prove our wretched condition. How is the High King supposed to be the defender of Skyrim, if he can't even defend himself?

translations.english: I hope Ulfric will come to his senses. But I fear he's in too far to stop now.
translations.chinese: 我希望乌弗瑞克能恢复理智。但恐怕他已经走的太远了。

translations.english: Likely only Ulfric's death, or the overthrow of the Jarls supporting him will end this. Either way, much blood will be spilt.
translations.chinese: 可能只有乌弗瑞克死了，或者支持他的领主都下台才能结束这一切。不管怎样，流血牺牲在所难免。

translations.english: First we'll kick the Thalmor and their bloody Imperial puppets out of the country. Then we'll rebuild Skyrim into the land she once was.
translations.chinese: 我们先得把梭默和他们的血腥帝国傀儡赶出这个国家。然后把天际重建成她曾经的样子。

translations.english: When we are done with that, we will take our army to the Dominion, and show those pointy-eared bastards not every man is fit to be their slave.
translations.chinese: 等这里完事了，我们就带着军队杀到先祖神洲去。让那些尖耳朵混蛋明白明白，不是所有人都愿意做他们的奴隶。

translations.english: What is the aim of this war?
translations.chinese: 这场战争是为了什么？

- INFO:RNAM | EN: What is the aim of this war? | ZH: 这场战争是为了什么？ | SID: 00AFEC

translations.english: Untold numbers of Nords died defending the Empire against the Dominion. And for what?
translations.chinese: 无数的诺德人为捍卫帝国、抗击先祖神洲而牺牲。

translations.english: We're fighting because our own Jarls, once strong, wise men, have become fearful and blind to their people's suffering.
translations.chinese: 我们战斗，因为我们曾经强大而睿智的领主们变得懦弱，而对人民的苦难视而不见。

translations.english: Skyrim being sold to the Thalmor so the Emperor could keep his throne!
translations.chinese: 然而皇帝为了他的皇位，把天际出卖给了梭默！

translations.english: We're fighting because Skyrim needs heroes, and there's no one else but us.
translations.chinese: 我们战斗，因为天际需要英雄，而舍我等其谁。

translations.english: We're fighting because we're done bleeding for an Empire that won't bleed for us.
translations.chinese: 我们战斗，因为我们不能再为一个不愿为我们流血的帝国流血了。

translations.english: Why are you fighting this war?
translations.chinese: 你们为何要打这场战争？

translations.english: Ah, but without a doubt, the most compelling feature of this frozen wasteland is the volley of inane questions leveled at me on a regular basis.
translations.chinese: 啊，但毫无疑问，这片冰冻荒原上最吸引我的就是经常有人向我提出一连串愚蠢的问题。

translations.english: Isn't it obvious? Why, the wonderful weather and hospitable people, of course!
translations.chinese: 这不是显而易见吗？当然是因为宜人的气候和好客的民众了！

translations.english: Not to mention my great fondness for dragons and petty political power struggles.
translations.chinese: 更别提我还多热爱龙族和琐碎的政治权力斗争了。

translations.english: Interesting, to say the least. What with all that's been going on.
translations.chinese: 至少可以说有点意思吧。尤其是发生了这么多事。

translations.english: All that matters is that I have what you need. And it's worth every septim.
translations.chinese: 重要的是我有你需要的东西，而且绝对一分钱一分货。

translations.english: But on the other, the scarcity of supplies has led to some, well, "elevated" prices.
translations.chinese: 但另一方面就是，供应短缺引发了价格的“上涨”。

translations.english: On the one hand, supplies are harder to come by, since fewer traders are traveling the roads these days.
translations.chinese: 一方面，由于现在走大路的商人越来越少，供应越发难得。

Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: All that matters is that I have what you need. And it's worth every septim. | ZH: 重要的是我有你需要的东西，而且绝对一分钱一分货。 | SID: 0076BB
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: But on the other, the scarcity of supplies has led to some, well, "elevated" prices. | ZH: 但另一方面就是，供应短缺引发了价格的“上涨”。 | SID: 0076BD
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: On the one hand, supplies are harder to come by, since fewer traders are traveling the roads these days. | ZH: 一方面，由于现在走大路的商人越来越少，供应越发难得。 | SID: 0076C2

translations.english: That'll be the Jarl, Balgruuf the Greater. He's an honorable enough man. Never done wrong by me or my kin.
translations.chinese: 领主“伟岸者”巴尔古夫。他是个可敬的人，始终为我和亲人们着想。

translations.english: Things are tough for him now, I'd wager. What with the fighting, and the dragons. But Balgruuf's a tough old Nord. He can handle it.
translations.chinese: 我敢打赌，他现在日子不好过。战乱还有巨龙。但巴尔古夫是个坚强的老诺德人。他能应付得过来。

translations.english: You ask if I'm worried? I'm terrified, if you want to truth of it. But I have to stay strong for my wife and children.
translations.chinese: 你问我是否担心？说实话，我确实害怕。为了老婆孩子，我必须坚强。

translations.english: Of course. Every night I pray that we don't get a visit from a dragon, or that two armies don't show up to fight over the bridge.
translations.chinese: 当然。我每晚都要祈祷别有龙找上门来，或者别有两支军队在桥上打仗。

translations.english: The Stormcloaks can rot in Oblivion for all I care. I've lived in this city for twenty years. Twenty!
translations.chinese: 风暴斗篷尽管在湮灭里腐烂吧。我已经在这城里住了二十年。二十年！

translations.english: Why, because I'm a proud citizen of the Empire? Because the Stormcloaks only want Nords in Skyrim?
translations.chinese: 为什么，就因为我是自豪的帝国公民？因为风暴斗篷只想让诺德人占有天际？

agentText:

translations.english: And that's not all. They took a heap of our lumber, and one tried to have his way with my daughter. They think they can do whatever they want.
translations.chinese: 这还不算。他们拿走了我们一堆木材，还有一个想把我女儿抢走。他们太为所欲为了。

translations.english: They stayed at the inn, but didn't pay. They said soldiers don't need to pay because they're risking their lives to protect us.
translations.chinese: 他们赖在旅店还不给钱。说是当兵的正在冒着生命危险保护我们，所以不需要付钱。

translations.english: Both the Imperials and Stormcloaks have sent riders this way, scouting the bridge and the lands nearby.
translations.chinese: 帝国军和风暴斗篷都派骑兵来这里侦察过桥和周边的土地。

translations.english: You should check in at Dragonsreach, too. There's so much going on these days, the Jarl or his Steward might have need of help.
translations.chinese: 你也可以去拜访一下龙临宫。这几天发生了很多事，领主和总管可能会需要帮助。

translations.english: Try Hulda, the innkeeper at the Bannered Mare. It's just up the road, near the market.
translations.chinese: 去找悬旗母马的老板胡尔达试试吧，那家店就在这条路上的市场附近。

translations.english: When I met Michel, I knew this was where I belonged. I suppose that's it, really.
translations.chinese: 当我遇到米切尔时，我知道这里就是我的归宿了。我真的就是这么想的。

translations.english: I grew up an orphan on the streets of Markarth. I'd have died there, too, but for the kindness of an old warrior named Logrolf the Bent.
translations.chinese: 我是在马卡斯街头长大的孤儿。要不是有个叫“驼背”罗格洛夫的老战士心善，我可能会在那里直到死去。

translations.english: Logrolf rescued me and gave me enough money to get out of the city. I followed the Karth river north, and came here.
translations.chinese: 罗格洛夫救了我，给我足够的钱让我离开那座城市。我沿着卡斯河向北，来到了这里。

translations.english: Well, that and maybe those stuck-up, dung-sniffing Battle-Borns.
translations.chinese: 嗯，还有那些自命不凡的臭战狂。

translations.english: I can tell you're new around here, askin' a question like that.
translations.chinese: 一问这种问题就知道你是初来乍到。

translations.english: My husband Eorlund tends the Skyforge up at Jorrvaskr, the Companions mead hall. There's no finer smith in the nine holds.
translations.chinese: 我丈夫厄伦德在战友团蜜酒大厅月瓦斯卡旁边的天空锻炉。九大领地里没有比他更好的铁匠了。

translations.english: You should ask him about his work. It's the only subject that'll get him talking.
translations.chinese: 你应该找他聊聊他的工作。这是唯一能让他开口的话题。

translations.english: You've got no idea. Half the men in Whiterun have proposed to me. Some were even single.
translations.chinese: 你不知道。白漫城有一半男的跟我求过婚。有些人到现在还单着。

translations.english: Right now, all that matters is my daughter Mila. No man's going to get between me and my little girl.
translations.chinese: 现在，我最重要的就是女儿米拉。没人能阻隔在我们母女之间。

translations.english: They'll never understand. No amount of flowers or honeyed words are going to change my mind.
translations.chinese: 他们永远不会明白。再多的鲜花和甜言蜜语也改不了我的心。

translations.english: Could be if one side wants to keep the other from coming across, they might try to knock it down.
translations.chinese: 如果一方想阻拦另一方过来，他们可能会试图把它拆毁。

translations.english: Hard to say. It's ancient, that much we know for sure. It was here long before the town itself.
translations.chinese: 很难说了。可以肯定的是这东西很古老了。早在这镇子出现前就在这里了。

translations.english: I just hope the bridge survives the war. It's the only place you can cross the Karth river for a long way in either direction.
translations.chinese: 我只是希望这座桥能在战争中幸存下来。这是唯一一个可以不绕路跨过卡斯河的地方。

translations.english: I swear that woman is the most spiteful shrew in all Skyrim. I think there's a chunk of ice where her heart ought to be.
translations.chinese: 我发誓那娘们儿是天际最恶毒的泼妇。她的心脏都是冰做的。

translations.english: Her name's Olda. If you've met her, then you probably already know what I'm talking about.
translations.chinese: 她叫奥尔达。如果你见过她，就知道我在说什么了。

translations.english: Master Wulfgar will demonstrate Whirlwind Sprint. Then it will be your turn.
translations.chinese: 沃夫加大师会展示旋风冲刺。然后就该轮到你了。

translations.english: You must hear the Word within yourself before you can project it into a Thu'um.
translations.chinese: 你必须在内心中听到这个词，再将它投射成一个吐'目。

translations.english: Master Borri will teach you the first Word of a new Shout. Attend to him.
translations.chinese: 博瑞大师会教你新龙吼的第一个词。去找他吧。

translations.english: Must have come from Mercer's place. He'd admired the Gray Fox for some time. Sure, I'll buy it from you... here you are.
translations.chinese: 肯定是从墨瑟家拿的吧。他崇拜灰狐有些日子了。当然，我买了……给你钱。

agentText:

translations.english: Are you serious? The war is tearing the land apart, the dragons have returned seeking who knows what... Skyrim is going nowhere fast.
translations.chinese: 你是认真的？战争正在撕裂这片土地，龙族也回来了，谁知道他们在找什么……天际已经快完了。

translations.english: If I were you, I'd pack up and get out of here before you end up in one of those burial cairns.
translations.chinese: 如果我是你，我就收拾东西离开，免得被砸死在石头底下。

translations.english: It's worth quite a bit actually. Quite a catch! Here you go, this should make you smile.
translations.chinese: 确实值些钱。拿的好！钱给你，应该能够你乐的了。

translations.english: The sooner I get out of Skyrim the better.
translations.chinese: 我要尽快离开天际才行。

translations.english: I'm not out to win friends and I could care less if you're happy about your purchase or not. I just need the coin.
translations.chinese: 我不是来交朋友，也不在乎你是否对购物感到愉快。我只需要钱。

translations.english: Look, I've moved all over Skyrim selling these bits of junk and I'm barely scraping by.
translations.chinese: 听着，我跑遍天际卖这些垃圾，只能勉强度日。

translations.english: By the Eight... you actually got your hands on it! This alone is worth more than some thieves earn in a lifetime.
translations.chinese: 八圣灵啊……你真拿到手了！就这一件就比其他贼一辈子赚的还多了。

translations.chinese: 真是令人欣喜的发现！这些应该足够了。

translations.english: I can assure you that this is entirely false. We are fully in control of everything.
translations.chinese: 我可以向你保证，这是完全的错误。一切都在我们的掌控中。

translations.english: There are those that believe the Jarl does nothing for this city... that it's corrupt and run by the Black-Briar family.
translations.chinese: 有人认为领主对城市毫无贡献……城市已经腐败了，被黑棘家族掌控了。

translations.chinese: 对了，两个家族有世仇，一个灰鬃，一个战狂。你要小心。

translations.english: Well, I know the Companions make their home here. Their mead hall, Jorrvaskr, is the oldest building in the city.
translations.chinese: 战友团在这里安家。他们的蜜酒大厅“月瓦斯卡”是这城里最古老的建筑了。

translations.english: The rest you can find out by asking the townsfolk. I'd start with the barkeep at the Bannered Mare, or the castle steward.
translations.chinese: 其他的你可以问问住在城里的人。是我的话就去悬旗母马酒馆或者找城堡的管家。

translations.chinese: 所以我需要个能让敌人感到害怕的绰号。当我有敌人的时候。

translations.english: Father says I should pick a name that describes what I really am, but nobody's going to hire Erik Greenthumb or Erik Hoe-pusher.
translations.chinese: 父亲说我应该取个符合真实身份的绰号，但不会有人愿意雇“菜鸟”艾瑞克或者“挥锄人”艾瑞克。

translations.chinese: 我们都叫她爱丽芙斯格尔女王，或者简单点叫爱丽。只要你买下她，想起什么名字随你意。

translations.english: Now, the horse I got for sale is seven years old, but in fine health. She's got a lot of spirit, that one.
translations.chinese: 我现在要卖的那匹已经七岁了，不过身体不错、就是那个很有精神的。

translations.english: None of 'em's older than nine, and the youngest is six.
translations.chinese: 都不超过九岁口，最小的才六岁。

translations.english: Exploiting? What's that supposed to mean? Erik works the farm because he's a good lad!
translations.chinese: 利用？什么意思？艾瑞克在农场干活是因为他是个好孩子！

translations.chinese: 哦，如果你见到玛雯·黑棘，要按她说的办。这里是她的城市，不归别人管。

translations.english: You can get a room at the Bee and Barb, but mind your coin purse -- it's no secret the Thieves' Guild makes its home here.
translations.chinese: 你可以去蜂与钩租间房，但一定要小心自己的钱包。盗贼公会在这里安家已经算不得秘密了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C41DB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Oh, and if you meet Maven Black-Briar, stay on her good side. This is her city, and nobody else's. | ZH: 哦，如果你见到玛雯·黑棘，要按她说的办。这里是她的城市，不归别人管。 | SID: 001AE5
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You can get a room at the Bee and Barb, but mind your coin purse -- it's no secret the Thieves' Guild makes its home here. | ZH: 你可以去蜂与钩租间房，但一定要小心自己的钱包。盗贼公会在这里安家已经算不得秘密了。 | SID: 0075DF

translations.english: My carriage is the safest way to travel.
translations.chinese: 我的马车就是最安全的旅行方式。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C41DC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: My carriage is the safest way to travel. | ZH: 我的马车就是最安全的旅行方式。 | SID: 00C76C

translations.english: If you need it, you can get a room for a fair price at the Winking Skeever, just inside the main gate.
translations.chinese: 如果有需要的话，可以去眨眼恶鼠租间房，价格还挺公道的，就在进正门不远。

translations.english: Ah, let's see, what else... The Bards College is here, and the main office of the East Empire Company.
translations.chinese: 啊，让我想想还有什么……吟游诗人学院在这儿，东帝国公司总部也在这儿。

translations.english: Solitude's been the capital of Skyrim as long as I can remember. Most of the High Kings of Skyrim were Jarls of Solitude first.
translations.chinese: 从我记事起，独孤城就是天际的首都了。天际大多数至高王起初都是独孤领主。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C41DD]

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Solitude's been the capital of Skyrim as long as I can remember. Most of the High Kings of Skyrim were Jarls of Solitude first. | ZH: 从我记事起，独孤城就是天际的首都了。天际大多数至高王起初都是独孤领主。 | SID: 0075D9

translations.english: I appreciate the gesture, but I'd rather not be in debt to a stranger.
translations.chinese: 谢谢你的好意，但我不想欠陌生人的人情。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C41DE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I appreciate the gesture, but I'd rather not be in debt to a stranger. | ZH: 谢谢你的好意，但我不想欠陌生人的人情。 | SID: 0041A7

translations.english: The Argonians can't even live inside the walls. They're all stuck out on the docks.
translations.chinese: 阿尔贡更惨，连城都进不去。都住在码头。

translations.english: It's an old city, I can tell you that. The Palace of the Kings is ancient.
translations.chinese: 跟你说，这是座古城了。众王之殿年头不短了。

translations.english: It's not the friendliest place for outsiders. The Dark Elves were all forced to live in a slum called the Gray Quarter.
translations.chinese: 这里对外来者不太友好。暗精灵都被迫住在一个叫“灰民区”的贫民窟里。

translations.english: Still, Candlehearth Hall's got decent food and cheap bunks. You could do worse.
translations.chinese: 不过，烛炉堂吃的住的都不错。也没那么糟。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C41DF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: The Argonians can't even live inside the walls. They're all stuck out on the docks. | ZH: 阿尔贡更惨，连城都进不去。都住在码头。 | SID: 001B25
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: It's an old city, I can tell you that. The Palace of the Kings is ancient. | ZH: 跟你说，这是座古城了。众王之殿年头不短了。 | SID: 0075D7
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: It's not the friendliest place for outsiders. The Dark Elves were all forced to live in a slum called the Gray Quarter. | ZH: 这里对外来者不太友好。暗精灵都被迫住在一个叫“灰民区”的贫民窟里。 | SID: 0078FC

translations.english: You were ranting but most of it was slurred. You said something about Rorikstead.
translations.chinese: 一直大喊大叫，还听不清说的是什么。不过你倒是提到了洛利克镇。

translations.english: Well, you were deep in your cups when you got here.
translations.chinese: 好吧，你来的时候喝得酩酊大醉。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C41FB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: You were ranting but most of it was slurred. You said something about Rorikstead. | ZH: 一直大喊大叫，还听不清说的是什么。不过你倒是提到了洛利克镇。 | SID: 009C9E
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Well, you were deep in your cups when you got here. | ZH: 好吧，你来的时候喝得酩酊大醉。 | SID: 00CEF5

translations.english: All right, all right. You're mean when you're sober.
translations.chinese: 好吧，好吧。你清醒的时候怎么这么刻薄。

translations.english: You said you the ceremony was going to be in Morvunskar. You said your friend Sam was going to be your best man.
translations.chinese: 你说过，要在莫万斯卡举行婚礼。你说你朋友山姆会做你的伴郎。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C41FC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: All right, all right. You're mean when you're sober. | ZH: 好吧，好吧。你清醒的时候怎么这么刻薄。 | SID: 000854
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: You said you the ceremony was going to be in Morvunskar. You said your friend Sam was going to be your best man. | ZH: 你说过，要在莫万斯卡举行婚礼。你说你朋友山姆会做你的伴郎。 | SID: 0075C8

translations.english: You think you can bully me. I grew up with five brothers. Go... get...my...ring.
translations.chinese: 你以为能欺负我不成。我和五个兄弟一起长大。去，把我，戒指，拿回来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C41FD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You think you can bully me. I grew up with five brothers. Go... get...my...ring. | ZH: 你以为能欺负我不成。我和五个兄弟一起长大。去，把我，戒指，拿回来。 | SID: 00E30E

translations.english: That's all I know.
translations.chinese: 我就知道这些。

translations.english: Okay, okay. Most of what you said didn't make sense but you left a note. The only bit that I could read said "after repaying Ysolda in Whiterun."
translations.chinese: 好吧，好吧。你说的大部分都狗屁不通，但留了张字条，我就看懂一句“把钱还给白漫城的伊索尔达之后”。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Okay, okay. Most of what you said didn't make sense but you left a note. The only bit that I could read said "after repaying Ysolda in Whiterun." | ZH: 好吧，好吧。你说的大部分都狗屁不通，但留了张字条，我就看懂一句“把钱还给白漫城的伊索尔达之后”。 | SID: 0087ED

translations.english: Do what you have to do, I'm not giving up on Gleda.
translations.chinese: 该干什么干什么。我不会放弃格丽达的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C41FF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Do what you have to do, I'm not giving up on Gleda. | ZH: 该干什么干什么。我不会放弃格丽达的。 | SID: 0075AD

translations.english: You were ranting when you got here but most of it was slurred. You did say something about Rorikstead . Maybe you should take a look there.
translations.chinese: 你刚来的时候大喊大叫，模糊不清。不过你说了洛利克镇。也许你该去那里看看。

translations.english: Well, we can always use contributions.
translations.chinese: 好吧，我们时常接受捐赠。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4200]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: You were ranting when you got here but most of it was slurred. You did say something about Rorikstead . Maybe you should take a look there. | ZH: 你刚来的时候大喊大叫，模糊不清。不过你说了洛利克镇。也许你该去那里看看。 | SID: 000671
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Well, we can always use contributions. | ZH: 好吧，我们时常接受捐赠。 | SID: 00758B

translations.english: Oh you must be nobility of some sort. Running around partying and paying others to clean it up.
translations.chinese: 哦，你一定很有钱吧。到处开宴会，还花钱请别人打扫。

translations.english: I don't think so. Clean up your own mess.
translations.chinese: 我可不这么想。自己收拾好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4201]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Oh you must be nobility of some sort. Running around partying and paying others to clean it up. | ZH: 哦，你一定很有钱吧。到处开宴会，还花钱请别人打扫。 | SID: 005315
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I don't think so. Clean up your own mess. | ZH: 我可不这么想。自己收拾好。 | SID: 00F614

translations.english: But I suppose everyone gets the jitters before their wedding. And I did say you could take a bit of time paying me back.
translations.chinese: 但估计每个人在婚礼前都会紧张。所以我说过，允许你过段时间再还钱。

translations.english: You said the ceremony was going to be at Morvunskar. Don't forget you still owe me!
translations.chinese: 你说要在莫万斯卡举办婚礼。别忘了你还欠我的哦！

translations.english: You must have had a wild night if you can't remember that.
translations.chinese: 如果你记不起来，那你那晚肯定玩得很疯啊。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4202]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: But I suppose everyone gets the jitters before their wedding. And I did say you could take a bit of time paying me back. | ZH: 但估计每个人在婚礼前都会紧张。所以我说过，允许你过段时间再还钱。 | SID: 000417
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: You said the ceremony was going to be at Morvunskar. Don't forget you still owe me! | ZH: 你说要在莫万斯卡举办婚礼。别忘了你还欠我的哦！ | SID: 0026BB
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: You must have had a wild night if you can't remember that. | ZH: 如果你记不起来，那你那晚肯定玩得很疯啊。 | SID: 009300

translations.english: If she still wants to marry you when you tell her you can't afford the ring.
translations.chinese: 前提是你告诉她买不起戒指之后，她还愿意嫁给你。

translations.english: I'm sure your bride-to-be will tell you when you where the ceremony will be.
translations.chinese: 我觉得你的婚约者会告诉你婚礼的地点。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4203]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: If she still wants to marry you when you tell her you can't afford the ring. | ZH: 前提是你告诉她买不起戒指之后，她还愿意嫁给你。 | SID: 0075B7
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I'm sure your bride-to-be will tell you when you where the ceremony will be. | ZH: 我觉得你的婚约者会告诉你婚礼的地点。 | SID: 0075BB

translations.english: Fine, but I'll still be missing my Gleda. Doubt I'll ever have a prize winning goat again.
translations.chinese: 好吧。但我还是很想念格丽达。恐怕我再也养不出这么好的山羊了。

translations.english: Most of what you said was gibberish but you left a note. The only bit I could read was "after repaying Ysolda in Whiterun."
translations.chinese: 你说的大部分话都狗屁不通，不过留了一张字条。我只看懂了“把钱还给白漫城的伊索尔达之后”。

translations.english: There's not enough money in the world to replace Gleda.
translations.chinese: 钱取代不了格丽达。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4205]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: There's not enough money in the world to replace Gleda. | ZH: 钱取代不了格丽达。 | SID: 00AA67

translations.english: You left a note but it was mostly gibberish, the only bit I could make out was "after repaying Ysolda in Whiterun."
translations.chinese: 你留了张字条，不过太潦草了，我只看懂一句“把钱还给白漫城的伊索尔达之后”。

translations.english: I suppose that makes sense. You didn't mention a Sam and nothing you said about the staff made sense.
translations.chinese: 有道理。你没提到山姆，关于法杖也是一堆胡言乱语。

translations.english: You didn't seem to need either to sell Gleda to the Giant in the first place. I think you'll figure it out.
translations.chinese: 看来你一开始就不需要把格丽达卖给巨人。我想你会明白过来的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4207]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You didn't seem to need either to sell Gleda to the Giant in the first place. I think you'll figure it out. | ZH: 看来你一开始就不需要把格丽达卖给巨人。我想你会明白过来的。 | SID: 00758C

translations.english: I don't know much about Morvunskar but it sounded like a lovely place for the ceremony. Congratulations.
translations.chinese: 我对莫万斯卡不太熟，但听起来是个举行婚礼的好地方。祝贺你。

translations.english: Decided to go through with it then? I knew you couldn't have forgotten about your fiance. You spoke of her so glowingly.
translations.chinese: 决定付钱了？我就知道你不会忘记你的未婚妻。你每次提到她都会眉开眼笑。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4208]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I don't know much about Morvunskar but it sounded like a lovely place for the ceremony. Congratulations. | ZH: 我对莫万斯卡不太熟，但听起来是个举行婚礼的好地方。祝贺你。 | SID: 002614

translations.english: I think I would prefer my ring back. I put a lot of time into making it and you just gave is away as a joke.
translations.chinese: 我还是把戒指拿回来为好。我花了这么长时间制作，而你却因为一个玩笑把它拿走了。

translations.english: Thorald can't be left to those... monsters.
translations.chinese: 不能把索拉德留给那些……怪物。

translations.english: I'll do anything if it means saving my brother. You'll join us, won't you?
translations.chinese: 只要能救我兄弟，我什么都愿意干。你会跟我们一起对吧？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Lingrah krosis saraan Strundu'ul, voth nid balaan klov praan nau.
translations.chinese: 灵嘎 科洛西斯 撒然 斯特朗都'乌尔，沃斯 聂德 巴兰 克罗夫 普兰 恼。

translations.english: Stand between us, and prepare yourself. Few can withstand the unbridled Voice of the Greybeards. But you are ready.
translations.chinese: 站在我们中间，做好准备。很少有人能抵挡灰胡子全力的吼声。但你应该可以。

translations.english: You have completed your training, Dragonborn. We would Speak to you.
translations.chinese: 龙裔，你完成了你的训练。我们要与你“谈谈”。

translations.english: Naal Thu'umu, mu ofan nii nu, Dovahkiin, naal suleyk do Kaan, naal suleyk do Shor, ahrk naal suleyk do Atmorasewuth.
translations.chinese: 纳尔 吐'目乌，姆 欧法 尼依 努，都瓦克因，纳尔 苏勒耶 都 凯恩，纳尔 苏勒耶 都 舒尔，阿克 纳尔 苏勒耶 都 阿特莫拉瑟乌斯。

translations.chinese: 这是我的荣幸。

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It would be my pleasure. | ZH: 这是我的荣幸。 | SID: 00516B

translations.english: There you are.
translations.chinese: 你在那儿啊。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Are you ready to go?
translations.chinese: 准备好出发了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C43EB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Are you ready to go? | ZH: 准备好出发了吗？ | SID: 002166

translations.english: Let me know. We shouldn't stay here all day. My men want their mead.
translations.chinese: 准备好就告诉我。我们不能成天待在这里。我的部下正期待庆功酒呢。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
