translations.english: This thing from Saarthal. What does it do? J'zargo cannot say.
translations.chinese: 来自萨瑟尔的东西。它是干什么用的？杰'扎格也不知道。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4401]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This thing from Saarthal. What does it do? J'zargo cannot say. | ZH: 来自萨瑟尔的东西。它是干什么用的？杰'扎格也不知道。 | SID: 00285C

translations.english: We shouldn't have been disturbing Saarthal, no matter what you found down there.
translations.chinese: 不管你在下面发现了什么，咱们都不应该打扰萨瑟尔。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4402]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We shouldn't have been disturbing Saarthal, no matter what you found down there. | ZH: 不管你在下面发现了什么，咱们都不应该打扰萨瑟尔。 | SID: 007926

translations.english: At least something good came out of that trip to Saarthal. I didn't find anything but dust.
translations.chinese: 那次萨瑟尔之行总算找到点好东西。我在那儿除了灰尘什么都没找到。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4403]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: At least something good came out of that trip to Saarthal. I didn't find anything but dust. | ZH: 那次萨瑟尔之行总算找到点好东西。我在那儿除了灰尘什么都没找到。 | SID: 0033C4

translations.english: I owe Thorald my life. Helping to save him is the least I can do.
translations.chinese: 我欠索拉德一条命。我得帮他一把。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4404]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I owe Thorald my life. Helping to save him is the least I can do. | ZH: 我欠索拉德一条命。我得帮他一把。 | SID: 00EF79

translations.english: No one should ever be left to the Thalmor.
translations.chinese: 没有人应该被梭默关起来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4405]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No one should ever be left to the Thalmor. | ZH: 没有人应该被梭默关起来。 | SID: 00D4D0

translations.english: The Thalmor need to be taught a lesson.
translations.chinese: 得给梭默上一课。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4406]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The Thalmor need to be taught a lesson. | ZH: 得给梭默上一课。 | SID: 00565C

translations.english: I pledged to aid Avulstein and Thorald a long time ago. There's nothing that could keep me from helping them now.
translations.chinese: 很久以前我就发誓要帮阿武斯特恩和索拉德。现在没什么能阻止我帮他们。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4407]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I pledged to aid Avulstein and Thorald a long time ago. There's nothing that could keep me from helping them now. | ZH: 很久以前我就发誓要帮阿武斯特恩和索拉德。现在没什么能阻止我帮他们。 | SID: 00DE26

translations.english: A few months ago it was troll fat salve and now he's got something new.
translations.chinese: 几个月前是巨魔脂肪药膏，现在又换新的了。

translations.english: Not well I'm afraid. That Brynjolf... he keeps draining the people's pockets with his ridiculous miracle cures.
translations.chinese: 恐怕不太行。布林乔夫……他不断用他那个荒谬的神药榨取人们的钱包。

translations.english: Not that there's anything that can be done about it. He's in good with the Thieves Guild.
translations.chinese: 我们也做不了什么。他和盗贼公会关系不错。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4421]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: A few months ago it was troll fat salve and now he's got something new. | ZH: 几个月前是巨魔脂肪药膏，现在又换新的了。 | SID: 0074D3
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Not well I'm afraid. That Brynjolf... he keeps draining the people's pockets with his ridiculous miracle cures. | ZH: 恐怕不太行。布林乔夫……他不断用他那个荒谬的神药榨取人们的钱包。 | SID: 0074D5
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Not that there's anything that can be done about it. He's in good with the Thieves Guild. | ZH: 我们也做不了什么。他和盗贼公会关系不错。 | SID: 00B9CD

translations.english: And if the meadery is profitable, I get rich. Get the picture?
translations.chinese: 只要蜜酒庄有钱赚，我也跟着发财。明白了？

translations.english: Maven Black-Briar wants me to keep the mead flowing and that's what I aim to do despite all these lazy good-for-nothings that work for us.
translations.chinese: 玛雯·黑棘要我保持蜜酒持续出产，这就是我的目标。尽管是这群懒鬼在替我们工作。

translations.english: Ever since I took over as the foreman the production of our mead has never been more profitable.
translations.chinese: 自从我担任工头后，我们的蜜酒从没这么有利可图过。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4422]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: And if the meadery is profitable, I get rich. Get the picture? | ZH: 只要蜜酒庄有钱赚，我也跟着发财。明白了？ | SID: 0074E4
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Maven Black-Briar wants me to keep the mead flowing and that's what I aim to do despite all these lazy good-for-nothings that work for us. | ZH: 玛雯·黑棘要我保持蜜酒持续出产，这就是我的目标。尽管是这群懒鬼在替我们工作。 | SID: 0074EE
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Ever since I took over as the foreman the production of our mead has never been more profitable. | ZH: 自从我担任工头后，我们的蜜酒从没这么有利可图过。 | SID: 00ED45

translations.english: Indeed. There have been multiple attempts on the Jarl's life. We're not certain if it's the Dark Brotherhood or simply Imperial sympathizers.
translations.chinese: 没错。有很多人想刺杀领主。我们也不确定是黑暗兄弟会还是单纯的帝国支持者。

translations.english: At the end of the day, I'm the last line of defense for the Jarl. I will not allow her to fall.
translations.chinese: 说到底，我是领主的最后防线。我不会让她受到伤害的。

translations.english: We've also had run-ins with spies attempting to probe our security for weaknesses. I work with the city guard to make certain they fail.
translations.chinese: 我们还遇到过试图探查安全漏洞的奸细。我和城市卫兵一起把他们破获了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4423]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Indeed. There have been multiple attempts on the Jarl's life. We're not certain if it's the Dark Brotherhood or simply Imperial sympathizers. | ZH: 没错。有很多人想刺杀领主。我们也不确定是黑暗兄弟会还是单纯的帝国支持者。 | SID: 0074CB
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: At the end of the day, I'm the last line of defense for the Jarl. I will not allow her to fall. | ZH: 说到底，我是领主的最后防线。我不会让她受到伤害的。 | SID: 009308
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: We've also had run-ins with spies attempting to probe our security for weaknesses. I work with the city guard to make certain they fail. | ZH: 我们还遇到过试图探查安全漏洞的奸细。我和城市卫兵一起把他们破获了。 | SID: 00E2F6

translations.english: While I feel Ulfric's cause is just, my concern is for the people of The Rift.
translations.chinese: 虽然我觉得乌弗瑞克的事业是正确的，但我关心的是裂痕领的人民。

translations.english: My heart goes out to them. If only our coffers were deeper, I could protect them as they were my own family.
translations.chinese: 我很同情他们，如果我们的金库再大一点，我就能像保护自己家人一样保护他们了。

translations.english: How can they continue to lead their already meager lives with dark clouds looming overhead?
translations.chinese: 在乌云密布之下，他们还能继续过自己贫瘠的生活吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4424]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: While I feel Ulfric's cause is just, my concern is for the people of The Rift. | ZH: 虽然我觉得乌弗瑞克的事业是正确的，但我关心的是裂痕领的人民。 | SID: 00491E
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: My heart goes out to them. If only our coffers were deeper, I could protect them as they were my own family. | ZH: 我很同情他们，如果我们的金库再大一点，我就能像保护自己家人一样保护他们了。 | SID: 0074B9
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: How can they continue to lead their already meager lives with dark clouds looming overhead? | ZH: 在乌云密布之下，他们还能继续过自己贫瘠的生活吗？ | SID: 0074BA

translations.english: I've been adventuring across Tamriel since I was a fresh-faced young woman barely able to swing a blade.
translations.chinese: 从我还是个连刀都不会挥的小姑娘开始，我就在泰姆瑞尔四处冒险了。

translations.english: My travels have taken me from High Rock to Valenwood, Elsweyr to Morrowind and all points in between.
translations.chinese: 我的足迹从高岩到威伦森林，从艾斯维尔到晨风，还有其间所有地方。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4425]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I've been adventuring across Tamriel since I was a fresh-faced young woman barely able to swing a blade. | ZH: 从我还是个连刀都不会挥的小姑娘开始，我就在泰姆瑞尔四处冒险了。 | SID: 007526
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: My travels have taken me from High Rock to Valenwood, Elsweyr to Morrowind and all points in between. | ZH: 我的足迹从高岩到威伦森林，从艾斯维尔到晨风，还有其间所有地方。 | SID: 009C92

translations.english: It also makes it easier to gather water when the canal is right out the front door.
translations.chinese: 运河在正门外面，取水就方便多了。

translations.english: Besides, I also prefer the quiet. I didn't open this business for browsing. Come in, buy what you need and get out.
translations.chinese: 此外，我更喜欢安静。我开店不是为了搞展览。进来，买了想要的，然后就出去。

translations.english: The moisture in the air is better for the ingredients. It isn't every day that you get your hands on fresh nirnroot or painted troll fat.
translations.chinese: 空气中的水分对原料更有利。不是每天都能弄到新鲜的奈恩根或者刚刮下来的巨魔脂肪。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4426]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: It also makes it easier to gather water when the canal is right out the front door. | ZH: 运河在正门外面，取水就方便多了。 | SID: 007F6C
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Besides, I also prefer the quiet. I didn't open this business for browsing. Come in, buy what you need and get out. | ZH: 此外，我更喜欢安静。我开店不是为了搞展览。进来，买了想要的，然后就出去。 | SID: 00A60E
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: The moisture in the air is better for the ingredients. It isn't every day that you get your hands on fresh nirnroot or painted troll fat. | ZH: 空气中的水分对原料更有利。不是每天都能弄到新鲜的奈恩根或者刚刮下来的巨魔脂肪。 | SID: 00F6AD

translations.english: To suddenly have all that wrenched away is like losing someone you hold dearly in your heart.
translations.chinese: 突然就失去这一切，就像失去了一个深爱着你的人。

translations.english: Talos is part of our culture. He's part of our heritage and our tradition. He's Skyrim personified.
translations.chinese: 塔洛斯是我们文化的一部分。他是我们的遗产和传统。他是天际的化身。

translations.english: The Empire already took my daughter from us, but by Talos they will not take our homeland!
translations.chinese: 帝国已经夺走了我的女儿，但塔洛斯在上，他们夺不走我们的家园！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4428]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: To suddenly have all that wrenched away is like losing someone you hold dearly in your heart. | ZH: 突然就失去这一切，就像失去了一个深爱着你的人。 | SID: 00A254
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Talos is part of our culture. He's part of our heritage and our tradition. He's Skyrim personified. | ZH: 塔洛斯是我们文化的一部分。他是我们的遗产和传统。他是天际的化身。 | SID: 00A255
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: The Empire already took my daughter from us, but by Talos they will not take our homeland! | ZH: 帝国已经夺走了我的女儿，但塔洛斯在上，他们夺不走我们的家园！ | SID: 00DBA7

translations.english: People say I'm making gold off of other people's misery, but what else would I do? Smithing is all I know.
translations.chinese: 人们说我是在从别人的痛苦中赚钱，但我还能做什么？我只会打铁。

translations.english: Next time one of my shields deflects a killing blow, they'll change their tune.
translations.chinese: 下次等我的盾牌帮他们挡住致命一击的时候，他们就不会这么说了。

translations.english: She's always welcome in Mistveil Keep and between you and me, I'm pretty sure she even has some pretty influential friends within the Empire.
translations.chinese: 她在雾隐堡垒很受欢迎，我跟你说，我确信她在帝国内部有一些很有权势的朋友。

translations.english: Lady Maven could buy or sell anyone in Skyrim. I wouldn't be surprised if she's the one pulling the strings around this city.
translations.chinese: 玛雯女士可以买通或者出卖天际的任何人。如果她是这座城市的幕后操纵者，我一点也不惊讶。

translations.english: I'd also warn you not to cross her. She employs quite a few... troubleshooters to take care of messy problems.
translations.chinese: 我得警告你，别去惹她。她雇了不少……解决麻烦的。

translations.english: Then one day, I was drunker than I've ever been and mounted a poor colt. Broke his back in two. Haven't ridden since.
translations.chinese: 然后有一天，我喝多了骑上了一匹可怜的小马。把它的背脊摔成两半了。自那以后我就不骑马了。

translations.english: I've been ridin' horses since I was a lad... nothin' I liked more. But as I got bigger, so did my mounts.
translations.chinese: 我从小就开始骑马……非常喜欢。但随着我长大，坐骑也得变大。

translations.english: Been stuck with the name for years.
translations.chinese: 我用这名字好多年了。

translations.english: In fact, I wouldn't say they were a threat at all. No, our resources should be spent on preparations for invasion.
translations.chinese: 事实上，我都不觉得他们是个威胁。对，我们的资源应该花在防范入侵上。

translations.english: I'd hardly call them a Guild. More like unorganized rabble.
translations.chinese: 我不会管他们叫公会。他们更像是无组织无纪律的乌合之众。

agentText:

translations.english: As one of our city's most influential citizens, she's has taken it upon herself to oversee their incarceration.
translations.chinese: 作为我们城里最有影响力的人，她承担了将他们扔进大牢的责任。

translations.english: We're all eager to see them brought to justice. Maven Black-Briar has assured me that they're being dealt with appropriately.
translations.chinese: 我们都渴望着他们被绳之以法。玛雯·黑棘向我保证，他们正在被妥善处理。

translations.english: Sadly, they're proving elusive but I have confidence that Maven won't give up until this city has been rid of them all.
translations.chinese: 遗憾的是，他们难以捉摸，但我有信心，玛雯不会放弃，直到这座城市完全摆脱他们。

translations.english: Liars and bastards. Every one of them. I'd have their heads on a pike if it wasn't for the war effort.
translations.chinese: 一群混蛋骗子。每个人都是。要不是因为战争，我早就把他们的脑袋插在长矛上了。

translations.english: All I need is a dozen men and we could march into the Ratway and burn them out like rodents.
translations.chinese: 我只需要十几个人就能冲进鼠道把他们像烧耗子一样烧死。

translations.english: Stormcloaks won't have it though. Too busy keeping the Imperial forces at bay.
translations.chinese: 但风暴斗篷没有人手。牵制帝国军团太忙了。

translations.english: How appropriate they should live in the Ratway with the rest of the trash.
translations.chinese: 他们就该和其他垃圾住在鼠道，太合适了。

translations.english: They're vermin... garbage. They're exactly what makes this city such a horrible place to live.
translations.chinese: 他们是害虫……垃圾。正是他们让这座城市变得如此可怕。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: They're vermin... garbage. They're exactly what makes this city such a horrible place to live. | ZH: 他们是害虫……垃圾。正是他们让这座城市变得如此可怕。 | SID: 00786A

translations.english: Of course! I'd be more than happy to add a donation to our charity box.
translations.chinese: 当然！我很乐意给我们的捐款箱里再添一笔。

translations.english: Right now, the best you could provide is coin. We need all the help we can get.
translations.chinese: 现在，你能提供的最好东西就是金币了。我们需要能得到的所有帮助。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Right now, the best you could provide is coin. We need all the help we can get. | ZH: 现在，你能提供的最好东西就是金币了。我们需要能得到的所有帮助。 | SID: 00D3C5

translations.english: Beggars roam the streets, crime runs rampant and the threat of war is driving away business.
translations.chinese: 乞丐游荡，犯罪猖獗，战争威胁，这一切让商业望而却步。

translations.english: Yes, I suppose someone has to be around here. Have you seen the condition of this sorry excuse for a city?
translations.chinese: 是的，我想这附近总会有人需要帮助。你看见这座可怜城市的状况了吗？

translations.english: The paltry amount of coin that I place in the charity box at the temple is the least I can do to help.
translations.chinese: 我往神庙的慈善箱里放的那点钱是我能帮上的最起码的一点忙了。

translations.english: A devout Nord would rather fall in battle and have his blood spill upon the earth than allow the Empire to strike his name from the divinity.
translations.chinese: 一个虔诚的诺德人宁可战死沙场，抛头洒血，也不愿帝国把他的名号从神谱中抹去。

translations.english: He's the protector of Man, the Dragon of the North, the patron of all Nords.
translations.chinese: 他是人类的守护者、北方巨龙、全诺德人的守护神。

translations.english: And despite the Imperials and their treaty, he will always be one of the Nine Divines.
translations.chinese: 尽管帝国人和他们的条约否认这点，但他永远是九圣灵之一。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: A devout Nord would rather fall in battle and have his blood spill upon the earth than allow the Empire to strike his name from the divinity. | ZH: 一个虔诚的诺德人宁可战死沙场，抛头洒血，也不愿帝国把他的名号从神谱中抹去。 | SID: 0074DB
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: He's the protector of Man, the Dragon of the North, the patron of all Nords. | ZH: 他是人类的守护者、北方巨龙、全诺德人的守护神。 | SID: 0074DE

translations.english: When the smoke cleared, the White-Gold Concordat was signed... it was supposedly a treaty aimed at establishing peace within the Empire.
translations.chinese: 硝烟散去，《白金协定》就签署了……被认定为旨在建立帝国内部和平的条约。

translations.english: To the Stormcloaks, this was viewed as the moment when the Empire became unworthy of the allegiance of any true Nord.
translations.chinese: 对于风暴斗篷来说，这是帝国不再值得任何一个真正诺德人忠诚的一刻。

translations.english: One of the terms of the treaty was the outlawing of worship to Talos.
translations.chinese: 条款之一就是取缔塔洛斯崇拜。

translations.english: Surely you're aware of the Great War between the Imperials and the Elves who called themselves the Aldmeri Dominion?
translations.chinese: 你肯定知道帝国和自称先祖神洲的精灵间爆发的浩大战争吧？

translations.english: As you wish. Whatever you can afford will certainly be put to good use.
translations.chinese: 如你所愿。无论你捐多少，我们都会善用的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4437]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: As you wish. Whatever you can afford will certainly be put to good use. | ZH: 如你所愿。无论你捐多少，我们都会善用的。 | SID: 007FBB

translations.english: Now, thanks to my mother's generosity, this city is making its mark.
translations.chinese: 现在，多亏我母亲的慷慨，这座城市开始崭露头角了。

translations.english: Before the meadery was opened almost fifty years ago, this town was nothing... a simple waypoint for those journeying on to Morrowind.
translations.chinese: 在蜜酒庄开办的大概五十年前，这个小镇什么都不是……只是通往晨风的一个路标。

translations.english: The Black-Briars have been instrumental in keeping Riften on the map.
translations.chinese: 黑棘为裂谷存留于地图发挥了重要作用。

translations.english: Tell me about your family.
translations.chinese: 跟我说说你的家族。

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Tell me about your family. | ZH: 跟我说说你的家族。 | SID: 007662

translations.english: When speaking of the Black-Briars, only one thought should spring to mind. We are not to be trifled with.
translations.chinese: 说到黑棘家族，我心里只有一个念头。我们不容愚弄。

translations.english: Help us, you end up rich. Cross us and you'll end up a memory. Is that enough information for you?
translations.chinese: 帮助我们，盆满钵满。背叛我们，变成回忆。这些信息对你来说还够吗？

translations.english: Tell me about your family.
translations.chinese: 跟我说说你的家族。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Tell me about your family. | ZH: 跟我说说你的家族。 | SID: 008329

translations.english: If only my mother would let me, I would make her proud.
translations.chinese: 只要我母亲允许，我会让她感到骄傲。

translations.english: Hmph. My family. All that wealth and they squander it on foolish ventures and political schemes.
translations.chinese: 哎。我的家族。他们把所有财富都浪费在愚蠢的冒险和政治计划上。

translations.english: I was meant for so much more than all of this... I wish to pledge my life and ply my talents in darker circles.
translations.chinese: 我的人生意义远不止于此……我希望把生命和才能投入更黑暗的圈子里。

translations.english: Tell me about your family.
translations.chinese: 跟我说说你的家族。

translations.english: Business is booming, coin is flowing and everyone seems content as things keep going our way.
translations.chinese: 生意兴隆，财源滚滚，每个人都对事情的发展很满意。

translations.english: A new chapter in the Thieves Guild is being written this day and we all owe it to you. Many thanks.
translations.chinese: 盗贼公会的新篇章现在正在被书写，我们都该感谢你。多谢了。

translations.english: I haven't seen so much celebrating in years. Mercer's dead, we have a new Guild Master and things are finally looking up.
translations.chinese: 我有好些年没见过这么多庆祝了。墨瑟死了，我们有了新的公会大师，事情总算见好了。

translations.english: I only hope we can restore the Guild to its former glory after all the damage that's been done.
translations.chinese: 我只希望在经历这么多伤害之后，我们能让公会重现往日的荣光。

translations.english: I haven't seen so much celebrating in years. Mercer's dead, we have a new Guild Master and things are finally looking up.
translations.chinese: 我有好些年没见过这么多庆祝了。墨瑟死了，我们有了新的公会大师，事情总算见好了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C443D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I only hope we can restore the Guild to its former glory after all the damage that's been done. | ZH: 我只希望在经历这么多伤害之后，我们能让公会重现往日的荣光。 | SID: 004731
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I haven't seen so much celebrating in years. Mercer's dead, we have a new Guild Master and things are finally looking up. | ZH: 我有好些年没见过这么多庆祝了。墨瑟死了，我们有了新的公会大师，事情总算见好了。 | SID: 006DD7

translations.english: Make sure you make him pay for what he did to Gallus... heck, for what he did to all of us.
translations.chinese: 一定要让他为他对加卢斯做的事付出代价……该死的，是为他对我们的一切所作所为。

translations.english: We're all behind you, friend. Do your best.
translations.chinese: 我们都支持你，朋友。尽力去做吧。

translations.english: So, word has it you and Brynjolf know where Mercer's hiding. Good.
translations.chinese: 听说你和布林乔夫找到墨瑟藏在哪儿了。很好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C443E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Make sure you make him pay for what he did to Gallus... heck, for what he did to all of us. | ZH: 一定要让他为他对加卢斯做的事付出代价……该死的，是为他对我们的一切所作所为。 | SID: 0005EA
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: We're all behind you, friend. Do your best. | ZH: 我们都支持你，朋友。尽力去做吧。 | SID: 00755D

translations.english: The word is that Mercer Frey is a dead man. The Guild wants his blood.
translations.chinese: 都说墨瑟·弗雷现在死定了。公会的人都想要些他的血呢。

translations.english: I can't say I blame them. Murder is not our way. Gallus was before my time, but I still can't believe it.
translations.chinese: 这也不怪他们。虽说咱们不靠杀人解决问题。我来的时候加卢斯已经死了，但我还是无法相信。

translations.english: You need to teach him a lesson... show him the penalty for betrayal around here.
translations.chinese: 你得去给他个教训……让他见识一下背叛的下场。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I can't say I blame them. Murder is not our way. Gallus was before my time, but I still can't believe it. | ZH: 这也不怪他们。虽说咱们不靠杀人解决问题。我来的时候加卢斯已经死了，但我还是无法相信。 | SID: 00755C
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: You need to teach him a lesson... show him the penalty for betrayal around here. | ZH: 你得去给他个教训……让他见识一下背叛的下场。 | SID: 00923C

translations.english: I know you have a damn good reason for siding with Karliah, so I hope you can give it to them.
translations.chinese: 我知道你有充分的理由支持卡莱亚，所以希望你能告诉他们。

translations.english: Look, I like you, so I'll tell it to you straight. Brynjolf and the rest are in the Guild, and they're ready to cut you down.
translations.chinese: 听着，我很中意你，所以我就直说了。布林乔夫和其他人都在公会里，他们准备好要做了你了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4440]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I know you have a damn good reason for siding with Karliah, so I hope you can give it to them. | ZH: 我知道你有充分的理由支持卡莱亚，所以希望你能告诉他们。 | SID: 000B90
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Look, I like you, so I'll tell it to you straight. Brynjolf and the rest are in the Guild, and they're ready to cut you down. | ZH: 听着，我很中意你，所以我就直说了。布林乔夫和其他人都在公会里，他们准备好要做了你了。 | SID: 00E1CB

translations.english: Everyone's been worried since you and Mercer haven't shown up in a while. Brynjolf even went out to find you.
translations.chinese: 你和墨瑟有段时间没回来了，大家都很担心。布林乔夫还出去找过你。

translations.english: Delvin and Vex have been running things for now.
translations.chinese: 现在是戴尔文和小烦在操持着。

translations.english: I hope this all gets straightened out soon or I'm headed on the first caravan out of Riften.
translations.chinese: 我希望这一切能尽快解决，否则我就直接搭车离开裂谷城了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4441]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I hope this all gets straightened out soon or I'm headed on the first caravan out of Riften. | ZH: 我希望这一切能尽快解决，否则我就直接搭车离开裂谷城了。 | SID: 009895

translations.english: Glad to hear Gulum-Ei got what he deserved. That lizard owes me big for a bad shipment of Shadowbanish Wine he tried to pass off on me.
translations.chinese: 很高兴听到古鲁姆-埃遭报应了。那只蜥蜴欠我一大笔钱，他卖给我的驱影酒根本不好卖。

translations.english: Never seen the guy so angry. Better help him out any way you can.
translations.chinese: 从没见过他这么生气。你最好尽力帮他办好。

translations.english: Mercer's been storming around waiting for you to come back. I think he's finally figured out who's been messing with the Guild.
translations.chinese: 墨瑟一直等你回来。我猜他是知道是谁在招惹公会了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4442]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Glad to hear Gulum-Ei got what he deserved. That lizard owes me big for a bad shipment of Shadowbanish Wine he tried to pass off on me. | ZH: 很高兴听到古鲁姆-埃遭报应了。那只蜥蜴欠我一大笔钱，他卖给我的驱影酒根本不好卖。 | SID: 00056F
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Never seen the guy so angry. Better help him out any way you can. | ZH: 从没见过他这么生气。你最好尽力帮他办好。 | SID: 001F66
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Mercer's been storming around waiting for you to come back. I think he's finally figured out who's been messing with the Guild. | ZH: 墨瑟一直等你回来。我猜他是知道是谁在招惹公会了。 | SID: 00E4E3

translations.english: Keep it up and you'll go places.
translations.chinese: 坚持下去，你会成功的。

translations.english: Maven was down here right before you got back and she was all smiles. Haven't seen her like that in a long time.
translations.chinese: 玛雯在你回来前来过，她笑得很开心。很久没见她那样了。

translations.english: Whatever you did at Honningbrew, you're now on her good side. Best of all, if she's happy, Mercer's happy.
translations.chinese: 不管你在蜜之酿干了什么，她现在对你很满意。关键是，只要她开心，墨瑟也会开心。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4443]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Keep it up and you'll go places. | ZH: 坚持下去，你会成功的。 | SID: 007546
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Maven was down here right before you got back and she was all smiles. Haven't seen her like that in a long time. | ZH: 玛雯在你回来前来过，她笑得很开心。很久没见她那样了。 | SID: 00754A
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Whatever you did at Honningbrew, you're now on her good side. Best of all, if she's happy, Mercer's happy. | ZH: 不管你在蜜之酿干了什么，她现在对你很满意。关键是，只要她开心，墨瑟也会开心。 | SID: 007E2E

translations.english: Well, you did something Vex couldn't do at Goldenglow, so you're looking pretty damn good.
translations.chinese: 嗯，你在金色光辉做到了小烦没做到的事，你看起来还不赖。

translations.english: Just watch your back and do what Mercer says... he'll sort it out.
translations.chinese: 小心点，照墨瑟说的办……他会解决的。

translations.english: Word is that you found something while you were out there though... something that could be a problem for the Guild.
translations.chinese: 有消息说你在外面发现了一些东西……这对公会来说可能是个问题。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4444]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Well, you did something Vex couldn't do at Goldenglow, so you're looking pretty damn good. | ZH: 嗯，你在金色光辉做到了小烦没做到的事，你看起来还不赖。 | SID: 002FFE
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Just watch your back and do what Mercer says... he'll sort it out. | ZH: 小心点，照墨瑟说的办……他会解决的。 | SID: 007544
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Word is that you found something while you were out there though... something that could be a problem for the Guild. | ZH: 有消息说你在外面发现了一些东西……这对公会来说可能是个问题。 | SID: 007545

translations.english: Last few years have been pretty bad. I've almost closed this place up.
translations.chinese: 过去几年很糟糕，我差点把这里关了。

translations.english: The Flagon used to be packed every night with the boys from the Guild but now look at it.
translations.chinese: 以前漏壶每晚都挤满公会里的小伙子，但看看现在。

translations.english: I don't know about the others, but I sure am glad to see a fresh face down here.
translations.chinese: 我不知道其他人怎么想，但我很高兴能在这里看到新面孔。

translations.english: Can you share anything about the Thieves Guild?
translations.chinese: 你能跟我分享些关于盗贼公会的事吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4445]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Last few years have been pretty bad. I've almost closed this place up. | ZH: 过去几年很糟糕，我差点把这里关了。 | SID: 007536
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: The Flagon used to be packed every night with the boys from the Guild but now look at it. | ZH: 以前漏壶每晚都挤满公会里的小伙子，但看看现在。 | SID: 00753A

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Can you share anything about the Thieves Guild? | ZH: 你能跟我分享些关于盗贼公会的事吗？ | SID: 007534

translations.english: I don't know you so we've got nothing to talk about. How about you finish the job Brynjolf gave you, then we can talk.
translations.chinese: 我不认识你，所以没什么可说的。不如你把布林乔夫交代的差事办完再聊吧。

translations.english: Can you share anything about the Thieves Guild?
translations.chinese: 你能跟我分享些关于盗贼公会的事吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4446]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I don't know you so we've got nothing to talk about. How about you finish the job Brynjolf gave you, then we can talk. | ZH: 我不认识你，所以没什么可说的。不如你把布林乔夫交代的差事办完再聊吧。 | SID: 007533
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Can you share anything about the Thieves Guild? | ZH: 你能跟我分享些关于盗贼公会的事吗？ | SID: 00D518

translations.english: Sure. How about you mind your own business about it, and I won't have to get Dirge to toss you into the cistern?
translations.chinese: 行啊。你管好自己的事怎么样，这样我就不用喊挽歌把你扔进水槽里了。

translations.english: Can you share anything about the Thieves Guild?
translations.chinese: 你能跟我分享些关于盗贼公会的事吗？

translations.english: Disgusting. Ruined sewers filled with goodness knows what.
translations.chinese: 恶心得很。天知道那个老下水道里塞满了什么。

translations.english: There's an entrance down by the canal, but I'd highly advise you stay out of there... its the Thieves Guild's territory.
translations.chinese: 运河那边有个入口，但我强烈建议你远离那里……那是盗贼公会的地盘。

translations.english: I'd go down there myself, but that would leave Jarl Laila unprotected.
translations.chinese: 我也想亲自下去，但那又会让莱拉领主无人保护。

translations.english: Everyone knows the Thieves Guild uses the old sewer system beneath Riften as their hideout.
translations.chinese: 所有人都知道盗贼公会利用老下水道系统作为自己的藏身所了。

translations.english: Thank you! I can promise you that this will be put to good use.
translations.chinese: 谢谢！我保证这些钱会得到善用的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C444B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Thank you! I can promise you that this will be put to good use. | ZH: 谢谢！我保证这些钱会得到善用的。 | SID: 00F004

translations.english: If he were to be crowned High King, I'm not so certain it would be the golden age his followers expect.
translations.chinese: 如果他真被加冕为至高王，我不确定真的就是他的追随者们期望的黄金时代。

translations.english: With the Stormcloaks at his back, Ulfric's poised to rid Skyrim of the Empire's forces and invalidate our involvement with the White-Gold Concordat.
translations.chinese: 在风暴斗篷的支持下，乌弗瑞克准备除掉天际的帝国军队并取消我们和白金协定的关系。

translations.english: Between you and I, I think his motivations are a bit more self-serving. He uses this holy war as leverage in order to pursue the throne.
translations.chinese: 但只你知我知，我觉得他的动机更自私点。他是要利用这场圣战做追求王位的筹码。

translations.english: With the Stormcloaks at his back, Ulfric's poised to rid Skyrim of the Empire's forces and invalidate our involvement with the White-Gold Concordat.
translations.chinese: 在风暴斗篷的支持下，乌弗瑞克准备除掉天际的帝国军队并取消我们和白金协定的关系。

translations.english: Many have died taking up arms for this cause. I fear that the land will be stained with blood for years to come.
translations.chinese: 许多人为此牺牲，拿起武器。我担心这片土地在未来的岁月被鲜血污染。

translations.english: Wealth is my business. Help me out and I can add to yours. Would you like a taste?
translations.chinese: 财富就是我的业务。你帮我，我就能帮你。想试试吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C44A2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Wealth is my business. Help me out and I can add to yours. Would you like a taste? | ZH: 财富就是我的业务。你帮我，我就能帮你。想试试吗？ | SID: 00D5C6

translations.english: There are ruined sewer tunnels beneath the city. The only way I know how to get in there is through a door off of the canal.
translations.chinese: 城市下面有个废弃的下水道。我知道的唯一进去的办法就是运河边上的那扇门。

translations.english: If I were you, I'd keep my feet dry and stay up here.
translations.chinese: 如果我是你，我会保持两脚干燥待在上面。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C44A4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: There are ruined sewer tunnels beneath the city. The only way I know how to get in there is through a door off of the canal. | ZH: 城市下面有个废弃的下水道。我知道的唯一进去的办法就是运河边上的那扇门。 | SID: 001FF7
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: If I were you, I'd keep my feet dry and stay up here. | ZH: 如果我是你，我会保持两脚干燥待在上面。 | SID: 0046FE

translations.english: I'm going to make you sorry for this!
translations.chinese: 我会让你后悔的！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C483C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm going to make you sorry for this! | ZH: 我会让你后悔的！ | SID: 0074AF

translations.english: Come on, give it your best shot!
translations.chinese: 来啊，有什么本事都使出来吧！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C483E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Come on, give it your best shot! | ZH: 来啊，有什么本事都使出来吧！ | SID: 0074B0

translations.english: How could you possibly know about...
translations.chinese: 你怎么会知道……

translations.english: Please. My family means too much to me. Don't hurt them.
translations.chinese: 拜托，我的家人对我很重要。不要伤害他们。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C483F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: How could you possibly know about... | ZH: 你怎么会知道…… | SID: 00359E
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Please. My family means too much to me. Don't hurt them. | ZH: 拜托，我的家人对我很重要。不要伤害他们。 | SID: 0074B2

translations.english: I can't thank you enough for what you did.
translations.chinese: 感谢你所做的一切。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4B15]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I can't thank you enough for what you did. | ZH: 感谢你所做的一切。 | SID: 0074AC

translations.english: The East Empire Company is in your debt.
translations.chinese: 东帝国公司欠你一份情。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4B16]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The East Empire Company is in your debt. | ZH: 东帝国公司欠你一份情。 | SID: 0044A1

translations.english: Glad Orthus was able to find someone competent to help out.
translations.chinese: 奥苏斯能找到能干的人帮忙真是太好了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C4B17]
Translations:

translations.english: Die, vampire!
translations.chinese: 去死吧，吸血鬼！

translations.chinese: 愚蠢的吸血鬼！

translations.english: We have guests as often as we can but there aren't a lot of travellers these days. The war keeps people off the roads.
translations.chinese: 我们尽可能多接待客人，但现在没有那么多旅客。战争使人们都远离大路了。

agentText:

translations.english: Falkreath trades with the surrounding holds and without our wood they would have trouble keeping their prices low.
translations.chinese: 佛克瑞斯和周围的领地做生意，如果没有我们的木材，他们很难保持低价的。

translations.english: We supply Falkreath to the south. Until recently we supplied Helgen.
translations.chinese: 我们向南边的佛克瑞斯供货。最近还为海尔根供应。

translations.english: We would but there's a big wedding taking place at Castle Dour. We'll have to wait until after the wedding.
translations.chinese: 虽然可以，但阴郁堡那边有场盛大婚礼。我们得等婚礼结束再说。

translations.english: Come back in a few nights when the wedding reception is over and we'll start the ceremony when you do.
translations.chinese: 先过几晚，等婚礼结束再说吧，到时候我们再开始庆祝。

translations.english: Let's do the fire festival tonight.
translations.chinese: 我们今晚举行火烧节吧。

translations.english: Other people just make things complex. Out here, Hern and I can get everything we need from the occasional traveler.
translations.chinese: 其他人喜欢把事情复杂化。在这里，我和赫恩能从偶尔路过的旅行者那里得到需要的一切。

translations.chinese: 嘿！是那个准吟游诗人。

translations.english: I am Burguk's mother and wise woman to our tribe, outlander.
translations.chinese: 我是博古克的母亲，也是我们部落的智妪，外来者。

translations.english: I'm Burguk's forge-wife. I shape all the steel for the stronghold.
translations.chinese: 我是博古克的锻妻，为堡垒打造武器。

translations.english: We will see about this...
translations.chinese: 我们还是走着看吧……

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C513D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We will see about this... | ZH: 我们还是走着看吧…… | SID: 007489

translations.english: I'm sorry, were you about to say something?
translations.chinese: 不好意思，你想说什么吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C513E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm sorry, were you about to say something? | ZH: 不好意思，你想说什么吗？ | SID: 007488

translations.english: Ayleid, Dwemer, Daedric... Not even Falmer. None of them are a match. Quite curious indeed.
translations.chinese: 亚历德、锻莫、迪德拉……甚至伐莫。都不能匹配。确实很神奇。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C513F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ayleid, Dwemer, Daedric... Not even Falmer. None of them are a match. Quite curious indeed. | ZH: 亚历德、锻莫、迪德拉……甚至伐莫。都不能匹配。确实很神奇。 | SID: 00819D

translations.english: I hear you found some... thing in Saarthal. You think it could help make me a powerful mage?
translations.chinese: 我听说你在萨瑟尔找到了一些……东西。你觉得那能帮助我成为强大的法师吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Is it true? One of the Psijics was here in the College?
translations.chinese: 是真的吗？有个赛伊克来过学院？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C5174]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Is it true? One of the Psijics was here in the College? | ZH: 是真的吗？有个赛伊克来过学院？ | SID: 005DF4

translations.english: No one's heard from the Psijic Order in so many years. Hard to believe one would just suddenly show up here.
translations.chinese: 这么多年都没听说过赛伊克教团的消息了。真难相信有一位突然出现在这里。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C5175]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No one's heard from the Psijic Order in so many years. Hard to believe one would just suddenly show up here. | ZH: 这么多年都没听说过赛伊克教团的消息了。真难相信有一位突然出现在这里。 | SID: 007720

translations.english: J'zargo regrets that there was no chance to speak with the Psijic Monk.
translations.chinese: 杰'扎格很遗憾没有和那个赛伊克僧侣交谈一下。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C5176]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: J'zargo regrets that there was no chance to speak with the Psijic Monk. | ZH: 杰'扎格很遗憾没有和那个赛伊克僧侣交谈一下。 | SID: 00BD06

translations.english: Do not let your easy mastery of the Voice tempt you into the arrogance of power that has been the downfall of many Dragonborn before you.
translations.chinese: 不要自恃能够轻松掌握龙吼就目中无人，在你之前有不少龙裔因此堕落。

translations.english: There is indeed much that we know that you do not. That does not mean that you are ready to understand it.
translations.chinese: 我们确实知道很多你不知道的事。但这不意味着你准备好去接受它了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C5219]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Do not let your easy mastery of the Voice tempt you into the arrogance of power that has been the downfall of many Dragonborn before you. | ZH: 不要自恃能够轻松掌握龙吼就目中无人，在你之前有不少龙裔因此堕落。 | SID: 000862
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: There is indeed much that we know that you do not. That does not mean that you are ready to understand it. | ZH: 我们确实知道很多你不知道的事。但这不意味着你准备好去接受它了。 | SID: 002D09

translations.english: Good. Then you will be ready for whatever lies ahead.
translations.chinese: 很好。然后你就能为未来的一切做好准备了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C521C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good. Then you will be ready for whatever lies ahead. | ZH: 很好。然后你就能为未来的一切做好准备了。 | SID: 00169C

translations.english: That is commendable. But remember, the Dragon Blood is itself a gift of Akatosh. Do not try to deny that gift.
translations.chinese: 值得称赞。但你要记住，龙血本就是阿卡托什的赐福，不要试着否定它。

translations.english: Your destiny requires you to use your Voice - why else would Akatosh have bestowed this power upon you?
translations.chinese: 你命中注定要使用你的吼声，不然阿卡托什为何要把力量赐予你？

translations.english: If you remember to use your Voice in service to the purpose of Akatosh, you will remain true to the Way.
translations.chinese: 只要你能铭记用自己的吼声服务于阿卡托什的目标，那你就能走上正途。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: That is commendable. But remember, the Dragon Blood is itself a gift of Akatosh. Do not try to deny that gift. | ZH: 值得称赞。但你要记住，龙血本就是阿卡托什的赐福，不要试着否定它。 | SID: 006630
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Your destiny requires you to use your Voice - why else would Akatosh have bestowed this power upon you? | ZH: 你命中注定要使用你的吼声，不然阿卡托什为何要把力量赐予你？ | SID: 00747D

translations.english: We therefore seek to guide you on the proper use of your gift, which transcends the restrictions which bind other mortals.
translations.chinese: 所以我们争取引导你正确使用你的天赋，这种天赋能超越束缚在其他凡人身上的限制。

translations.english: If we accept one gift, how can we deny the other? As Dragonborn, you have received the ability to Shout directly from Akatosh.
translations.chinese: 我们不能因为接受一份礼物就拒绝其他礼物吧？作为龙裔，你直接从阿卡托什那里获取了龙吼的能力。

translations.english: The Dragonborn is an exception to all the rules - the Dragon Blood itself is a gift of the gods.
translations.chinese: 龙裔是可以论外的，龙血本身就是众神的馈赠。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: He was a great war leader of the ancient Nords, a master of the Voice, or Tongue.
translations.chinese: 他是古诺德的伟大战争领袖，吼声大师，发声者。

translations.english: After the disaster at Red Mountain, where the Nord army was annihilated, he spent many years pondering the meaning of that terrible defeat.
translations.chinese: 在诺德军队在红山被击溃后，他花费数年来思考那场可怕失败的意义所在。

translations.english: Jurgen Windcaller's mastery of the Voice eventually overcame all opposition, and the Way of the Voice was born.
translations.chinese: “唤风者”约根对吼声的精通最终压制了所有反对者，并创立了吼声之道。

translations.english: He was the first to understand that the Voice should be used solely for the glory and worship of the gods, not the glory of men.
translations.chinese: 他首先领悟出，吼声只能用于礼敬和荣耀神明，而不应该用于荣耀人类。

translations.english: He finally came to realize that the gods had punished the Nords for their arrogant and blasphemous misuse of the Voice.
translations.chinese: 最后他意识到，诸神因为诺德人傲慢而亵渎地滥用吼声而降下了惩罚。

translations.english: "By our breath we bestow it now to you in the name of Kyne, in the name of Shor, and in the name of Atmora of Old."
translations.chinese: “我们现在以凯娜、舒尔以及古老阿特莫拉之名，将它赐予你。”

translations.english: "Long has the Stormcrown languished, with no worthy brow to sit upon."
translations.chinese: “风暴王冠凋谢已久，无人有资格佩戴。”

translations.english: "You are Ysmir now, the Dragon of the North, hearken to it."
translations.chinese: “你如今即是伊斯米尔，北方巨龙，倾听吧。”

translations.english: Ah. I sometimes forget you are not versed in the dragon tongue as we are. This is a rough translation:
translations.chinese: 啊，我偶尔会忘了你不像我们那样精通龙语。我简单翻译一下：

translations.english: The same words were used to greet the young Talos, when he came to High Hrothgar, before he became the Emperor Tiber Septim.
translations.chinese: 年轻的塔洛斯在成为皇帝泰伯·塞普汀之前，来到霍斯加修道院的时候，也被致以同样的问候。

translations.english: We spoke the traditional words of greeting to a Dragonborn who has accepted our guidance.
translations.chinese: 我们在向接受了指引的龙裔致以传统的问候之语。

translations.english: Stand in the center of the room and prepare yourself to taste the Voice of the Greybeards.
translations.chinese: 站在房间中央。准备试试我们灰胡子的吼声吧。

translations.chinese: 进来吧。其他大师在那等着我们。

translations.english: First, Master Wulfgar will teach you the final word of Unrelenting Force. You are ready.
translations.chinese: 首先，沃夫加大师会教你冷酷之力的最后一个词。准备好。

translations.english: Please, stop! I'll pay! Take it!
translations.chinese: 请住手吧！我付钱！拿去吧！

translations.english: Oh? Where?
translations.chinese: 哦？哪里？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C57F1]

translations.chinese: 去吧。回应你的命运。到时之痕使用卷轴吧。

translations.english: Do not delay. Alduin will be coming. He cannot miss the signs.
translations.chinese: 不要犹豫。奥杜因要来了。他不会错过机会的。

translations.english: There is no question. You are doom-driven. Kogaan Akatosh. The very bones of the earth are at your disposal.
translations.chinese: 毫无疑问。你果然受末日驱策而来。寇甘 阿卡托什。地骨由你处置。

translations.english: You have it. The Kel - the Elder Scroll. Tiid kreh... qalos. Time shudders at its touch.
translations.chinese: 你找到了。科尔……上古卷轴。提德 科瑞……洽洛斯。时间在它的触摸下颤抖。

translations.chinese: 巴尔古夫性情平和，但他弟弟是个热血的战争贩子，想用武力解决一切。

EDID: [000C81FA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The College is a bit of an oddity in Skyrim. Magic isn't something that's looked upon fondly here. | ZH: 学院在天际确实有点怪。魔法在这里不受欢迎。 | SID: 00881E

translations.english: We're supposedly at peace now. But I put in to be stationed here to keep an eye on the Thalmor. I've a feeling they're behind this unrest in Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 我们现在是处于和平状态。但我派兵驻守这里监视梭默。我感觉他们就是天际动乱的幕后黑手。

translations.english: Everyone was dead. Wholesale slaughter. The Dominion, not content with killing dissidents at home, came to Hammerfell to finish the job.
translations.chinese: 所有人都死了。大规模屠杀。先祖神洲，并不只是满足于在国内杀死持有不同政见者，还来到落锤执行这项任务。

translations.english: I ran to the scene with other Legionaries who where stationed there, but the entire quarter was a smoking ruin by the time we arrived.
translations.chinese: 我和驻扎在那里的其他军团兵跑到了现场，但整个难民区已经是一片冒烟的废墟了。

translations.english: Suddenly an explosion of magic in the refugee quarter. Thalmor mages were attacking the Altmer dissidents who were resisting with magic of their own.
translations.chinese: 突然，难民区发生了魔法爆炸。梭默法师用魔法攻击政见不同者。

translations.english: Back in 42 I was stationed in Hammerfell, on leave in Sentinel, trying to track down some refugee relatives who had fled persecution in Alinor.
translations.chinese: 四十二年前，我驻扎在落锤。在哨卫城休假时，我试着追踪一些逃出艾琳诺的难民同族。

translations.english: What happened during the Night of Green Fire?
translations.chinese: “绿火之夜”发生了什么？

translations.english: Wasn't long before I saw more of the world than I bargained for.
translations.chinese: 没过多久，我就发现这个世界远超出我的想象。

translations.english: I joined the Legion to see the world. I know, that's one of those things people say, but it's completely true in my case.
translations.chinese: 我加入军团就是为了见识世界。我知道，人们经常会这么说，但对我来说就是这样。

translations.english: My parents were traveling merchants eventually settling in Cyrodiil. I must have inherited their wanderlust...
translations.chinese: 我的父母是旅行商人，最后定居在希罗帝尔。我肯定是继承了他们的旅行癖……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Wasn't long before I saw more of the world than I bargained for. | ZH: 没过多久，我就发现这个世界远超出我的想象。 | SID: 0071EC
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I joined the Legion to see the world. I know, that's one of those things people say, but it's completely true in my case. | ZH: 我加入军团就是为了见识世界。我知道，人们经常会这么说，但对我来说就是这样。 | SID: 0071ED

translations.english: For the glory of the Empire.
translations.chinese: 为了帝国的荣耀。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C8203]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: For the glory of the Empire. | ZH: 为了帝国的荣耀。 | SID: 007209

translations.english: And I've seen the face of evil. It was in the air above Sentinel on the Night of Green Fire.
translations.chinese: 我曾经目睹过邪恶的面貌。就在绿火之夜时哨卫城的上空。

translations.english: But they send the Legion to places that've gotten too bad to be settled without violence. What's hard is seeing good people warped by evil.
translations.chinese: 但他们把军团派到那些糟糕到只能用暴力才能解决的地方。真是不忍看到好人被邪恶扭曲。

translations.english: The life of a soldier is full of hardship. That's nothing.
translations.chinese: 军旅生涯就是充满艰辛，这没什么。

translations.english: Sounds like you've seen you far share of hardship.
translations.chinese: 听起来你经历过很多困难啊。

agentText:

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Sounds like you've seen you far share of hardship. | ZH: 听起来你经历过很多困难啊。 | SID: 00A932

translations.english: Don't get me wrong, every country has its dark corners. But that's why we're here. To bring order and civilization, and to protect the people.
translations.chinese: 别误会我的意思，每个国家都有黑暗的角落。但这也是我们在这里的原因。我们要建立秩序与文明，并保护人民。

translations.english: Cyrodiil is a beautiful place, full of diverse peoples and histories. But so too, Hammerfell and Skyrim, and every other place I've been.
translations.chinese: 希罗帝尔是个美丽的地方，历史丰富，各族往来。但落锤、天际还有其他我到过的地方也是如此。

translations.english: Home? Home to me is a hot cup of ale at the end of the day and five minutes without someone needing something from me...
translations.chinese: 家？家对我来说就是一天结束时的热麦芽酒和五分钟的清闲时光……

translations.english: You're from Cyrodiil? What's it like back home?
translations.chinese: 你从希罗帝尔来？回到家是什么感觉？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:RNAM | EN: You're from Cyrodiil? What's it like back home? | ZH: 你从希罗帝尔来？回到家是什么感觉？ | SID: 00E289

translations.english: It matters little if some of the people here are ignorant to that truth. They are still citizens of the Empire. It's our solemn duty to protect them.
translations.chinese: 即使有些人不明白这个事实，也无妨。他们仍旧是帝国公民，保护他们是我们的神圣职责。

translations.english: Ulfric and his thugs are stirring up trouble for their own agenda. The Empire is the only thing keeping the Dominion from walking all over Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克和他的手下为了自己的目的而制造麻烦。只有帝国能阻止先祖神洲在天际横行。

translations.english: Not everyone seems to want us here.
translations.chinese: 但不是每个人都希望我们在这儿。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C8206]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: It matters little if some of the people here are ignorant to that truth. They are still citizens of the Empire. It's our solemn duty to protect them. | ZH: 即使有些人不明白这个事实，也无妨。他们仍旧是帝国公民，保护他们是我们的神圣职责。 | SID: 00720C
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Ulfric and his thugs are stirring up trouble for their own agenda. The Empire is the only thing keeping the Dominion from walking all over Skyrim. | ZH: 乌弗瑞克和他的手下为了自己的目的而制造麻烦。只有帝国能阻止先祖神洲在天际横行。 | SID: 00720E
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Not everyone seems to want us here. | ZH: 但不是每个人都希望我们在这儿。 | SID: 00E249

translations.english: Aye. I've worked on a few moorings here and there for it. Most of the ship captains are superstitious about who works on their vessels, though.
translations.chinese: 是。我在几个停泊处工作过。不过大多数船长对船上工作的人很迷信。

translations.english: And Dawnstar is known for its bad luck. We're the last port of call before Windhelm, and the ore we trade makes rich targets for pirates.
translations.chinese: 晨星以厄运著称。我们是通往风舵城之前最后一个港口，我们交易的矿石对海盗来说可是笔大财。

agentText:

translations.english: He's a fool, if you haven't met him already. Thinks Ulfric Stormcloak is invincible and spits dragon fire.
translations.chinese: 你如果还没见过他，那我告诉你，他就是个傻子。他以为乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷是无敌的，还会喷龙炎呢。

translations.english: The people here look to Brina Merilis when they need things settled. Real firebrand going up. Wasn't surprised when she joined the Legion.
translations.chinese: 这里的人需要解决问题的时候都会去求助布里那·莫里利斯。真正的火炬正在成长。难怪她加入过军团。

translations.english: Pfft. I'm the oldest woman in Dawnstar. Was here when the Skald the Elder was Skald the Younger.
translations.chinese: 哈。我是晨星岁数最大的女人了。老斯卡德还是小斯卡德的时候我就在这儿了。

agentText:

translations.english: That's right. In the Second Era, Tiber Septim himself led the army that conquered Old Hroldan from the barbarians of the Reach.
translations.chinese: 没错。第二纪元时，泰伯·塞普汀亲率军队从瑞驰蛮子手里征服了古霍尔丹。

translations.english: And this inn has the very bed the great general slept in on his first night as Old Hroldan's liberator. As good as it was hundreds of years ago.
translations.chinese: 这个旅店的床就是那位伟大将军成为古霍尔丹解放者的第一晚睡过的。保存的和几百年前一样好。

translations.english: Septim would later found the Empire that united Tamriel, but his first known battle and victory was right here.
translations.chinese: 后来塞普汀建立了统一泰姆瑞尔的帝国，但他的第一次战役和胜利就发生在这里。

agentText:

translations.english: In fact, he's the reason I chose to learn the smithing trade. I want to make weapons and armor for the great Stormcloak army.
translations.chinese: 事实上，他也是我选择入行做铁匠的原因。我想为伟大的风暴斗篷军队制造武器和盔甲。

translations.english: Every Nord should admire Ulfric. He fights for all of us.
translations.chinese: 每个诺德人都该敬佩乌弗瑞克。他为我们所有人而战。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C826C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: In fact, he's the reason I chose to learn the smithing trade. I want to make weapons and armor for the great Stormcloak army. | ZH: 事实上，他也是我选择入行做铁匠的原因。我想为伟大的风暴斗篷军队制造武器和盔甲。 | SID: 00DB28
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Every Nord should admire Ulfric. He fights for all of us. | ZH: 每个诺德人都该敬佩乌弗瑞克。他为我们所有人而战。 | SID: 00E0EF

translations.english: Lot of history in these walls. We're trying to make some more. It's a lucky time to be alive.
translations.chinese: 这些墙充满历史。我们会创造更多历史。活着真是幸运。

translations.english: Grew up here. Colder as Atmora, but that just grows the beards thicker!
translations.chinese: 我在这里长大。这里比阿特莫拉还冷，但只是让人的胡子长得更厚罢了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C826D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Lot of history in these walls. We're trying to make some more. It's a lucky time to be alive. | ZH: 这些墙充满历史。我们会创造更多历史。活着真是幸运。 | SID: 007182
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Grew up here. Colder as Atmora, but that just grows the beards thicker! | ZH: 我在这里长大。这里比阿特莫拉还冷，但只是让人的胡子长得更厚罢了。 | SID: 007186

translations.english: Wherever I can find them. If you're the type who worries over where something came from, you may want to move on.
translations.chinese: 从能找到的地方来。如果你是担心货物来源的人，那就换别家看看吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C826E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Wherever I can find them. If you're the type who worries over where something came from, you may want to move on. | ZH: 从能找到的地方来。如果你是担心货物来源的人，那就换别家看看吧。 | SID: 006A06

translations.english: He's... he's not the best teacher. But just watching him, I've learned so much.
translations.chinese: 他……他不算是最好的老师。但只是看着他，我就学到了很多。

translations.english: Are you kidding? I came all the way from Cyrodiil just to work with him.
translations.chinese: 你在开玩笑吧？我大老远从希罗帝尔赶来，就是为了和他一起工作。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C826F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: He's... he's not the best teacher. But just watching him, I've learned so much. | ZH: 他……他不算是最好的老师。但只是看着他，我就学到了很多。 | SID: 007190
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Are you kidding? I came all the way from Cyrodiil just to work with him. | ZH: 你在开玩笑吧？我大老远从希罗帝尔赶来，就是为了和他一起工作。 | SID: 007193

translations.english: To bring Ulfric his rightful glory, I would hammer a thousand shields.
translations.chinese: 为了给乌弗瑞克带来他应得的荣耀，我愿再捶打一千面盾牌。

translations.english: Shor's bones, I might just have to!
translations.chinese: 舒尔的骨头，我必须这么做！

translations.english: I don't see these troubles as business. This is a labor of honor.
translations.chinese: 我不觉得这些麻烦算是生意。这是光荣的劳动。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C8270]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: To bring Ulfric his rightful glory, I would hammer a thousand shields. | ZH: 为了给乌弗瑞克带来他应得的荣耀，我愿再捶打一千面盾牌。 | SID: 000534
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Shor's bones, I might just have to! | ZH: 舒尔的骨头，我必须这么做！ | SID: 004772

translations.english: We both leave well enough alone.
translations.chinese: 我们现在这样也挺好。

translations.english: No, but then I don't have much need for Ulfric.
translations.chinese: 不，但我也不怎么需要乌弗瑞克。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000C8271]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: We both leave well enough alone. | ZH: 我们现在这样也挺好。 | SID: 007188
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: No, but then I don't have much need for Ulfric. | ZH: 不，但我也不怎么需要乌弗瑞克。 | SID: 00D74A

translations.english: Smithing isn't the most exciting thing for me, but we all have to lend a hand as best we can.
translations.chinese: 对于我来说，锻造不是最让人兴奋的事，但我们都在努力。

translations.english: If a Stormcloak uses one of my swords to strike down an Imperial soldier, then I've done my part to free our land.
translations.chinese: 如果一个风暴斗篷拿我的剑杀死帝国士兵，那我就完成了我的使命，帮助我们解放自己的土地。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Smithing isn't the most exciting thing for me, but we all have to lend a hand as best we can. | ZH: 对于我来说，锻造不是最让人兴奋的事，但我们都在努力。 | SID: 0067BC

translations.english: It doesn't matter what I believe. Nurelion does, and it might be the only thing keeping him alive right now.

translations.chinese: 有句老话，只有诺德人能在天际工作。我觉得没人有这耐心。

translations.english: It takes half a day just to dig a planting row in the cold, stony earth here. But what else can we do, eat rocks and ice?
translations.chinese: 光是在这冰冷多石的土地上挖一排土就需要半天功夫。但我们能怎么办，吃石头吃冰块吗？

translations.english: Did you see that candle above the fire upstairs?
translations.chinese: 看到楼上壁炉里的蜡烛吗？

translations.english: When word came that he'd fallen, his son Deroct lit the candle in his honor. Nobody knows why it still burns.
translations.chinese: 当他去世的消息传来，他儿子德洛特为他点燃了蜡烛。没人知道为什么它还在燃烧。

translations.english: That bard Mikael is begging for a dagger up against his throat, the way he goes on about me.
translations.chinese: 那个诗人米凯尔真是找死，看看他对我的态度。

translations.english: My wife Seren and I run it together. She still smiths even though we found out she is with child.
translations.chinese: 我妻子赛仁和我一起。即使她怀孕了，还是坚持在锻造。

translations.english: Hey, if you find a book called "Night Falls on Sentinel," could you bring it to me? It's a story from my wife's people. Be good to have.
translations.chinese: 嘿，你能不能找到一本叫《暗夜笼罩哨卫城》的书？那是来自我妻子她们民族的故事。希望里面有点好东西。

translations.english: Our son or daughter isn't going to get much Redguard culture here in Skyrim. I know my wife worries how she will pass along her traditions.
translations.chinese: 我们的儿女在天际得不到太多红卫文化熏陶。我知道我妻子担心她的传统能否被继承。

translations.english: You in charge of this forge?
translations.chinese: 你负责这个铁匠铺吗？

translations.chinese: 如果我说得还不够清楚，意思就是，我们不希望他死。

translations.chinese: 哎，是这样没错……他染指了东帝国公司的生意，我们会好好利用这笔账。

translations.english: For now, just keep on his tail and he's bound to step into something he can't scrape off his boot.
translations.chinese: 现在，只要跟着他，早晚能抓住他的小尾巴。

translations.chinese: 我刚刚把“唤风者”约根的号角交给你了。难不成我现在也算龙裔了？

translations.english: We surrender. The capital is yours. If you pledge no harm will come of my people, I turn over the seat of power to you.
translations.chinese: 我们投降。首府是你们的了。只要保证不再祸害我的民众，宝座可以交给你们。

translations.english: There is no point in further talk. Go now!

translations.english: I guess they thought a woman wasn't strong enough to hurt him. I didn't mean for him to die! Why would I want that? I just... lost control.
translations.chinese: 我猜他们是觉得女人不够强也伤不到他。我也没想让他死！再说也没理由啊？我只是……没控制好。

translations.english: They wanted me to prove my worth, so they threw me up against a young whelp of a lad, hardly old enough to grow his first chin-hairs.
translations.chinese: 他们想让我证明自己的价值，就把个下巴没毛的小子扔给我。

translations.english: It wasn't my fault! I told them over and over that it was an accident!
translations.chinese: 那不是我的错！我一直在跟他们解释那是个意外！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000CAB7A]
Translations:

translations.english: "Too hot-headed," they cried. Weak, pathetic cowards, the lot of them!
translations.chinese: 他们说我“太急躁了”。都是些软弱可怜的懦夫！

translations.english: You been talking to those Companions?
translations.chinese: 你已经和战友团谈过了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000CAB7B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: "Too hot-headed," they cried. Weak, pathetic cowards, the lot of them! | ZH: 他们说我“太急躁了”。都是些软弱可怜的懦夫！ | SID: 006D66
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You been talking to those Companions? | ZH: 你已经和战友团谈过了？ | SID: 006D67

translations.english: That, and a true Nord never misses a chance to test her worth.
translations.chinese: 所以啊，一个真正的诺德人是绝不会错过考验自己价值的机会的。

translations.english: The heat of battle is the fire that forges the strongest blades. It's an old Nord proverb.
translations.chinese: 诺德古话讲，战斗的激情是锻造最坚固刀剑的烈火。

translations.english: About the same as everyone else. They're the cat-folk of Elsweyr. Great warriors, good traders.
translations.chinese: 和其他人差不多。他们是来自艾斯维尔的猫族。是伟大的战士和优秀的商人。

translations.english: Way I hear it, Elsweyr ain't nothing like Skyrim. It's got tropical forests and dusty badlands. It sounds awful!
translations.chinese: 据我所知，艾斯维尔和天际迥乎不同。那里有热带森林和尘土飞扬的荒漠。听起来很糟糕。

agentText:

translations.english: Worst thing is, nobody wants them in the cities. Nobody trusts them.
translations.chinese: 最糟糕的是，没人想让他们进城，也没人信任他们。

translations.english: It's got to be tough. Skyrim's a hard enough land when you've got a roof over your head.
translations.chinese: 肯定很艰难。就算对拥有栖身之所的人来说，天际都是片相当严酷的土地。

translations.english: Yeah, these Khajiit make a living traveling the roads and selling their wares.
translations.chinese: 是，那些卡吉特靠沿途贩运货物为生。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Hmph. Plenty.
translations.chinese: 嗯。多得很。

translations.english: The city's ruled by the Jarl up in Dragonsreach. That's the fortress, there, up on the tall hill.
translations.chinese: 领主在龙临宫里统治这座城市。那儿，就是远处高山上的堡垒。

translations.english: I'd say we're prosperous enough. Most folk don't go hungry, if they're willing to work hard.
translations.chinese: 我们这里已经足够繁荣了。只要愿意努力工作，大多数人都不会挨饿。

translations.english: But you're probably more interested in Jorrvaskr, mead hall of the Companions. Their deeds of war and valor are... legendary.
translations.chinese: 但你可能会对月瓦斯卡更感兴趣，那里是战友团的蜜酒大厅。他们的战争和英勇事迹……非常传奇。

translations.english: I am an artisan, painting in strokes of blood red upon the canvas of life. But yes, I will take coin to fight at your side.
translations.chinese: 我是艺术家，专门在生命的画布上用血作画。但是，我愿意收钱和你并肩作战。

translations.english: After all, where is the value in creating art if there is nobody left alive to see it?
translations.chinese: 毕竟，没活人见证的话，创造艺术又有什么价值可言？

translations.english: Damn Imperials. They won't hold Dawnstar forever.
translations.chinese: 该死的帝国人。他们不会一直把着晨星的。

translations.english: This isn't over. I catch you sending one letter to General Tullius, I'll have you both executed.
translations.chinese: 这不算完。一旦我抓住你给图留斯将军送信，我就处决了你俩。

translations.english: About 30 years ago, the Aldmeri Dominion invaded the Empire. It was a surprise attack, caught everyone off guard.
translations.chinese: 大概30年前，先祖神洲入侵了帝国。那次突然袭击让大家措手不及。

translations.english: By Akatosh, all the blood. The smell of flesh burned and pulled apart by magic. I never want to do that to another soul ever again.
translations.chinese: 阿卡托什在上，遍地是血。血肉的味道被魔法烧焦和撕裂。我再也不想对别人做这种事了。

translations.english: They ended up sacking the Imperial City. I was there, blasting apart young Elven men and women with Fireballs and Lightning Bolts.
translations.chinese: 他们最终洗劫了帝都。我当时在场，用火球和闪电箭把那些年轻的精灵男女炸开。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: They ended up sacking the Imperial City. I was there, blasting apart young Elven men and women with Fireballs and Lightning Bolts. | ZH: 他们最终洗劫了帝都。我当时在场，用火球和闪电箭把那些年轻的精灵男女炸开。 | SID: 006D3C

translations.chinese: 我知道这不值钱，但拿着这把弓吧。这是我家人给我的。对我来说很特别，却也带来了太多痛苦的回忆。

translations.chinese: 怎么了，亲爱的？

translations.english: Ain't sure if they're takin' on new members, but you should talk to the Companions. They're over in their hall, Jorrvaskr.
translations.chinese: 你应该去找战友团谈谈，但我不确定他们是否在招新人。他们就在月瓦斯卡大厅。

translations.english: If by "work" you mean "testing your steel in bloody battle."
translations.chinese: 如果你说的“工作”是指“在血腥的战斗中检验武器”的话。

translations.english: Any place I can find work?
translations.chinese: 我到哪儿能找些工作？

translations.english: But Ulfric Stormcloak's uprising has divided us. Now seems we can scarce look at each other without comin' to blows. Petty and foolish, that.
translations.chinese: 但乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷的起义把我们搞得分裂了。到现在，我们只要对视一眼都能打起来。真是小气而愚蠢。

translations.english: Aye, that I do. Have all my life. We Battle-Borns have been here since the beginning. Along with the Gray-Manes.
translations.chinese: 是啊，我一辈子都住在这儿。我们战狂从一开始就和灰鬃一样在这里了。

translations.english: They're sayin' dragons have returned to Skyrim. Now that there, that's a real problem.
translations.chinese: 现在有传言说龙族回归天际了。这才是真正的问题。

translations.english: Our families been close as kin for generations.
translations.chinese: 我们两家世代交好。

translations.english: You live here?
translations.chinese: 你住在这里吗？

translations.english: Truly?
translations.chinese: 真的？

translations.english: Ha! By Shor, this city could use more like you.
translations.chinese: 哈！舒尔在上，这城市需要更多像你这样的人。

translations.english: Best head up to Dragonsreach, then, and see the Jarl. He's lord of Whiterun, and can set you on the path.
translations.chinese: 你最好到龙临宫去见领主。他是白漫城的主人，会适当安排你的。

translations.english: I'm here to help, in any way I can.
translations.chinese: 我是来尽我所能提供帮助的。

translations.english: You'll want the Bannered Mare. See old Hulda, she'll keep you swimmin' in mead.
translations.chinese: 去悬旗母马吧。找老胡尔达，她会让你在蜜酒的海洋里荡漾的。

translations.english: But mind he bard, Mikael. Poncy little milk drinker, that one.
translations.chinese: 但要要注意那个吟游诗人，米凯尔。那家伙是个小懦夫。

translations.english: Ha! The most important question of all, that one.
translations.chinese: 哈！这才是最重要的问题对吧。

translations.english: Where can I get a drink?
translations.chinese: 我到哪里找酒喝？

translations.english: A pity. And words I hear too often.
translations.chinese: 遗憾啊。这话我听的太多了。

translations.english: But there's no shame in it. One of them dragons comes callin' in Whiterun, the place'll go up like tinder.
translations.chinese: 但这并不可耻。如果有龙向白漫袭来，这地方就会像易燃物一样炸开。

translations.english: Just passing through.
translations.chinese: 只是路过。

translations.english: You need only ask about. Plenty o' folk in Whiterun with too much fat and gold to be bothered doing anything for themselves.
translations.chinese: 四处问问就行。白漫城不缺那种脑满肠肥还什么事都不愿意自己干的有钱人。

translations.english: Ah, so it's gold you're after, then?
translations.chinese: 啊，这么说你是来淘金的？

translations.english: I seek my fortune.
translations.chinese: 我来寻找财富。

translations.chinese: 你好啊，老乡。什么风把你吹到白漫城来了？

translations.english: Ah, hello my Argonian friend. In the market for some hunting supplies?
translations.chinese: 啊，你好啊，阿尔贡朋友。来市场买狩猎用品吗？

translations.chinese: 白漫的公民永远铭记你们的贡献！

translations.english: In defeating these Stormcloak traitors, you have proven the hollowness of their cause and the fullness of your hearts.
translations.chinese: 在击败风暴斗篷叛徒时，你们证明了他们的事业是虚假的，而你们的心灵是充实的。

translations.english: They already sing of your valor and skill! The halls of Sovngarde are no doubt ringing with your praises!
translations.chinese: 他们在歌颂你的英勇与技巧，称赞声响彻松加德的大厅！

translations.english: Revel in your victory here today, even as the gods revel in your honor!
translations.chinese: 尽情享受今天的胜利吧，众神为你们的荣耀欢呼！

translations.english: It'd be my honor should you decide to make Whiterun your home. Speak with Proventus. He'll make the necessary arrangements.
translations.chinese: 如果你决定要在白漫城安家，那将是我的荣幸。和普罗万图斯谈谈。他会做必要的安排。

translations.english: Thank you for your role in all of this.
translations.chinese: 谢谢你所做的一切。

translations.chinese: 所有人注意！领主有话要说！

translations.chinese: 你出不去了。领主给你判了无期徒刑。好好适应黑暗吧，你再也看不见太阳了。

translations.chinese: 确实不是。银血家付钱给我们。这里人人都是训练有素的雇佣兵。

translations.chinese: 为了白漫！为了帝国！

translations.english: Now, you. Get down there.
translations.chinese: 喂，你。下去。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000CD10D]

translations.english: You got it?
translations.chinese: 明白了？

translations.english: All right, prisoner. Eyes front. You're in Cidhna Mine, now. And we expect you to earn your keep.
translations.chinese: 好了，囚犯。看着前面。你现在在希讷矿场了。你好好工作吧。

translations.english: There's no resting your hide in a cell in this prison. Here, you work. You'll mine ore until you start throwing up silver bars.
translations.chinese: 在这个监狱里，你无处藏身。只能好好工作。开采矿石直到挖出银条来。

translations.english: It's the most secure prison in Skyrim. Throw scum in, close the gates. No one gets out.
translations.chinese: 这里是天际最安全的监狱。只要把那些人渣扔进来，把门一关。没人能出来。

translations.english: This is a jail, owned by the Silver-Blood family. We use the prisoners to mine for ore.
translations.chinese: 这里是银血家族的监狱。我们利用囚犯开采矿石。

translations.english: So unless you're here to dig, you don't belong here.
translations.chinese: 所以除非你是来挖矿的，就跟这儿没关系。

translations.chinese: 继续加油吧，伙计们，接受我的感激与祝福！

translations.english: Anything for my favorite lass.
translations.chinese: 为我最爱的姑娘怎么都行。

translations.english: You need to leave <Alias=QuestGiver> alone.
translations.chinese: 你得离<Alias=QuestGiver>远点。

translations.chinese: 我知道是至高王邀请他们来这里的，但他没有事先征询我还有其他人的意见。他应该先问问我们。

translations.english: They're parasites. They're living in our city, under our protection, but what do they do for us? Nothing!
translations.chinese: 他们都是寄生虫。他们住在我们的城市里，受我们的保护，但为我们做了什么？什么都没有！

translations.english: But in time, I made the right friends and proved myself useful enough that they don't give me trouble anymore.
translations.chinese: 但随着时间推移，我也交了很多朋友，证明了自己的价值，他们就不再给我找麻烦了。

translations.english: The dark elves are too proud and naive to understand the way things truly are, and so they continue to dwell in that slum.
translations.chinese: 暗精灵自视太高，也太天真，无法理解人情世故，所以就只能继续住在那边的贫民窟了。

translations.english: It was difficult at first. The Nords of this city are, at best, suspicious of outsiders.
translations.chinese: 一开始很困难。城里的诺德人不过是对外人保持怀疑而已。

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: The dark elves are too proud and naive to understand the way things truly are, and so they continue to dwell in that slum. | ZH: 暗精灵自视太高，也太天真，无法理解人情世故，所以就只能继续住在那边的贫民窟了。 | SID: 006A7B
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: It was difficult at first. The Nords of this city are, at best, suspicious of outsiders. | ZH: 一开始很困难。城里的诺德人不过是对外人保持怀疑而已。 | SID: 006A7D

translations.english: I'm a Dark Elf and I live in Windhelm, so yes, I live in the Gray Quarter.
translations.chinese: 我一个住在风舵城的暗精灵，当然住在灰民区。

translations.english: You must be new around here, or you'd know they don't let my kind live anywhere outside that slum.
translations.chinese: 你一定是新来的，不然你就会知道，我们一族除了贫民窟外哪里也不能住。

translations.english: He likes to get drunk and walk around the Gray Quarter yelling insults at us in the small hours of the morning. A real charmer, that one.
translations.chinese: 他喜欢喝得酩酊大醉然后在灰民区瞎溜达，在半夜凌晨对着我们大吼大叫，这人真有意思。

translations.english: Nothing new there. Most of the Nords living in Windhelm don't care much for us, but Rolff is the worst by far.
translations.chinese: 不算新鲜事了。住在风舵城的大多数诺德人都不怎么关心我们，但罗尔夫最恶劣的一个。

translations.english: Make your way to our hidden military camp in the Pale. Rikke will have important tasks for you, and will need you when we reclaim the capital.
translations.chinese: 去我们隐藏在苍原领的军营吧。瑞姬有重要任务交给你。等我们重新夺回首府时，她会需要你的。

translations.english: You'd be wasted as a regular soldier. I have special plans for you. You'll be of greater use to me with greater flexibility.
translations.chinese: 你当个普通士兵太浪费了。我有特别计划要给你。你灵活行动对我来说更有用。

translations.english: What are my new orders, sir?
translations.chinese: 长官，我的新命令是什么？

translations.english: I suspect you'll be of greater use to us with greater freedom, so you're free to engage the Imperials as you see fit.
translations.chinese: 我觉得你便宜行动会对我们更加有利。所以你就自由与帝国军交战吧。

translations.english: What's our next move against the Empire?
translations.chinese: 我们对抗帝国的下一步是什么？

translations.chinese: 我刚说了，我叫安吉，我在这里一个人住有些年了。

translations.english: Calm down. I'm not going to hurt you.

translations.chinese: 我家人被杀以后，我就从海尔根搬到这里了。

translations.english: At the time I couldn't stand to be around anyone. They all felt sorry for me and I didn't want them to. It was my problem, not theirs.
translations.chinese: 那时候我受不了和人们住在一起，他们都对我报以同情，但我不打算让他们同情我。那是我的问题，和他们无关。

translations.chinese: 为什么一个人住在这里啊？

translations.chinese: 所以我再问一遍，灰鬃还是战狂？

translations.chinese: 不同的是，灰鬃背弃了帝国而我们战狂依然忠诚。

translations.english: I didn't tell you this. Faleen likes to act tough, but she really has a soft spot for, of all things, poetry.
translations.chinese: 我没告诉过你。法琳喜欢表现得很强硬，但偏偏对诗歌情有独钟。

translations.english: You know, I took some classes at the Bards College as a youth. Poems come in handy when wooing.
translations.chinese: 我年轻的时候在吟游诗人学院上过课。诗歌在求爱时是很有用的。

translations.english: As for what she might like...
translations.chinese: 那她可能喜欢什么……

translations.english: There's a poem I once used on an older lady of Rorikstead. I can change it to be about Faleen, if you've got some gold.
translations.chinese: 我有首诗以前是写给洛利克镇一个老太太的。如果你肯付钱，我可以改成写给法琳的。

translations.chinese: 生存下来，你就具有价值。这就是摆在你面前的考验。你能接受吗？

translations.english: You will rely on your skill as a mage. Not on your belongings, not on your scrolls and potions. Only what lies within.
translations.chinese: 你将依靠自己作为法师的技能。而非诸如卷轴药剂等外物。只能求诸于内。

translations.english: First, there are ancient references to dragon "heartscales". What little I could learn suggests they may be what I need.
translations.chinese: 首先，古代有关于龙的“心鳞”的记载。我之所学表明它们可能正是我所需要的。

translations.english: First you'll need to retrieve the dagger, then use it to carve a few scales off a dragon. Presumably a deceased one.
translations.chinese: 你先去把匕首取回，然后用它在龙身上片下几块鳞来。可能是死掉的龙。

translations.english: Second, there are stories of a dagger called Kahvozein's Fang, said to be sharp enough to carve individual scales off a dragon.
translations.chinese: 其次，有一种叫做卡沃奇恩之牙的匕首，据说锋利到能够将龙鳞切下。

translations.english: My knowledge of Skyrim's history is far from complete, but I did some research and discovered two things.
translations.chinese: 我对天际历史的了解远远不够，但我做了些研究发现了两件事。

translations.english: As I've said, I made some progress using the essence of dragon scales. But they're just not quite potent enough.
translations.chinese: 我说了，我利用龙鳞的精华获得了一些进展，但还不够强大。

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If that must be, then it will. And why should I be any different? How many the lives already lost. What's one more? | ZH: 如果非要如此，那就这样吧。我又有何特殊？已经失去了那么多生命，再多我一个又怎样？ | SID: 006824
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Rikke, leave. They'll kill you. | ZH: 瑞姬，离开这。他们会杀了你的。 | SID: 006823

translations.english: Secure the door.
translations.chinese: 确保大门安全。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D143D]
Translations:

translations.english: You're a cold hearted bastard, aren't you?
translations.chinese: 你可真是个冷血混蛋啊。

translations.english: Just kill her and get it over with.
translations.chinese: 干脆点杀了她，了结这事儿吧。

translations.chinese: 恐怕这就是解决办法了。

translations.english: Just kill her and get it over with.
translations.chinese: 干脆点杀了她，了结这事儿吧。

translations.english: A true Nord never fears death. It's the how and why of it that one needs consider.
translations.chinese: 真正的诺德人从不畏惧死亡。但我们要考虑如何死、为何死。

translations.english: We'll kill you if we must.
translations.chinese: 如果有必要，我们会杀你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D1440]

translations.english: You're wrong. Ulfric. We need the Empire. Without it Skyrim will assuredly fall to the Dominion.
translations.chinese: 你错了，乌弗瑞克。我们需要帝国，没有它，天际会落到先祖神洲手里！

agentText:

translations.english: Talos preserve us.
translations.chinese: 愿塔洛斯保佑我们。

translations.english: You've left me no choice...
translations.chinese: 但你让我别无选择……

translations.english: You're also free to die for it.
translations.chinese: 你也可以自由地为它而死。

translations.english: We Gray-Manes got just as much to be proud of as them Battle-Borns, but you won't see us with our noses in the air.
translations.chinese: 我们灰鬃氏族和他们战狂氏族一样值得骄傲，但我们绝不会鼻子眼看人。

translations.english: I think my voice is ready. I hope we've done this well.
translations.chinese: 我觉得我的声音准备好了。希望咱们表现得够出色。

translations.chinese: 但日记没有说这些钱是哪来的？

translations.english: Hmm. This is intriguing, but highly disturbing.
translations.chinese: 嗯。有意思，但也极度令人不安。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D180C]
Translations:

translations.english: I'm not familiar with the Twilight Sepulcher. What is it? What's Mercer Frey done?
translations.chinese: 我不太了解黄昏坟墓。那是什么？墨瑟·弗雷干了什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D180D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm not familiar with the Twilight Sepulcher. What is it? What's Mercer Frey done? | ZH: 我不太了解黄昏坟墓。那是什么？墨瑟·弗雷干了什么？ | SID: 009E3F

translations.english: Anything else, Enthir? Anything about... the Nightingales?
translations.chinese: 恩希尔，还有别的吗？有没有关于……夜莺？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D180E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Anything else, Enthir? Anything about... the Nightingales? | ZH: 恩希尔，还有别的吗？有没有关于……夜莺？ | SID: 0067D7

translations.english: It's alright Karliah. You don't have to say a word.
translations.chinese: 没关系，卡莱亚。你什么都不用说。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D180F]

translations.english: The last few pages seem to describe "the failure of the Nightingales" although it doesn't go into great detail.
translations.chinese: 最后几页似乎是在讲“夜莺的失败”，不过语焉不详。

translations.english: Gallus also repeatedly mentions his strong belief that Mercer desecrated something known as the Twilight Sepulcher.
translations.chinese: 加卢斯还反复提及自己坚信墨瑟亵渎了一个叫“黄昏坟墓”的地方。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Yes. Gallus seems certain that Mercer had been removing funds from the Guild's treasury without anyone's knowledge.
translations.chinese: 是。加卢斯好像很确定墨瑟在不引起任何人注意的情况下，从公会的金库里转移资金。

translations.english: Gallus had begun to uncover what he calls an "...unduly lavish lifestyle replete with spending vast amounts of gold on personal pleasures."
translations.chinese: 加卢斯开始发现他所谓的“……过度奢侈的生活方式，在个人享乐上花费不菲。”

translations.english: It appears that Gallus had suspicions about Mercer Frey's allegiance to the Guild for months.
translations.chinese: 看来加卢斯怀疑墨瑟·弗雷对公会的忠诚有几个月时间了。

translations.chinese: 阴影保佑。是真的……

translations.chinese: 嗯。有了，在这儿。

agentText:

EDID: [000D1816]
Translations:

translations.english: As a Nightingale, I've been sworn to secrecy regarding the Sepulcher.
translations.chinese: 身为夜莺，黄昏坟墓的事必须保密。

translations.english: I know the Guild doesn't do much to foster faith, but I'm going to have to ask that you continue to trust me.
translations.chinese: 我知道公会在信仰培养方面做得不足，但我还是希望你能继续相信我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D1817]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: As a Nightingale, I've been sworn to secrecy regarding the Sepulcher. | ZH: 身为夜莺，黄昏坟墓的事必须保密。 | SID: 00405F

translations.english: I'm sorry Enthir, I can't say. All that matters is we deliver your translation to the Guild immediately.
translations.chinese: 抱歉，恩希尔，我不能说。现在最要紧的是马上把你的翻译交给公会。

translations.english: Farewell, Enthir... words can't express...
translations.chinese: 再会吧，恩希尔……我也不知道该说些什么好……

translations.english: Shhh. Listen to Enthir... we can't afford to miss a single detail.
translations.chinese: 嘘。仔细听恩希尔的话……我们不能放过任何一个细节。

agentText:

EDID: [000D1819]

translations.english: We haven't much time for discussion, but what did you need?
translations.chinese: 我们没多少时间可以讨论了，你到底想干什么？

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D181A]

translations.english: Don't you go trackin' your dirty boots on my clean floor!
translations.chinese: 别用你的脏鞋踩在我干净的地板上！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D1821]

translations.english: Soldiers! They're everywhere these days. And not a one of them knows how to pick up after themselves.
translations.chinese: 士兵！到处都是士兵。没有一个知道要自己收拾垃圾。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D1822]

translations.english: We're not done here.
translations.chinese: 我们还没说完呢。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D1827]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We're not done here. | ZH: 我们还没说完呢。 | SID: 000F30

translations.english: No. I was just getting some fresh air. Had one too many pints of mead at the Silver-Blood Inn.
translations.chinese: 不。我刚才在银血旅店蜜酒喝多了，打算出来吹吹风。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D194E]

translations.english: You don't have to say sorry to me. I just hope the Eight bring us more peace in the future.
translations.chinese: 不用客气。我只是希望八圣灵能为未来带去更多和平。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D1950]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You don't have to say sorry to me. I just hope the Eight bring us more peace in the future. | ZH: 不用客气。我只是希望八圣灵能为未来带去更多和平。 | SID: 005CE2

translations.english: I think I heard someone mention it was underneath the Temple of Dibella, in the big crag in the center of the city.
translations.chinese: 我听说它在迪贝拉神庙的下面，就在城中心的巨石上。

translations.english: Huh. Not sure. I don't worship Talos, myself.
translations.chinese: 嗯。不确定。我不信仰塔洛斯。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D1951]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I think I heard someone mention it was underneath the Temple of Dibella, in the big crag in the center of the city. | ZH: 我听说它在迪贝拉神庙的下面，就在城中心的巨石上。 | SID: 0000DA
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Huh. Not sure. I don't worship Talos, myself. | ZH: 嗯。不确定。我不信仰塔洛斯。 | SID: 00EFD8

translations.english: My note? No, that's yours. Must have fallen out of your pocket.
translations.chinese: 我的？不，是你的。肯定是从你口袋里掉出来的吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D1952]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: My note? No, that's yours. Must have fallen out of your pocket. | ZH: 我的？不，是你的。肯定是从你口袋里掉出来的吧。 | SID: 00CA45

translations.english: But I think you'll see that the Legion is Skyrim's only hope for real peace right now. I know you'll make the right choice in the end.
translations.chinese: 但我想你会看到的，军团是如今天际实现真正和平的唯一希望。你最后一定能作出正确的选择。

translations.english: Sure, I understand. It's not easy to go from being executed by the Legion one day to joining up the next.
translations.chinese: 没问题，我能理解。刚要被军团处决就要加入军团确实不容易接受。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D195D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: But I think you'll see that the Legion is Skyrim's only hope for real peace right now. I know you'll make the right choice in the end. | ZH: 但我想你会看到的，军团是如今天际实现真正和平的唯一希望。你最后一定能作出正确的选择。 | SID: 008EC8
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Sure, I understand. It's not easy to go from being executed by the Legion one day to joining up the next. | ZH: 没问题，我能理解。刚要被军团处决就要加入军团确实不容易接受。 | SID: 00DF52

translations.english: I hope so. The Legion is Skyrim's only hope right now. Come on, we'd better get moving.
translations.chinese: 希望如此吧。军团是目前天际唯一的希望。来，我们得走了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D1961]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I hope so. The Legion is Skyrim's only hope right now. Come on, we'd better get moving. | ZH: 希望如此吧。军团是目前天际唯一的希望。来，我们得走了。 | SID: 009AFF

translations.english: Welcome to Whiterun, friend. Go right on in.
translations.chinese: 欢迎来到白漫城，朋友。请进吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D197B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Welcome to Whiterun, friend. Go right on in. | ZH: 欢迎来到白漫城，朋友。请进吧。 | SID: 00677F

translations.english: Halt! City's closed with the dragons about. Official business only.
translations.chinese: 停下！龙族在附近出没，城市已经关闭了。非公莫入。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D197C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Halt! City's closed with the dragons about. Official business only. | ZH: 停下！龙族在附近出没，城市已经关闭了。非公莫入。 | SID: 00676D

translations.english: If not for Talos, and a few modest bribes paid to the right jailors, why, I would not be standing before you today, resplendent in my faith!
translations.chinese: 如果不是因为塔洛斯，还有向狱卒行贿，我今天就不会站在你的面前。都是因我的信仰光彩夺目啊！

translations.english: Oh yes, many times. But mighty Talos was my keeper, my shield against the heresy of the south!
translations.chinese: 哦没错，很多次了。但强大的塔洛斯就是我的守护者，是我对抗南方异端邪说的护盾！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D197D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: If not for Talos, and a few modest bribes paid to the right jailors, why, I would not be standing before you today, resplendent in my faith! | ZH: 如果不是因为塔洛斯，还有向狱卒行贿，我今天就不会站在你的面前。都是因我的信仰光彩夺目啊！ | SID: 002E28
