translations.english: Or else what? You think you can stand against the entire Whiterun city guard? The gate's closed.
translations.chinese: 否则什么？你觉得能对抗全白漫城的卫兵吗？城门已经关闭了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D197F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Or else what? You think you can stand against the entire Whiterun city guard? The gate's closed. | ZH: 否则什么？你觉得能对抗全白漫城的卫兵吗？城门已经关闭了。 | SID: 00678C

translations.english: Riverwood's in danger, too? You'd better go on in. You'll find the Jarl in Dragonsreach, at the top of the hill.
translations.chinese: 河木镇也有危险了？快进去吧。到山顶的龙临宫见领主。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D1980]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Riverwood's in danger, too? You'd better go on in. You'll find the Jarl in Dragonsreach, at the top of the hill. | ZH: 河木镇也有危险了？快进去吧。到山顶的龙临宫见领主。 | SID: 006776

translations.chinese: 好吧，但我们会盯着你的。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D1981]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Fine, but we'll be keeping an eye on you. | ZH: 好吧，但我们会盯着你的。 | SID: 00B3B8

translations.english: Safe travels.
translations.chinese: 一路安全。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D1982]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Safe travels. | ZH: 一路安全。 | SID: 00678E

translations.english: And if the rebels have themselves a dragon, General Tullius is the only one who can stop them.
translations.chinese: 如果叛军有一头龙，那图留斯将军就是唯一能阻止他们的人。

translations.english: Of course! I know, today wasn't the best introduction to the Legion, but I hope you'll give us another chance.

EDID: [000D23CA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Do you think they will sit idle while a dragon is slaughtering my men and burning my city? | ZH: 你觉得他们会坐视巨龙屠杀我的部下、焚烧我的城市吗？ | SID: 00013F
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Ulfric and General Tullius are both just waiting for me to make a wrong move. | ZH: 乌弗瑞克和图留斯将军都在等待我一步走错。 | SID: 002432

translations.english: Spoken like a true Nord. I'll stand beside you, Dragonborn.
translations.chinese: 像个真诺德人说的话。我支持你，龙裔。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: No Nord could have said it better! I'll stand beside you, Dragonborn.
translations.chinese: 连诺德人都不一定说的这么好。我支持你，龙裔。

translations.english: I don't know about such things, but I heard the Greybeards summon you. That's good enough for me.
translations.chinese: 我不太了解这些，但我听到了灰胡子对你的召唤。这就足够了。

translations.english: I didn't say anything about giving up.
translations.chinese: 我没说过要放弃。

translations.english: We'll be ready, don't worry. You do have a plan for actually luring a dragon into this trap, don't you?
translations.chinese: 别担心，我们会准备好。你真有办法把龙引到陷阱来吗？

agentText:

translations.english: My men will be ready when you are, Dragonborn. You have a truce to arrange first, eh?
translations.chinese: 我的人随时待命，龙裔。你得先去安排休战协议吧？

translations.english: So what's the plan, then? How do you intend to lure a dragon into the trap?
translations.chinese: 所以你的计划呢？你打算怎么把龙引到陷阱来？

translations.english: Then... Whiterun will stand with you, Dragonborn. We will take the risk, and gain the glory, whether it be in victory or defeat!
translations.chinese: 那么……白漫会与你同在，龙裔。无论成败，我们都会用迎接风险，换回荣耀！

translations.english: Alduin? The World-Eater himself? But... how can we fight him? Doesn't his return mean it's the end times?
translations.chinese: 奥杜因？世界吞噬者本尊？但……我们怎么打败他？他回来不就意味着末日降临了吗？

translations.english: Aye, Dragonborn. Maybe you can stop the dragons - and this war into the bargain.
translations.chinese: 啊，龙裔。也许你能够阻止龙族，促成停战谈判。

translations.english: Need you to deliver some false orders to the Imperial Legate in Morthal.
translations.chinese: 我需要你去给莫萨尔的帝国军指挥官送些假命令。

translations.english: But first we need to get our hands on some Imperial orders to make the forgeries.
translations.chinese: 但首先我们得弄到一些帝国军的命令来伪造。

translations.english: Reporting for duty.
translations.chinese: 报告。

translations.english: Two things I have for you. Two shapes. One edged, one round.
translations.chinese: 我给你两样东西。一个方的一个圆的。

translations.english: The round one, for tuning. Dwemer music is soft and subtle, and needed to open their cleverest gates.
translations.chinese: 圆的用来调试。锻莫的音乐柔和微妙，可以打开他们最巧妙的大门。

translations.english: Trust Septimus. He knows you can know.
translations.chinese: 相信赛普蒂莫斯。他知道你知道。

translations.english: Find Mzark and its sky-dome. The machinations there will read the Scroll and lay the lore upon the cube.
translations.chinese: 找到姆扎克和里面的天穹顶。那里的机关可以读出卷轴内容，并把里面的知识刻录在方典上。

translations.english: The edged lexicon, for inscribing. To us, a hunk of metal. To the Dwemer, a full library of knowings. But... empty.
translations.chinese: 方典用来刻录。于我们而言，这就是块废铁。对锻莫来说，这不亚于一座知识宝库。不过……是空的。

translations.chinese: 你就和你的朋友们在这儿待着吧，我去拿铲子了。

translations.chinese: 就让我把你的钱包拿走吧。还有你那双漂亮的靴子。

translations.english: It's not easy running messages, what with Imperials scouts crawling all over the place. Well done.
translations.chinese: 送信可不是容易事。现在到处都是帝国侦察兵。做得好。

translations.english: Ah, good. Looks like the reinforcements for the fort are on the way. And we have some information about enemy troop movements as well. Excellent.
translations.chinese: 哦，很好。看来支援要塞的部队已经在路上了。还有一些关于敌军动向的情报。太好了。

translations.english: Why don't you grab yourself a drink at the Windpeak before heading back?
translations.chinese: 回去前到风岳旅店喝一杯吧。

translations.english: All right. Let's take a look...
translations.chinese: 好吧。我看看。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Ah, good. Looks like the reinforcements for the fort are on the way. And we have some information about enemy troop movements as well. Excellent. | ZH: 哦，很好。看来支援要塞的部队已经在路上了。还有一些关于敌军动向的情报。太好了。 | SID: 0066BF

translations.english: Thank you, soldier. Let's take a look at these reports...
translations.chinese: 谢谢你，士兵。我来看看这些报告……

translations.english: Why don't you have yourself a drink at the Moorside before you head back?
translations.chinese: 回去前在坞边旅店喝一杯吧。

translations.english: Stormcloak scouts are making it difficult to move around. It's good you made it here in one piece.
translations.chinese: 现在外面这么多风暴斗篷的侦察兵，行动不容易。你能毫发无损地把信送来真是太好了。

translations.english: I'm waiting on word about reinforcements for the fort... Good, they're on the way. And we have some information on enemy troop movements. Excellent.
translations.chinese: 我一直在等要塞援军的消息……很好，他们在路上了。还有关于敌军动向的情报。太好了。

translations.english: If you can... I want you to kill someone else, as well. You don't have to - not as part of our deal. But if you do... I'll pay you even more.
translations.chinese: 如果可以的话……我希望你去再杀一个人。当然你不杀也没事，毕竟这是在我们协议之外。但如果你干了……我会多付你些报酬。

translations.english: It's Nilsine Shatter-Shield, in Windhelm. If Nilsine dies, too... I'll make it worth your while.
translations.chinese: 目标是风舵城的尼尔欣·碎盾。如果尼尔欣也死了……我会给你个满意的价格。

translations.english: I'm listening.
translations.chinese: 我听着呢。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D2AE6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: If you can... I want you to kill someone else, as well. You don't have to - not as part of our deal. But if you do... I'll pay you even more. | ZH: 如果可以的话……我希望你去再杀一个人。当然你不杀也没事，毕竟这是在我们协议之外。但如果你干了……我会多付你些报酬。 | SID: 005DD1
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: It's Nilsine Shatter-Shield, in Windhelm. If Nilsine dies, too... I'll make it worth your while. | ZH: 目标是风舵城的尼尔欣·碎盾。如果尼尔欣也死了……我会给你个满意的价格。 | SID: 006009
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I'm listening. | ZH: 我听着呢。 | SID: 00CD08

translations.english: Couldn't they understand that I was used? That I was grieving for Friga, too? No... they treated me like garbage, threw me away.
translations.chinese: 他们就不明白我被利用了吗？没看到我也为弗丽嘉的死伤心吗？没有……他们就像扔垃圾一样把我丢在一边。

translations.english: With Nilsine dead, maybe then Tova will realize what she's lost, hmm? Maybe then she'll see that I was just as much a daughter as the others.
translations.chinese: 或许尼尔欣的死会让托娃意识到她到底失去了什么，嗯？到那时她可能就会明白我和她其他女儿一样了。

translations.english: Don't you see? I was like a daughter to Tova. A sister to Nilsine and Friga. But the family refuses to believe my innocence. No matter what I say.
translations.chinese: 你不明白吗？我就像托娃的女儿一样，和尼尔欣、弗丽嘉情同姐妹。但是不管我怎么解释，他们一家都不肯相信我是无辜的。

translations.english: And if not, may she drown in her own tears.
translations.chinese: 如果没意识到，那就祝愿她被自己的泪水淹死吧。

translations.english: That hammer... Why that's Aegisbane, heirloom of Clan Shatter-Shield! Last I heard, it was stolen by a couple of swindlers. Alain and... Muiri. Yeah.
translations.chinese: 那把锤子……不是神盾之祸么。碎盾氏族的传家宝！我记得它被俩骗子偷走了。一个叫阿兰……还有一个暮蕊。没错。

translations.english: Karliah... she's still alive?
translations.chinese: 卡莱亚……她还活着？

translations.chinese: 好，非常好。

translations.english: Here, then, is the first of the Illusion spells you sought.
translations.chinese: 来，这是你要找的第一个幻术魔法。

translations.english: And that's it. I certainly think you deserve the first copy of the tome. Use it well!
translations.chinese: 就是这样。我觉得你应该第一个拿到这本书。好好使用吧！

translations.english: Wonderful, just wonderful!
translations.chinese: 太好了，好极了！

translations.english: And it's just as I suspected. The energies need to be channeled back through the nexus a second and third time...
translations.chinese: 和我怀疑的一样，能量需要第二次、第三次通过连接点被引导回来……

translations.english: Even just one should be enough for me to complete my research.
translations.chinese: 有一个就足够完成我的研究了。

translations.english: You'll need Kahvozein's Fang, of course.
translations.chinese: 当然，你首先需要卡沃奇恩之牙。

translations.english: Then, if you should happen upon the corpse of a dragon, you should be able to use it to slice off a heartscale or two.
translations.chinese: 然后，如果你碰巧看见一具龙尸，可以切几片心鳞下来。

translations.english: Not just any dragon scales. Heartscales. Very special.
translations.chinese: 不是随便的什么龙鳞。是心鳞。非常特别。

translations.english: They were said to be quite fond of ritual sacrifices. So fond, in fact, that the high priest spent a great deal of time sharpening the dagger.
translations.chinese: 据说他们非常喜欢祭祀仪式。正因如此喜欢，以至于他们的大祭司花了很长时间来打磨这把匕首。

translations.english: Perhaps not the brightest spot in Skyrim's history, eh?
translations.chinese: 或许这并不是天际历史上多光彩的一幕吧？

translations.english: That way it was always ready for the next inevitable victim.

translations.english: Not much, I'm afraid. It was named Kahvozein's Fang after the dragon worshipped by this particular sect of the cult.

translations.english: But Odahviing, he is... headstrong? Boziik. Rash. Even among the dov, he was known for this.
translations.chinese: 但傲达威英很……任性？波兹克。鲁莽。即使在都瓦中也很有名。

translations.english: He is not compelled to come, but the dov are prideful by nature. Few could resist such a challenge. Especially from you, Dovahkiin.
translations.chinese: 他并非被迫前来。但都瓦生性高傲。很少能拒绝挑战。尤其是来自你的挑战，都瓦克因。

translations.english: He will not resist the challenge of your Voice, Dovahkiin. He will come.
translations.chinese: 他不会拒绝你吼声的挑战，都瓦克因。他会来的。

translations.english: Ah, I forget how little you know of the dov. Our names are always made up of three Rotmulaag - Words of Power.
translations.chinese: 哦，我都忘了你对都瓦了解不多。我们的名字总是由三个罗姆拉格……力量之语组成的。

translations.english: I have tasted the voices of Alduin's allies on the wind. Pogaan nahlaas, vokrii wah jun.
translations.chinese: 我从风中感受到了奥杜因盟友的吼声。迫甘 纳拉斯，沃克瑞 瓦 琼。

translations.english: There is one who I remember well. Odahviing. He is the one to tell us where Alduin has gone.
translations.chinese: 有一个我印象很深，傲达威英。他能告诉我们奥杜因的去向。

translations.english: Hmm, yes. I have been pondering on exactly that question. Lingrah morah.
translations.chinese: 嗯，没错。我一直在认真思考那个问题。灵拉 摩拉。

translations.english: I need a way to lure a dragon to Dragonsreach. Any ideas?
translations.chinese: 我需要把龙引到龙临宫。有什么好办法吗？

translations.chinese: 哦……好吧。那就交给你了。我相信你很熟悉自己的工作。

translations.english: Probably for the best. It will give me time to see if that old trap still works - and break the news to the men.
translations.chinese: 那最好了。这样我就有时间去看看那个老陷阱还能不能用，在把消息告诉部下。

translations.chinese: 如果想把劳动成果变现，就去找托尼利亚吧。她说话很强硬，但保证公道实惠。

translations.english: Ulfric murdered Torygg, you know. Walked right into his palace in Solitude and killed him. Shouted him to death, if you believe the stories.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克谋杀了托依格。独自走进宫殿然后杀了他。还有谣传说托依格是被吼杀的。

translations.english: Ah, I forget you're new to Skyrim. Jarl Elisif, I should say, although only because she was married to Jarl Torryg when he was murdered.
translations.chinese: 啊，我忘了你是刚来天际了。我应该称艾利西弗领主才对。虽然她是在她丈夫，托依格领主被杀后才接任的。

translations.english: That's what started this whole war. The Empire couldn't ignore that. Once the jarls start killing each other, we're back to the bad old days.
translations.chinese: 这就是战争的起因。帝国不能无视这一点。一旦领主们开始自相残杀，我们就回到了过去糟糕的年代了。

translations.english: Jarl Balgruuf? He rules Whiterun Hold. A good man, perhaps a bit over-cautious, but these are dangerous times.
translations.chinese: 巴尔古夫领主吗？他统治着白漫领。他是个好人，就是有些太过谨慎了。但现在是危机时期，谨慎些也没错。

translations.english: So far he's managed to stay out of the war. I'm afraid it can't last, though.
translations.chinese: 到目前他都在避免卷入战争。但我看坚持不了多久。

translations.english: It's not far. We used to go to the market there every month or so, until the roads got so dangerous with the war and all.
translations.chinese: 不远。我们几乎每月都要去一次那边的市场。但现在战争搞得道路不宁。

translations.english: I've had this bow almost my entire life, and it's never let me down. I hope it brings you the same luck.
translations.chinese: 我这辈子都带着这把弓，它从没让我失望。希望它也能为你带来同样的好运。

translations.english: I wish I could say that it was, but it's not that simple.
translations.chinese: 我也希望能说快结束了，但事情不那么简单。

translations.english: Many Stormcloaks will fight until they die, because they still believe they're fighting for Skyrim's freedom.
translations.chinese: 许多风暴斗篷会一直斗争到死，因为他们仍然相信自己在为天际的自由而战。

translations.english: But without Ulfric, the movement will wither and die. It's only a matter of time.
translations.chinese: 但没有了乌弗瑞克，这场运动枯萎消亡只是时间问题了。

translations.english: In my days as a riverboat captain, I was known to run a tight ship.
translations.chinese: 我以前在内河当船长时，大家都知道我管理很严格。

translations.english: Well, a few reasons come to mind.
translations.chinese: 我想有几个原因。

translations.english: That, and I made my fortune by knowing when to spend my septims, and when not to. I can't stand waste.
translations.chinese: 其次，我知道塞普汀什么时候该花，什么时候不该花。我是受不了铺张浪费的。

translations.english: The Palace of the Kings in which you now stand is one of the last buildings that remain from that era.
translations.chinese: 你现在所在的众王之殿就是那个纪元遗留下的一座建筑。

translations.english: Windhelm is one of the oldest human cities in all of Tamriel. In fact, it was the capital of the First Empire, which was founded by Ysgramor
translations.chinese: 风舵城是泰姆瑞尔最古老的人类城市之一，也是伊斯格拉默建立的第一帝国的首都。

translations.english: And now, thanks to you, the city is back under the Empire's banner.
translations.chinese: 而现在，多亏了你，这座城市又重归帝国旗下了。

translations.english: Long ago, the Empire used the city to garrison troops who guarded the passes to Morrowind.
translations.chinese: 很久之前，帝国在此驻扎军队，守卫着通往晨风的关隘。

translations.english: You! You're the one who wiped out the Dark Brotherhood! All the guards are talking about it... You're a hero to us all!
translations.chinese: 你！是你消灭了黑暗兄弟会！所有卫兵都在谈论这件事……你是我们所有人的英雄啊！

agentText:

translations.english: I assure you, I'm prepared to make any deal.
translations.chinese: 我可以跟你保证，我这里什么交易都做。

translations.english: You'll find tonics, salves, poultices and potions on my shelves. Browse to your heart's content.
translations.chinese: 我的货架上有补品、药水、药膏。随意看看。

translations.english: I offer remedies for ailments both common and rare. Do let me know if I can be of service.
translations.chinese: 我这里常见病罕见病药方都有。如果需要帮忙尽管提。

translations.english: If there's anything I can help you with, you have but to ask.
translations.chinese: 如果需要帮忙尽管开口问。

translations.english: I sell cures for all ills, and I'll be happy to serve you.
translations.chinese: 我这里治什么病的药都有，乐意为你效劳。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3BFE]

translations.english: We have garrisons throughout all the provinces of the Empire. Our mission is to serve the Emperor, uphold the law, and protect the citizenry.
translations.chinese: 我们在帝国的各省都有驻军。我们的使命就是效忠皇帝、维护法律、保护公民。

translations.english: Skyrim's days are darkening, and the Legion will soon be called into service like never before. But we stand ready, as always, to meet that call.
translations.chinese: 天际的形势越发黯淡，军团将会被前所未有的迅速召集。我们一如既往做好了迎接征召的准备。

translations.english: Not sure I understand the question. The Legion's always been in Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 我不太明白你的问题。军团一直在天际。

translations.english: What's the Imperial Legion doing in Skyrim?
translations.chinese: 帝国军团在天际做什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3C55]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: We have garrisons throughout all the provinces of the Empire. Our mission is to serve the Emperor, uphold the law, and protect the citizenry. | ZH: 我们在帝国的各省都有驻军。我们的使命就是效忠皇帝、维护法律、保护公民。 | SID: 001BA5
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Skyrim's days are darkening, and the Legion will soon be called into service like never before. But we stand ready, as always, to meet that call. | ZH: 天际的形势越发黯淡，军团将会被前所未有的迅速召集。我们一如既往做好了迎接征召的准备。 | SID: 0057F0
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Not sure I understand the question. The Legion's always been in Skyrim. | ZH: 我不太明白你的问题。军团一直在天际。 | SID: 006B1D
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What's the Imperial Legion doing in Skyrim? | ZH: 帝国军团在天际做什么？ | SID: 00153F

translations.english: The sound of our fury is a storm about to break on the heads of our enemies. Our friendship, a cloak of true brotherhood for all who would wear it.
translations.chinese: 我们的狂怒之音就是冲溃敌人头脑的风暴。我们的友谊是友人身上真情实意的斗篷。

translations.english: At first they called us that to belittle our cause. But we gladly accept being named for Ulfric Stormcloak, the only true High King of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 首先，他们这样叫我们是为了贬低我们的事业。但我们很乐意接受以天际唯一的真正至高王乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷之名来命名自己。

translations.english: We are the true sons and daughters of Skyrim, and Ulfric... he's the truest of us all.
translations.chinese: 我们都是天际真正的儿女，而乌弗瑞克……他是我们中最纯正的。

translations.english: We fight to make our land great once more, to raise up strong, noble thanes, and lay low false Jarls and the cowards who hide behind them.
translations.chinese: 我们为了复兴自己的土地而战，要拥立强大、高贵的武卫们，打倒虚伪的领主和躲在他们背后的懦夫。

translations.english: Why are you called Stormcloaks?
translations.chinese: 你们为什么叫做风暴斗篷？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3C56]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: The sound of our fury is a storm about to break on the heads of our enemies. Our friendship, a cloak of true brotherhood for all who would wear it. | ZH: 我们的狂怒之音就是冲溃敌人头脑的风暴。我们的友谊是友人身上真情实意的斗篷。 | SID: 000109

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Why are you called Stormcloaks? | ZH: 你们为什么叫做风暴斗篷？ | SID: 0064A6

translations.english: If you are, then you make your way to Windhelm and talk to the man himself. If you're not, well friend, you'd best walk away before this gets ugly.
translations.chinese: 如果你是，那就去风舵城找他本人谈谈。如果不是，朋友，你最好赶紧走开，否则我就不客气了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3C57]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If you are, then you make your way to Windhelm and talk to the man himself. If you're not, well friend, you'd best walk away before this gets ugly. | ZH: 如果你是，那就去风舵城找他本人谈谈。如果不是，朋友，你最好赶紧走开，否则我就不客气了。 | SID: 0064B7

translations.english: The Legion's always looking for strong, capable warriors. If you think you've got what it takes, our headquarters is in Solitude.
translations.chinese: 军团一直在寻找强壮得力的战士。如果你觉得你能胜任，就到我们独孤城的总部去吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3C58]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The Legion's always looking for strong, capable warriors. If you think you've got what it takes, our headquarters is in Solitude. | ZH: 军团一直在寻找强壮得力的战士。如果你觉得你能胜任，就到我们独孤城的总部去吧。 | SID: 0064C2

translations.english: If you know any true sons and daughters of Skyrim, tell them to head to Windhelm. Ulfric Stormcloak wants to see them.
translations.chinese: 如果你知道哪里有真正的天际儿女，告诉他们去风舵城。乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷想见见他们。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3C59]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If you know any true sons and daughters of Skyrim, tell them to head to Windhelm. Ulfric Stormcloak wants to see them. | ZH: 如果你知道哪里有真正的天际儿女，告诉他们去风舵城。乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷想见见他们。 | SID: 003FB5

translations.english: If you're serious, make your way to Solitude. Our headquarters is Castle Dour. You find General Tulius there, commanding our forces in Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 如果你是认真的，就到独孤城去吧。我们的总部在阴郁堡。你在那里能见到总揽天际军事的图留斯将军。

translations.english: Honestly, the Legion can use all the able bodies it can muster. We have our hands full. A dead king, a rebellion, and now dragons? Skyrim's a mess.
translations.chinese: 老实说，军团现在需要能干的人。我们忙得不可开交了。国王被杀，叛乱爆发，现在还有龙？天际真是一团糟了。

translations.english: Think you've got the mettle, eh?
translations.chinese: 有勇气是吧？

translations.english: But talk to Legate Rikke. She handles the local recruiting.
translations.chinese: 但先去找瑞姬副官谈谈。她负责招募新兵的工作。

translations.english: How does one join the Imperial Legion?
translations.chinese: 如何加入帝国军团？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3C5A]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Honestly, the Legion can use all the able bodies it can muster. We have our hands full. A dead king, a rebellion, and now dragons? Skyrim's a mess. | ZH: 老实说，军团现在需要能干的人。我们忙得不可开交了。国王被杀，叛乱爆发，现在还有龙？天际真是一团糟了。 | SID: 0025D8

- INFO:RNAM | EN: How does one join the Imperial Legion? | ZH: 如何加入帝国军团？ | SID: 006494

translations.english: Ulfric's not running a social club. You don't join anything. Either you're a true son of Skyrim, or you're not.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克可不是开社交俱乐部的。除非你是真正的天际之子，否则就没法加入。

translations.english: How does one join the Stormcloaks?
translations.chinese: 怎么加入风暴斗篷？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3C5B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ulfric's not running a social club. You don't join anything. Either you're a true son of Skyrim, or you're not. | ZH: 乌弗瑞克可不是开社交俱乐部的。除非你是真正的天际之子，否则就没法加入。 | SID: 006492
- INFO:RNAM | EN: How does one join the Stormcloaks? | ZH: 怎么加入风暴斗篷？ | SID: 0077AA

translations.english: Ulfric's not running a social club. You don't join anything. Either you're a true daughter of Skyrim, or you're not.

translations.english: How does one join the Stormcloaks?

- INFO:RNAM | EN: How does one join the Stormcloaks? | ZH: 怎么加入风暴斗篷？ | SID: 008E74

translations.english: But rest assured, citizen. We'll put an end to this uprising... and things will get back to normal soon enough.
translations.chinese: 但请放心，公民。我们会平定这场叛乱……一切很快就会恢复正常的。

translations.english: The Nord kings - oh, excuse me, "Jarls" - they can't seem to control their own people. So the Legion has stepped in to keep order.
translations.chinese: 诺德的国王们，哦，抱歉，“领主”，他们似乎无法控制自己的人民。所以军团要介入进来维持秩序。

translations.english: Sadly, the Empire's stretched a little thin these days, and we've gotten very few reinforcements. So we've been forced to recruit locally.
translations.chinese: 遗憾的是，最近帝国人手有些不足，增援部队也很少。所以我们得在当地招募新兵。

translations.english: You mean Ulfric's so-called "Stormcloak rebellion"?
translations.chinese: 你是说乌弗瑞克所谓的“风暴斗篷叛乱”？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3C5D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: But rest assured, citizen. We'll put an end to this uprising... and things will get back to normal soon enough. | ZH: 但请放心，公民。我们会平定这场叛乱……一切很快就会恢复正常的。 | SID: 00018B
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: The Nord kings - oh, excuse me, "Jarls" - they can't seem to control their own people. So the Legion has stepped in to keep order. | ZH: 诺德的国王们，哦，抱歉，“领主”，他们似乎无法控制自己的人民。所以军团要介入进来维持秩序。 | SID: 004BA7
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Sadly, the Empire's stretched a little thin these days, and we've gotten very few reinforcements. So we've been forced to recruit locally. | ZH: 遗憾的是，最近帝国人手有些不足，增援部队也很少。所以我们得在当地招募新兵。 | SID: 0064A2
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: You mean Ulfric's so-called "Stormcloak rebellion"? | ZH: 你是说乌弗瑞克所谓的“风暴斗篷叛乱”？ | SID: 0064A4

translations.english: And we'll cleave through the Legion to get to them.
translations.chinese: 我们要撕裂军团的阵线抓到他们。

translations.english: Skyrim is the birthplace of humanity. The birthplace of honor. And those snowbacked Imperials renounced both when they laid down before the Thalmor.
translations.chinese: 天际是人类与荣誉的发源地。但那些软骨头的帝国人跪伏在梭默脚下的时候放弃了这两个东西。

translations.english: And what did Torygg do? He and the Jarls that supported him? They took the Emperor's gold. Sold out their people for a slave master's "peace treaty."
translations.chinese: 而托依格做了什么？支持他的领主做了什么？他们接受了皇帝的金子。把人民出卖给了一个奴隶主的“和平条约”。

translations.english: Ulfric did right killing him. Soon we'll rid Skyrim of elves, their bloody Justiciars, and the Jarls in their pockets. The whole damn lot of them.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克杀他杀得好。很快我们就要除掉天际的精灵、他们那群嗜血的审判者，还有支持他们的领主。除掉他们所有人。

translations.english: Worse still, to pay for the privilege to keep his throne, the Emperor sells Skyrim and our very gods - Talos, no less! - to the damn elves.
translations.chinese: 更糟糕的是，皇帝为了保住皇位，把天际和我们的神灵塔洛斯卖给了该死的精灵！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3C5E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [4/4] | EN: And we'll cleave through the Legion to get to them. | ZH: 我们要撕裂军团的阵线抓到他们。 | SID: 006499
- INFO:NAM1 [0/4] | EN: Skyrim is the birthplace of humanity. The birthplace of honor. And those snowbacked Imperials renounced both when they laid down before the Thalmor. | ZH: 天际是人类与荣誉的发源地。但那些软骨头的帝国人跪伏在梭默脚下的时候放弃了这两个东西。 | SID: 00649F
- INFO:NAM1 [2/4] | EN: And what did Torygg do? He and the Jarls that supported him? They took the Emperor's gold. Sold out their people for a slave master's "peace treaty." | ZH: 而托依格做了什么？支持他的领主做了什么？他们接受了皇帝的金子。把人民出卖给了一个奴隶主的“和平条约”。 | SID: 0091C0

translations.english: I asked the question because I was hoping you might be able to help me recover something I've lost.
translations.chinese: 回答这些是希望你能帮我找回我失去的东西。

translations.english: We also keep a constant vigil against those who practice the vile arts of necromancy.
translations.chinese: 我们也会时刻警惕那些使用死灵邪术的人。

translations.english: Priests of Arkay such as myself perform rites for the dead and sometimes console the bereaved.
translations.chinese: 像我这样的阿尔凯祭司会为死者举行仪式，有时也会去安慰逝者家属。

translations.english: Well, as I said, Arkay is the god of life and death. You'll find his temples and Halls of the Dead all across Tamriel.
translations.chinese: 嗯，我说过，阿尔凯是生死之神。你会发现他的神庙和亡者之厅遍布泰姆瑞尔。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3D5E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: I asked the question because I was hoping you might be able to help me recover something I've lost. | ZH: 回答这些是希望你能帮我找回我失去的东西。 | SID: 006485
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: We also keep a constant vigil against those who practice the vile arts of necromancy. | ZH: 我们也会时刻警惕那些使用死灵邪术的人。 | SID: 006489
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Priests of Arkay such as myself perform rites for the dead and sometimes console the bereaved. | ZH: 像我这样的阿尔凯祭司会为死者举行仪式，有时也会去安慰逝者家属。 | SID: 00648A
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Well, as I said, Arkay is the god of life and death. You'll find his temples and Halls of the Dead all across Tamriel. | ZH: 嗯，我说过，阿尔凯是生死之神。你会发现他的神庙和亡者之厅遍布泰姆瑞尔。 | SID: 00648B

translations.english: So be it. I'm sure Arkay will find it in his heart to forgive you... eventually.
translations.chinese: 那就这样吧。阿尔凯会发自内心的原谅你的。

translations.english: You're on your own, priest.
translations.chinese: 自求多福吧，祭司。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:RNAM | EN: You're on your own, priest. | ZH: 自求多福吧，祭司。 | SID: 006482

translations.english: I'll just wait here and make sure nothing foul escapes the catacombs.
translations.chinese: 我就在这里等着，确保没有什么肮脏的东西从地下墓穴跑出来。

translations.english: I'll find your amulet.
translations.chinese: 我去找你的护身符。

agentText:

- INFO:RNAM | EN: I'll find your amulet. | ZH: 我去找你的护身符。 | SID: 006481

translations.english: Tired of bread and stew? Had enough of fish and fowl? Treat yourself and your kin to a choice cut of steak or a tender rack of ribs!
translations.chinese: 吃腻了面包和炖菜？吃够了鱼肉鸡肉？买块上好的肉排犒劳犒劳一家人吧！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3D65]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Tired of bread and stew? Had enough of fish and fowl? Treat yourself and your kin to a choice cut of steak or a tender rack of ribs! | ZH: 吃腻了面包和炖菜？吃够了鱼肉鸡肉？买块上好的肉排犒劳犒劳一家人吧！ | SID: 00686A

translations.english: I heard you were at the wedding of the Emperor's cousin. In Solitude? Gods, that must have been horrible...
translations.chinese: 我听说你参加皇帝表妹的婚礼了。是在独孤吗？神啊，那一定很可怕……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: I heard the Gourmet is hiding out somewhere in Skyrim. You know, fella who wrote that cookbook.
translations.chinese: 我听说“美食家”就藏在天际的某个地方。就是那个写食谱的人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3D67]

translations.english: Oh, good. She'll listen to you, I just know it.
translations.chinese: 哦，太好了。我知道她会听你的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3DE0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, good. She'll listen to you, I just know it. | ZH: 哦，太好了。我知道她会听你的。 | SID: 00647B

translations.english: Oh, okay. I didn't think you'd help me. Nobody ever does.
translations.chinese: 哦，好。我没想过你会帮我。从来没人帮我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3DE1]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, okay. I didn't think you'd help me. Nobody ever does. | ZH: 哦，好。我没想过你会帮我。从来没人帮我。 | SID: 00034F

translations.english: What the...?!

agentText:

EDID: [000D3DE3]
Translations:

translations.english: Someone do something!
translations.chinese: 快来人管管！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3DE4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Someone do something! | ZH: 快来人管管！ | SID: 00AF25

translations.english: Die, you filthy beast!
translations.chinese: 去死吧，肮脏的畜生！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3DE5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Die, you filthy beast! | ZH: 去死吧，肮脏的畜生！ | SID: 0005DB

translations.english: Skyrim belongs to the Nords!
translations.chinese: 天际属于诺德人！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3DE6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Skyrim belongs to the Nords! | ZH: 天际属于诺德人！ | SID: 00998E

translations.english: Die, beast!
translations.chinese: 死吧，野兽！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3DE7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Die, beast! | ZH: 死吧，野兽！ | SID: 0078F2

translations.english: She's not from Markarth. The air about her screamed "outsider."
translations.chinese: 她不是马卡斯人。浑身上下都散发着“外来户”的气息。

translations.english: Visitors to the city usually stay at the Silver-Blood Inn.
translations.chinese: 来这座城市的游客大多数都住在银血旅店。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3E50]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Visitors to the city usually stay at the Silver-Blood Inn. | ZH: 来这座城市的游客大多数都住在银血旅店。 | SID: 006420

translations.english: I never knew much about Weylin, except he lives in the Warrens, like all the other workers.
translations.chinese: 我和韦林不熟，只知道他和其他工人一样住在窝棚区。

translations.english: He was one of the smelter workers. I used to have a job down there myself, casting silver ingots.
translations.chinese: 他是冶炼厂的工人。我以前也是在那里工作，负责铸造银锭。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3E51]

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: He was one of the smelter workers. I used to have a job down there myself, casting silver ingots. | ZH: 他是冶炼厂的工人。我以前也是在那里工作，负责铸造银锭。 | SID: 006423

translations.english: You want to walk away? Fine. But there's going to be no justice for that poor woman. No one to care what happened to her.
translations.chinese: 你想一走了之？好吧。可惜那女人的冤魂没有得到公平正义。没人在乎她的事。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3E52]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You want to walk away? Fine. But there's going to be no justice for that poor woman. No one to care what happened to her. | ZH: 你想一走了之？好吧。可惜那女人的冤魂没有得到公平正义。没人在乎她的事。 | SID: 00641D

translations.english: Please. I don't want to talk about it. All that blood.
translations.chinese: 拜托。我不想谈。太血腥了。

translations.english: If you want answers, ask at the inn. She told me she was staying there.
translations.chinese: 如果你想知道什么，去旅店吧。她告诉过我她住在那里。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3E53]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: If you want answers, ask at the inn. She told me she was staying there. | ZH: 如果你想知道什么，去旅店吧。她告诉过我她住在那里。 | SID: 00F906

translations.english: Did you need anything else?
translations.chinese: 还需要些别的吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3E54]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Did you need anything else? | ZH: 还需要些别的吗？ | SID: 006477

translations.english: Of course. But I can't just hand that over. Privacy, after all.
translations.chinese: 当然了。但我不能就这么交出来。毕竟涉及她的隐私。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3E55]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Of course. But I can't just hand that over. Privacy, after all. | ZH: 当然了。但我不能就这么交出来。毕竟涉及她的隐私。 | SID: 000AC9

translations.english: But somehow they're still here, and they're killing people.
translations.chinese: 但不知怎的，他们还在这里，依旧在杀人。

translations.english: They're remnants of the old rulers of Markarth. Natives of the Reach. Followers of the old ways.
translations.chinese: 他们是过去统治马卡斯的势力残余。瑞驰的原住民。古老信仰的追随者。

translations.english: The Nords drove them out of the city. Ulfric Stormcloak and his men. That was about 20 years ago.
translations.chinese: 诺德人把他们逐出了城市。乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷和他的手下。那已经是大概二十年前的事了。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: They're remnants of the old rulers of Markarth. Natives of the Reach. Followers of the old ways. | ZH: 他们是过去统治马卡斯的势力残余。瑞驰的原住民。古老信仰的追随者。 | SID: 00642C

translations.english: Well, you seem like the honest sort. Here you are.
translations.chinese: 好吧，你看着还算老实。给你吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3E57]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well, you seem like the honest sort. Here you are. | ZH: 好吧，你看着还算老实。给你吧。 | SID: 006469

translations.english: Right. You adventuring types would never go into a room just to steal everything.
translations.chinese: 得了吧。你们这种爱冒险的进了房间没个不偷东西的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3E58]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Right. You adventuring types would never go into a room just to steal everything. | ZH: 得了吧。你们这种爱冒险的进了房间没个不偷东西的。 | SID: 006C56

translations.english: Well, I guess Margret isn't around to complain. It's yours.
translations.chinese: 好吧，玛格丽特也没机会抱怨了。归你了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3E59]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well, I guess Margret isn't around to complain. It's yours. | ZH: 好吧，玛格丽特也没机会抱怨了。归你了。 | SID: 00A72E

translations.english: Sorry. Margret might be dead, but the room's rented.
translations.chinese: 抱歉。玛格丽特是死了，但房已租出不能更换。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3E5A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Sorry. Margret might be dead, but the room's rented. | ZH: 抱歉。玛格丽特是死了，但房已租出不能更换。 | SID: 00646C

translations.english: I swore I was going to just give up, for my child's sake, but it's like my father's ghost is haunting me. Asking me "Why?"
translations.chinese: 我曾经发誓要为孩子考虑，该放弃了。但我父亲的冤魂就像是在缠着我，问我，“为什么？”。

translations.english: He was killed. Guards said it was just a madman, but everyone knew the murderer was a member of the Forsworn.
translations.chinese: 他被杀了。卫兵说凶手是个疯子，但大家都知道他是个弃誓者。

translations.english: I've been trying to find out why ever since. Gotten nowhere so far, and then I got married. Have a child of my own on the way.
translations.chinese: 在那之后我就一直想找到原因。直到我婚也结了，娃也要生了，可还是没什么进展。

translations.english: Yes. It all started when I was a boy. My father owned one of the mines. Rare for anyone who isn't a Nord.
translations.chinese: 没错。一切始于我小时候。我父亲是矿场老板。在非诺德人里很罕见的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Yes. It all started when I was a boy. My father owned one of the mines. Rare for anyone who isn't a Nord. | ZH: 没错。一切始于我小时候。我父亲是矿场老板。在非诺德人里很罕见的。 | SID: 0088A2

translations.english: Changed your mind? Ready to find out the truth about Markarth?
translations.chinese: 改主意了？准备好揭开马卡斯的真相了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3E5C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Changed your mind? Ready to find out the truth about Markarth? | ZH: 改主意了？准备好揭开马卡斯的真相了吗？ | SID: 004513

translations.english: This has been going on for years. And all I've been able to find is murder and blood. I need help.
translations.chinese: 这种情况持续太多年了。我能找到的只有谋杀和血迹。我需要帮手。

translations.english: Please. You find out why that woman was attacked, who's behind Weylin and the Forsworn, and I'll pay you for any information you bring me.
translations.chinese: 拜托。请你找出那个女人被袭击的原因吧，揪出韦林和弃誓者的幕后黑手，任何信息我都愿意付钱的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3E5D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: This has been going on for years. And all I've been able to find is murder and blood. I need help. | ZH: 这种情况持续太多年了。我能找到的只有谋杀和血迹。我需要帮手。 | SID: 00DC14

translations.english: All right. I don't want any trouble. It's yours.
translations.chinese: 好吧。我不想惹麻烦。给你了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3E5E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: All right. I don't want any trouble. It's yours. | ZH: 好吧。我不想惹麻烦。给你了。 | SID: 006474

translations.english: Are you serious? I hear more threatening words from my wife.
translations.chinese: 你认真的？我妻子吓唬人比你强多了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3E5F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Are you serious? I hear more threatening words from my wife. | ZH: 你认真的？我妻子吓唬人比你强多了。 | SID: 0097F5

translations.english: I think she's sitting by the fire. Poor girl.
translations.chinese: 她应该正在火炉边坐着呢。可怜的女孩。

translations.english: Ah, yes. Rented the nicest room we had for a whole month.
translations.chinese: 啊，没错。把我们最好的房间租下了一个月。

translations.english: Does a woman named Margret stay here?
translations.chinese: 有个叫玛格丽特的女人住在这吗？

translations.chinese: 啊，没错。把我们最好的房间租下了一个月。

translations.english: Best we all forget about her. Bad luck to talk about the dead in Markarth.
translations.chinese: 我们最好还是忘了她吧。在马卡斯谈论死者不吉利。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Oh yeah. Pretty little thing. Been sitting by the fire all day.
translations.chinese: 哦，没错。挺漂亮的姑娘。在火炉边坐一整天了。

translations.english: Does a woman named Margret stay here?
translations.chinese: 有个叫玛格丽特的女人住在这吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3E62]
Translations:

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Does a woman named Margret stay here? | ZH: 有个叫玛格丽特的女人住在这吗？ | SID: 003A8A

translations.english: I remember her. Her stance. The way she walked. A trained warrior, no doubt.
translations.chinese: 我记得她。她行动坐卧的方式，一看就是个训练有素的战士。

translations.english: She had a room here. Might talk to the innkeeper about it.
translations.chinese: 她在这里租了间房。你应该去找老板谈谈。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3E63]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I remember her. Her stance. The way she walked. A trained warrior, no doubt. | ZH: 我记得她。她行动坐卧的方式，一看就是个训练有素的战士。 | SID: 000548

translations.english: Who? You mean that woman who was attacked in the market?
translations.chinese: 谁？你是说在市场被袭击的那个女的？

translations.english: Didn't know her. Guards dragged her body away. Last we'll hear of that.
translations.chinese: 不太熟。最后一次听说还是她尸体被卫兵拖走了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D3E64]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Who? You mean that woman who was attacked in the market? | ZH: 谁？你是说在市场被袭击的那个女的？ | SID: 00644D
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Didn't know her. Guards dragged her body away. Last we'll hear of that. | ZH: 不太熟。最后一次听说还是她尸体被卫兵拖走了。 | SID: 006E39

translations.english: Who? You mean that woman who was attacked in the market the other day?
translations.chinese: 谁？你是说几天前在市场被袭击的那个女的？

translations.english: Don't know her. Guards dragged that Forsworn's body away, though. Last we'll hear of that.
translations.chinese: 不太熟。上次听说还是卫兵把那个弃誓者的尸体拖走了。

translations.english: And me and Mila used to climb up on the roof of Dragonsreach and look for birds' eggs.
translations.chinese: 还经常和米拉爬到龙临宫的屋檐上掏鸟蛋。

translations.english: But I don't do that stuff anymore. Father keeps catching me and then I get in trouble.
translations.chinese: 但现在不干了。父亲总能抓到我，然后我就有麻烦了。

translations.english: Well, I used to sneak out at night and try to tip over the big ox in the Gray-Manes' yard.
translations.chinese: 嗯，我以前晚上会溜出去把灰鬃院子里的大牛弄翻。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Now now, fella. Let's not get too close to my new bride, eh?
translations.chinese: 诶诶，伙计。能别离我新娘太近吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.chinese: 哦。好吧，还是得谢谢你的努力。我得想办法去凑钱了。

translations.english: I don't know what to say. I didn't think anyone in Riften even cared what happened to me.
translations.chinese: 我不知道该说什么。我觉得裂谷城的人根本不在乎我的遭遇。

translations.english: By the Eight! You actually talked her into it?
translations.chinese: 八圣灵啊！你真的把她说服了？

translations.english: Look, I was saving this, but I wanted you to have it. I thought I might need it if Sapphire came for me, but I don't need it anymore.
translations.chinese: 那个，我本来想留着这个的，但我想给你。我以为如果蓝宝石再来找我，我可能会用得上，但现在不需要了。

translations.english: You're no longer in debt with Sapphire.
translations.chinese: 你不再欠蓝宝石的债了。

translations.chinese: 不想，那不能解释尺寸的问题。天啊，要是这些生物没逃出来就好了。

translations.chinese: 也许下一批药水应该多加些微光尘。应该能增加它们的抵抗力。

translations.english: Ah, no mere brute mercenary, but a thinker - perhaps even a scholar?
translations.chinese: 啊，你还不是个野蛮佣兵，是个会思考的啊，难不成是学者？

translations.english: But I began to search for information about dragons - where had they gone all those years ago? And where were they coming from?
translations.chinese: 但我开始搜寻关于龙族的信息，当初他们去哪了？他们又是从何而来？

translations.english: One sure mark of a fool is to dismiss anything that falls outside his experience as being impossible.
translations.chinese: 笨蛋的典型特征就是把一切自己经历以外的东西都当成假的。

translations.english: You see, when the stories of dragons began to circulate, many dismissed them as mere fantasies, rumors. Impossiblilities.
translations.chinese: 你看，当龙族的故事传开时，大多数人把它当成幻想、谣言或者瞎编乱造。

translations.chinese: 伊瑞莱斯，马上向河木镇派遣一个小队。

translations.english: Why, this very palace was built by one of Balgruuf's ancestors to hold a captive dragon. Hence its name - Dragonsreach.
translations.chinese: 比如，这座宫殿就是巴尔古夫的先祖建造的，用来囚禁一头龙。所以才被命名为“龙临”。

translations.english: Oh, no. Many were killed, of course. But many survived into historical times.
translations.chinese: 哦，并不。确实有很多被杀了。但还有许多幸存了下来，从神话时期进入了历史时期。

translations.chinese: 开门见山？省去那些繁琐的起因经过。我喜欢。把这些东西丢给上面的人考虑去吧？

translations.english: Succeed at this, and you'll be rewarded. Whiterun will be in your debt.
translations.chinese: 办好这件事，你就能拿到报酬。白漫也会欠你一个情。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D50CD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Enough! | ZH: 够了！ | SID: 0013DB

translations.english: Many of the monumental ruins that still dot the landscape were, in fact, built as temples to the dragons.
translations.chinese: 事实上如今点缀在天际大地上的许多遗迹都是为龙族建造的神庙。

translations.english: Far back in the Mythic Era, the dragons were worshipped as gods in Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 在遥远的神话纪元，龙族在天际被当做神明崇拜。

translations.english: But not anymore. The Dragon War was a real event, although only the barest glimmer of the actual events has come down to us.
translations.chinese: 但现在不是了。虽然如今只能模糊地知道个大概，但巨龙战争确实发生过。

translations.english: I'm not surprised you've never heard of it. Even I used to think it was just a myth.
translations.chinese: 你没听说过也很正常。连我过去都以为这就是个神话。

translations.english: The details are lost, but at some point the Nords rebelled. After a long and terrible war, the Nords overthrew their dragon overlords.
translations.chinese: 尽管细节不详，但诺德人确实在某一刻起兵反抗了。经过漫长残酷的战争，诺德人推翻了统治他们的龙族。

translations.chinese: 要找领主请到大殿去，他应该坐在那个领主宝座上，而不是在我的巫师实验室里瞎晃悠。

translations.chinese: 佛克瑞斯的领主会将其视为挑衅！他会觉得我们加入了乌弗瑞克的阵营准备进攻他。

translations.english: Well. Must preserve some professional secrets, mustn't we? I have my sources... reliable sources.
translations.chinese: 啊。我也得保守些职业秘密吧？我有属于个人的消息来源……可靠的来源。

translations.english: Alvor? The smith, isn't he? Reliable, solid fellow. Not prone to flights of fancy...
translations.chinese: 阿尔沃？那个铁匠？他可是个老实可靠的人。从不异想天开的……

translations.english: And you're sure Helgen was destroyed by a dragon? This wasn't some Stormcloak raid gone wrong?
translations.chinese: 你确定海尔根是被龙毁了？不是风暴斗篷突袭了那儿？

translations.english: Now... what did you say you wanted?
translations.chinese: 那……你刚才说你需要什么？

translations.english: My lord, we should send troops to Riverwood at once.

translations.english: Ah. Maybe you just want to know how to get there. It's near Riverwood, a miserable little village a few miles south of here.
translations.chinese: 啊。你可能只想知道怎么去吧。在河木镇附近，那是个离这不远的小穷村子。

translations.english: An old tomb, built by the ancient Nords, perhaps dating back to the Dragon War itself.
translations.chinese: 古诺德人建造的一座古老坟墓，或许能追溯到巨龙战争年代。

translations.english: I'm sure some of the locals can point you in the right direction once you get there.
translations.chinese: 我想你去了那边之后，当地人会给你指路的。

translations.english: What do you say now, Proventus? Shall we continue to trust in the strength of our walls? Against a dragon?
translations.chinese: 普罗万图斯，现在怎么说？我们还能继续指望靠城墙？去抵挡龙吗？

translations.english: I've got a good feeling about you. And I don't often get good feelings about anything. A warrior knows to trust her gut...
translations.chinese: 我一向对很多事不太看好。但我对你感觉不错。战士要相信自己的直觉……

translations.chinese: 我想你说的是真的。很好。

translations.chinese: 把法仁加要的石板带回来，我就欠你一个情了。

translations.chinese: 我不知道风舵谁有这东西。当然，除了我之外。

translations.english: They look like they were made with... well, the ancient Nords used these kinds of curved blades when they embalmed their dead.
translations.chinese: 它们看起来像是用……古诺德人用来给死者做防腐处理的那种小弯刀切出来的。

translations.english: The only unusual thing is the shape of the cuts.
translations.chinese: 唯一不寻常的就是伤口的形状了。

translations.english: I mean, someone who's not me, that is.
translations.chinese: 我指的是我以外的那个人。

translations.english: Sorry, was only joking with you.

translations.chinese: 等等，姑娘。这盔甲是不错，但成为夜莺？好像还没讨论过吧。

translations.english: Indirectly. The Trinity is usually selected from the ranks of the Guild although its existence is a closely-guarded secret.
translations.chinese: 间接算。三人组通常是从公会里挑选出来的，但其存在是被严格保密的。

translations.english: Yes. That's why we need to prepare ourselves and meet Mercer on equal footing.
translations.chinese: 是。所以我们要准备和墨瑟对等地见面。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D61DC]

translations.english: The Trinity disbanded twenty-five years ago when Mercer Frey betrayed us by slaying Gallus and dumping his body in the ruins of Snow Veil Sanctum.
translations.chinese: 二十五年前，墨瑟·弗雷背叛我们，杀死了加卢斯，并把他的尸体扔在了雪幔圣所遗迹里。三人组就这么散了。

translations.english: Gallus, Mercer Frey and I were once members of what's known as the Nightingale Trinity.
translations.chinese: 加卢斯、墨瑟·弗雷还有我都曾经是夜莺三人组的成员。

translations.english: To hold any hope of defeating Mercer, we must have Nocturnal at our backs.
translations.chinese: 想要有望击败墨瑟，我们必须有诺克图娜尔的帮助。

translations.english: If she's to accept you as one of her own, an arrangement must be struck.
translations.chinese: 想要她接受你成为一员，就必须达成协议。

translations.english: The Nightingales protect the temple of Nocturnal, a place known as the Twilight Sepulcher.
translations.chinese: 夜莺保护诺克图娜尔的神庙，那里被称为黄昏坟墓。

translations.english: This missive should convince him. Be aware soldier, these documents contain sensitive intelligence for the Jarl's eyes only.
translations.chinese: 这封信应该能说服他。士兵，听好，这里有些敏感情报只能交给领主看。

translations.english: We have it on good authority that Ulfric has raised enough men to attack the city of Whiterun. The Jarl, however, refuses the Legion's support.
translations.chinese: 我们有可靠的证据表明，乌弗瑞克已经集结了足够的兵力进攻白漫城。然而领主回绝了军团的支援。

translations.english: Legend has it that the crown is made from the bones and teeth of ancient dragons, and is said to increase the power of the wearer.
translations.chinese: 传说这顶王冠由古代的龙骨和九枚龙牙制成。据说可以增强佩戴者的力量。

translations.english: A legendary crown, dating back to King Harald's time, or before. A powerful relic of a golden age, long since passed.
translations.chinese: 一个传奇的王冠。可以追溯到哈拉尔德王乃至更早的时代。一个早已逝去的黄金时代所遗留的产物。

translations.english: Whatever the truth, if Ulfric get's his hands on it, it would be a powerful symbol around which to rally support for his cause.
translations.chinese: 不管真相如何，一旦乌弗瑞克拿到了它，就会变成为他事业争取更多支持的强大象征。

translations.english: But my agents report that Galmar is pretty damned convinced Korvanjund is the tomb of King Borgas.
translations.chinese: 据我的探子回报，加尔玛很确定科万琼德就是博加斯王的陵墓。

translations.english: I know Galmar. We fought in many wars together. He's not a sentimental man taken to fancy. If he believes the crown is there... he's likely found it.
translations.chinese: 我了解加尔玛。我们曾经并肩作战很久。他不是个感情用事的人。如果他坚信王冠在那儿……可能就已经找到了。

translations.english: Well, to be frank, we don't. Its location was lost with King Borgas, when the Great Hunt killed him while off on his Alessian campaigns.
translations.chinese: 好吧，坦白讲我们不知道。博加斯王在阿莱西亚战役中被大狩猎所杀之后，它的下落就是个谜。

translations.english: Supposedly, his body was brought back to Skyrim and secretly buried with the crown. Knowledge of that location was lost, in the Wars of Succession.
translations.chinese: 据说，他的尸体被运回了天际，和王冠一起被秘密安葬了。地点的消息在继承人战争中也消失了。

translations.english: We're backing Elisif. When the Moot meets, they'll do the sensible thing.
translations.chinese: 我们支持艾利西弗。当领主议会召开时，他们会做明智的事情。

agentText:

translations.english: We're backing Erikur. When the Moot meets, they'll do the sensible thing.
translations.chinese: 我们支持艾瑞库尔。当领主议会召开时，他们会做明智的事情。

translations.english: I trust you'll be finished with Fort Hraggstad soon?
translations.chinese: 我想你很快就搞定哈格斯塔德堡了吧？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D6613]

translations.english: I need someone I can trust to deliver a message of great import to Jarl Balgruuf of Whiterun.
translations.chinese: 我需要有个可靠的人给白漫的巴尔古夫领主送个重要消息。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: And we gave it to Erikur?
translations.chinese: 然后交给艾瑞库尔？

EDID: [000D6616]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And we gave it to Erikur? | ZH: 然后交给艾瑞库尔？ | SID: 00552A

translations.english: Hardly likely.
translations.chinese: 几乎不可能。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D6617]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hardly likely. | ZH: 几乎不可能。 | SID: 003C6A

translations.english: Just shut up and keep out of sight.
translations.chinese: 闭上嘴，别被看见。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D6619]
Translations:

translations.english: So I've let him run his little Forsworn rebellion from inside Cidhna Mine. Now he's out of control.
translations.chinese: 所以我容让了他在希讷矿场上进行的小小弃誓者叛乱。但现在他失控了。

translations.english: I offered him a stay from execution if he used his influence to deal with any annoyances that came up. Competitors, agents, idiots.
translations.chinese: 我给他判了缓刑，利用他的影响力来处理任何可能出现的麻烦。竞争对手、奸细、白痴。

translations.english: When their uprising was crushed, I had Madanach brought to me. He was a wild animal, but a useful one.
translations.chinese: 当他们的叛乱被镇压之后，我让人把迈德纳奇带回来了。他虽然是个不驯的野兽，但也很有用处。

translations.english: Or else what? You'll kill me? I already had to face that today.
translations.chinese: 否则什么？你还能杀了我？我早就做好准备面对了。

translations.english: Well then, look. Look all you want. And when you're done looking, maybe we can get some work done.

translations.chinese: 哎。是，奈波斯。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D6674]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hmph. Yes, Nepos. | ZH: 哎。是，奈波斯。 | SID: 006106

translations.english: So if you don't have any business. Leave.
translations.chinese: 如果你没有什么事，请离开吧。

translations.english: If you must know, I'm the maid. And the master of the house is old and needs his rest.
translations.chinese: 如果非得说的话，我是女仆。房主年纪大了，需要休息。

translations.english: You're finding it. That's bad enough.
translations.chinese: 你已经找了。现在已经够糟了。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.chinese: 抱歉，但你不是这里的人。

EDID: [000D6677]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Sorry, but you don't exactly belong here. | ZH: 抱歉，但你不是这里的人。 | SID: 0060CE

translations.english: Madanach. The King in Rags.
translations.chinese: 迈德纳奇。人称“褴褛国王”。

translations.english: While we were off fighting the Elves in the Great War, Madanach was busy ruling over the Reach.
translations.chinese: 当我们忙于在浩大战争对抗精灵时，迈德纳奇趁乱夺了瑞驰。

translations.english: Until Ulfric came and put them down.
translations.chinese: 直到乌弗瑞克到来将他们击败。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D6678]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Until Ulfric came and put them down. | ZH: 直到乌弗瑞克到来将他们击败。 | SID: 007ECC

translations.english: Rather not talk. I have to head back to Cyrodiil soon.
translations.chinese: 不聊了。我马上得回希罗帝尔去。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D6679]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Rather not talk. I have to head back to Cyrodiil soon. | ZH: 不聊了。我马上得回希罗帝尔去。 | SID: 00604D

translations.english: What did you expect? That no one was going to notice you butting into business that wasn't yours?
translations.chinese: 不然呢？你以为没人注意到你插手与你无关的事了吗？

translations.english: Markarth is my city. You have no right looking into my business. Now get out.
translations.chinese: 马卡斯是我的城市。你无权调查。滚吧。

translations.english: The guards know who holds the purse strings in this city, and I don't like snoops.
translations.chinese: 卫兵们都知道谁才是这个城市的主人，我不喜欢人四处乱打探。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D667B]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You'll listen to this. | ZH: 你会听的。 | SID: 00A409

translations.chinese: 闭嘴。只有神灵才配审判我。你是想知道弃誓者的真面目？

translations.english: This is a private home, and the master of the house is a very old man. He's not to be disturbed.
translations.chinese: 这里是私宅，房主年纪很大了。请不要打扰他。

translations.chinese: 只是来旅游。我在这里办点事。就这样。

translations.english: My prison. The source of half the silver in Skyrim. The most secure prison in Tamriel.
translations.chinese: 我的监狱。天际一半银矿的来源。也是全泰姆瑞尔最牢靠的监狱。

translations.english: No one escapes. I thought keeping Madanach down there would keep him under control.
translations.chinese: 没人能够逃脱。我以为把迈德纳奇关在那里就能控制住他了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D6680]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: No one escapes. I thought keeping Madanach down there would keep him under control. | ZH: 没人能够逃脱。我以为把迈德纳奇关在那里就能控制住他了。 | SID: 00CBC2

translations.english: They're my puppets. I have their "king" rotting in Cidhna Mine.
translations.chinese: 他们是我的木偶。我让他们的“王”在希讷矿场里服刑。

translations.english: He was supposed to keep them under control.
translations.chinese: 他本应该控制得了他们的。

translations.english: It's an old family. Very well-respected throughout the Reach.
translations.chinese: 这是个古老的家族。在整个瑞驰都备受尊重。

translations.english: And of course, they own Cidhna Mine, the finest prison and source of silver in Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 当然，他们还拥有希讷矿场，天际最好的监狱和最大的白银产地。

translations.english: The Silver-Bloods run nearly all the lands in this Hold, as well as the local inn.
translations.chinese: 银血家族几乎控制了全领的土地，还有这里的旅店。

translations.english: For one, the landowners of the Reach. It goes without saying that they rely heavily on us for our silver and support.
translations.chinese: 首先，是瑞驰的地产主。不用说，他们非常依赖于我们的银矿和支持。

translations.english: Nepos the Nose handles that part of our business. He has a way with the workers.
translations.chinese: “大鼻子”奈波斯负责这部分工作。他对付工人很有一套。

translations.english: All the miners, farmers, and laborers in the Reach get their daily wages through us.
translations.chinese: 瑞驰的所有矿工、农民还有劳工都是通过我们获取每日的薪水。

translations.english: Every other day, seems one of the laborers runs off in the hills saying he'll join the Forsworn.
translations.chinese: 每隔几天，都会有工人跑到山上说要加入弃誓者。

translations.english: You don't like the Nords? Fine. But pledging your whole life to killing them? That's just dumb.
translations.chinese: 你不喜欢诺德？无所谓。但你咬牙跺脚非杀他们？那就是蠢。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: You don't like the Nords? Fine. But pledging your whole life to killing them? That's just dumb. | ZH: 你不喜欢诺德？无所谓。但你咬牙跺脚非杀他们？那就是蠢。 | SID: 0060A0

translations.english: I'm sorry about my housekeeper. She's a little protective of me.
translations.chinese: 我代我的管家道歉。她只是想要保护我。

translations.english: Now, what is it you want?
translations.chinese: 好了，你想要什么？

translations.english: I'm one of General Tullius's agents. I was sent to investigate the Treasury House and the Silver-Blood family.
translations.chinese: 我是图留斯将军派来的间谍。我的任务是调查珍宝屋和银血家族。

translations.english: Mark my words. Thonar Silver-Blood was behind that attack in the market. Somehow.
translations.chinese: 记住我的话。托纳尔·银血就是那次市场袭击的幕后黑手。至少某种程度上是。

translations.english: They own Cidhna Mine, one of the toughest jails in Skyrim. I was hoping I could buy or steal the deed, but I don't think that's how things work here.
translations.chinese: 他们坐拥希讷矿场，全天际最好的监狱。我本希望买或偷到那里的地契，但我发现这里的规矩不是那样的。

translations.english: Someone who doesn't like you asking questions.
translations.chinese: 一个不喜欢你四处打听的人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D6687]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Someone who doesn't like you asking questions. | ZH: 一个不喜欢你四处打听的人。 | SID: 00621F

translations.english: Well fought, ya swinging bit of skeever bait.
translations.chinese: 打得好，你打得不错。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D6688]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well fought, ya swinging bit of skeever bait. | ZH: 打得好，你打得不错。 | SID: 00CFDE

translations.english: Oh, yes. Weylin. Bastard could have at least gone crazy after we made our silver quota.
translations.chinese: 哦，没错。韦林啊。那混蛋至少应该在我们达到生产目标之后再发疯。

agentText:

translations.english: Go... go right ahead then. Don't let me keep you.
translations.chinese: 那……请进吧。我就不耽误您了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D668A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Go... go right ahead then. Don't let me keep you. | ZH: 那……请进吧。我就不耽误您了。 | SID: 0091E0

translations.english: I must have misheard you. Did you say you were leaving?
translations.chinese: 我一定是听错了。你是说要走了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D668B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I must have misheard you. Did you say you were leaving? | ZH: 我一定是听错了。你是说要走了吗？ | SID: 00616C

translations.english: Laborers. The sick. The lame. We're all here.
translations.chinese: 劳工、病鬼、瘸子。我们这些人都在这里。

translations.english: It's where you go if you can't afford a room anywhere else. About the time they opened the mines, someone got the idea to throw beds in here.
translations.chinese: 如果你住不起别的地方，那就来这里。他们开矿的时候，有人提议在这里铺几张床。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: It's where you go if you can't afford a room anywhere else. About the time they opened the mines, someone got the idea to throw beds in here. | ZH: 如果你住不起别的地方，那就来这里。他们开矿的时候，有人提议在这里铺几张床。 | SID: 0060C3

translations.english: I'm afraid he's asked to not be disturbed. He has important business.
translations.chinese: 恐怕不行，他说过别去打扰他。他有要事处理。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D668D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm afraid he's asked to not be disturbed. He has important business. | ZH: 恐怕不行，他说过别去打扰他。他有要事处理。 | SID: 005848

translations.english: Funny.
translations.chinese: 有意思。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D668E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Funny. | ZH: 有意思。 | SID: 00A415

translations.english: What are you doing here? I told them no visitors.
translations.chinese: 你在这里做什么？我告诉过他们不接待访客。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D668F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What are you doing here? I told them no visitors. | ZH: 你在这里做什么？我告诉过他们不接待访客。 | SID: 006179

translations.english: You were seen coming in. The girl at the door is a Forsworn agent masquerading as a maid.
translations.chinese: 我看到你进来了。门口那女孩是伪装成女仆的弃誓者间谍。

translations.english: You aren't the first one to have gotten this far. You won't be the last.
translations.chinese: 你不是第一个走到这一步的人。但也不会是最后一个。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D6690]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You were seen coming in. The girl at the door is a Forsworn agent masquerading as a maid. | ZH: 我看到你进来了。门口那女孩是伪装成女仆的弃誓者间谍。 | SID: 004589
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: You aren't the first one to have gotten this far. You won't be the last. | ZH: 你不是第一个走到这一步的人。但也不会是最后一个。 | SID: 00D60F

translations.english: No. I'm telling you. There was no other reason.
translations.chinese: 不。我跟你说。没什么别的原因。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D6691]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No. I'm telling you. There was no other reason. | ZH: 不。我跟你说。没什么别的原因。 | SID: 00D0FC

translations.english: Thank you. The Eight keep you.
translations.chinese: 谢谢。八圣灵保佑你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D6692]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Thank you. The Eight keep you. | ZH: 谢谢。八圣灵保佑你。 | SID: 00CFDD

translations.english: Damn Madanach. Damn his Forsworn backside.
translations.chinese: 该死的迈德纳奇。这群天杀的弃誓者。

translations.english: My wife. They killed her.
translations.chinese: 我的妻子。被他们杀了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D6693]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Damn Madanach. Damn his Forsworn backside. | ZH: 该死的迈德纳奇。这群天杀的弃誓者。 | SID: 00618F
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: My wife. They killed her. | ZH: 我的妻子。被他们杀了。 | SID: 006190

translations.english: Now don't get all upset. Here. Take it.
translations.chinese: 没必要生气。给。拿去吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D6694]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Now don't get all upset. Here. Take it. | ZH: 没必要生气。给。拿去吧。 | SID: 000791

translations.english: And I wasn't stuttering. No key.
translations.chinese: 我不是个结巴。也没有钥匙。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D6695]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And I wasn't stuttering. No key. | ZH: 我不是个结巴。也没有钥匙。 | SID: 0060DB

translations.english: Get of my house. Now.
translations.chinese: 滚出我的房子。马上。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D6696]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Get of my house. Now. | ZH: 滚出我的房子。马上。 | SID: 0061B9

translations.english: Because my king told me to. Madanach. When the uprising fell at the hands of the Nords, they threw him in the mines.
translations.chinese: 这是我王迈德纳奇的指示。自从起义失败被擒，他们就把他关进了矿场。

translations.english: I don't know how, but he lives. I get his messages, and I hand out his orders without question.
translations.chinese: 我不知道是怎么回事，但他活了下来，我收到了他的信息，然后坚决地传达他的命令。

translations.english: But he hands all the paperwork over to Nepos the Nose to finish. That old man's back is heavy with burden.
translations.chinese: 但他把这里的所有文书都交给“大鼻子”奈波斯来管了。那个老家伙的负担很重。

translations.english: What? No. Thonar Silver-Blood owns it. He owns everything in Markarth.
translations.chinese: 什么？不是。这是托纳尔·银血的产业。他拥有马卡斯的一切。

translations.english: When the uprising fell at the hands of the Nords, they threw him in the mines. I don't know how, but he lives.
translations.chinese: 起义最后败于诺德人之手，他们把他扔进了矿场。我不知道是什么原因，但他活了下来。

translations.english: A monster? No. I'm just a servant. To my king, Madanach.
translations.chinese: 怪物？不。我只是个仆人。服务于我王，迈德纳奇。

translations.english: Little extra slip of paper for Weylin. Took it right to his room after he got it.
translations.chinese: 有人给了韦林一张小纸条。他拿着就回房间去了。

translations.english: For that amount, I can. Fine. I did notice something odd last time we handed out the pay.
translations.chinese: 这么多钱，那也不是不可以了。好吧。上次发工资的时候确实有些奇怪。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D669C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Little extra slip of paper for Weylin. Took it right to his room after he got it. | ZH: 有人给了韦林一张小纸条。他拿着就回房间去了。 | SID: 006083
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: For that amount, I can. Fine. I did notice something odd last time we handed out the pay. | ZH: 这么多钱，那也不是不可以了。好吧。上次发工资的时候确实有些奇怪。 | SID: 006084

translations.english: No.
translations.chinese: 不。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D669D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No. | ZH: 不。 | SID: 00607E

translations.english: You've been digging around where you don't belong.
translations.chinese: 你一直在打听不该自己管的事。

translations.english: It's time you learned a lesson.
translations.chinese: 是时候给你上一课了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D669E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You've been digging around where you don't belong. | ZH: 你一直在打听不该自己管的事。 | SID: 0060E1
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: It's time you learned a lesson. | ZH: 是时候给你上一课了。 | SID: 007CF6

translations.english: Nepos is in charge. That's all I know.
translations.chinese: 奈波斯是主使。我只知道这些。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D669F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Nepos is in charge. That's all I know. | ZH: 奈波斯是主使。我只知道这些。 | SID: 00ED7D

translations.english: I guess someone else will be taking his room, now.
translations.chinese: 现在大概有其他人入住他的房间了。

translations.english: Oh yes. I know everyone who sleeps in the Warrens. Kind of the one who passes the keys around.
translations.chinese: 知道。窝棚区所有住户我都熟。这里负责发钥匙的就是我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66A0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I guess someone else will be taking his room, now. | ZH: 现在大概有其他人入住他的房间了。 | SID: 000AA4
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Oh yes. I know everyone who sleeps in the Warrens. Kind of the one who passes the keys around. | ZH: 知道。窝棚区所有住户我都熟。这里负责发钥匙的就是我。 | SID: 0060CA

translations.english: Good work. Here's your gold. I have a feeling Nepos gets his own orders, though. If you find out, I'll have more for you.
translations.chinese: 干得好。这是你的金币。但我觉得奈波斯也是听命于别人的。如果有什么发现，我会付更多给你。

translations.english: Nepos the Nose? He's been in Markarth forever. And he's well-respected among the natives of the Reach.
translations.chinese: “大鼻子”奈波斯？他一直住在马卡斯。他在瑞驰原住民里很受尊敬的。

translations.english: For the Forsworn!
translations.chinese: 为了弃誓者！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66A2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: For the Forsworn! | ZH: 为了弃誓者！ | SID: 006ABD

translations.english: Let's go!
translations.chinese: 我们走！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66A3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Let's go! | ZH: 我们走！ | SID: 00C9FA

translations.english: We haven't been expecting you, and the old man needs his rest. Come back some other time.
translations.chinese: 我们没有会客的安排，老人家需要休息。改天再来吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66A4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We haven't been expecting you, and the old man needs his rest. Come back some other time. | ZH: 我们没有会客的安排，老人家需要休息。改天再来吧。 | SID: 00125E

translations.english: Fine. You want to know what the Forsworn really are?
translations.chinese: 好吧。你想知道弃誓者到底是什么吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66A5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Fine. You want to know what the Forsworn really are? | ZH: 好吧。你想知道弃誓者到底是什么吗？ | SID: 00476F

translations.english: They're crazy. Think they rule the Reach.
translations.chinese: 他们都是疯子。总是想着统治瑞驰。

translations.english: That answer your damn questions? Now get out.
translations.chinese: 这个答案能回答你的破问题了吧？滚吧。

translations.english: Well guess who really runs things around here? Me. I own the mines. I make the coin pass to the right hands.
translations.chinese: 但猜猜这里到底谁说了算？是我。我拥有矿场。我会花钱找得力的人来帮助。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66A6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: They're crazy. Think they rule the Reach. | ZH: 他们都是疯子。总是想着统治瑞驰。 | SID: 006185
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: That answer your damn questions? Now get out. | ZH: 这个答案能回答你的破问题了吧？滚吧。 | SID: 00A7A5
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Well guess who really runs things around here? Me. I own the mines. I make the coin pass to the right hands. | ZH: 但猜猜这里到底谁说了算？是我。我拥有矿场。我会花钱找得力的人来帮助。 | SID: 00D849

translations.english: Now get out of my house!
translations.chinese: 滚出我的宅子！

translations.english: You already got what you wanted, you damn hound. This is your fault.
translations.chinese: 你已经得到你想要的了，你这该死的猎狗。都是你的错。

translations.english: You and Madanach are animals, and I'll see you both rot to death in Cidhna Mine for this.
translations.chinese: 你和迈德纳奇都是禽兽，我要看着你俩在希讷矿场烂掉。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66A7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Now get out of my house! | ZH: 滚出我的宅子！ | SID: 009202
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: You already got what you wanted, you damn hound. This is your fault. | ZH: 你已经得到你想要的了，你这该死的猎狗。都是你的错。 | SID: 009517
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: You and Madanach are animals, and I'll see you both rot to death in Cidhna Mine for this. | ZH: 你和迈德纳奇都是禽兽，我要看着你俩在希讷矿场烂掉。 | SID: 00E20D

translations.english: Hmph.
translations.chinese: 嗯。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66A8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hmph. | ZH: 嗯。 | SID: 006092

translations.english: Not much. One moment I was buying a necklace, and the rest is just a blur.
translations.chinese: 不太多。我当时正在买项链，剩下的什么都不知道了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66A9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Not much. One moment I was buying a necklace, and the rest is just a blur. | ZH: 不太多。我当时正在买项链，剩下的什么都不知道了。 | SID: 006031

translations.english: No you're not. You want to know what the Forsworn really are?
translations.chinese: 用不着。你不就是想知道弃誓者的真面目吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66AA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No you're not. You want to know what the Forsworn really are? | ZH: 用不着。你不就是想知道弃誓者的真面目吗？ | SID: 00A787

translations.english: You heard him. Go on in.
translations.chinese: 你听到了。进去吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66AB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You heard him. Go on in. | ZH: 你听到了。进去吧。 | SID: 0042D3

translations.english: Then Ulfric and his men came. Those of us who didn't run were executed, except for myself, my king, and a handful of others.
translations.chinese: 然后乌弗瑞克带着军队来了。我们中没有逃跑的都被处决了，除了我，我王，还有其他几个。

translations.english: But then during their war with the elves, we had our moment. We drove the Nords out of the Reach in a great uprising.
translations.chinese: 但在他们和精灵大战的时候，我们找到了机会。在一次伟大的起义中，我们把诺德人赶出了瑞驰。

translations.english: Markarth and the Reach are our lands. That is why we are the Forsworn. We cannot claim the home that is rightly ours.
translations.chinese: 马卡斯和瑞驰是我们的土地。这就是为什么我们成了弃誓者。我们连本应属于自己的家园都不能宣称。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66AC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Then Ulfric and his men came. Those of us who didn't run were executed, except for myself, my king, and a handful of others. | ZH: 然后乌弗瑞克带着军队来了。我们中没有逃跑的都被处决了，除了我，我王，还有其他几个。 | SID: 00613D
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: But then during their war with the elves, we had our moment. We drove the Nords out of the Reach in a great uprising. | ZH: 但在他们和精灵大战的时候，我们找到了机会。在一次伟大的起义中，我们把诺德人赶出了瑞驰。 | SID: 006140
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Markarth and the Reach are our lands. That is why we are the Forsworn. We cannot claim the home that is rightly ours. | ZH: 马卡斯和瑞驰是我们的土地。这就是为什么我们成了弃誓者。我们连本应属于自己的家园都不能宣称。 | SID: 006142

translations.english: All from inside Cidhna Mine. A Nord prison. The irony is quite thick.
translations.chinese: 都是来自希讷矿场内。诺德的监狱。多么讽刺啊。

translations.english: He is the King in Rags. A man who once held all the Reach within his grip.
translations.chinese: “褴褛王”。曾经掌控整个瑞驰的人。

translations.english: He stokes the passions of the downtrodden in this city. Directs them to kill the enemies of the Forsworn in our name.
translations.chinese: 他激发了全城被压迫者的激情。指挥他们以我们的名义杀死弃誓者的敌人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66AD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: All from inside Cidhna Mine. A Nord prison. The irony is quite thick. | ZH: 都是来自希讷矿场内。诺德的监狱。多么讽刺啊。 | SID: 006131
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: He is the King in Rags. A man who once held all the Reach within his grip. | ZH: “褴褛王”。曾经掌控整个瑞驰的人。 | SID: 00613B
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: He stokes the passions of the downtrodden in this city. Directs them to kill the enemies of the Forsworn in our name. | ZH: 他激发了全城被压迫者的激情。指挥他们以我们的名义杀死弃誓者的敌人。 | SID: 00B474

translations.english: You want Garvey. He handles the keys for the Warrens. About the only thing that disease-riddled native is good for.
translations.chinese: 去找加维吧。他管着窝棚区的钥匙。这个病鬼土著唯一的一点用处了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66AE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You want Garvey. He handles the keys for the Warrens. About the only thing that disease-riddled native is good for. | ZH: 去找加维吧。他管着窝棚区的钥匙。这个病鬼土著唯一的一点用处了。 | SID: 00B552

translations.english: Trust is hard to come by here, but all right.
translations.chinese: 在这里取信于他人很难，但没关系。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66AF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Trust is hard to come by here, but all right. | ZH: 在这里取信于他人很难，但没关系。 | SID: 0060D3

translations.english: No. It's not. Trust me.
translations.chinese: 不。不行。也请相信我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66B0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No. It's not. Trust me. | ZH: 不。不行。也请相信我。 | SID: 004204

translations.english: Was is that obvious? Damn. I must be losing my touch.
translations.chinese: 这么明显吗？该死。我肯定是露出马脚了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66B1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Was is that obvious? Damn. I must be losing my touch. | ZH: 这么明显吗？该死。我肯定是露出马脚了。 | SID: 006037

translations.english: No. I'm not.
translations.chinese: 不。我没有。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66B2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No. I'm not. | ZH: 不。我没有。 | SID: 006035

translations.english: The Warrens isn't a place for your type. What do you want?
translations.chinese: 窝棚不是你这种人该来的地方。你想干什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66B3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The Warrens isn't a place for your type. What do you want? | ZH: 窝棚不是你这种人该来的地方。你想干什么？ | SID: 006EC3

translations.english: Warrens ain't for you. Trust me.
translations.chinese: 窝棚不适合你。相信我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66B4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Warrens ain't for you. Trust me. | ZH: 窝棚不适合你。相信我。 | SID: 000076

translations.english: You don't want to be here. No one wants to.
translations.chinese: 你不会想待在这儿。没人愿意。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66B5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You don't want to be here. No one wants to. | ZH: 你不会想待在这儿。没人愿意。 | SID: 0081C4

translations.english: Don't know anyone here doesn't have Rattles or Ataxia.
translations.chinese: 我不知道这里还谁没得过颤抖症或者运动失调。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66B6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Don't know anyone here doesn't have Rattles or Ataxia. | ZH: 我不知道这里还谁没得过颤抖症或者运动失调。 | SID: 00EE42

translations.english: My dear boy, what makes you think you're getting out of here alive?
translations.chinese: 好孩子，你以为还能活着出去吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66B7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: My dear boy, what makes you think you're getting out of here alive? | ZH: 好孩子，你以为还能活着出去吗？ | SID: 00A5EA

translations.english: My dear girl, what makes you think you're getting out of here alive?
translations.chinese: 好孩子，你以为还能活着出去吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66B8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: My dear girl, what makes you think you're getting out of here alive? | ZH: 好孩子，你以为还能活着出去吗？ | SID: 006125

translations.english: No. I was just buying jewelry for my sister in Cyrodiil. I've never even seen that man before.
translations.chinese: 不。我只是在给住在希罗帝尔的妹妹买珠宝。我从来没见过那个人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66B9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No. I was just buying jewelry for my sister in Cyrodiil. I've never even seen that man before. | ZH: 不。我只是在给住在希罗帝尔的妹妹买珠宝。我从来没见过那个人。 | SID: 006023

translations.english: Oh, I'm sorry to keep you. Head right in.
translations.chinese: 哦，抱歉耽搁您了。请进。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66BA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, I'm sorry to keep you. Head right in. | ZH: 哦，抱歉耽搁您了。请进。 | SID: 00D68F

translations.english: No. He isn't.
translations.chinese: 不，他没说过。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66BB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No. He isn't. | ZH: 不，他没说过。 | SID: 00A768

translations.english: Whatever you want to know, I don't care. I run a smelter. That's it.
translations.chinese: 不管你想知道什么，我都不在乎。我只负责冶炼厂。就这样。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66BC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Whatever you want to know, I don't care. I run a smelter. That's it. | ZH: 不管你想知道什么，我都不在乎。我只负责冶炼厂。就这样。 | SID: 007FA9

translations.english: What? By the gods, Betrid....
translations.chinese: 什么？神啊，贝垂德……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66BD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What? By the gods, Betrid.... | ZH: 什么？神啊，贝垂德…… | SID: 00A966

translations.english: Wait. It's okay, my dear. Send him in.
translations.chinese: 等等。没关系的，亲爱的。请他进来吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66BE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Wait. It's okay, my dear. Send him in. | ZH: 等等。没关系的，亲爱的。请他进来吧。 | SID: 000994

translations.english: Wait. It's okay, my dear. Send her in.
translations.chinese: 等等。没关系的，亲爱的。请她进来吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66BF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Wait. It's okay, my dear. Send her in. | ZH: 等等。没关系的，亲爱的。请她进来吧。 | SID: 006105

translations.english: I doubt he'll be free, but all right.
translations.chinese: 我觉得他一会儿也不一定有空，不过没关系。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66C0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I doubt he'll be free, but all right. | ZH: 我觉得他一会儿也不一定有空，不过没关系。 | SID: 006173

translations.english: You're not one of my workers. What are you doing here?
translations.chinese: 你不是我的工人。来这里做什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66C1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're not one of my workers. What are you doing here? | ZH: 你不是我的工人。来这里做什么？ | SID: 001B23

translations.english: You. I've seen you snooping around. Asking questions.
translations.chinese: 你。我看到你在四处打探。你哪来这么多问题。

translations.english: Back off. You don't want to know what happens to troublemakers here.
translations.chinese: 躲远点吧。你不会想知道在这里制造麻烦的下场。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66C2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You. I've seen you snooping around. Asking questions. | ZH: 你。我看到你在四处打探。你哪来这么多问题。 | SID: 005D84
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Back off. You don't want to know what happens to troublemakers here. | ZH: 躲远点吧。你不会想知道在这里制造麻烦的下场。 | SID: 006059

translations.english: You've been warned, outsider.
translations.chinese: 我已经警告过你了，外来者。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66C3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You've been warned, outsider. | ZH: 我已经警告过你了，外来者。 | SID: 006056

translations.english: I don't know how, but he lives. I get his messages, and I hand out his orders without question.
translations.chinese: 我不知道是怎么回事，但他活了下来，我收到了他的信息，然后坚决地传达他的命令。

translations.english: My king. Madanach. When the uprising fell at the hands of the Nords, they threw him in the mines.
translations.chinese: 我王迈德纳奇。自从起义失败被擒，他们就把他关进了矿场。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66C4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I don't know how, but he lives. I get his messages, and I hand out his orders without question. | ZH: 我不知道是怎么回事，但他活了下来，我收到了他的信息，然后坚决地传达他的命令。 | SID: 006116
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: My king. Madanach. When the uprising fell at the hands of the Nords, they threw him in the mines. | ZH: 我王迈德纳奇。自从起义失败被擒，他们就把他关进了矿场。 | SID: 006117

translations.english: You hard of hearing? I run this smelter. And I'm late meeting our silver quota. What do you want?
translations.chinese: 你耳朵不好使？我负责管理冶炼厂。我们的生产配额快完不成了。你想干什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66C5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You hard of hearing? I run this smelter. And I'm late meeting our silver quota. What do you want? | ZH: 你耳朵不好使？我负责管理冶炼厂。我们的生产配额快完不成了。你想干什么？ | SID: 000988

translations.english: Welcome to the Warrens.
translations.chinese: 欢迎来到窝棚区。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66C6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Welcome to the Warrens. | ZH: 欢迎来到窝棚区。 | SID: 0060D7

translations.english: No, I don't think so.
translations.chinese: 我不这么认为。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66C7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No, I don't think so. | ZH: 我不这么认为。 | SID: 0060D6

translations.english: You've been warned.
translations.chinese: 记住我的警告。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66C8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You've been warned. | ZH: 记住我的警告。 | SID: 00606E

translations.english: Little extra slip of paper for Weylin. Took it right to his room.
translations.chinese: 有人给了韦林一张小纸条。他拿着就回房间去了。

translations.english: Hold, on there. I think I just remembered something. The last time we handed out pay.
translations.chinese: 慢着。我刚想起来个事儿。就是上次发工资的时候。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66C9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Little extra slip of paper for Weylin. Took it right to his room. | ZH: 有人给了韦林一张小纸条。他拿着就回房间去了。 | SID: 001FA0

translations.english: I was sent by Nepos the Nose. The old man hands out the orders.
translations.chinese: 是大鼻子奈波斯派我来的。那老头下的令。

translations.english: He told me to make sure you didn't get in the way. That's all I know, I swear!
translations.chinese: 他让我教训你不要碍事。我只知道这些，我发誓！

translations.english: Talk, or I send you to the gods.
translations.chinese: 快说，不然送你去和神聊聊。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66CB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I was sent by Nepos the Nose. The old man hands out the orders. | ZH: 是大鼻子奈波斯派我来的。那老头下的令。 | SID: 00ADAD

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Talk, or I send you to the gods. | ZH: 快说，不然送你去和神聊聊。 | SID: 00CFFB

translations.english: That's what I thought.
translations.chinese: 我也是这么想。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66CD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That's what I thought. | ZH: 我也是这么想。 | SID: 007FB5

translations.english: Damn. Another body to get rid of.
translations.chinese: 该死。又有尸体要处理了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D66CE]

translations.english: Now get out.
translations.chinese: 滚吧。

translations.english: This is my business. My city. You Empire lovers should learn to stay out of it.
translations.chinese: 这是我的事业。我的城市。你们这群帝国支持者应该学会置身事外。

translations.chinese: 这是说好的报酬。沿着这条线索查下去吧。你会发现更多的。

translations.chinese: 好吧。上次发工资的时候我确实注意到了些事情。有人给韦林一张小纸条。他拿到之后直接回房间去了。

translations.english: You want Thonar Silver-Blood. He handles all the family business.
translations.chinese: 你说的是托纳尔·银血吧。他主持家族的全部事务。

translations.english: Bah. Another honest man lost in all this madness. And for what?
translations.chinese: 呸。又一个好人被逼疯了。有什么好说的？
