translations.english: Oh, Cicero takes care of our Lady's body. Oils it, preserves it, keeps it safe. Makes sure nobody disrespects our Matron's coffin.
translations.chinese: 哦，西塞罗负责照看夫人的身体。给它上油、保养，守护它的安全。保证无人能够亵渎母亲的圣棺。

translations.english: What are the duties of a Keeper?
translations.chinese: 守护者的职责是什么？

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D6757]

translations.chinese: 然后在他的荣耀下，杀了他们。

translations.english: What? Who is the Night Mother?
translations.chinese: 什么？夜母是谁？

translations.english: You of course know that the Night Mother is our Unholy Matron. The undying spirit of a great woman who birthed the children of Sithis.
translations.chinese: 你肯定知道夜母是我们的不洁主母。她是伟大女性的不朽灵魂，为西帝斯生下了孩子。

translations.english: Oh! Oh, you jest! You jest with gullible Cicero!
translations.chinese: 哦！哦，你在开玩笑！你在耍笑老实的西塞罗！

translations.english: Such was my... honor. As Keeper.
translations.chinese: 这是我作为守护者的……荣耀。

translations.english: The Night Mother's crypt in Bravil was... desecrated. The Imperial Province is ravaged by strife. Nowhere there is safe, at present.
translations.chinese: 夜母在布拉维尔的墓穴被……亵渎了。帝国省当时战火纷飞，没有安全的地方。

translations.english: So Cicero brought our Lady to her new home. Here! This is the only Sanctuary left in all of Skyrim, you see.
translations.chinese: 所以西塞罗就带着母亲来到了新家。这里！这里是天际唯一的避难所。

translations.chinese: 你为什么到圣所来？

translations.chinese: 在神殿中礼拜的人有时也会获得神的恩惠。

translations.english: I should think so! I'm well used to taking care of a house and the folk living in it.
translations.chinese: 没错！我习惯了照顾一所房子和住在里面的人。

translations.english: I just hope I can do right by the good folk who are looking to us to see to their needs.
translations.chinese: 我只是希望我能善待那些需要我们满足他们的好人。

translations.english: Taking care of the entire hold is another matter entirely. It would be a big enough job without the war on and the dragons about.
translations.chinese: 但照顾好一个领地就是另一回事了。就算没有战争和龙族那工作量也够大了。

translations.english: Just don't expect us to at your back when Maven has your head on the executioner's block.
translations.chinese: 但等玛雯把你脑袋按在行刑台上的时候，别指望我们救你。

translations.english: Look, this sounds like a family matter and I don't want the Guild in the middle of it. You do what you want.
translations.chinese: 听着，这应该是家族私事，我不想让公会搅和进去。你想做什么随意。

translations.english: So Sibbi finally got the nerve to bare his teeth, eh?
translations.chinese: 所以西比终于鼓起勇气冲玛雯呲牙了？

translations.chinese: 黑血掠夺者……太招眼了。我不想让人觉得黑血帮太过大胆。

translations.chinese: 你为这个位面做出的贡献超乎你的想象。波特玛复活……一想到这个我就不寒而栗。

translations.chinese: 我们得快点找到索拉德！

translations.english: He made the mistake of supporting the Stormcloaks, and it cost him. Bitter news for his family, but a fate they should've expected.
translations.chinese: 他错误地选择支持风暴斗篷，为此付出了代价。对他的家人来说确实不幸，但这也是他们应该料到的命运。

translations.english: Haven't you heard it by now?
translations.chinese: 你还没听到吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D6CC1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: He made the mistake of supporting the Stormcloaks, and it cost him. Bitter news for his family, but a fate they should've expected. | ZH: 他错误地选择支持风暴斗篷，为此付出了代价。对他的家人来说确实不幸，但这也是他们应该料到的命运。 | SID: 005F2B

translations.english: It's enough for me to know that he's out there somewhere, and not locked up like an animal in a cage.
translations.chinese: 我只要知道他在某处，不是像个畜生一样被关在笼子里就足够了。

translations.english: No, nor do I expect to. Would be too dangerous for now.
translations.chinese: 没有，也不指望了。现在太危险了。

translations.chinese: 没有，也不指望了。现在太危险了。

translations.english: It's enough for me to know that they're out there somewhere, and together again.
translations.chinese: 只要我只道他们还在某处，又重新团聚，就足够了。

translations.english: Have you heard from your sons?
translations.chinese: 你有你儿子们的消息吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D6CC3]

translations.english: Locked him up someplace to get back at my family. I'm sure of it.
translations.chinese: 把他关在什么地方来报复我们家。我敢肯定。

translations.english: They knew Thorald supported the Stormcloaks, knew he was going to aid them in battle. Made sure he didn't come back.
translations.chinese: 他们知道索拉德支持风暴斗篷，知道他去参军了。肯定会把他抓起来。

translations.english: The Battle-Borns. The Emperor's biggest boot-lickers here in Whiterun.
translations.chinese: 战狂，是白漫城里皇帝最大的马屁精。

translations.english: Their connections to the Empire and the Legion are well-known. When Thorald didn't return home, there was no question in my mind.
translations.chinese: 他们和帝国还有军团的联系人所共知。索拉德没回来，我第一反应就是他们干的。

agentText:

translations.chinese: 灰鬃又想把责任推到别人身上。

translations.english: And yet they want to heap the fault on my family's good name? Bah.
translations.chinese: 他们还想把一切都推到我们家的名誉上？我呸。

translations.chinese: 尽我所能让我的家人安息。

translations.chinese: 之后？也许就待在这里吧。我在来的路上看见一些好猎物，我想在附近待一会儿。

translations.english: The Companions are the oldest, most honored band of warriors in Skyrim. Whiterun was built around their hall, Jorrvaskr.

translations.english: I wish I could believe that I'd have held out forever against their torture, but I can't be so sure.
translations.chinese: 我希望我能一直抗住他们的折磨，但我又不那么确定。

translations.english: Gods, I've lost count of the days. It feels like an age has passed.

translations.chinese: 他们想要让我认罪。都是些无关紧要的事，他们就是想让我承认。

translations.english: I'm not sure. At first they accused me of being a Stormcloak, a secret Talos worshipper...
translations.chinese: 不知道。一开始他们指责我是风暴斗篷和塔洛斯的秘密信徒……

translations.english: I gave them no such pleasure.

translations.english: I think they wanted to break me. Use me as a way to get to the rest of the Gray-Mane family.
translations.chinese: 我觉得他们是想击垮我。好利用我去接近灰鬃家的其他人。

translations.english: Ulfric Stormcloak. Jarl of Windhelm.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷。风舵城领主。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D763F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ulfric Stormcloak. Jarl of Windhelm. | ZH: 乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷。风舵城领主。 | SID: 0046E3

translations.english: Lokir of Rorikstead.
translations.chinese: 洛利克镇的洛克尔。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D7648]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Lokir of Rorikstead. | ZH: 洛利克镇的洛克尔。 | SID: 005EAF

translations.english: Do vah kiin!
translations.chinese: 都 瓦 克因！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D766E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Do vah kiin! | ZH: 都 瓦 克因！ | SID: 005E51

translations.english: By all accounts the Stormcloaks are suffering just as badly. Even Ulfric might see the sense of a truce under these conditions.
translations.chinese: 大家都说风暴斗篷一样承受了严重损失。乌弗瑞克也应该看到休战的意义。

translations.english: You may have a point. It's getting difficult to even move troops around without attracting a dragon attack.
translations.chinese: 你说的有道理。想要在不引起巨龙攻击的情况下移动军队越发困难了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D766F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: By all accounts the Stormcloaks are suffering just as badly. Even Ulfric might see the sense of a truce under these conditions. | ZH: 大家都说风暴斗篷一样承受了严重损失。乌弗瑞克也应该看到休战的意义。 | SID: 0010A0
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You may have a point. It's getting difficult to even move troops around without attracting a dragon attack. | ZH: 你说的有道理。想要在不引起巨龙攻击的情况下移动军队越发困难了。 | SID: 005E62

translations.english: I'll be the judge of that. Besides, by all reports the Stormcloaks are suffering just as much as we are from these dragon attacks.
translations.chinese: 这应该由我进行判断。另外，风暴斗篷也在遭受巨龙袭击。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D7670]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'll be the judge of that. Besides, by all reports the Stormcloaks are suffering just as much as we are from these dragon attacks. | ZH: 这应该由我进行判断。另外，风暴斗篷也在遭受巨龙袭击。 | SID: 00F1BD

translations.english: Has he? I suppose he doesn't want to miss a chance to bluster about the Empire's many crimes.
translations.chinese: 是吗？我看他是不想错过任何鼓吹帝国犯下众多罪行的机会。

translations.english: He's probably hoping I'll refuse so he can blame the Empire for being unreasonable. I think I'll have to disappoint him yet again.
translations.chinese: 他可能希望我会拒绝，这样他就能责备帝国无理取闹了。看起来我得让他失望了。

translations.english: Ulfric has already agreed to attend.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克已经答应参加。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D7671]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Has he? I suppose he doesn't want to miss a chance to bluster about the Empire's many crimes. | ZH: 是吗？我看他是不想错过任何鼓吹帝国犯下众多罪行的机会。 | SID: 00004D
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: He's probably hoping I'll refuse so he can blame the Empire for being unreasonable. I think I'll have to disappoint him yet again. | ZH: 他可能希望我会拒绝，这样他就能责备帝国无理取闹了。看起来我得让他失望了。 | SID: 006F05
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Ulfric has already agreed to attend. | ZH: 乌弗瑞克已经答应参加。 | SID: 005E86

translations.english: Hmm. You may have a point. I'm always surprised by how seriously the Nords take these things.
translations.chinese: 嗯。你说的有理。我总是很惊奇诺德人对这些东西的重视程度。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D7672]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hmm. You may have a point. I'm always surprised by how seriously the Nords take these things. | ZH: 嗯。你说的有理。我总是很惊奇诺德人对这些东西的重视程度。 | SID: 004CD9

translations.english: There must be another way. The risk is too great.
translations.chinese: 一定还有别的方法。这个风险太大了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D7674]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: There must be another way. The risk is too great. | ZH: 一定还有别的方法。这个风险太大了。 | SID: 008DAA

translations.english: They are getting to be a problem. But I wasn't sent to Skyrim to fight dragons.
translations.chinese: 他们确实是个问题。但我被派来不是为了和龙族战斗的。

translations.english: My job is to quell this rebellion, and I intend to do just that, dragons or no dragons.
translations.chinese: 我的职责是平定叛乱。无论有没有龙，我都会这么做。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D7676]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: They are getting to be a problem. But I wasn't sent to Skyrim to fight dragons. | ZH: 他们确实是个问题。但我被派来不是为了和龙族战斗的。 | SID: 003D96
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: My job is to quell this rebellion, and I intend to do just that, dragons or no dragons. | ZH: 我的职责是平定叛乱。无论有没有龙，我都会这么做。 | SID: 00B7AB

translations.english: Deliver the message to the warring parties. If they will listen, I will do what I can to bring them to terms.
translations.chinese: 向交战双方传达消息。如果他们愿意听从，我会尽所能促成停战。

translations.english: Are you ready to host the peace council?
translations.chinese: 你准备好主持和平会议了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D767A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Deliver the message to the warring parties. If they will listen, I will do what I can to bring them to terms. | ZH: 向交战双方传达消息。如果他们愿意听从，我会尽所能促成停战。 | SID: 006BC1
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Are you ready to host the peace council? | ZH: 你准备好主持和平会议了吗？ | SID: 00E983

translations.english: I have the greatest respect for the Greybeards, of course. And the dragon attacks are a growing plague.
translations.chinese: 诚然，我十分敬重灰胡子。巨龙的袭扰也日益严重。

translations.english: I can't afford to appear weak. I can't agree to this unless Tullius himself will be there.
translations.chinese: 我不能示人以弱。除非图留斯亲自到场，否则我不会同意。

translations.english: But the political situation is still delicate. Not all the Jarls are fully committed to supporting me as High King.
translations.chinese: 但时局仍旧微妙。并不是所有领主都全力支持我成为至高王。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D767D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I have the greatest respect for the Greybeards, of course. And the dragon attacks are a growing plague. | ZH: 诚然，我十分敬重灰胡子。巨龙的袭扰也日益严重。 | SID: 00A35F
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I can't afford to appear weak. I can't agree to this unless Tullius himself will be there. | ZH: 我不能示人以弱。除非图留斯亲自到场，否则我不会同意。 | SID: 00ABF3
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: But the political situation is still delicate. Not all the Jarls are fully committed to supporting me as High King. | ZH: 但时局仍旧微妙。并不是所有领主都全力支持我成为至高王。 | SID: 00DBF7

translations.english: No!
translations.chinese: 不！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D767E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No! | ZH: 不！ | SID: 00A31B

translations.english: But I don't understand. Why let a dragon into the heart of my city when we've been working so hard to keep them out?
translations.chinese: 但我还是不懂。为什么要把龙放进城市中心，我们可是一直在尽力防范它们啊？

translations.english: Of course. You already saved Whiterun from that dragon. I owe you a great deal.
translations.chinese: 当然。你从巨龙手中拯救了白漫城。我欠你的太多了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D767F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: But I don't understand. Why let a dragon into the heart of my city when we've been working so hard to keep them out? | ZH: 但我还是不懂。为什么要把龙放进城市中心，我们可是一直在尽力防范它们啊？ | SID: 005E55
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Of course. You already saved Whiterun from that dragon. I owe you a great deal. | ZH: 当然。你从巨龙手中拯救了白漫城。我欠你的太多了。 | SID: 005E59

translations.english: I'm sorry, but I can't do it. We'll just have to keep fighting the dragons as best we can.
translations.chinese: 抱歉。我做不到。我们需要尽全力和龙族战斗。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D7680]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm sorry, but I can't do it. We'll just have to keep fighting the dragons as best we can. | ZH: 抱歉。我做不到。我们需要尽全力和龙族战斗。 | SID: 005E54

translations.english: I don't need you to teach me how to play high politics in Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 不用你教我怎么在天际玩高级政治。

translations.english: But... you're right. There's nothing to be gained by refusing the Greybeards' request.
translations.chinese: 但……你说得对。拒绝灰胡子的要求没有好处。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D7681]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I don't need you to teach me how to play high politics in Skyrim. | ZH: 不用你教我怎么在天际玩高级政治。 | SID: 005EA5
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: But... you're right. There's nothing to be gained by refusing the Greybeards' request. | ZH: 但……你说得对。拒绝灰胡子的要求没有好处。 | SID: 00AFF1

translations.english: You speak truly, Dragonborn. Sometimes the grubby business of politics clouds my eyes.
translations.chinese: 你说的对，龙裔。有时候肮脏的政治遮蔽了我的双眼。

translations.english: Besides, it will be good to see High Hrothgar again.
translations.chinese: 而且，能再去一次霍斯加修道院也好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D7682]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You speak truly, Dragonborn. Sometimes the grubby business of politics clouds my eyes. | ZH: 你说的对，龙裔。有时候肮脏的政治遮蔽了我的双眼。 | SID: 005E9E
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Besides, it will be good to see High Hrothgar again. | ZH: 而且，能再去一次霍斯加修道院也好。 | SID: 00FA35

translations.english: True. A pause to consolidate our gains would be useful. And the Empire can afford to look magnanimous in victory.
translations.chinese: 确实。暂时停战可以巩固我们的成果。帝国可以在胜利时显得宽宏大量。

translations.english: The best time to negotiate is from a position of strength.
translations.chinese: 处于有利地位是谈判的最佳时机。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D7683]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: True. A pause to consolidate our gains would be useful. And the Empire can afford to look magnanimous in victory. | ZH: 确实。暂时停战可以巩固我们的成果。帝国可以在胜利时显得宽宏大量。 | SID: 005E71
- INFO:RNAM | EN: The best time to negotiate is from a position of strength. | ZH: 处于有利地位是谈判的最佳时机。 | SID: 001A6A

translations.english: But, as you say, these negotiations may offer a chance for his supporters to gracefully return to the Imperial fold.
translations.chinese: 但你说的对。谈判可能会给他的支持者一个优雅回归帝国的机会。

translations.english: Ulfric's insurrection has reached its high tide. Soon enough the rebel Jarls will realize what it means to oppose the Empire.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克的叛乱已经到达高潮。反叛的领主很快就会意识到反抗帝国意味着什么。

translations.english: Neither side is making much headway. What's the harm in talking to Ulfric?
translations.chinese: 双方没有大进展。跟乌弗瑞克谈谈有什么坏处？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D7684]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: But, as you say, these negotiations may offer a chance for his supporters to gracefully return to the Imperial fold. | ZH: 但你说的对。谈判可能会给他的支持者一个优雅回归帝国的机会。 | SID: 00023C
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Ulfric's insurrection has reached its high tide. Soon enough the rebel Jarls will realize what it means to oppose the Empire. | ZH: 乌弗瑞克的叛乱已经到达高潮。反叛的领主很快就会意识到反抗帝国意味着什么。 | SID: 005E6A
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Neither side is making much headway. What's the harm in talking to Ulfric? | ZH: 双方没有大进展。跟乌弗瑞克谈谈有什么坏处？ | SID: 0054A3

translations.english: But... we could use the breathing space to regroup.
translations.chinese: 但……我们可以利用这个喘息机会重新整合。

translations.english: I think you overestimate Ulfric's chances. He's stretched himself too thin.
translations.chinese: 我想你高估了乌弗瑞克的机会。他把自己搞的太紧了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D7685]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: But... we could use the breathing space to regroup. | ZH: 但……我们可以利用这个喘息机会重新整合。 | SID: 002AAC
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I think you overestimate Ulfric's chances. He's stretched himself too thin. | ZH: 我想你高估了乌弗瑞克的机会。他把自己搞的太紧了。 | SID: 005E66

translations.english: Even Tullius may be forced to talk sense in the face of such a threat.
translations.chinese: 图留斯在这种威胁下也不得不讲道理。

translations.english: Alduin? The World-Eater of song and legend? If that's true... well, it changes the situation doesn't it?
translations.chinese: 奥杜因？传说中的世界吞噬者？如果是真的……那情况就变了，不是吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D7689]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Even Tullius may be forced to talk sense in the face of such a threat. | ZH: 图留斯在这种威胁下也不得不讲道理。 | SID: 005E96
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Alduin? The World-Eater of song and legend? If that's true... well, it changes the situation doesn't it? | ZH: 奥杜因？传说中的世界吞噬者？如果是真的……那情况就变了，不是吗？ | SID: 005E97

translations.english: Alduin? The World-Eater of song and legend? If that's true, we're all doomed anyway.
translations.chinese: 奥杜因？传说中的世界吞噬者？如果是真的，那我们都得完蛋。

translations.english: And if it isn't true... well, then the fight to free Skyrim goes on. Either way, I don't see the use in talking to the Empire.
translations.chinese: 但如果不是真的……那解放天际的战斗不会停下。不管怎样，我看不出跟帝国谈话有什么用。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D768A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Alduin? The World-Eater of song and legend? If that's true, we're all doomed anyway. | ZH: 奥杜因？传说中的世界吞噬者？如果是真的，那我们都得完蛋。 | SID: 005E95
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: And if it isn't true... well, then the fight to free Skyrim goes on. Either way, I don't see the use in talking to the Empire. | ZH: 但如果不是真的……那解放天际的战斗不会停下。不管怎样，我看不出跟帝国谈话有什么用。 | SID: 0089B1

translations.english: I need your help. I need to trap a dragon in your palace.
translations.chinese: 我需要你的帮助。我要在你的宫殿里抓捕一头龙。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D768B]
Translations:
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I need your help. I need to trap a dragon in your palace. | ZH: 我需要你的帮助。我要在你的宫殿里抓捕一头龙。 | SID: 00E7F5

translations.english: I believe I'll stay here and bask in Eldergleam's warmth a bit longer.
translations.chinese: 我还想在这里多待会儿，享受古光树的温暖。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D769F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I believe I'll stay here and bask in Eldergleam's warmth a bit longer. | ZH: 我还想在这里多待会儿，享受古光树的温暖。 | SID: 004FBC

translations.english: But even if you could get to the Eldergleam, you couldn't tap it. Not with any normal metal.
translations.chinese: 但即使你找到了古光树，也伤不到它分毫。任何寻常武器都不行。

translations.english: I think if we had some of the sap from the parent tree, we could wake up its child.
translations.chinese: 如果能从母树那里获取一点汁液，我们就能唤醒它的子树。

translations.english: I've thought about that... Trees like this never really die. They only slumber.
translations.chinese: 我想过了……这样的树是不会死的。只是沉睡了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D76A0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: But even if you could get to the Eldergleam, you couldn't tap it. Not with any normal metal. | ZH: 但即使你找到了古光树，也伤不到它分毫。任何寻常武器都不行。 | SID: 000BF9
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I think if we had some of the sap from the parent tree, we could wake up its child. | ZH: 如果能从母树那里获取一点汁液，我们就能唤醒它的子树。 | SID: 005E12
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I've thought about that... Trees like this never really die. They only slumber. | ZH: 我想过了……这样的树是不会死的。只是沉睡了。 | SID: 00EAEC

translations.english: You should take it to Whiterun. Danica will want to see that the true blessings of nature lie in renewal, not a slavish maintenance.
translations.chinese: 你应该拿着它返回白漫城。丹尼卡肯定会希望看到的，大自然真正的祝福在于更新，而非一味地维持。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D76A1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You should take it to Whiterun. Danica will want to see that the true blessings of nature lie in renewal, not a slavish maintenance. | ZH: 你应该拿着它返回白漫城。丹尼卡肯定会希望看到的，大自然真正的祝福在于更新，而非一味地维持。 | SID: 005E44

translations.english: Kynareth gives life, and we need a living tree to be her symbol.
translations.chinese: 凯娜瑞丝赋予生命，我们需要一棵活树来作为她的象征。

translations.english: A big dead tree isn't very inspiring if you're coming to worship the divine of wind and rains.
translations.chinese: 如果你是来朝拜风雨圣灵，那一棵大死树是鼓舞不了人心的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D76A2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Kynareth gives life, and we need a living tree to be her symbol. | ZH: 凯娜瑞丝赋予生命，我们需要一棵活树来作为她的象征。 | SID: 005E09
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: A big dead tree isn't very inspiring if you're coming to worship the divine of wind and rains. | ZH: 如果你是来朝拜风雨圣灵，那一棵大死树是鼓舞不了人心的。 | SID: 008417

translations.english: You're right. It's mine.
translations.chinese: 你说得对。这怪我。

translations.english: I thank you. And may Kynareth's soft rains fall before you.
translations.chinese: 谢谢你。愿凯娜瑞丝的柔雨沐浴你。

translations.english: I may not live to see this little one grow into a new Gildergreen, but I can be remembered as the woman who planted it.
translations.chinese: 我也许不能活着看到这棵小树长成新的镀绿树了，但大家会记得我是种下它的人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D76A3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: You're right. It's mine. | ZH: 你说得对。这怪我。 | SID: 005C33
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I thank you. And may Kynareth's soft rains fall before you. | ZH: 谢谢你。愿凯娜瑞丝的柔雨沐浴你。 | SID: 005E3B
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I may not live to see this little one grow into a new Gildergreen, but I can be remembered as the woman who planted it. | ZH: 我也许不能活着看到这棵小树长成新的镀绿树了，但大家会记得我是种下它的人。 | SID: 005E3D

translations.english: The sap is precious. It can restore barren fields or bring life to rocks. I can use it to repair the Gildergreen, so we can worship properly again.
translations.chinese: 那树液很是珍贵。能够恢复贫瘠的土壤，或是给岩石带去生命。我们可以用它来修复镀绿树，这样我们就可以正常的礼拜了。

translations.english: It's an old tree. Very old. They say it was a seedling when the first men were arriving from Atmora, thousands of years ago.
translations.chinese: 那是一株古树了。年代很久远。传说是几千年前第一批从阿特莫拉来到这里的人们带来的一株幼苗。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D76A5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: The sap is precious. It can restore barren fields or bring life to rocks. I can use it to repair the Gildergreen, so we can worship properly again. | ZH: 那树液很是珍贵。能够恢复贫瘠的土壤，或是给岩石带去生命。我们可以用它来修复镀绿树，这样我们就可以正常的礼拜了。 | SID: 005E38

translations.english: It's held in a Hagraven nest called Orphan Rock.
translations.chinese: 它应该就藏在一个叫孤儿岩的乌鸦鬼婆巢穴里。

translations.english: Your spirit is strong. Kynareth's winds will guide your path.
translations.chinese: 你的精神很好。凯娜瑞丝之风会指引你的道路。

translations.english: Eldergleam is older than metal, from a time before men or elves. To even affect it, you have to tap into the old magic.
translations.chinese: 古光树比金属还要古老，远在人类与精灵之前。想要影响它，就必须用古老的魔法。

translations.english: It's called "Nettlebane." The hags terrify me, or I would have gone after it myself.
translations.chinese: 名为“刺草之祸”。鬼婆太吓人了，否则我就亲自去找了。

translations.english: You'll have to deal with the Hagravens. I've heard about a weapon they've made for sacrificing Spriggans.
translations.chinese: 你得去对付乌鸦鬼婆。我听说他们利用献祭木灵制造了一种武器。
